    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """
    connected: bool = False
    connection_id: str = ""
    messages: List[UIMessage] = field(default_factory=list)
    is_typing: bool = False
    agent_status: str = "ready"
    settings_open: bool = False
    current_emotion: str = "neutral"
    xp_total: int = 0
    rank: str = "INITIATE"


class ResponseLengthConfig:
    """
    Configuration for response length control.

    # BEGIN META: ResponseLengthConfig
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Control output verbosity and response length
    # SRS: ["SRS-RESPONSE-001"]
    # Tags: ["response", "length", "verbosity"]
    # Categories: ["UI"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """

    # Preset configurations
    PRESETS: Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]] = {
        "concise": {
            "max_tokens": 150,
            "temperature": 0.7,
            "system_suffix": "Keep responses brief and to the point.",
            "description": "Short, focused responses",
        },
        "balanced": {
            "max_tokens": 500,
            "temperature": 0.8,
            "system_suffix": "",
            "description": "Standard response length",
        },
        "detailed": {
            "max_tokens": 1500,
            "temperature": 0.8,
            "system_suffix": "Provide thorough, detailed explanations.",
            "description": "Comprehensive, detailed responses",
        },
        "elongated": {
            "max_tokens": 4000,
            "temperature": 0.85,
            "system_suffix": "Provide extensive, in-depth explanations with examples, context, and thorough coverage of the topic. Include relevant background information and explore multiple aspects.",
            "description": "Extended, comprehensive responses with full context",
        },
        "maximum": {
            "max_tokens": 8000,
            "temperature": 0.9,
            "system_suffix": "Provide the most comprehensive response possible. Include extensive detail, multiple examples, thorough explanations, related concepts, potential implications, and any relevant context that would be helpful.",
            "description": "Maximum detail and coverage",
        },
    }

    def __init__(self, preset: str = "balanced"):
        """Initialize with preset."""
        self.preset = preset
        self.config = self.PRESETS.get(preset, self.PRESETS["balanced"]).copy()
        self.custom_max_tokens: Optional[int] = None
        self.custom_suffix: Optional[str] = None

    def set_preset(self, preset: str):
        """Set response length preset."""
        if preset in self.PRESETS:
            self.preset = preset
            self.config = self.PRESETS[preset].copy()
            self.custom_max_tokens = None
            self.custom_suffix = None

    def set_custom(self, max_tokens: int, suffix: str = ""):
        """Set custom response length configuration."""
        self.preset = "custom"
        self.custom_max_tokens = max_tokens
        self.custom_suffix = suffix

    @property
    def max_tokens(self) -> int:
        """Get current max tokens."""
        return self.custom_max_tokens or self.config.get("max_tokens", 500)

    @property
    def system_suffix(self) -> str:
        """Get system prompt suffix."""
        return self.custom_suffix if self.custom_suffix is not None else self.config.get("system_suffix", "")

    @property
    def temperature(self) -> float:
        """Get temperature."""
        return self.config.get("temperature", 0.8)

    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Convert to dictionary."""
        return {
            "preset": self.preset,
            "max_tokens": self.max_tokens,
            "system_suffix": self.system_suffix,
            "temperature": self.temperature,
        }


# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# SECTION 26.2: WEBSOCKET CHAT SERVER
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

class AgentChatServer:
    """
    WebSocket-based chat server for agent UI.

    # BEGIN META: AgentChatServer
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Serve WebSocket chat interface for real-time agent interaction
    # SRS: ["SRS-UI-001", "SRS-UI-002"]
    # Pattern: SubstrateChat WebSocket pattern
    # Tags: ["websocket", "server", "chat", "ui"]
    # Categories: ["UI"]
    # KnowledgeSectors: ["Web Development", "Real-time Communication"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # Description: WebSocket server providing real-time chat interface with
    #              streaming responses, status updates, and settings sync.
    # END META
    """

    def __init__(
        self,
        agent: Any,  # NexusTamagotchiAgentPro
        config: Optional[UIConfig] = None,
        response_config: Optional[ResponseLengthConfig] = None,
    ):
        """
        Initialize chat server.

        # BEGIN META: AgentChatServer.__init__
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Initialize WebSocket server with agent reference
        # SRS: ["SRS-UI-001"]
        # Tags: ["init", "server", "websocket"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META
        """
        self.agent = agent
        self.config = config or UIConfig()
        self.response_config = response_config or ResponseLengthConfig("balanced")
        self.state = UIState()
        self._server = None
        self._connections: set = set()
        self._message_history: List[UIMessage] = []

    def _generate_html(self) -> str:
        """
        Generate the chat interface HTML.

        # BEGIN META: AgentChatServer._generate_html
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Generate HTML/CSS/JS for chat UI
        # SRS: ["SRS-UI-001"]
        # Pattern: SubstrateChat.tsx styling
        # Tags: ["html", "ui", "generate"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META
        """
        agent_name = getattr(self.agent, 'agent_name', 'Nexus Agent')
        port = self.config.port

        return f'''<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>{self.config.window_title}</title>
    <style>
        :root {{
            --primary: {self.config.primary_color};
            --secondary: {self.config.secondary_color};
            --bg-dark: #0a0a1a;
            --bg-card: #1a1a2e;
            --text-primary: #ffffff;
            --text-secondary: #a0a0b0;
            --border: #2a2a4a;
            --user-bg: linear-gradient(135deg, #00d9ff20, #00d9ff10);
            --assistant-bg: linear-gradient(135deg, #7B68EE20, #7B68EE10);
            --system-bg: #2a2a3a;
            --college-color: #4ade80;
            --council-color: #fbbf24;
            --taskir-color: #818cf8;
            --sake-color: #f472b6;
            --success: #22c55e;
            --warning: #f59e0b;
            --error: #ef4444;
            --info: #3b82f6;
        }}

        * {{
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }}

        body {{
            font-family: {self.config.font_family};
            font-size: {self.config.font_size};
            background: var(--bg-dark);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            overflow: hidden;
        }}

        /* Main Layout - 3 Column */
        .main-layout {{
            display: flex;
            flex: 1;
            overflow: hidden;
        }}

        /* Knowledge Domains Panel (Left) */
        .domains-panel {{
            width: 280px;
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            transition: width 0.3s;
        }}

        .domains-panel.collapsed {{
            width: 48px;
        }}

        .domains-header {{
            padding: 16px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }}

        .domains-header h3 {{
            font-size: 14px;
            color: var(--primary);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }}

        .domains-content {{
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 12px;
        }}

        .domain-item {{
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            padding: 12px;
            background: var(--bg-dark);
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
        }}

        .domain-item:hover {{
            border-color: var(--primary);
            transform: translateX(4px);
        }}

        .domain-item.active {{
            border-color: var(--primary);
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,217,255,0.1), transparent);
        }}

        .domain-icon {{
            width: 36px;
            height: 36px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 18px;
        }}

        .domain-icon.college {{ background: rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.2); }}
        .domain-icon.council {{ background: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.2); }}
        .domain-icon.taskir {{ background: rgba(129, 140, 248, 0.2); }}
        .domain-icon.sake {{ background: rgba(244, 114, 182, 0.2); }}
        .domain-icon.rag {{ background: rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2); }}
        .domain-icon.memory {{ background: rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.2); }}

        .domain-info {{
            flex: 1;
        }}

        .domain-name {{
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-bottom: 2px;
        }}

        .domain-status {{
            font-size: 11px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
        }}

        .domain-status-dot {{
            width: 6px;
            height: 6px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }}

        .domain-status-dot.online {{ background: var(--success); }}
        .domain-status-dot.offline {{ background: var(--error); }}
        .domain-status-dot.pending {{ background: var(--warning); animation: pulse 1s infinite; }}

        /* Cognitive Topology Graph */
        .topology-graph {{
            padding: 12px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
        }}

        .topology-header {{
            font-size: 11px;
            color: var(--primary);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }}

        .topology-canvas {{
            width: 100%;
            height: 180px;
            background: var(--bg-dark);
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }}

        .topology-legend {{
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-top: 8px;
            font-size: 10px;
        }}

        .legend-item {{
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
        }}

        .legend-dot {{
            width: 8px;
            height: 8px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }}

        .legend-dot.college {{ background: #4ade80; }}
        .legend-dot.council {{ background: #fbbf24; }}
        .legend-dot.taskir {{ background: #818cf8; }}
        .legend-dot.sake {{ background: #f472b6; }}
        .legend-dot.rag {{ background: #00d9ff; }}
        .legend-dot.memory {{ background: #a855f7; }}
        .legend-dot.agent {{ background: #ffffff; }}

        /* Logic Steps Panel (Right) */
        .logic-panel {{
            width: 320px;
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            transition: width 0.3s;
        }}

        .logic-panel.collapsed {{
            width: 48px;
        }}

        .logic-header {{
            padding: 16px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }}

        .logic-header h3 {{
            font-size: 14px;
            color: var(--secondary);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }}

        .logic-content {{
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 12px;
        }}

        .logic-step {{
            position: relative;
            padding: 12px;
            padding-left: 32px;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
            background: var(--bg-dark);
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            transition: all 0.3s;
        }}

        .logic-step::before {{
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            left: 12px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            width: 10px;
            height: 10px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--border);
        }}

        .logic-step.active::before {{
            background: var(--primary);
            animation: pulse 1s infinite;
        }}

        .logic-step.completed::before {{
            background: var(--success);
        }}

        .logic-step.error::before {{
            background: var(--error);
        }}

        .logic-step.college::before {{ background: var(--college-color); }}
        .logic-step.council::before {{ background: var(--council-color); }}
        .logic-step.taskir::before {{ background: var(--taskir-color); }}
        .logic-step.sake::before {{ background: var(--sake-color); }}

        .logic-step-header {{
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }}

        .logic-step-name {{
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-primary);
        }}

        .logic-step-time {{
            font-size: 10px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }}

        .logic-step-detail {{
            font-size: 11px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: 1.4;
        }}

        .logic-step-connector {{
            position: absolute;
            left: 16px;
            top: 100%;
            width: 2px;
            height: 4px;
            background: var(--border);
        }}

        /* API Call Badge */
        .api-badge {{
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            padding: 2px 8px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 10px;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-top: 4px;
        }}

        .api-badge.college {{
            background: rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.2);
            color: var(--college-color);
        }}

        .api-badge.council {{
            background: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.2);
            color: var(--council-color);
        }}

        .api-badge.taskir {{
            background: rgba(129, 140, 248, 0.2);
            color: var(--taskir-color);
        }}

        .api-badge.sake {{
            background: rgba(244, 114, 182, 0.2);
            color: var(--sake-color);
        }}

        /* Right Panel Tabs */
        .right-panel-tabs {{
            display: flex;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }}

        .right-panel-tab {{
            flex: 1;
            padding: 10px 8px;
            text-align: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 11px;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }}

        .right-panel-tab:hover {{
            color: var(--text-primary);
            background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
        }}

        .right-panel-tab.active {{
            color: var(--primary);
            border-bottom: 2px solid var(--primary);
        }}

        .right-panel-content {{
            display: none;
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }}

        .right-panel-content.active {{
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }}

        /* Professor Panel */
        .professor-panel {{
            padding: 12px;
        }}

        .professor-card {{
            background: var(--bg-dark);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }}

        .professor-card.active {{
            border-color: var(--college-color);
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.2);
        }}

        .professor-header {{
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }}

        .professor-icon {{
            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--college-color), #22c55e);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 16px;
        }}

        .professor-name {{
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 13px;
        }}

        .professor-domain {{
            font-size: 11px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }}

        .professor-output {{
            font-size: 12px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            line-height: 1.5;
            max-height: 100px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }}

        .professor-output.has-content {{
            color: var(--text-primary);
            background: rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.1);
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }}

        /* DossierWriter Panel */
        .dossier-panel {{
            padding: 12px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
        }}

        .dossier-entry {{
            padding: 8px;
            background: var(--bg-dark);
            border-radius: 6px;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
            font-size: 11px;
        }}

        .dossier-tier {{
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 2px 6px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 10px;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-right: 6px;
        }}

        .dossier-tier.critical {{ background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2); color: #ef4444; }}
        .dossier-tier.important {{ background: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.2); color: #fbbf24; }}
        .dossier-tier.standard {{ background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2); color: #3b82f6; }}
        .dossier-tier.archived {{ background: rgba(107, 114, 128, 0.2); color: #6b7280; }}

        /* Agent GIF Thought Visualization */
        .thought-viz-panel {{
            padding: 12px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 12px;
        }}

        .thought-frame {{
            background: var(--bg-dark);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }}

        .thought-frame-header {{
            padding: 8px 12px;
            background: rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.1);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }}

        .thought-frame-id {{
            font-family: monospace;
            font-size: 10px;
            color: var(--primary);
        }}

        .thought-state {{
            padding: 2px 8px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 10px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }}

        .thought-state.receiving {{ background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2); color: #3b82f6; }}
        .thought-state.thinking {{ background: rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.2); color: #fbbf24; animation: pulse 1s infinite; }}
        .thought-state.responding {{ background: rgba(74, 222, 128, 0.2); color: #4ade80; }}
        .thought-state.learning {{ background: rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.2); color: #a855f7; }}
        .thought-state.idle {{ background: rgba(107, 114, 128, 0.2); color: #6b7280; }}

        .thought-content {{
            padding: 12px;
        }}

        .thought-vector {{
            display: flex;
            gap: 2px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }}

        .thought-vector-bar {{
            width: 4px;
            height: 20px;
            background: var(--border);
            border-radius: 2px;
        }}

        .thought-vector-bar.active {{
            background: linear-gradient(to top, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
        }}

        .thought-narration {{
            font-size: 12px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            font-style: italic;
            line-height: 1.4;
        }}

        .thought-timeline {{
            display: flex;
            gap: 4px;
            padding: 8px 12px;
            background: var(--bg-card);
            overflow-x: auto;
        }}

        .timeline-frame {{
            width: 24px;
            height: 24px;
            border-radius: 4px;
            background: var(--border);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }}

        .timeline-frame.active {{
            background: var(--primary);
            transform: scale(1.1);
        }}

        .timeline-frame:hover {{
            background: var(--secondary);
        }}

        /* Center Content Area */
        .center-content {{
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            min-width: 0;
        }}

        /* Header */
        .header {{
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            padding: 16px 24px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }}

        .header-left {{
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
        }}

        .status-dot {{
            width: 10px;
            height: 10px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #4ade80;
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }}

        .status-dot.disconnected {{
            background: #ef4444;
            animation: none;
        }}

        @keyframes pulse {{
            0%, 100% {{ opacity: 1; }}
            50% {{ opacity: 0.5; }}
        }}

        .agent-name {{
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--primary);
        }}

        .agent-stats {{
            display: flex;
            gap: 16px;
            font-size: 12px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }}

        .stat {{
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
        }}

        .stat-value {{
            color: var(--primary);
            font-weight: 600;
        }}

        .header-right {{
            display: flex;
            gap: 8px;
        }}

        .btn {{
            background: transparent;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 13px;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }}

        .btn:hover {{
            background: var(--border);
        }}

        .btn-primary {{
            background: var(--primary);
            border-color: var(--primary);
            color: #000;
        }}

        .btn-primary:hover {{
            background: #00c4e6;
        }}

        /* Chat Container */
        .chat-container {{
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            overflow: hidden;
        }}

        .messages {{
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 24px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 16px;
        }}

        .message {{
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
            max-width: 80%;
            animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease-out;
        }}

        @keyframes fadeIn {{
            from {{ opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }}
            to {{ opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }}
        }}

        .message.user {{
            align-self: flex-end;
            flex-direction: row-reverse;
        }}

        .message-avatar {{
            width: 32px;
            height: 32px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 14px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }}

        .message.user .message-avatar {{
            background: var(--primary);
            color: #000;
        }}

        .message.assistant .message-avatar {{
            background: var(--secondary);
            color: #fff;
        }}

        .message.system .message-avatar {{
            background: var(--system-bg);
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }}

        .message-content {{
            background: var(--bg-card);
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            line-height: 1.6;
        }}

        .message.user .message-content {{
            background: var(--user-bg);
            border-color: rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2);
        }}

        .message.assistant .message-content {{
            background: var(--assistant-bg);
            border-color: rgba(123, 104, 238, 0.2);
        }}

        .message-timestamp {{
            font-size: 10px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            margin-top: 4px;
        }}

        .message-reasoning {{
            background: rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.1);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.3);
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 8px 12px;
            margin-top: 8px;
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #ffd700;
        }}

        .message-reasoning::before {{
            content: '💭 Thinking: ';
            font-weight: 600;
        }}

        /* Typing Indicator */
        .typing-indicator {{
            display: flex;
            gap: 4px;
            padding: 8px;
        }}

        .typing-dot {{
            width: 8px;
            height: 8px;
            background: var(--secondary);
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: typingBounce 1.4s infinite;
        }}

        .typing-dot:nth-child(2) {{ animation-delay: 0.2s; }}
        .typing-dot:nth-child(3) {{ animation-delay: 0.4s; }}

        @keyframes typingBounce {{
            0%, 60%, 100% {{ transform: translateY(0); }}
            30% {{ transform: translateY(-8px); }}
        }}

        /* Input Area */
        .input-area {{
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
            padding: 16px 24px;
        }}

        .input-container {{
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
            align-items: flex-end;
        }}

        .input-wrapper {{
            flex: 1;
            position: relative;
        }}

        textarea {{
            width: 100%;
            background: var(--bg-dark);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 12px;
            color: var(--text-primary);
            padding: 12px 16px;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 14px;
            resize: none;
            min-height: 48px;
            max-height: 200px;
            line-height: 1.5;
        }}

        textarea:focus {{
            outline: none;
            border-color: var(--primary);
        }}

        textarea::placeholder {{
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }}

        .send-btn {{
            background: var(--primary);
            border: none;
            color: #000;
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 20px;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }}

        .send-btn:hover {{
            background: #00c4e6;
            transform: scale(1.05);
        }}

        .send-btn:disabled {{
            opacity: 0.5;
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }}

        /* Settings Panel */
        .settings-panel {{
            position: fixed;
            right: -400px;
            top: 0;
            width: 400px;
            height: 100%;
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
            transition: right 0.3s;
            z-index: 1000;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }}

        .settings-panel.open {{
            right: 0;
        }}

        .settings-header {{
            padding: 16px 24px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
        }}

        .settings-content {{
            padding: 24px;
        }}

        .settings-section {{
            margin-bottom: 24px;
        }}

        .settings-section h3 {{
            font-size: 14px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }}

        .settings-option {{
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }}

        .settings-option:last-child {{
            border-bottom: none;
        }}

        select {{
            background: var(--bg-dark);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            padding: 8px 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-size: 13px;
        }}

        .toggle {{
            width: 48px;
            height: 24px;
            background: var(--border);
            border-radius: 12px;
            position: relative;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: background 0.2s;
        }}

        .toggle.active {{
            background: var(--primary);
        }}

        .toggle::after {{
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            top: 2px;
            left: 2px;
            transition: left 0.2s;
        }}

        .toggle.active::after {{
            left: 26px;
        }}

        /* Code blocks */
        pre {{
            background: #0d0d1a;
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow-x: auto;
            margin: 8px 0;
        }}

        code {{
            font-family: 'Fira Code', 'Consolas', monospace;
            font-size: 13px;
        }}

        /* Markdown */
        .message-content h1, .message-content h2, .message-content h3 {{
            margin: 12px 0 8px;
            color: var(--primary);
        }}

        .message-content ul, .message-content ol {{
            margin: 8px 0;
            padding-left: 24px;
        }}

        .message-content li {{
            margin: 4px 0;
        }}

        .message-content a {{
            color: var(--primary);
            text-decoration: none;
        }}

        .message-content a:hover {{
            text-decoration: underline;
        }}

        /* Memory Indicator */
        .memory-bar {{
            height: 4px;
            background: var(--border);
            border-radius: 2px;
            margin-top: 4px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }}

        .memory-fill {{
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            transition: width 0.3s;
        }}

        /* Scrollbar */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {{
            width: 8px;
        }}

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {{
            background: var(--bg-dark);
        }}

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {{
            background: var(--border);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }}

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {{
            background: var(--primary);
        }}
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="header">
        <div class="header-left">
            <div class="status-dot" id="statusDot"></div>
            <span class="agent-name">{agent_name}</span>
            <div class="agent-stats">
                <span class="stat">XP: <span class="stat-value" id="xpValue">0</span></span>
                <span class="stat">Rank: <span class="stat-value" id="rankValue">INITIATE</span></span>
                <span class="stat">Emotion: <span class="stat-value" id="emotionValue">neutral</span></span>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="header-right">
            <button class="btn" onclick="toggleDomainsPanel()">📚 Domains</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="toggleLogicPanel()">🧠 Logic</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="toggleSettings()">⚙️ Settings</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="clearChat()">🗑️ Clear</button>
            <button class="btn" onclick="exportChat()">📥 Export</button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div class="main-layout">
        <!-- Knowledge Domains Panel (Left) -->
        <div class="domains-panel" id="domainsPanel">
            <div class="domains-header">
                <h3>Knowledge Domains</h3>
                <button class="btn" onclick="toggleDomainsPanel()" style="padding: 4px 8px;">◀</button>
            </div>
            <div class="domains-content">
                <div class="domain-item active" onclick="selectDomain('college')" id="domain-college">
                    <div class="domain-icon college">🎓</div>
                    <div class="domain-info">
                        <div class="domain-name">College System</div>
                        <div class="domain-status">
                            <span class="domain-status-dot online" id="college-status"></span>
                            <span id="college-status-text">Vector RAG</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="domain-item" onclick="selectDomain('council')" id="domain-council">
                    <div class="domain-icon council">⚖️</div>
                    <div class="domain-info">
                        <div class="domain-name">Council System</div>
                        <div class="domain-status">
                            <span class="domain-status-dot online" id="council-status"></span>
                            <span id="council-status-text">Governance</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="domain-item" onclick="selectDomain('taskir')" id="domain-taskir">
                    <div class="domain-icon taskir">📋</div>
                    <div class="domain-info">
                        <div class="domain-name">Taskir Router</div>
                        <div class="domain-status">
                            <span class="domain-status-dot pending" id="taskir-status"></span>
                            <span id="taskir-status-text">Task Planning</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="domain-item" onclick="selectDomain('sake')" id="domain-sake">
                    <div class="domain-icon sake">🍶</div>
                    <div class="domain-info">
                        <div class="domain-name">SAKE Engine</div>
                        <div class="domain-status">
                            <span class="domain-status-dot pending" id="sake-status"></span>
                            <span id="sake-status-text">Semantic Analysis</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="domain-item" onclick="selectDomain('rag')" id="domain-rag">
                    <div class="domain-icon rag">🔍</div>
                    <div class="domain-info">
                        <div class="domain-name">RAG Service</div>
                        <div class="domain-status">
                            <span class="domain-status-dot online" id="rag-status"></span>
                            <span id="rag-status-text">citadel-nexus.com:7001</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="domain-item" onclick="selectDomain('memory')" id="domain-memory">
                    <div class="domain-icon memory">💾</div>
                    <div class="domain-info">
                        <div class="domain-name">STM/LTM Memory</div>
                        <div class="domain-status">
                            <span class="domain-status-dot online" id="memory-status"></span>
                            <span id="memory-status-text">FAISS Index</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Cognitive Topology Graph -->
            <div class="topology-graph">
                <div class="topology-header">
                    <span>Cognitive Topology</span>
                    <button class="btn" onclick="refreshTopology()" style="padding: 2px 6px; font-size: 10px;">Refresh</button>
                </div>
                <canvas id="topologyCanvas" class="topology-canvas"></canvas>
                <div class="topology-legend">
                    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot agent"></div><span>Agent</span></div>
                    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot college"></div><span>College</span></div>
                    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot council"></div><span>Council</span></div>
                    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot taskir"></div><span>TaskIR</span></div>
                    <div class="legend-item"><div class="legend-dot memory"></div><span>Memory</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Center Chat Area -->
        <div class="center-content">
            <div class="chat-container">
                <div class="messages" id="messages">
                    <div class="message system">
                        <div class="message-avatar">🤖</div>
                        <div class="message-content">
                            Welcome! I'm {agent_name}, your Citadel Nexus Agent. How can I help you today?
                            <div class="memory-bar">
                                <div class="memory-fill" id="memoryBar" style="width: 0%"></div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="input-area">
                <div class="input-container">
                    <div class="input-wrapper">
                        <textarea
                            id="messageInput"
                            placeholder="Type your message... (Shift+Enter for new line)"
                            rows="1"
                            onkeydown="handleKeydown(event)"
                            oninput="autoResize(this)"
                        ></textarea>
                    </div>
                    <button class="send-btn" id="sendBtn" onclick="sendMessage()">→</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div> <!-- End center-content -->

        <!-- Right Panel (Tabbed: Logic Steps, Professor, Thought Viz) -->
        <div class="logic-panel" id="logicPanel">
            <!-- Tab Navigation -->
            <div class="right-panel-tabs">
                <button class="right-panel-tab active" onclick="switchRightTab('logic')">Logic</button>
                <button class="right-panel-tab" onclick="switchRightTab('professor')">Professor</button>
                <button class="right-panel-tab" onclick="switchRightTab('thought')">Thoughts</button>
                <button class="right-panel-tab" onclick="switchRightTab('zigzag')" style="color: #00d9ff;">ZigZag</button>
            </div>

            <!-- Logic Steps Content -->
            <div class="right-panel-content active" id="tab-logic">
                <div class="logic-content" id="logicContent">
                    <div class="logic-step completed" id="step-receive">
                        <div class="logic-step-header">
                            <span class="logic-step-name">1. Receive Input</span>
                            <span class="logic-step-time" id="step-receive-time">-</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="logic-step-detail" id="step-receive-detail">Awaiting user input...</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="logic-step" id="step-taskir">
                        <div class="logic-step-header">
                            <span class="logic-step-name">2. Taskir Router</span>
                            <span class="logic-step-time" id="step-taskir-time">-</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="logic-step-detail" id="step-taskir-detail">Route to appropriate handler</div>
                        <span class="api-badge taskir">API: citadel-nexus.com</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="logic-step" id="step-college">
                        <div class="logic-step-header">
                            <span class="logic-step-name">3. College RAG</span>
                            <span class="logic-step-time" id="step-college-time">-</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="logic-step-detail" id="step-college-detail">Query knowledge vectors</div>
                        <span class="api-badge college">API: College System</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="logic-step" id="step-sake">
                        <div class="logic-step-header">
                            <span class="logic-step-name">4. SAKE Analysis</span>
                            <span class="logic-step-time" id="step-sake-time">-</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="logic-step-detail" id="step-sake-detail">Semantic entity extraction</div>
                        <span class="api-badge sake">API: SAKE Engine</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="logic-step" id="step-council">
                        <div class="logic-step-header">
                            <span class="logic-step-name">5. Council Review</span>
                            <span class="logic-step-time" id="step-council-time">-</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="logic-step-detail" id="step-council-detail">Governance validation</div>
                        <span class="api-badge council">API: Council System</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="logic-step" id="step-generate">
                        <div class="logic-step-header">
                            <span class="logic-step-name">6. Generate Response</span>
                            <span class="logic-step-time" id="step-generate-time">-</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="logic-step-detail" id="step-generate-detail">LLM synthesis</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="logic-step" id="step-memory">
                        <div class="logic-step-header">
                            <span class="logic-step-name">7. Store Memory</span>
                            <span class="logic-step-time" id="step-memory-time">-</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="logic-step-detail" id="step-memory-detail">STM/LTM persistence</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Professor Network Content -->
            <div class="right-panel-content" id="tab-professor">
                <div class="professor-panel">
                    <div class="professor-card" id="prof-python" data-domain="python">
                        <div class="professor-header">
                            <div class="professor-icon">&#x1f40d;</div>
                            <div>
                                <div class="professor-name">Prof. Python</div>
                                <div class="professor-domain">Python Development</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="professor-output" id="prof-python-output">Awaiting query...</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="professor-card" id="prof-architecture" data-domain="architecture">
                        <div class="professor-header">
                            <div class="professor-icon">&#x1f3db;</div>
                            <div>
                                <div class="professor-name">Prof. Architecture</div>
                                <div class="professor-domain">System Design</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="professor-output" id="prof-arch-output">Awaiting query...</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="professor-card" id="prof-security" data-domain="security">
                        <div class="professor-header">
                            <div class="professor-icon">&#x1f512;</div>
                            <div>
                                <div class="professor-name">Prof. Security</div>
                                <div class="professor-domain">Cybersecurity</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="professor-output" id="prof-sec-output">Awaiting query...</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="professor-card" id="prof-data" data-domain="data">
                        <div class="professor-header">
                            <div class="professor-icon">&#x1f4ca;</div>
                            <div>
                                <div class="professor-name">Prof. Data</div>
                                <div class="professor-domain">Data Science</div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="professor-output" id="prof-data-output">Awaiting query...</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <!-- DossierWriter Output -->
                <div class="dossier-panel">
                    <h4 style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 8px;">Dossier Entries</h4>
                    <div id="dossierEntries">
                        <div class="dossier-entry">
                            <span class="dossier-tier standard">STANDARD</span>
                            No entries yet...
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Agent GIF Thought Visualization Content -->
            <div class="right-panel-content" id="tab-thought">
                <div class="thought-viz-panel">
                    <!-- Current Frame -->
                    <div class="thought-frame" id="currentThoughtFrame">
                        <div class="thought-frame-header">
                            <span class="thought-frame-id" id="thoughtFrameId">Frame: -</span>
                            <span class="thought-state idle" id="thoughtState">IDLE</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="thought-content">
                            <div class="thought-vector" id="thoughtVector">
                                <!-- 32 bars for vector visualization -->
                            </div>
                            <div class="thought-narration" id="thoughtNarration">
                                Agent is idle. Awaiting input to begin cognitive processing...
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <!-- Timeline -->
                    <div class="thought-timeline" id="thoughtTimeline">
                        <!-- Frame markers will be added dynamically -->
                    </div>
                    <!-- Stats -->
                    <div style="padding: 0 12px; font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-secondary);">
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 4px;">
                            <span>Frames Emitted:</span>
                            <span id="framesEmitted">0</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 4px;">
                            <span>Cognitive State:</span>
                            <span id="cognitiveState">IDLE</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                            <span>Processing Time:</span>
                            <span id="processingTime">0ms</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- ZigZag Observability Content -->
            <div class="right-panel-content" id="tab-zigzag">
                <div class="zigzag-panel" style="padding: 12px;">
                    <div style="margin-bottom: 16px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;">
                        <span style="font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #00d9ff;">ZigZag Observability</span>
                        <button onclick="refreshZigZag()" style="background: #00d9ff20; border: 1px solid #00d9ff40; color: #00d9ff; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 11px; cursor: pointer;">Refresh</button>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Metrics Cards -->
                    <div id="zigzagMetrics" style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px;">
                        <div style="background: #00d9ff10; border: 1px solid #00d9ff30; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px;">
                            <div style="font-size: 10px; color: #00d9ff80;">Total Spans</div>
                            <div id="zz-spans" style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #00d9ff;">0</div>
                        </div>
                        <div style="background: #7B68EE10; border: 1px solid #7B68EE30; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px;">
                            <div style="font-size: 10px; color: #7B68EE80;">Components</div>
                            <div id="zz-components" style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #7B68EE;">0</div>
                        </div>
                        <div style="background: #fbbf2410; border: 1px solid #fbbf2430; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px;">
                            <div style="font-size: 10px; color: #fbbf2480;">Avg Latency</div>
                            <div id="zz-latency" style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #fbbf24;">0ms</div>
                        </div>
                        <div style="background: #4ade8010; border: 1px solid #4ade8030; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px;">
                            <div style="font-size: 10px; color: #4ade8080;">XP Awarded</div>
                            <div id="zz-xp" style="font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #4ade80;">0</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Active Nodes -->
                    <div style="margin-bottom: 12px;">
                        <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 8px;">Active Nodes</div>
                        <div id="zigzagNodes" style="max-height: 150px; overflow-y: auto;">
                            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-secondary); padding: 8px; text-align: center;">No activity yet</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Recent XP Transactions -->
                    <div>
                        <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 8px;">Recent XP</div>
                        <div id="zigzagXP" style="max-height: 120px; overflow-y: auto;">
                            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-secondary); padding: 8px; text-align: center;">No transactions</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div> <!-- End main-layout -->

    <div class="settings-panel" id="settingsPanel">
        <div class="settings-header">
            <h2>Settings</h2>
            <button class="btn" onclick="toggleSettings()">✕</button>
        </div>
        <div class="settings-content">
            <div class="settings-section">
                <h3>Response Length</h3>
                <div class="settings-option">
                    <span>Preset</span>
                    <select id="responsePreset" onchange="updateResponsePreset()">
                        <option value="concise">Concise</option>
                        <option value="balanced" selected>Balanced</option>
                        <option value="detailed">Detailed</option>
                        <option value="elongated">Elongated</option>
                        <option value="maximum">Maximum</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="settings-section">
                <h3>Display</h3>
                <div class="settings-option">
                    <span>Show Reasoning</span>
                    <div class="toggle active" id="toggleReasoning" onclick="toggleOption('reasoning')"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="settings-option">
                    <span>Show Tool Calls</span>
                    <div class="toggle active" id="toggleToolCalls" onclick="toggleOption('toolCalls')"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="settings-option">
                    <span>Enable Markdown</span>
                    <div class="toggle active" id="toggleMarkdown" onclick="toggleOption('markdown')"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="settings-section">
                <h3>Agent Info</h3>
                <div id="agentInfo" style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary);">
                    Loading...
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        let ws;
        let reconnectAttempts = 0;
        const maxReconnectAttempts = 5;
        let settings = {{
            reasoning: true,
            toolCalls: true,
            markdown: true,
            responsePreset: 'balanced'
        }};

        // Domain and Logic state
        let activeDomain = 'college';
        let logicSteps = [];
        const API_BASE = 'https://citadel-nexus.com';

        // Panel toggle functions
        function toggleDomainsPanel() {{
            document.getElementById('domainsPanel').classList.toggle('collapsed');
        }}

        function toggleLogicPanel() {{
            document.getElementById('logicPanel').classList.toggle('collapsed');
        }}

        // Right Panel Tab Switching
        function switchRightTab(tabName) {{
            // Update tab buttons
            document.querySelectorAll('.right-panel-tab').forEach(tab => tab.classList.remove('active'));
            event.target.classList.add('active');

            // Update content panels
            document.querySelectorAll('.right-panel-content').forEach(panel => panel.classList.remove('active'));
            document.getElementById('tab-' + tabName).classList.add('active');

            // Auto-refresh ZigZag when tab is selected
            if (tabName === 'zigzag') {{
                refreshZigZag();
            }}
        }}

        // ZigZag Observability Functions
        async function refreshZigZag() {{
            try {{
                const response = await fetch('/zigzag/dashboard-data');
                if (!response.ok) throw new Error('API error');
                const data = await response.json();

                // Update metrics
                if (data.metrics) {{
                    document.getElementById('zz-spans').textContent = data.metrics.total_spans.toLocaleString();
                    document.getElementById('zz-components').textContent = data.metrics.active_components;
                    document.getElementById('zz-latency').textContent = Math.round(data.metrics.avg_latency_ms) + 'ms';
                    document.getElementById('zz-xp').textContent = data.metrics.xp_awarded_total.toLocaleString();
                }}

                // Update nodes
                if (data.topology && data.topology.nodes && data.topology.nodes.length > 0) {{
                    const nodesHtml = data.topology.nodes.map(node => `
                        <div style="background: #1a1a2e; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 4px;">
                            <div style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--primary);">${{node.name}}</div>
                            <div style="font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px;">
                                ${{node.call_count}} calls · ${{Math.round(node.avg_latency_ms)}}ms · ${{Math.round(node.health_score * 100)}}% health
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    `).join('');
                    document.getElementById('zigzagNodes').innerHTML = nodesHtml;
                }}

                // Update XP transactions
                if (data.economy && data.economy.xp_transactions && data.economy.xp_transactions.length > 0) {{
                    const xpHtml = data.economy.xp_transactions.slice(0, 10).map(txn => `
                        <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; padding: 6px 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid #2a2a4a;">
                            <span style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-secondary);">${{txn.activity_type}}</span>
                            <span style="font-size: 11px; color: #4ade80; font-weight: 500;">+${{txn.amount}} XP</span>
                        </div>
                    `).join('');
                    document.getElementById('zigzagXP').innerHTML = xpHtml;
                }}
            }} catch (err) {{
                console.error('ZigZag refresh failed:', err);
            }}
        }}

        // ============================================
        // COGNITIVE TOPOLOGY GRAPH (Force-Directed)
        // ============================================

        // Graph nodes and edges
        const topologyNodes = [
            {{ id: 'agent', label: 'Agent', x: 128, y: 90, vx: 0, vy: 0, color: '#ffffff', size: 14 }},
            {{ id: 'college', label: 'College', x: 60, y: 40, vx: 0, vy: 0, color: '#4ade80', size: 10 }},
            {{ id: 'council', label: 'Council', x: 200, y: 50, vx: 0, vy: 0, color: '#fbbf24', size: 10 }},
            {{ id: 'taskir', label: 'TaskIR', x: 40, y: 130, vx: 0, vy: 0, color: '#818cf8', size: 10 }},
            {{ id: 'sake', label: 'SAKE', x: 180, y: 140, vx: 0, vy: 0, color: '#f472b6', size: 8 }},
            {{ id: 'memory', label: 'Memory', x: 100, y: 160, vx: 0, vy: 0, color: '#a855f7', size: 10 }},
            {{ id: 'rag', label: 'RAG', x: 160, y: 160, vx: 0, vy: 0, color: '#00d9ff', size: 8 }},
        ];

        const topologyEdges = [
            {{ source: 'agent', target: 'college', weight: 3, active: true }},
            {{ source: 'agent', target: 'council', weight: 2, active: true }},
            {{ source: 'agent', target: 'memory', weight: 4, active: true }},
            {{ source: 'agent', target: 'taskir', weight: 2, active: false }},
            {{ source: 'college', target: 'memory', weight: 2, active: true }},
            {{ source: 'college', target: 'rag', weight: 3, active: true }},
            {{ source: 'taskir', target: 'sake', weight: 2, active: false }},
            {{ source: 'council', target: 'memory', weight: 1, active: false }},
        ];

        let topologyAnimFrame = null;
        let topologyCanvas = null;
        let topologyCtx = null;

        function initTopology() {{
            topologyCanvas = document.getElementById('topologyCanvas');
            if (!topologyCanvas) return;

            topologyCtx = topologyCanvas.getContext('2d');

            // Set canvas size
            const rect = topologyCanvas.getBoundingClientRect();
            topologyCanvas.width = rect.width * window.devicePixelRatio;
            topologyCanvas.height = rect.height * window.devicePixelRatio;
            topologyCtx.scale(window.devicePixelRatio, window.devicePixelRatio);

            // Start animation
            animateTopology();
        }}

        function animateTopology() {{
            if (!topologyCtx) return;

            const width = topologyCanvas.width / window.devicePixelRatio;
            const height = topologyCanvas.height / window.devicePixelRatio;

            // Clear canvas
            topologyCtx.fillStyle = '#0a0a1a';
            topologyCtx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);

            // Simple force simulation
            const centerX = width / 2;
            const centerY = height / 2;
            const repulsion = 800;
            const attraction = 0.005;
            const damping = 0.9;

            // Apply forces
            for (let i = 0; i < topologyNodes.length; i++) {{
                const node = topologyNodes[i];

                // Repulsion from other nodes
                for (let j = 0; j < topologyNodes.length; j++) {{
                    if (i === j) continue;
                    const other = topologyNodes[j];
                    const dx = node.x - other.x;
                    const dy = node.y - other.y;
                    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) || 1;
                    const force = repulsion / (dist * dist);
                    node.vx += (dx / dist) * force * 0.01;
                    node.vy += (dy / dist) * force * 0.01;
                }}

                // Attraction to center
                node.vx += (centerX - node.x) * attraction;
                node.vy += (centerY - node.y) * attraction;

                // Apply damping
                node.vx *= damping;
                node.vy *= damping;

                // Update position
                node.x += node.vx;
                node.y += node.vy;

                // Keep in bounds
                node.x = Math.max(20, Math.min(width - 20, node.x));
                node.y = Math.max(20, Math.min(height - 20, node.y));
            }}

            // Draw edges
            for (const edge of topologyEdges) {{
                const source = topologyNodes.find(n => n.id === edge.source);
                const target = topologyNodes.find(n => n.id === edge.target);
                if (!source || !target) continue;

                topologyCtx.beginPath();
                topologyCtx.moveTo(source.x, source.y);
                topologyCtx.lineTo(target.x, target.y);
                topologyCtx.strokeStyle = edge.active ? 'rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.4)' : 'rgba(100, 100, 120, 0.3)';
                topologyCtx.lineWidth = edge.weight * 0.5;
                topologyCtx.stroke();

                // Draw pulse on active edges
                if (edge.active) {{
                    const t = (Date.now() % 2000) / 2000;
                    const px = source.x + (target.x - source.x) * t;
                    const py = source.y + (target.y - source.y) * t;
                    topologyCtx.beginPath();
                    topologyCtx.arc(px, py, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                    topologyCtx.fillStyle = '#00d9ff';
                    topologyCtx.fill();
                }}
            }}

            // Draw nodes
            for (const node of topologyNodes) {{
                // Glow
                const gradient = topologyCtx.createRadialGradient(node.x, node.y, 0, node.x, node.y, node.size * 2);
                gradient.addColorStop(0, node.color + '40');
                gradient.addColorStop(1, 'transparent');
                topologyCtx.fillStyle = gradient;
                topologyCtx.beginPath();
                topologyCtx.arc(node.x, node.y, node.size * 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                topologyCtx.fill();

                // Node circle
                topologyCtx.beginPath();
                topologyCtx.arc(node.x, node.y, node.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                topologyCtx.fillStyle = node.color;
                topologyCtx.fill();
                topologyCtx.strokeStyle = node.color;
                topologyCtx.lineWidth = 1;
                topologyCtx.stroke();
            }}

            topologyAnimFrame = requestAnimationFrame(animateTopology);
        }}

        function refreshTopology() {{
            // Randomize node positions slightly to restart animation
            for (const node of topologyNodes) {{
                node.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 5;
                node.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 5;
            }}

            // Fetch actual topology data from ZigZag if available
            fetch('/zigzag/dashboard-data').then(r => r.json()).then(data => {{
                if (data.topology && data.topology.edges) {{
                    // Update edge activity based on real data
                    for (const edge of topologyEdges) {{
                        const match = data.topology.edges.find(e =>
                            (e.source === edge.source && e.target === edge.target) ||
                            (e.source === edge.target && e.target === edge.source)
                        );
                        if (match) {{
                            edge.active = match.call_count > 0;
                            edge.weight = Math.min(5, match.call_count / 10);
                        }}
                    }}
                }}
            }}).catch(() => {{}});
        }}

        // Initialize topology on load
        setTimeout(initTopology, 500);

        // Thought Visualization State
        let thoughtFrames = [];
        let currentFrameIndex = 0;
        let thoughtVector = [];

        // Initialize thought vector bars
        function initThoughtVector() {{
            const vectorContainer = document.getElementById('thoughtVector');
            vectorContainer.innerHTML = '';
            for (let i = 0; i < 32; i++) {{
                const bar = document.createElement('div');
                bar.className = 'thought-vector-bar';
                bar.id = 'vector-bar-' + i;
                vectorContainer.appendChild(bar);
            }}
        }}

        // Update thought visualization
        function updateThoughtViz(state, narration, vector) {{
            // Update state badge
            const stateEl = document.getElementById('thoughtState');
            stateEl.className = 'thought-state ' + state.toLowerCase();
            stateEl.textContent = state;
            document.getElementById('cognitiveState').textContent = state;

            // Update narration
            document.getElementById('thoughtNarration').textContent = narration;

            // Update vector visualization
            if (vector && vector.length > 0) {{
                for (let i = 0; i < 32; i++) {{
                    const bar = document.getElementById('vector-bar-' + i);
                    if (bar) {{
                        const value = vector[i % vector.length] || 0;
                        bar.classList.toggle('active', value > 0.5);
                    }}
                }}
            }}
        }}

        // Emit a thought frame
        function emitThoughtFrame(frameData) {{
            const frameId = 'F' + String(thoughtFrames.length + 1).padStart(3, '0');
            document.getElementById('thoughtFrameId').textContent = 'Frame: ' + frameId;

            // Add to timeline
            const timeline = document.getElementById('thoughtTimeline');
            const marker = document.createElement('div');
            marker.className = 'timeline-frame';
            marker.onclick = () => selectThoughtFrame(thoughtFrames.length);
            timeline.appendChild(marker);

            // Store frame
            thoughtFrames.push(frameData);
            currentFrameIndex = thoughtFrames.length - 1;
            document.getElementById('framesEmitted').textContent = thoughtFrames.length;

            // Update display
            updateThoughtViz(frameData.state, frameData.narration, frameData.vector);

            // Mark current frame active
            document.querySelectorAll('.timeline-frame').forEach((f, i) => {{
                f.classList.toggle('active', i === currentFrameIndex);
            }});
        }}

        // Select a specific thought frame
        function selectThoughtFrame(index) {{
            if (index >= 0 && index < thoughtFrames.length) {{
                currentFrameIndex = index;
                const frame = thoughtFrames[index];
                updateThoughtViz(frame.state, frame.narration, frame.vector);
                document.getElementById('thoughtFrameId').textContent = 'Frame: F' + String(index + 1).padStart(3, '0');

                document.querySelectorAll('.timeline-frame').forEach((f, i) => {{
                    f.classList.toggle('active', i === index);
                }});
            }}
        }}

        // Update professor panel
        function updateProfessor(domain, output, isActive) {{
            const cardMap = {{
                'python': 'prof-python',
                'architecture': 'prof-architecture',
                'security': 'prof-security',
                'data': 'prof-data'
            }};
            const cardId = cardMap[domain.toLowerCase()];
            if (cardId) {{
                const card = document.getElementById(cardId);
                const outputEl = document.getElementById(cardId + '-output') || document.getElementById(cardId.replace('prof-', 'prof-') + '-output');
                if (card) {{
                    card.classList.toggle('active', isActive);
                }}
                if (outputEl && output) {{
                    outputEl.textContent = output;
                    outputEl.classList.toggle('has-content', output && output !== 'Awaiting query...');
                }}
            }}
        }}

        // Add dossier entry
        function addDossierEntry(tier, content) {{
            const container = document.getElementById('dossierEntries');
            const entry = document.createElement('div');
            entry.className = 'dossier-entry';
            entry.innerHTML = '<span class="dossier-tier ' + tier.toLowerCase() + '">' + tier.toUpperCase() + '</span>' + content;
            container.insertBefore(entry, container.firstChild);

            // Limit entries
            while (container.children.length > 10) {{
                container.removeChild(container.lastChild);
            }}
        }}

        function selectDomain(domain) {{
            document.querySelectorAll('.domain-item').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
            document.getElementById('domain-' + domain).classList.add('active');
            activeDomain = domain;
            console.log('Selected domain:', domain);
        }}

        // Logic Steps Visualization
        function resetLogicSteps() {{
            const steps = ['receive', 'taskir', 'college', 'sake', 'council', 'generate', 'memory'];
            steps.forEach(step => {{
                const el = document.getElementById('step-' + step);
                if (el) {{
                    el.classList.remove('active', 'completed', 'error', 'college', 'council', 'taskir', 'sake');
                    document.getElementById('step-' + step + '-time').textContent = '-';
                }}
            }});
        }}

        function updateLogicStep(stepId, status, detail, timeMs) {{
            const el = document.getElementById('step-' + stepId);
            if (!el) return;

            el.classList.remove('active', 'completed', 'error');
            el.classList.add(status);

            if (detail) {{
                document.getElementById('step-' + stepId + '-detail').textContent = detail;
            }}
            if (timeMs !== undefined) {{
                document.getElementById('step-' + stepId + '-time').textContent = timeMs + 'ms';
            }}
        }}

        // Citadel API Calls
        async function callTaskirAPI(input) {{
            updateLogicStep('taskir', 'active', 'Routing query...', null);
            const startTime = Date.now();
            try {{
                const response = await fetch(API_BASE + '/api/taskir/route', {{
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {{ 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }},
                    body: JSON.stringify({{
                        query: input,
                        domain: activeDomain,
                        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
                    }})
                }});
                const data = await response.json();
                const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
                updateLogicStep('taskir', 'completed taskir', 'Route: ' + (data.route || 'general'), elapsed);
                return data;
            }} catch (error) {{
                const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
                updateLogicStep('taskir', 'completed taskir', 'Local fallback', elapsed);
                return {{ route: 'general', fallback: true }};
            }}
        }}

        async function callCollegeAPI(input, context) {{
            updateLogicStep('college', 'active', 'Querying College RAG...', null);
            const startTime = Date.now();
            try {{
                const response = await fetch(API_BASE + '/api/college/query', {{
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {{ 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }},
                    body: JSON.stringify({{
                        query: input,
                        context: context,
                        top_k: 5
                    }})
                }});
                const data = await response.json();
                const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
                const hitCount = data.results ? data.results.length : 0;
                updateLogicStep('college', 'completed college', hitCount + ' knowledge hits', elapsed);
                return data;
            }} catch (error) {{
                const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
                updateLogicStep('college', 'completed college', 'Local memory fallback', elapsed);
                return {{ results: [], fallback: true }};
            }}
        }}

        async function callSakeAPI(input) {{
            updateLogicStep('sake', 'active', 'Analyzing semantics...', null);
            const startTime = Date.now();
            try {{
                const response = await fetch(API_BASE + '/api/sake/analyze', {{
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {{ 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }},
                    body: JSON.stringify({{
                        text: input,
                        extract_entities: true,
                        extract_intent: true
                    }})
                }});
                const data = await response.json();
                const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
                const entityCount = data.entities ? data.entities.length : 0;
                updateLogicStep('sake', 'completed sake', entityCount + ' entities, intent: ' + (data.intent || 'general'), elapsed);
                return data;
            }} catch (error) {{
                const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
                updateLogicStep('sake', 'completed sake', 'Local analysis', elapsed);
                return {{ entities: [], intent: 'general', fallback: true }};
            }}
        }}

        async function callCouncilAPI(action, context) {{
            updateLogicStep('council', 'active', 'Validating with Council...', null);
            const startTime = Date.now();
            try {{
                const response = await fetch(API_BASE + '/api/council/validate', {{
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {{ 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }},
                    body: JSON.stringify({{
                        action: action,
                        context: context,
                        governance_level: 'S00'
                    }})
                }});
                const data = await response.json();
                const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
                updateLogicStep('council', 'completed council', 'Approved: ' + (data.approved ? 'Yes' : 'No'), elapsed);
                return data;
            }} catch (error) {{
                const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
                updateLogicStep('council', 'completed council', 'Auto-approved (local)', elapsed);
                return {{ approved: true, fallback: true }};
            }}
        }}

        // Check domain health on startup
        async function checkDomainHealth() {{
            const domains = ['college', 'council', 'taskir', 'sake', 'rag', 'memory'];
            for (const domain of domains) {{
                const statusDot = document.getElementById(domain + '-status');
                const statusText = document.getElementById(domain + '-status-text');
                try {{
                    // For external APIs, check citadel-nexus.com
                    if (['taskir', 'sake'].includes(domain)) {{
                        const response = await fetch(API_BASE + '/api/' + domain + '/health', {{
                            method: 'GET',
                            timeout: 3000
                        }});
                        if (response.ok) {{
                            statusDot.className = 'domain-status-dot online';
                            statusText.textContent = 'Online';
                        }} else {{
                            statusDot.className = 'domain-status-dot pending';
                            statusText.textContent = 'Degraded';
                        }}
                    }}
                }} catch (error) {{
                    // Silently handle - domains default to their initial state
                }}
            }}
        }}

        function connect() {{
            ws = new WebSocket('ws://{self.config.host}:{port}/ws');

            ws.onopen = () => {{
                console.log('Connected to agent');
                document.getElementById('statusDot').classList.remove('disconnected');
                reconnectAttempts = 0;
