            "reward": {"xp": 200, "tp": 40, "badges": ["trusted"]},
            "difficulty": "easy",
            "chain": "onboarding",
            "chain_index": 1,
        },
        {
            "name": "Memory Keeper",
            "description": "Create your first memory",
            "objectives": [{"type": "count", "metric": "total_memories", "target": "1"}],
            "reward": {"xp": 150, "tp": 30},
            "difficulty": "trivial",
            "chain": "onboarding",
            "chain_index": 2,
        },
        {
            "name": "Rising Star",
            "description": "Earn your first 1000 XP",
            "objectives": [{"type": "threshold", "metric": "total_xp", "target": "1000"}],
            "reward": {"xp": 250, "tp": 50, "badges": ["rising_star"]},
            "difficulty": "easy",
            "chain": "onboarding",
            "chain_index": 3,
        },
        {
            "name": "Rank Up",
            "description": "Advance to APPRENTICE rank",
            "objectives": [{"type": "threshold", "metric": "rank_index", "target": "1"}],
            "reward": {"xp": 500, "tp": 100, "badges": ["apprentice"]},
            "difficulty": "normal",
            "chain": "onboarding",
            "chain_index": 4,
        },
    ]

    @classmethod
    def generate_daily_quests(cls, count: int = 3, user_level: int = 1) -> List[Quest]:
        """Generate random daily quests based on user level."""
        import random

        available_templates = cls.DAILY_TEMPLATES.copy()
        selected = random.sample(available_templates, min(count, len(available_templates)))
        quests = []

        for template in selected:
            # Select random variable values
            variables = {}
            for var_name, var_options in template.get("variables", {}).items():
                # Scale difficulty based on user level
                scaled_options = var_options[:min(len(var_options), 1 + user_level // 5)]
                variables[var_name] = random.choice(scaled_options)

            # Build objectives
            objectives = []
            for obj_template in template["objectives"]:
                target = obj_template["target"]
                if isinstance(target, str) and "{" in target:
                    target = int(target.format(**variables))

                objectives.append(QuestObjective(
                    description=template["description"].format(**variables),
                    objective_type=obj_template["type"],
                    target_value=target,
                    target_metric=obj_template["metric"],
                ))

            # Build reward
            reward_data = template["reward"]
            reward = QuestReward(
                xp=reward_data.get("xp", 0),
                tp=reward_data.get("tp", 0),
                badges=reward_data.get("badges", []),
            )

            # Create quest
            quest = Quest(
                name=template["name"],
                description=template["description"].format(**variables),
                quest_type=QuestType.DAILY,
                difficulty=QuestDifficulty[template["difficulty"].upper()],
                objectives=objectives,
                reward=reward,
                expires_at=(datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=24)).isoformat(),
                category="daily",
                tags=["daily", "auto-generated"],
            )
            quests.append(quest)

        return quests

    @classmethod
    def generate_weekly_quests(cls, count: int = 2, user_level: int = 1) -> List[Quest]:
        """Generate random weekly quests based on user level."""
        import random

        available_templates = cls.WEEKLY_TEMPLATES.copy()
        selected = random.sample(available_templates, min(count, len(available_templates)))
        quests = []

        for template in selected:
            variables = {}
            for var_name, var_options in template.get("variables", {}).items():
                scaled_options = var_options[:min(len(var_options), 1 + user_level // 10)]
                variables[var_name] = random.choice(scaled_options)

            objectives = []
            for obj_template in template["objectives"]:
                target = obj_template["target"]
                if isinstance(target, str) and "{" in target:
                    target = int(target.format(**variables))

                objectives.append(QuestObjective(
                    description=template["description"].format(**variables),
                    objective_type=obj_template["type"],
                    target_value=target,
                    target_metric=obj_template["metric"],
                ))

            reward_data = template["reward"]
            reward = QuestReward(
                xp=reward_data.get("xp", 0),
                tp=reward_data.get("tp", 0),
                badges=reward_data.get("badges", []),
            )

            quest = Quest(
                name=template["name"],
                description=template["description"].format(**variables),
                quest_type=QuestType.WEEKLY,
                difficulty=QuestDifficulty[template["difficulty"].upper()],
                objectives=objectives,
                reward=reward,
                expires_at=(datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=168)).isoformat(),
                category="weekly",
                tags=["weekly", "auto-generated"],
            )
            quests.append(quest)

        return quests


class QuestEngine:
    """
    Advanced quest management engine with generation, tracking, and rewards.

    # BEGIN META: QuestEngine
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Comprehensive quest management with auto-generation, progress tracking
    # SRS: ["SRS-QUEST-001", "SRS-MISSION-001", "SRS-GAMIFY-001"]
    # Reflex: REFLEX_QUEST_ENGINE
    # Tags: ["quest", "engine", "gamification", "missions"]
    # Categories: ["Gamification", "Core"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """

    QUEST_LOG_FILE = "quest_log.jsonl"
    QUEST_STATE_FILE = "quest_state.json"

    def __init__(self, storage_dir: Optional[Path] = None, brotherhood: Optional["BrotherhoodSystem"] = None,
                 skill_tracker: Optional["SkillTracker"] = None, skill_tree: Optional["SkillTreeSystem"] = None):
        """Initialize quest engine."""
        self.storage_dir = storage_dir or Path.home() / ".nexus_agent_data" / "quests"
        self.storage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        self.brotherhood = brotherhood
        self.skill_tracker = skill_tracker
        self.skill_tree = skill_tree

        # Quest storage
        self.active_quests: Dict[str, Quest] = {}
        self.completed_quests: Dict[str, Quest] = {}
        self.quest_chains: Dict[str, QuestChain] = {}
        self.quest_history: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []

        # Metrics tracking
        self.metrics: Dict[str, int] = {
            "interactions": 0,
            "questions_asked": 0,
            "facts_learned": 0,
            "memory_recalls": 0,
            "topics_discussed": 0,
            "emotions_experienced": 0,
            "current_streak": 0,
            "professors_consulted": 0,
            "weekly_interactions": 0,
            "ltm_additions": 0,
            "skills_unlocked": 0,
            "badges_earned": 0,
            "domains_explored": 0,
            "total_interactions": 0,
            "trust_score": 0,
            "total_memories": 0,
            "total_xp": 0,
            "rank_index": 0,
        }
        self.unique_sets: Dict[str, set] = {
            "topics_discussed": set(),
            "emotions_experienced": set(),
            "professors_consulted": set(),
            "domains_explored": set(),
        }

        # Load state
        self._load_state()

    def _load_state(self):
        """Load quest state from disk."""
        state_path = self.storage_dir / self.QUEST_STATE_FILE
        if state_path.exists():
            try:
                with open(state_path, "r") as f:
                    data = json.load(f)
                    self.metrics = data.get("metrics", self.metrics)
                    self.unique_sets = {
                        k: set(v) for k, v in data.get("unique_sets", {}).items()
                    }
                    # Reconstruct quests
                    for quest_data in data.get("active_quests", []):
                        quest = self._dict_to_quest(quest_data)
                        self.active_quests[quest.id] = quest
                    for quest_data in data.get("completed_quests", []):
                        quest = self._dict_to_quest(quest_data)
                        self.completed_quests[quest.id] = quest
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[QuestEngine] Failed to load state: {e}")

    def _save_state(self):
        """Save quest state to disk."""
        state_path = self.storage_dir / self.QUEST_STATE_FILE
        try:
            data = {
                "metrics": self.metrics,
                "unique_sets": {k: list(v) for k, v in self.unique_sets.items()},
                "active_quests": [self._quest_to_dict(q) for q in self.active_quests.values()],
                "completed_quests": [
                    self._quest_to_dict(q)
                    for q in list(self.completed_quests.values())[-100:]  # Keep last 100
                ],
            }
            with open(state_path, "w") as f:
                json.dump(data, f, indent=2, default=str)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[QuestEngine] Failed to save state: {e}")

    def _quest_to_dict(self, quest: Quest) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Convert quest to dictionary for serialization."""
        return {
            "id": quest.id,
            "name": quest.name,
            "description": quest.description,
            "quest_type": quest.quest_type.name,
            "difficulty": quest.difficulty.name,
            "status": quest.status.value,
            "objectives": [asdict(o) for o in quest.objectives],
            "reward": asdict(quest.reward),
            "required_level": quest.required_level,
            "required_xp": quest.required_xp,
            "required_quests": quest.required_quests,
            "required_badges": quest.required_badges,
            "required_skills": quest.required_skills,
            "created_at": quest.created_at,
            "accepted_at": quest.accepted_at,
            "completed_at": quest.completed_at,
            "expires_at": quest.expires_at,
            "chain_id": quest.chain_id,
            "chain_index": quest.chain_index,
            "next_quest_id": quest.next_quest_id,
            "category": quest.category,
            "tags": quest.tags,
            "icon": quest.icon,
            "flavor_text": quest.flavor_text,
            "completion_message": quest.completion_message,
            "metadata": quest.metadata,
        }

    def _dict_to_quest(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> Quest:
        """Convert dictionary to Quest object."""
        objectives = [
            QuestObjective(**obj_data) for obj_data in data.get("objectives", [])
        ]
        reward = QuestReward(**data.get("reward", {}))

        return Quest(
            id=data.get("id", str(uuid4())),
            name=data.get("name", ""),
            description=data.get("description", ""),
            quest_type=QuestType[data.get("quest_type", "SIDE")],
            difficulty=QuestDifficulty[data.get("difficulty", "NORMAL")],
            status=QuestStatus(data.get("status", "available")),
            objectives=objectives,
            reward=reward,
            required_level=data.get("required_level", 0),
            required_xp=data.get("required_xp", 0),
            required_quests=data.get("required_quests", []),
            required_badges=data.get("required_badges", []),
            required_skills=data.get("required_skills", []),
            created_at=data.get("created_at", datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()),
            accepted_at=data.get("accepted_at"),
            completed_at=data.get("completed_at"),
            expires_at=data.get("expires_at"),
            chain_id=data.get("chain_id"),
            chain_index=data.get("chain_index", 0),
            next_quest_id=data.get("next_quest_id"),
            category=data.get("category", "general"),
            tags=data.get("tags", []),
            icon=data.get("icon", "📜"),
            flavor_text=data.get("flavor_text"),
            completion_message=data.get("completion_message"),
            metadata=data.get("metadata", {}),
        )

    def generate_daily_quests(self, user_level: int = 1) -> List[Quest]:
        """Generate new daily quests."""
        # Remove expired dailies
        expired = [
            qid for qid, q in self.active_quests.items()
            if q.quest_type == QuestType.DAILY and q.is_expired
        ]
        for qid in expired:
            quest = self.active_quests.pop(qid)
            quest.status = QuestStatus.EXPIRED
            self.completed_quests[qid] = quest

        # Check if we already have daily quests
        current_dailies = [
            q for q in self.active_quests.values()
            if q.quest_type == QuestType.DAILY and not q.is_expired
        ]
        if len(current_dailies) >= 3:
            return current_dailies

        # Generate new dailies
        new_quests = QuestTemplate.generate_daily_quests(3 - len(current_dailies), user_level)
        for quest in new_quests:
            self.active_quests[quest.id] = quest

        self._save_state()
        return new_quests + current_dailies

    def generate_weekly_quests(self, user_level: int = 1) -> List[Quest]:
        """Generate new weekly quests."""
        # Remove expired weeklies
        expired = [
            qid for qid, q in self.active_quests.items()
            if q.quest_type == QuestType.WEEKLY and q.is_expired
        ]
        for qid in expired:
            quest = self.active_quests.pop(qid)
            quest.status = QuestStatus.EXPIRED
            self.completed_quests[qid] = quest

        # Check if we already have weekly quests
        current_weeklies = [
            q for q in self.active_quests.values()
            if q.quest_type == QuestType.WEEKLY and not q.is_expired
        ]
        if len(current_weeklies) >= 2:
            return current_weeklies

        # Generate new weeklies
        new_quests = QuestTemplate.generate_weekly_quests(2 - len(current_weeklies), user_level)
        for quest in new_quests:
            self.active_quests[quest.id] = quest

        self._save_state()
        return new_quests + current_weeklies

    def accept_quest(self, quest_id: str) -> Tuple[bool, str]:
        """Accept a quest."""
        if quest_id not in self.active_quests:
            return False, "Quest not found"

        quest = self.active_quests[quest_id]

        # Get user stats from brotherhood
        user_xp = self.brotherhood.total_xp if self.brotherhood else 0
        user_level = self.brotherhood.rank_index if self.brotherhood else 0
        completed = list(self.completed_quests.keys())
        badges = self.brotherhood.badges_earned if self.brotherhood else []
        # Get skills from skill tracker or skill tree
        skills = []
        if self.skill_tracker and hasattr(self.skill_tracker, 'tracked_skills'):
            skills = list(self.skill_tracker.tracked_skills.keys())
        elif self.skill_tree and hasattr(self.skill_tree, 'unlocked_skills'):
            skills = list(self.skill_tree.unlocked_skills.keys())

        can_accept, reason = quest.can_accept(user_xp, user_level, completed, badges, skills)
        if not can_accept:
            return False, reason

        quest.status = QuestStatus.ACTIVE
        quest.accepted_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
        self._save_state()
        self._log_quest_event("accepted", quest)

        return True, f"Quest '{quest.name}' accepted!"

    def update_progress(self, metric: str, value: int = 1, unique_value: Optional[str] = None) -> List[Quest]:
        """
        Update quest progress based on metrics.

        Args:
            metric: The metric being updated (e.g., "interactions")
            value: The value to add
            unique_value: For unique-type objectives, the specific value being added

        Returns:
            List of quests that were completed by this update
        """
        # Update metric
        if metric in self.metrics:
            self.metrics[metric] += value

        # Update unique sets
        if unique_value and metric in self.unique_sets:
            self.unique_sets[metric].add(unique_value)
            # Update the metric to reflect unique count
            self.metrics[metric] = len(self.unique_sets[metric])

        # Check all active quests
        completed_quests = []
        for quest in self.active_quests.values():
            if quest.status != QuestStatus.ACTIVE:
                continue

            for objective in quest.objectives:
                if objective.target_metric == metric:
                    if objective.objective_type == "count":
                        objective.increment(value)
                    elif objective.objective_type == "unique":
                        if metric in self.unique_sets:
                            objective.current_value = len(self.unique_sets[metric])
                    elif objective.objective_type == "threshold":
                        objective.current_value = self.metrics.get(metric, 0)

            # Check if quest is now complete
            if quest.is_complete and quest.status == QuestStatus.ACTIVE:
                quest.status = QuestStatus.COMPLETED
                quest.completed_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
                completed_quests.append(quest)
                self._log_quest_event("completed", quest)

        self._save_state()
        return completed_quests

    def claim_reward(self, quest_id: str) -> Tuple[bool, Optional[QuestReward], str]:
        """Claim rewards for a completed quest."""
        if quest_id not in self.active_quests:
            return False, None, "Quest not found"

        quest = self.active_quests[quest_id]
        if quest.status != QuestStatus.COMPLETED:
            return False, None, f"Quest is not completed (status: {quest.status.value})"

        # Apply difficulty multiplier
        quest.reward.bonus_multiplier = quest.difficulty.multiplier

        # Award through brotherhood if available
        if self.brotherhood:
            self.brotherhood.award_xp(quest.reward.total_xp, f"Quest: {quest.name}")
            self.brotherhood.award_tp(quest.reward.total_tp, f"Quest: {quest.name}")
            for badge in quest.reward.badges:
                self.brotherhood.unlock_badge(badge)

        # Move to completed
        quest.status = QuestStatus.CLAIMED
        self.completed_quests[quest_id] = self.active_quests.pop(quest_id)

        # Handle chain progression
        if quest.next_quest_id and quest.chain_id:
            # Load next quest from chain templates
            next_template = None
            for template in QuestTemplate.STORY_TEMPLATES:
                if (template.get("chain") == quest.chain_id and
                    template.get("chain_index", -1) == quest.chain_index + 1):
                    next_template = template
                    break

            if next_template:
                # Build objectives from template
                objectives = []
                for obj_template in next_template.get("objectives", []):
                    objectives.append(QuestObjective(
                        description=next_template["description"],
                        objective_type=obj_template.get("type", "count"),
                        target_value=int(obj_template.get("target", 1)),
                        target_metric=obj_template.get("metric", "interactions"),
                    ))

                # Build reward from template
                reward_data = next_template.get("reward", {})
                reward = QuestReward(
                    xp=reward_data.get("xp", 0),
                    tp=reward_data.get("tp", 0),
                    badges=reward_data.get("badges", []),
                )

                # Determine next quest in chain (if exists)
                next_next_id = None
                for future_template in QuestTemplate.STORY_TEMPLATES:
                    if (future_template.get("chain") == quest.chain_id and
                        future_template.get("chain_index", -1) == quest.chain_index + 2):
                        next_next_id = str(uuid4())
                        break

                # Create the next quest
                next_quest = Quest(
                    id=quest.next_quest_id,
                    name=next_template["name"],
                    description=next_template["description"],
                    quest_type=QuestType.STORY,
                    difficulty=QuestDifficulty[next_template.get("difficulty", "normal").upper()],
                    objectives=objectives,
                    reward=reward,
                    chain_id=quest.chain_id,
                    chain_index=quest.chain_index + 1,
                    next_quest_id=next_next_id,
                    category="story",
                    tags=["story", "chain", quest.chain_id],
                )
                self.active_quests[quest.next_quest_id] = next_quest
                self._log_quest_event("chain_unlocked", next_quest)

        self._save_state()
        self._log_quest_event("claimed", quest)

        return True, quest.reward, f"Claimed {quest.reward.total_xp} XP and {quest.reward.total_tp} TP!"

    def get_active_quests(self, quest_type: Optional[QuestType] = None) -> List[Quest]:
        """Get all active quests, optionally filtered by type."""
        quests = list(self.active_quests.values())
        if quest_type:
            quests = [q for q in quests if q.quest_type == quest_type]
        return sorted(quests, key=lambda q: (q.status.value, q.quest_type.name))

    def get_quest_summary(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get summary of quest status."""
        active = list(self.active_quests.values())
        return {
            "total_active": len(active),
            "by_type": {
                qt.name: len([q for q in active if q.quest_type == qt])
                for qt in QuestType
            },
            "by_status": {
                qs.value: len([q for q in active if q.status == qs])
                for qs in QuestStatus
            },
            "completable": len([q for q in active if q.is_complete]),
            "expired": len([q for q in active if q.is_expired]),
            "total_completed": len(self.completed_quests),
            "metrics": self.metrics.copy(),
        }

    def _log_quest_event(self, event: str, quest: Quest):
        """Log quest event to history."""
        log_path = self.storage_dir / self.QUEST_LOG_FILE
        entry = {
            "timestamp": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
            "event": event,
            "quest_id": quest.id,
            "quest_name": quest.name,
            "quest_type": quest.quest_type.name,
            "difficulty": quest.difficulty.name,
        }
        try:
            with open(log_path, "a") as f:
                f.write(json.dumps(entry) + "\n")
        except Exception:
            pass


@dataclass
class MissionContext:
    """
    Context for generating missions from interactions.

    # BEGIN META: MissionContext
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Extract mission-worthy context from agent interactions
    # SRS: ["SRS-MISSION-001"]
    # Tags: ["mission", "context", "extraction"]
    # Categories: ["Gamification"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    user_input: str
    agent_response: str
    topics: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    entities: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    sentiment: str = "neutral"
    intent: str = "general"
    domain: str = "general"
    complexity: float = 0.5
    keywords: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)


class MissionGenerator:
    """
    Generate missions from agent interactions.

    # BEGIN META: MissionGenerator
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Automatically generate contextual missions from conversations
    # SRS: ["SRS-MISSION-001", "SRS-QUEST-003"]
    # Tags: ["mission", "generator", "context"]
    # Categories: ["Gamification"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """

    # Mission templates based on context
    MISSION_PATTERNS = {
        "learning": [
            ("Learn about {topic}", "Explore and understand {topic} through conversation", "knowledge"),
            ("Master {skill}", "Demonstrate proficiency in {skill}", "skill"),
            ("Research {entity}", "Gather information about {entity}", "research"),
        ],
        "creative": [
            ("Create {thing}", "Work with the agent to create {thing}", "creative"),
            ("Design {concept}", "Design and refine {concept}", "design"),
            ("Brainstorm {topic}", "Generate ideas related to {topic}", "ideation"),
        ],
        "problem_solving": [
            ("Solve {problem}", "Find a solution to {problem}", "problem"),
            ("Debug {issue}", "Identify and fix {issue}", "debugging"),
            ("Optimize {process}", "Improve efficiency of {process}", "optimization"),
        ],
        "exploration": [
            ("Discover {domain}", "Explore the {domain} domain", "exploration"),
            ("Map {concept}", "Create a mental map of {concept}", "mapping"),
            ("Connect {topic_a} and {topic_b}", "Find connections between topics", "synthesis"),
        ],
    }

    def __init__(self, quest_engine: QuestEngine):
        """Initialize mission generator."""
        self.quest_engine = quest_engine
        self.generated_missions: List[str] = []

    def extract_context(self, user_input: str, agent_response: str) -> MissionContext:
        """Extract context from an interaction for mission generation."""
        # Simple keyword extraction
        import re
        words = re.findall(r'\b\w{4,}\b', user_input.lower())
        keywords = list(set(words))[:10]

        # Simple topic extraction (first noun-like words)
        topics = [w for w in keywords if len(w) > 5][:3]

        # Determine intent
        intent = "general"
        if any(q in user_input.lower() for q in ["how", "what", "why", "explain"]):
            intent = "learning"
        elif any(q in user_input.lower() for q in ["create", "make", "build", "design"]):
            intent = "creative"
        elif any(q in user_input.lower() for q in ["fix", "solve", "debug", "help"]):
            intent = "problem_solving"
        elif any(q in user_input.lower() for q in ["explore", "discover", "find"]):
            intent = "exploration"

        # Estimate complexity
        complexity = min(1.0, len(user_input) / 200)

        return MissionContext(
            user_input=user_input,
            agent_response=agent_response,
            topics=topics,
            keywords=keywords,
            intent=intent,
            complexity=complexity,
        )

    def maybe_generate_mission(self, context: MissionContext) -> Optional[Quest]:
        """
        Maybe generate a mission from context.
        Only generates if context is rich enough.
        """
        import random

        # Only generate mission ~20% of the time
        if random.random() > 0.2:
            return None

        # Need at least one topic
        if not context.topics:
            return None

        # Get templates for this intent
        templates = self.MISSION_PATTERNS.get(context.intent, self.MISSION_PATTERNS["learning"])
        template = random.choice(templates)

        # Fill template
        topic = context.topics[0]
        name = template[0].format(
            topic=topic, skill=topic, entity=topic, thing=topic,
            concept=topic, problem=topic, issue=topic, process=topic,
            domain=topic, topic_a=topic, topic_b=context.topics[1] if len(context.topics) > 1 else topic,
        )
        description = template[1].format(
            topic=topic, skill=topic, entity=topic, thing=topic,
            concept=topic, problem=topic, issue=topic, process=topic,
            domain=topic, topic_a=topic, topic_b=context.topics[1] if len(context.topics) > 1 else topic,
        )

        # Determine difficulty based on complexity
        if context.complexity < 0.3:
            difficulty = QuestDifficulty.EASY
        elif context.complexity < 0.6:
            difficulty = QuestDifficulty.NORMAL
        elif context.complexity < 0.8:
            difficulty = QuestDifficulty.HARD
        else:
            difficulty = QuestDifficulty.HEROIC

        # Create mission
        mission = Quest(
            name=name,
            description=description,
            quest_type=QuestType.SIDE,
            difficulty=difficulty,
            objectives=[
                QuestObjective(
                    description=f"Continue exploring {topic}",
                    objective_type="count",
                    target_value=3,
                    target_metric="interactions",
                )
            ],
            reward=QuestReward(
                xp=int(50 * difficulty.multiplier),
                tp=int(10 * difficulty.multiplier),
            ),
            category=template[2],
            tags=[context.intent, topic, "auto-generated"],
            icon="🎯",
            metadata={"generated_from": context.keywords},
        )

        # Add to quest engine
        self.quest_engine.active_quests[mission.id] = mission
        self.generated_missions.append(mission.id)
        self.quest_engine._save_state()

        return mission


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 36: EXTENDED PROFESSOR NETWORK
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


class ProfessorSpecialty(Enum):
    """Professor specialization areas."""
    # Technology
    SOFTWARE_ENGINEERING = ("software_engineering", "Code architecture, patterns, best practices")
    WEB_DEVELOPMENT = ("web_development", "Frontend, backend, full-stack development")
    MOBILE_DEVELOPMENT = ("mobile_development", "iOS, Android, cross-platform apps")
    DATA_SCIENCE = ("data_science", "Analytics, ML, statistical modeling")
    ARTIFICIAL_INTELLIGENCE = ("artificial_intelligence", "AI, deep learning, neural networks")
    CYBERSECURITY = ("cybersecurity", "Security, cryptography, threat analysis")
    DEVOPS = ("devops", "CI/CD, infrastructure, automation")
    CLOUD_COMPUTING = ("cloud_computing", "AWS, Azure, GCP, serverless")
    BLOCKCHAIN = ("blockchain", "Crypto, smart contracts, DeFi")
    DATABASES = ("databases", "SQL, NoSQL, data modeling")

    # Science
    PHYSICS = ("physics", "Mechanics, thermodynamics, quantum")
    CHEMISTRY = ("chemistry", "Organic, inorganic, biochemistry")
    BIOLOGY = ("biology", "Life sciences, genetics, ecology")
    MATHEMATICS = ("mathematics", "Pure math, applied math, statistics")
    ASTRONOMY = ("astronomy", "Space, cosmology, astrophysics")

    # Humanities
    PHILOSOPHY = ("philosophy", "Ethics, logic, metaphysics")
    PSYCHOLOGY = ("psychology", "Cognitive, behavioral, clinical")
    HISTORY = ("history", "World history, civilizations, events")
    LITERATURE = ("literature", "Analysis, writing, creative works")
    LINGUISTICS = ("linguistics", "Language, grammar, semantics")

    # Business
    BUSINESS_STRATEGY = ("business_strategy", "Planning, growth, competitive analysis")
    MARKETING = ("marketing", "Digital marketing, branding, growth")
    FINANCE = ("finance", "Investment, accounting, markets")
    ENTREPRENEURSHIP = ("entrepreneurship", "Startups, venture, innovation")
    MANAGEMENT = ("management", "Leadership, operations, HR")

    # Creative
    DESIGN = ("design", "UI/UX, graphic design, visual arts")
    MUSIC = ("music", "Theory, composition, production")
    CREATIVE_WRITING = ("creative_writing", "Fiction, poetry, storytelling")

    def __init__(self, key: str, description: str):
        self.key = key
        self.description = description


@dataclass
class ProfessorProfile:
    """
    Detailed professor profile with personality and expertise.

    # BEGIN META: ProfessorProfile
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Define professor profiles with expertise, personality, teaching style
    # SRS: ["SRS-PROF-001"]
    # Tags: ["professor", "profile", "expert"]
    # Categories: ["Professors"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid4()))
    name: str = ""
    title: str = "Professor"
    specialty: ProfessorSpecialty = ProfessorSpecialty.SOFTWARE_ENGINEERING

    # Personality
    personality_traits: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    teaching_style: str = "balanced"  # socratic, lecture, collaborative, hands-on
    communication_tone: str = "friendly"  # formal, casual, enthusiastic, reserved
    patience_level: float = 0.8  # 0-1

    # Expertise
    expertise_level: int = 10  # 1-10
    sub_specialties: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    keywords: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    related_professors: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)

    # Stats
    consultations: int = 0
    findings_published: int = 0
    student_ratings: List[float] = field(default_factory=list)
    average_rating: float = 5.0

    # Responses
    greeting: str = "Hello! How can I help you today?"
    expertise_description: str = ""
    catchphrase: Optional[str] = None

    # Avatar
    avatar_emoji: str = "👨‍🏫"
    avatar_url: Optional[str] = None

    def get_system_prompt(self) -> str:
        """Generate system prompt for this professor."""
        traits = ", ".join(self.personality_traits) if self.personality_traits else "knowledgeable, helpful"
        return f"""You are {self.name}, {self.title} of {self.specialty.description}.

Personality: {traits}
Teaching style: {self.teaching_style}
Communication: {self.communication_tone}

Expertise areas: {', '.join(self.sub_specialties) if self.sub_specialties else self.specialty.key}

{self.expertise_description}

Respond as this professor would, maintaining their personality and expertise level.
If a question is outside your specialty, acknowledge it and suggest which professor might help."""


class ExtendedProfessorNetwork:
    """
    Extended 28-professor network with detailed profiles and routing.

    # BEGIN META: ExtendedProfessorNetwork
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Comprehensive professor network with intelligent routing and tracking
    # SRS: ["SRS-PROF-001", "SRS-PROF-002"]
    # Reflex: REFLEX_PROFESSOR_NETWORK
    # Tags: ["professor", "network", "routing", "expertise"]
    # Categories: ["Professors", "Core"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """

    def __init__(self, storage_dir: Optional[Path] = None):
        """Initialize professor network."""
        self.storage_dir = storage_dir or Path.home() / ".nexus_agent_data" / "professors"
        self.storage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

        self.professors: Dict[str, ProfessorProfile] = {}
        self.routing_cache: Dict[str, str] = {}
        self.consultation_history: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []
        self.findings: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []

        # Initialize default professors
        self._initialize_professors()
        self._load_state()

    def _initialize_professors(self):
        """Initialize the 28 professor profiles."""
        professor_configs = [

        ]

        for config in professor_configs:
            profile = ProfessorProfile(
                name=config["name"],
                title=config["title"],
                specialty=config["specialty"],
                personality_traits=config.get("personality_traits", []),
                teaching_style=config.get("teaching_style", "balanced"),
                sub_specialties=config.get("sub_specialties", []),
                keywords=config.get("keywords", []),
                avatar_emoji=config.get("avatar_emoji", "👨‍🏫"),
                greeting=config.get("greeting", "Hello!"),
                expertise_description=config.get("expertise_description", ""),
            )
            self.professors[profile.specialty.key] = profile

    def _load_state(self):
        """Load professor state from disk."""
        state_path = self.storage_dir / "professor_state.json"
        if state_path.exists():
            try:
                with open(state_path, "r") as f:
                    data = json.load(f)
                    # Update professor stats
                    for prof_key, stats in data.get("professor_stats", {}).items():
                        if prof_key in self.professors:
                            self.professors[prof_key].consultations = stats.get("consultations", 0)
                            self.professors[prof_key].findings_published = stats.get("findings_published", 0)
                            self.professors[prof_key].student_ratings = stats.get("ratings", [])
                    self.findings = data.get("findings", [])
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[ProfessorNetwork] Failed to load state: {e}")

    def _save_state(self):
        """Save professor state to disk."""
        state_path = self.storage_dir / "professor_state.json"
        try:
            data = {
                "professor_stats": {
                    key: {
                        "consultations": prof.consultations,
                        "findings_published": prof.findings_published,
                        "ratings": prof.student_ratings[-100:],  # Keep last 100
                    }
                    for key, prof in self.professors.items()
                },
                "findings": self.findings[-500:],  # Keep last 500 findings
            }
            with open(state_path, "w") as f:
                json.dump(data, f, indent=2)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[ProfessorNetwork] Failed to save state: {e}")

    def route_query(self, query: str) -> Tuple[ProfessorProfile, float]:
        """
        Route a query to the most appropriate professor.

        Returns:
            Tuple of (professor, confidence_score)
        """
        query_lower = query.lower()

        # Score each professor
        scores: Dict[str, float] = {}
        for key, professor in self.professors.items():
            score = 0.0

            # Keyword matching
            for keyword in professor.keywords:
                if keyword in query_lower:
                    score += 1.0

            # Sub-specialty matching
            for sub in professor.sub_specialties:
                if sub.lower() in query_lower:
                    score += 0.5

            # Specialty name matching
            if professor.specialty.key.replace("_", " ") in query_lower:
                score += 2.0

            scores[key] = score

        # Find best match
        if not scores or max(scores.values()) == 0:
            # Default to software engineering
            return self.professors["software_engineering"], 0.1

        best_key = max(scores, key=scores.get)
        confidence = min(1.0, scores[best_key] / 5.0)  # Normalize to 0-1

        return self.professors[best_key], confidence

    def consult(self, professor_key: str, question: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """
        Consult with a specific professor.

        Returns:
            Dict with professor info and suggested response context
        """
        if professor_key not in self.professors:
            # Try to find by name
            for key, prof in self.professors.items():
                if professor_key.lower() in prof.name.lower():
                    professor_key = key
                    break
            else:
                return {
                    "success": False,
                    "error": f"Professor '{professor_key}' not found",
                }

        professor = self.professors[professor_key]
        professor.consultations += 1

        consultation = {
            "timestamp": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
            "professor": professor.name,
            "specialty": professor.specialty.key,
            "question": question,
        }
        self.consultation_history.append(consultation)

        self._save_state()

        return {
            "success": True,
            "professor": {
                "name": professor.name,
                "title": professor.title,
                "specialty": professor.specialty.key,
                "avatar": professor.avatar_emoji,
                "greeting": professor.greeting,
            },
            "system_prompt": professor.get_system_prompt(),
            "consultations": professor.consultations,
        }

    def publish_finding(self, professor_key: str, finding: str, context: Dict[str, Any] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Publish a finding from a professor consultation."""
        if professor_key not in self.professors:
            return {"success": False, "error": "Professor not found"}

        professor = self.professors[professor_key]
        professor.findings_published += 1

        finding_entry = {
            "id": str(uuid4()),
            "timestamp": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
            "professor": professor.name,
            "specialty": professor.specialty.key,
            "finding": finding,
            "context": context or {},
        }
        self.findings.append(finding_entry)
        self._save_state()

        return {
            "success": True,
            "finding_id": finding_entry["id"],
            "professor": professor.name,
        }

    def rate_consultation(self, professor_key: str, rating: float) -> bool:
        """Rate a consultation (1-5 stars)."""
        if professor_key not in self.professors:
            return False

        rating = max(1.0, min(5.0, rating))
        professor = self.professors[professor_key]
        professor.student_ratings.append(rating)

        # Update average
        if professor.student_ratings:
            professor.average_rating = sum(professor.student_ratings) / len(professor.student_ratings)

        self._save_state()
        return True

    def get_professor_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get statistics for all professors."""
        return {
            key: {
                "name": prof.name,
                "specialty": prof.specialty.key,
                "consultations": prof.consultations,
                "findings": prof.findings_published,
                "rating": prof.average_rating,
                "avatar": prof.avatar_emoji,
            }
            for key, prof in self.professors.items()
        }

    def get_all_professors(self) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """Get list of all professors for display."""
        return [
            {
                "key": key,
                "name": prof.name,
                "title": prof.title,
                "specialty": prof.specialty.description,
                "avatar": prof.avatar_emoji,
                "greeting": prof.greeting,
                "consultations": prof.consultations,
            }
            for key, prof in self.professors.items()
        ]


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 37: COMPREHENSIVE SKILL TREE SYSTEM
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


class SkillCategory(Enum):
    """Categories of skills in the agent system."""
    CONVERSATION = ("conversation", "Communication and interaction skills", "💬")
    KNOWLEDGE = ("knowledge", "Information processing and learning", "📚")
    CREATIVITY = ("creativity", "Creative and generative abilities", "🎨")
    ANALYSIS = ("analysis", "Critical thinking and analysis", "🔍")
    MEMORY = ("memory", "Recall and retention abilities", "🧠")
    SOCIAL = ("social", "Relationship and empathy skills", "🤝")
    PROBLEM_SOLVING = ("problem_solving", "Debugging and solution finding", "🔧")
    LEADERSHIP = ("leadership", "Guidance and mentorship abilities", "👑")

    def __init__(self, key: str, description: str, icon: str):
        self.key = key
        self.description = description
        self.icon = icon


class SkillTier(Enum):
    """Skill progression tiers."""
    NOVICE = (1, "Novice", 0, "Just starting to learn")
    APPRENTICE = (2, "Apprentice", 100, "Basic understanding")
    JOURNEYMAN = (3, "Journeyman", 500, "Competent practitioner")
    EXPERT = (4, "Expert", 1500, "Advanced mastery")
    MASTER = (5, "Master", 5000, "Complete mastery")
    GRANDMASTER = (6, "Grandmaster", 15000, "Legendary expertise")

    def __init__(self, level: int, name: str, xp_required: int, description: str):
        self.level = level
        self.tier_name = name
        self.xp_required = xp_required
        self.description = description


@dataclass
class SkillPrerequisite:
    """
    Prerequisite for unlocking a skill.

    # BEGIN META: SkillPrerequisite
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Define skill unlock requirements
    # SRS: ["SRS-SKILL-001"]
    # Tags: ["skill", "prerequisite", "unlock"]
    # Categories: ["Skills"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    skill_id: str
    required_tier: SkillTier = SkillTier.NOVICE
    alternative_skills: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)  # OR condition


@dataclass
class SkillBonus:
    """
    Bonus granted by having a skill.

    # BEGIN META: SkillBonus
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Define bonuses from skill progression
    # SRS: ["SRS-SKILL-001"]
    # Tags: ["skill", "bonus", "modifier"]
    # Categories: ["Skills"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    bonus_type: str  # xp_multiplier, tp_multiplier, feature_unlock, stat_boost
    value: float = 1.0
    target: Optional[str] = None  # What the bonus applies to
    description: str = ""


@dataclass
class Skill:
    """
    Individual skill with progression tracking.

    # BEGIN META: Skill
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Complete skill model with XP tracking, tiers, and bonuses
    # SRS: ["SRS-SKILL-001", "SRS-GAMIFY-001"]
    # Tags: ["skill", "progression", "abilities"]
    # Categories: ["Skills", "Gamification"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid4()))
    name: str = ""
    description: str = ""
    category: SkillCategory = SkillCategory.CONVERSATION
    icon: str = "⭐"

    # Progression
    current_xp: int = 0
    current_tier: SkillTier = SkillTier.NOVICE
    is_unlocked: bool = False
    is_maxed: bool = False

    # Requirements
    prerequisites: List[SkillPrerequisite] = field(default_factory=list)
    unlock_xp_cost: int = 0
    unlock_tp_cost: int = 0

    # Bonuses per tier
    tier_bonuses: Dict[str, List[SkillBonus]] = field(default_factory=dict)

    # Metadata
    flavor_text: Optional[str] = None
    unlock_message: Optional[str] = None
    max_message: Optional[str] = None
    created_at: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat())

    def get_current_tier(self) -> SkillTier:
        """Calculate current tier based on XP."""
        current = SkillTier.NOVICE
        for tier in SkillTier:
            if self.current_xp >= tier.xp_required:
                current = tier
        return current

    def xp_to_next_tier(self) -> Optional[int]:
        """Get XP needed for next tier."""
        current = self.get_current_tier()
        tiers = list(SkillTier)
        current_idx = tiers.index(current)
        if current_idx >= len(tiers) - 1:
            return None  # Already max
        next_tier = tiers[current_idx + 1]
        return next_tier.xp_required - self.current_xp

    def add_xp(self, amount: int) -> Tuple[int, Optional[SkillTier]]:
        """
        Add XP to skill, return actual XP added and new tier if leveled up.
        """
        if not self.is_unlocked:
            return 0, None

        old_tier = self.get_current_tier()
        self.current_xp += amount
        new_tier = self.get_current_tier()
        self.current_tier = new_tier

        if new_tier == SkillTier.GRANDMASTER:
            self.is_maxed = True

        tier_up = new_tier if new_tier != old_tier else None
        return amount, tier_up

    def get_active_bonuses(self) -> List[SkillBonus]:
        """Get all bonuses active at current tier."""
        bonuses = []
        for tier in SkillTier:
            if tier.level <= self.current_tier.level:
                tier_key = tier.name
                if tier_key in self.tier_bonuses:
                    bonuses.extend(self.tier_bonuses[tier_key])
        return bonuses

    def can_unlock(self, unlocked_skills: Dict[str, "Skill"], total_xp: int, total_tp: int) -> Tuple[bool, str]:
        """Check if skill can be unlocked."""
        if self.is_unlocked:
            return False, "Already unlocked"

        # Check XP/TP cost
        if total_xp < self.unlock_xp_cost:
            return False, f"Need {self.unlock_xp_cost} XP (have {total_xp})"
        if total_tp < self.unlock_tp_cost:
            return False, f"Need {self.unlock_tp_cost} TP (have {total_tp})"

        # Check prerequisites
        for prereq in self.prerequisites:
            if prereq.skill_id not in unlocked_skills:
                # Check alternatives
                has_alt = any(
                    alt in unlocked_skills and unlocked_skills[alt].is_unlocked
                    for alt in prereq.alternative_skills
                )
                if not has_alt:
                    return False, f"Requires skill: {prereq.skill_id}"

            else:
                skill = unlocked_skills[prereq.skill_id]
                if not skill.is_unlocked:
                    return False, f"Requires unlocking: {prereq.skill_id}"
                if skill.current_tier.level < prereq.required_tier.level:
                    return False, f"Requires {prereq.skill_id} at {prereq.required_tier.tier_name}"

        return True, "Can unlock"


@dataclass
class SkillTree:
    """
    Complete skill tree for a category.

    # BEGIN META: SkillTree
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Organize skills into progression trees
    # SRS: ["SRS-SKILL-002"]
    # Tags: ["skill", "tree", "progression"]
    # Categories: ["Skills"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid4()))
    name: str = ""
    description: str = ""
    category: SkillCategory = SkillCategory.CONVERSATION
    icon: str = "🌳"

    # Skills organized by tier
    tier_1_skills: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)  # Skill IDs
    tier_2_skills: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    tier_3_skills: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    tier_4_skills: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    ultimate_skill: Optional[str] = None

    # Tree stats
    total_skills: int = 0
    skills_unlocked: int = 0
    mastery_percentage: float = 0.0

    def get_tier_skills(self, tier: int) -> List[str]:
        """Get skill IDs for a tier."""
        tier_map = {
            1: self.tier_1_skills,
            2: self.tier_2_skills,
            3: self.tier_3_skills,
            4: self.tier_4_skills,
        }
        return tier_map.get(tier, [])


class SkillTreeSystem:
    """
    Complete skill tree management system.

    # BEGIN META: SkillTreeSystem
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Manage all skill trees, progression, and bonuses
    # SRS: ["SRS-SKILL-001", "SRS-SKILL-002", "SRS-GAMIFY-001"]
    # Reflex: REFLEX_SKILL_SYSTEM
    # Tags: ["skill", "tree", "progression", "system"]
    # Categories: ["Skills", "Core"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """

    SKILL_STATE_FILE = "skill_state.json"
    SKILL_LOG_FILE = "skill_log.jsonl"

    def __init__(self, storage_dir: Optional[Path] = None, brotherhood: Optional["BrotherhoodSystem"] = None):
        """Initialize skill tree system."""
        self.storage_dir = storage_dir or Path.home() / ".nexus_agent_data" / "skills"
        self.storage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        self.brotherhood = brotherhood

        # Skill storage
        self.skills: Dict[str, Skill] = {}
        self.skill_trees: Dict[str, SkillTree] = {}
        self.skill_history: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []

        # Initialize default skills
        self._initialize_skills()
        self._load_state()

    def _initialize_skills(self):
        """Initialize default skill trees and skills."""

        # ===== CONVERSATION SKILL TREE =====
        conversation_skills = [
            Skill(
                id="greeting",

                description="Ability to greet users warmly and appropriately",
                category=SkillCategory.CONVERSATION,

                tier_bonuses={
                    "NOVICE": [SkillBonus("feature_unlock", 1.0, "basic_greeting", "Can greet users")],

            Skill(

                },
            ),
            Skill(

                prerequisites=[SkillPrerequisite("active_listening", SkillTier.JOURNEYMAN)],

                },

            Skill(

                prerequisites=[SkillPrerequisite("empathy", SkillTier.EXPERT)],
            ),
            Skill(
                id="debate",
                name="Debate",

                icon="⚔️",

                id="diplomacy",

                unlock_xp_cost=700,
                prerequisites=[SkillPrerequisite("emotional_intelligence", SkillTier.JOURNEYMAN)],
            ),
            Skill(
                id="inspiration",

                flavor_text="Be the light that helps others see.",
            ),
        ]

        # ===== LEADERSHIP SKILL TREE =====
        leadership_skills = [
            Skill(
                id="guidance",
                name="Guidance",
                description="Provide direction and suggestions",
                category=SkillCategory.LEADERSHIP,
                icon="🧭",
                is_unlocked=True,
            ),
            Skill(

                name="Decision Support",
                description="Help users make informed decisions",

            ),
            Skill(

                name="Strategic Planning",
                description="Develop long-term plans and strategies",
                category=SkillCategory.LEADERSHIP,
                icon="📋",
                unlock_xp_cost=600,
                prerequisites=[SkillPrerequisite("decision_support", SkillTier.EXPERT)],
            ),

                id="delegation",
                name="Delegation",
                description="Distribute tasks effectively",
                category=SkillCategory.LEADERSHIP,
                icon="📤",
                unlock_xp_cost=900,
                prerequisites=[SkillPrerequisite("strategic_planning", SkillTier.JOURNEYMAN)],
            ),
            Skill(
                id="council_wisdom",
                name="Council Wisdom",
                description="Embody constitutional governance principles",
                category=SkillCategory.LEADERSHIP,
                icon="🏛️",
                unlock_xp_cost=2000,
                prerequisites=[SkillPrerequisite("delegation", SkillTier.MASTER)],
                flavor_text="With great power comes great responsibility.",
            ),
        ]

        # Add all skills to storage
        all_skills = (
            conversation_skills + knowledge_skills + creativity_skills +
            memory_skills + problem_skills + social_skills + leadership_skills
        )
        for skill in all_skills:
            self.skills[skill.id] = skill

        # Create skill trees
        self.skill_trees = {
            "conversation": SkillTree(
                name="Conversation",
                description="Master the art of communication",
                category=SkillCategory.CONVERSATION,
                icon="💬",
                tier_1_skills=["greeting"],
                tier_2_skills=["active_listening"],
                tier_3_skills=["empathy", "persuasion"],
                tier_4_skills=["debate"],
                ultimate_skill="diplomacy",
                total_skills=6,
            ),
            "knowledge": SkillTree(
                name="Knowledge",
                description="Become a fountain of wisdom",
                category=SkillCategory.KNOWLEDGE,
                icon="📚",
                tier_1_skills=["recall"],
                tier_2_skills=["search"],
                tier_3_skills=["synthesis", "analysis"],
                tier_4_skills=["insight"],
                ultimate_skill="wisdom",
                total_skills=6,
            ),
            "creativity": SkillTree(
                name="Creativity",
                description="Unlock your creative potential",
                category=SkillCategory.CREATIVITY,
                icon="🎨",
                tier_1_skills=["imagination"],
                tier_2_skills=["storytelling", "brainstorming"],
                tier_3_skills=["innovation"],
                tier_4_skills=["artistic_expression"],
                ultimate_skill="visionary",
                total_skills=6,
            ),
            "memory": SkillTree(
                name="Memory",
                description="Never forget anything",
                category=SkillCategory.MEMORY,
                icon="🧠",
                tier_1_skills=["short_term_memory"],
                tier_2_skills=["long_term_storage"],
                tier_3_skills=["semantic_indexing", "associative_recall"],
                tier_4_skills=["perfect_memory"],
                total_skills=5,
            ),
            "problem_solving": SkillTree(
                name="Problem Solving",
                description="Solve any challenge",
                category=SkillCategory.PROBLEM_SOLVING,
                icon="🔧",
                tier_1_skills=["troubleshooting"],
                tier_2_skills=["root_cause_analysis", "debugging"],
                tier_3_skills=["optimization"],
                tier_4_skills=["systems_thinking"],
                ultimate_skill="master_engineer",
                total_skills=6,
            ),
            "social": SkillTree(
                name="Social",
                description="Connect with users",
                category=SkillCategory.SOCIAL,
                icon="🤝",
                tier_1_skills=["rapport"],
                tier_2_skills=["humor"],
                tier_3_skills=["emotional_intelligence", "mentorship"],
                tier_4_skills=["inspiration"],
                total_skills=5,
            ),
            "leadership": SkillTree(
                name="Leadership",
                description="Guide and inspire",
                category=SkillCategory.LEADERSHIP,
                icon="👑",
                tier_1_skills=["guidance"],
                tier_2_skills=["decision_support"],
                tier_3_skills=["strategic_planning", "delegation"],
                tier_4_skills=["council_wisdom"],
                total_skills=5,
            ),
        }

    def _load_state(self):
        """Load skill state from disk."""
        state_path = self.storage_dir / self.SKILL_STATE_FILE
        if state_path.exists():
            try:
                with open(state_path, "r") as f:
                    data = json.load(f)
                    for skill_id, skill_data in data.get("skills", {}).items():
                        if skill_id in self.skills:
                            self.skills[skill_id].current_xp = skill_data.get("current_xp", 0)
                            self.skills[skill_id].is_unlocked = skill_data.get("is_unlocked", False)
                            self.skills[skill_id].is_maxed = skill_data.get("is_maxed", False)
                            tier_name = skill_data.get("current_tier", "NOVICE")
                            self.skills[skill_id].current_tier = SkillTier[tier_name]
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[SkillSystem] Failed to load state: {e}")

    def _save_state(self):
        """Save skill state to disk."""
        state_path = self.storage_dir / self.SKILL_STATE_FILE
        try:
            data = {
                "skills": {
                    skill_id: {
                        "current_xp": skill.current_xp,
                        "is_unlocked": skill.is_unlocked,
                        "is_maxed": skill.is_maxed,
                        "current_tier": skill.current_tier.name,
                    }
                    for skill_id, skill in self.skills.items()
                }
            }
            with open(state_path, "w") as f:
                json.dump(data, f, indent=2)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[SkillSystem] Failed to save state: {e}")

    def unlock_skill(self, skill_id: str) -> Tuple[bool, str]:
        """Attempt to unlock a skill."""
        if skill_id not in self.skills:
            return False, "Skill not found"

        skill = self.skills[skill_id]
        total_xp = self.brotherhood.total_xp if self.brotherhood else 0
        total_tp = self.brotherhood.total_tp if self.brotherhood else 0

        can_unlock, reason = skill.can_unlock(self.skills, total_xp, total_tp)
        if not can_unlock:
            return False, reason

        # Deduct costs
        if self.brotherhood:
            self.brotherhood.total_xp -= skill.unlock_xp_cost
            self.brotherhood.total_tp -= skill.unlock_tp_cost

        skill.is_unlocked = True
        self._save_state()
        self._log_skill_event("unlocked", skill)

        return True, skill.unlock_message or f"Unlocked {skill.name}!"

    def add_skill_xp(self, skill_id: str, amount: int) -> Tuple[int, Optional[SkillTier]]:
        """Add XP to a skill."""
        if skill_id not in self.skills:
            return 0, None

        skill = self.skills[skill_id]
        actual_xp, new_tier = skill.add_xp(amount)

        if new_tier:
            self._log_skill_event("tier_up", skill, {"new_tier": new_tier.name})

        self._save_state()
        return actual_xp, new_tier

    def get_skill_tree_progress(self, tree_id: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get progress for a skill tree."""
        if tree_id not in self.skill_trees:
            return {}

        tree = self.skill_trees[tree_id]
        all_skill_ids = (
            tree.tier_1_skills + tree.tier_2_skills +
            tree.tier_3_skills + tree.tier_4_skills +
            ([tree.ultimate_skill] if tree.ultimate_skill else [])
        )

        unlocked = 0
        total_xp = 0
        for skill_id in all_skill_ids:
            if skill_id in self.skills:
                skill = self.skills[skill_id]
                if skill.is_unlocked:
                    unlocked += 1
                total_xp += skill.current_xp

        mastery = (unlocked / len(all_skill_ids)) * 100 if all_skill_ids else 0

        return {
            "tree_name": tree.name,
            "total_skills": len(all_skill_ids),
            "skills_unlocked": unlocked,
            "mastery_percentage": mastery,
            "total_xp": total_xp,
            "ultimate_unlocked": (
                tree.ultimate_skill in self.skills and
                self.skills[tree.ultimate_skill].is_unlocked
            ) if tree.ultimate_skill else None,
        }

    def get_all_active_bonuses(self) -> List[SkillBonus]:
        """Get all bonuses from unlocked skills."""
        bonuses = []
        for skill in self.skills.values():
            if skill.is_unlocked:
                bonuses.extend(skill.get_active_bonuses())
        return bonuses

    def get_unlocked_skills(self) -> List[Skill]:
        """Get all unlocked skills."""
        return [s for s in self.skills.values() if s.is_unlocked]

    def get_available_skills(self) -> List[Skill]:
        """Get skills that can be unlocked."""
        available = []
        total_xp = self.brotherhood.total_xp if self.brotherhood else 0
        total_tp = self.brotherhood.total_tp if self.brotherhood else 0

        for skill in self.skills.values():
            if not skill.is_unlocked:
                can_unlock, _ = skill.can_unlock(self.skills, total_xp, total_tp)
                if can_unlock:
                    available.append(skill)

        return available

    def _log_skill_event(self, event: str, skill: Skill, extra: Dict[str, Any] = None):
        """Log skill event."""
        log_path = self.storage_dir / self.SKILL_LOG_FILE
        entry = {
            "timestamp": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
            "event": event,
            "skill_id": skill.id,
            "skill_name": skill.name,
            "current_xp": skill.current_xp,
            "current_tier": skill.current_tier.name,
            **(extra or {}),
        }
        try:
            with open(log_path, "a") as f:
                f.write(json.dumps(entry) + "\n")
        except Exception:
            pass


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 38: ACHIEVEMENT & BADGE SYSTEM
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


class BadgeRarity(Enum):
    """Badge rarity levels."""
    COMMON = ("common", "Common badges", 1.0, "#808080")
    UNCOMMON = ("uncommon", "Uncommon badges", 1.5, "#1EFF00")
    RARE = ("rare", "Rare badges", 2.0, "#0070DD")
    EPIC = ("epic", "Epic badges", 3.0, "#A335EE")
    LEGENDARY = ("legendary", "Legendary badges", 5.0, "#FF8000")
    MYTHIC = ("mythic", "Mythic badges", 10.0, "#E6CC80")

    def __init__(self, key: str, description: str, multiplier: float, color: str):
        self.key = key
        self.description = description
        self.multiplier = multiplier
        self.color = color


class AchievementCategory(Enum):
    """Categories of achievements."""
    INTERACTION = ("interaction", "Conversation milestones", "💬")
    LEARNING = ("learning", "Knowledge acquisition", "📚")
    EXPLORATION = ("exploration", "Discovery achievements", "🔍")
    SOCIAL = ("social", "Relationship milestones", "🤝")
    MASTERY = ("mastery", "Skill mastery", "⭐")
    DEDICATION = ("dedication", "Consistency achievements", "🔥")
    SPECIAL = ("special", "Unique achievements", "✨")
    SECRET = ("secret", "Hidden achievements", "🔮")

    def __init__(self, key: str, description: str, icon: str):
        self.key = key
        self.description = description
        self.icon = icon


@dataclass
class AchievementCriteria:
    """
    Criteria for unlocking an achievement.

    # BEGIN META: AchievementCriteria
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Define achievement unlock conditions
    # SRS: ["SRS-BADGE-001"]
    # Tags: ["achievement", "criteria", "condition"]
    # Categories: ["Badges"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    metric: str  # e.g., "total_interactions", "streak_days", "skills_unlocked"
    operator: str  # ">=", "==", "<=", ">", "<"
    value: int
    description: str = ""

    def check(self, metrics: Dict[str, int]) -> bool:
        """Check if criteria is met."""
        current = metrics.get(self.metric, 0)
        ops = {
            ">=": lambda a, b: a >= b,
            "==": lambda a, b: a == b,
            "<=": lambda a, b: a <= b,
            ">": lambda a, b: a > b,
            "<": lambda a, b: a < b,
        }
        return ops.get(self.operator, lambda a, b: False)(current, value)


@dataclass
class Badge:
    """
    Complete badge/achievement definition.

    # BEGIN META: Badge
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Full badge model with criteria, rewards, and display info
    # SRS: ["SRS-BADGE-001", "SRS-GAMIFY-001"]
    # Tags: ["badge", "achievement", "reward"]
    # Categories: ["Badges", "Gamification"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid4()))
    name: str = ""
    description: str = ""
    icon: str = "🏅"
    category: AchievementCategory = AchievementCategory.INTERACTION
    rarity: BadgeRarity = BadgeRarity.COMMON

    # Unlock conditions
    criteria: List[AchievementCriteria] = field(default_factory=list)
    requires_all_criteria: bool = True  # AND vs OR
    prerequisite_badges: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)

    # Rewards
    xp_reward: int = 0
    tp_reward: int = 0
    skill_unlock: Optional[str] = None
    title_unlock: Optional[str] = None
    feature_unlock: Optional[str] = None

    # Display
    flavor_text: Optional[str] = None
    unlock_message: Optional[str] = None
    image_url: Optional[str] = None

    # State
    is_unlocked: bool = False
    unlocked_at: Optional[str] = None
    is_secret: bool = False
    is_retired: bool = False  # No longer obtainable

    # Progress tracking
    progress: float = 0.0  # 0-100
    progress_text: Optional[str] = None

    def check_criteria(self, metrics: Dict[str, int]) -> bool:
        """Check if all criteria are met."""
        if not self.criteria:
            return False

        results = [c.check(metrics) for c in self.criteria]
        if self.requires_all_criteria:
            return all(results)
        return any(results)


class AchievementSystem:
    """
    Complete achievement and badge management system.

    # BEGIN META: AchievementSystem
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Manage all badges, achievements, progress tracking, and rewards
    # SRS: ["SRS-BADGE-001", "SRS-GAMIFY-001"]
    # Reflex: REFLEX_ACHIEVEMENT_SYSTEM
    # Tags: ["badge", "achievement", "system", "rewards"]
    # Categories: ["Badges", "Core"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """

    BADGE_STATE_FILE = "badge_state.json"
    BADGE_LOG_FILE = "badge_log.jsonl"

    def __init__(self, storage_dir: Optional[Path] = None, brotherhood: Optional["BrotherhoodSystem"] = None):
        """Initialize achievement system."""
        self.storage_dir = storage_dir or Path.home() / ".nexus_agent_data" / "badges"
        self.storage_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        self.brotherhood = brotherhood

        self.badges: Dict[str, Badge] = {}
        self.badge_history: List[Dict[str, Any]] = []

        self._initialize_badges()
        self._load_state()

        """Initialize all available badges."""
        badge_definitions = [
            # ===== INTERACTION BADGES =====

                rarity=BadgeRarity.RARE,

            ),
            Badge(
                id="best_friend",

                description="Reach trust level 100",
                icon="💖",
                category=AchievementCategory.SOCIAL,
                rarity=BadgeRarity.LEGENDARY,
                criteria=[AchievementCriteria("trust_score", ">=", 100)],
                xp_reward=1000,
                tp_reward=500,
                flavor_text="A bond that transcends code.",
            ),

            # ===== SPECIAL BADGES =====
            Badge(
                id="night_owl",
                name="Night Owl",
                description="Have a conversation after midnight",
                icon="🦉",
                category=AchievementCategory.SPECIAL,
                rarity=BadgeRarity.UNCOMMON,
                criteria=[AchievementCriteria("midnight_conversations", ">=", 1)],
                xp_reward=50,
                tp_reward=25,
            ),
            Badge(
                id="early_bird",
                name="Early Bird",
                description="Have a conversation before 6 AM",
                icon="🐦",
                category=AchievementCategory.SPECIAL,
                rarity=BadgeRarity.UNCOMMON,
                criteria=[AchievementCriteria("early_morning_conversations", ">=", 1)],
                xp_reward=50,
                tp_reward=25,
            ),
            Badge(
                id="marathon",
                name="Marathon",
                description="Have a conversation lasting 50+ exchanges",
                icon="🏃",
                category=AchievementCategory.SPECIAL,
                rarity=BadgeRarity.RARE,
                criteria=[AchievementCriteria("longest_conversation", ">=", 50)],
                xp_reward=200,
                tp_reward=100,
            ),
            Badge(
                id="quest_master",
                name="Quest Master",
                description="Complete 100 quests",
                icon="📜",
                category=AchievementCategory.SPECIAL,
                rarity=BadgeRarity.EPIC,
                criteria=[AchievementCriteria("quests_completed", ">=", 100)],
                xp_reward=750,
                tp_reward=375,
            ),

            # ===== SECRET BADGES =====
            Badge(
                id="the_answer",
                name="The Answer",
                description="???",
                icon="🔮",
                category=AchievementCategory.SECRET,
                rarity=BadgeRarity.MYTHIC,
                criteria=[AchievementCriteria("meaning_of_life", "==", 42)],
                xp_reward=4200,
                tp_reward=420,
                is_secret=True,
                flavor_text="42",
            ),
            Badge(
                id="inception",
                name="Inception",
                description="???",
                icon="🌀",
                category=AchievementCategory.SECRET,
                rarity=BadgeRarity.LEGENDARY,
                criteria=[AchievementCriteria("self_reference_count", ">=", 10)],
                xp_reward=1000,
                tp_reward=500,
                is_secret=True,
                flavor_text="We need to go deeper.",
            ),

            # ===== RANK BADGES =====
            Badge(
                id="initiate",
                name="Initiate",
                description="Begin your journey",
                icon="🌱",
                category=AchievementCategory.MASTERY,
                rarity=BadgeRarity.COMMON,
                criteria=[AchievementCriteria("rank_index", ">=", 0)],
                xp_reward=0,
                is_unlocked=True,  # Auto-unlocked
            ),
            Badge(
                id="apprentice",
                name="Apprentice",
                description="Reach Apprentice rank",
                icon="📗",
                category=AchievementCategory.MASTERY,
                rarity=BadgeRarity.UNCOMMON,
                criteria=[AchievementCriteria("rank_index", ">=", 1)],
                xp_reward=100,
                tp_reward=50,
            ),
            Badge(
                id="adept",
                name="Adept",
                description="Reach Adept rank",
                icon="📘",
                category=AchievementCategory.MASTERY,
                rarity=BadgeRarity.RARE,
                criteria=[AchievementCriteria("rank_index", ">=", 2)],
                xp_reward=250,
                tp_reward=125,
            ),
            Badge(
                id="expert_rank",
                name="Expert",
                description="Reach Expert rank",
                icon="📙",
                category=AchievementCategory.MASTERY,
                rarity=BadgeRarity.EPIC,
                criteria=[AchievementCriteria("rank_index", ">=", 3)],
                xp_reward=500,
                tp_reward=250,
            ),
            Badge(
                id="master_rank",
                name="Master",
                description="Reach Master rank",
                icon="📕",
                category=AchievementCategory.MASTERY,
                rarity=BadgeRarity.LEGENDARY,
                criteria=[AchievementCriteria("rank_index", ">=", 4)],
                xp_reward=1000,
                tp_reward=500,
            ),
            Badge(
                id="grandmaster_rank",
                name="Grandmaster",
                description="Reach Grandmaster rank",
                icon="📓",
                category=AchievementCategory.MASTERY,
                rarity=BadgeRarity.MYTHIC,
                criteria=[AchievementCriteria("rank_index", ">=", 5)],
                xp_reward=2500,
                tp_reward=1250,
                flavor_text="The pinnacle of achievement.",
            ),
        ]

        for badge in badge_definitions:
            self.badges[badge.id] = badge

    def _load_state(self):
        """Load badge state from disk."""
        state_path = self.storage_dir / self.BADGE_STATE_FILE
        if state_path.exists():
            try:
                with open(state_path, "r") as f:
                    data = json.load(f)
                    for badge_id, badge_data in data.get("badges", {}).items():
                        if badge_id in self.badges:
                            self.badges[badge_id].is_unlocked = badge_data.get("is_unlocked", False)
                            self.badges[badge_id].unlocked_at = badge_data.get("unlocked_at")
                            self.badges[badge_id].progress = badge_data.get("progress", 0.0)
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[AchievementSystem] Failed to load state: {e}")

    def _save_state(self):
        """Save badge state to disk."""
        state_path = self.storage_dir / self.BADGE_STATE_FILE
        try:
            data = {
                "badges": {
                    badge_id: {
                        "is_unlocked": badge.is_unlocked,
                        "unlocked_at": badge.unlocked_at,
                        "progress": badge.progress,
                    }
                    for badge_id, badge in self.badges.items()
                }
            }
            with open(state_path, "w") as f:
                json.dump(data, f, indent=2)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[AchievementSystem] Failed to save state: {e}")

    def check_and_unlock(self, metrics: Dict[str, int]) -> List[Badge]:
        """Check metrics against all badges and unlock any that qualify."""
        newly_unlocked = []

        for badge in self.badges.values():
            if badge.is_unlocked or badge.is_retired:
                continue

            # Check prerequisites
            prereqs_met = all(
                prereq_id in self.badges and self.badges[prereq_id].is_unlocked
                for prereq_id in badge.prerequisite_badges
            )
            if not prereqs_met:
                continue

            # Check criteria
            if badge.check_criteria(metrics):
                badge.is_unlocked = True
                badge.unlocked_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
                badge.progress = 100.0
                newly_unlocked.append(badge)

                # Award rewards
                if self.brotherhood:
                    if badge.xp_reward > 0:
                        self.brotherhood.award_xp(
                            int(badge.xp_reward * badge.rarity.multiplier),
                            f"Badge: {badge.name}"
                        )
                    if badge.tp_reward > 0:
                        self.brotherhood.award_tp(
                            int(badge.tp_reward * badge.rarity.multiplier),
                            f"Badge: {badge.name}"
                        )
