@dataclass
class NLUResult:
    """
    Complete NLU analysis result.

    # BEGIN META: NLUResult
    # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-001", "SRS-NLU-002", "SRS-NLU-003"]
    # Purpose: Aggregate all NLU analysis results
    # END META
    """
    original_text: str
    processed_text: str
    intent: IntentResult
    entities: List[ExtractedEntity]
    sentiment: SentimentResult
    language: LanguageResult
    topics: TopicResult
    tokens: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    processed_at: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat())
    processing_time_ms: float = 0.0
    metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)


class TextPreprocessor:
    """
    Text preprocessing utilities.

    # BEGIN META: TextPreprocessor
    # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-006"]
    # Purpose: Preprocess text for NLU analysis
    # END META
    """

    # Common contractions
    CONTRACTIONS = {
        "won't": "will not",
        "can't": "cannot",
        "n't": " not",
        "'re": " are",
        "'s": " is",
        "'d": " would",
        "'ll": " will",
        "'ve": " have",
        "'m": " am",
    }

    # Stop words (common words to filter)
    STOP_WORDS = {
        "a", "an", "the", "and", "or", "but", "in", "on", "at", "to", "for",
        "of", "with", "by", "from", "as", "is", "was", "are", "were", "been",
        "be", "have", "has", "had", "do", "does", "did", "will", "would",
        "could", "should", "may", "might", "must", "shall", "this", "that",
        "these", "those", "i", "you", "he", "she", "it", "we", "they", "me",
        "him", "her", "us", "them", "my", "your", "his", "its", "our", "their",
    }

    def __init__(self):
        self.cache: Dict[str, str] = {}

    def preprocess(
        self,
        text: str,
        lowercase: bool = True,
        remove_punctuation: bool = False,
        expand_contractions: bool = True,
        remove_stop_words: bool = False,
        remove_extra_whitespace: bool = True,
    ) -> str:
        """
        Preprocess text with various options.

        # BEGIN META: preprocess
        # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-006"]
        # Purpose: Apply text preprocessing transformations
        # END META
        """
        if not text:
            return ""

        result = text

        # Expand contractions
        if expand_contractions:
            for contraction, expansion in self.CONTRACTIONS.items():
                result = result.replace(contraction, expansion)

        # Lowercase
        if lowercase:
            result = result.lower()

        # Remove punctuation
        if remove_punctuation:
            import re
            result = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', '', result)

        # Remove extra whitespace
        if remove_extra_whitespace:
            result = ' '.join(result.split())

        # Remove stop words
        if remove_stop_words:
            words = result.split()
            result = ' '.join(w for w in words if w.lower() not in self.STOP_WORDS)

        return result

    def tokenize(self, text: str) -> List[str]:
        """Simple word tokenization."""
        import re
        return re.findall(r'\b\w+\b', text.lower())

    def sentence_split(self, text: str) -> List[str]:
        """Split text into sentences."""
        import re
        sentences = re.split(r'(?<=[.!?])\s+', text)
        return [s.strip() for s in sentences if s.strip()]

    def normalize_unicode(self, text: str) -> str:
        """Normalize unicode characters."""
        import unicodedata
        return unicodedata.normalize('NFKD', text)

    def remove_html_tags(self, text: str) -> str:
        """Remove HTML tags from text."""
        import re
        return re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', text)

    def remove_urls(self, text: str) -> Tuple[str, List[str]]:
        """Remove URLs from text and return them separately."""
        import re
        url_pattern = r'https?://[^\s]+'
        urls = re.findall(url_pattern, text)
        clean_text = re.sub(url_pattern, '', text)
        return clean_text.strip(), urls

    def remove_mentions(self, text: str) -> Tuple[str, List[str]]:
        """Remove @mentions from text and return them separately."""
        import re
        mention_pattern = r'@\w+'
        mentions = re.findall(mention_pattern, text)
        clean_text = re.sub(mention_pattern, '', text)
        return clean_text.strip(), mentions

    def remove_hashtags(self, text: str) -> Tuple[str, List[str]]:
        """Remove #hashtags from text and return them separately."""
        import re
        hashtag_pattern = r'#\w+'
        hashtags = re.findall(hashtag_pattern, text)
        clean_text = re.sub(hashtag_pattern, '', text)
        return clean_text.strip(), hashtags


class IntentClassifier:
    """
    Intent classification using keyword matching and patterns.

    # BEGIN META: IntentClassifier
    # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-001"]
    # Purpose: Classify user intents from text
    # END META
    """

    def __init__(self):
        self.preprocessor = TextPreprocessor()
        self.custom_patterns: Dict[str, List[str]] = {}

    def classify(self, text: str) -> IntentResult:
        """
        Classify intent from text.

        # BEGIN META: classify
        # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-001"]
        # Purpose: Determine primary and secondary intents
        # END META
        """
        processed_text = self.preprocessor.preprocess(text)
        tokens = self.preprocessor.tokenize(processed_text)

        scores: Dict[IntentCategory, float] = {}
        matched_keywords: Dict[IntentCategory, List[str]] = {}

        for intent in IntentCategory:
            score = 0.0
            matches = []
            for keyword in intent.keywords:
                if keyword.lower() in processed_text:
                    score += 1.0
                    matches.append(keyword)
            if score > 0:
                scores[intent] = score
                matched_keywords[intent] = matches

        # Sort by score
        sorted_intents = sorted(scores.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)

        if sorted_intents:
            primary_intent = sorted_intents[0][0]
            primary_confidence = min(sorted_intents[0][1] / 3.0, 1.0)  # Normalize to 0-1
            secondary = [(i, min(s / 3.0, 1.0)) for i, s in sorted_intents[1:4]]
            primary_matches = matched_keywords.get(primary_intent, [])
        else:
            primary_intent = IntentCategory.UNKNOWN
            primary_confidence = 0.5
            secondary = []
            primary_matches = []

        return IntentResult(
            primary_intent=primary_intent,
            confidence=primary_confidence,
            secondary_intents=secondary,
            matched_keywords=primary_matches,
        )

    def add_custom_pattern(self, intent_name: str, patterns: List[str]) -> None:
        """Add custom patterns for intent matching."""
        self.custom_patterns[intent_name] = patterns


class EntityExtractor:
    """
    Entity extraction using patterns and rules.

    # BEGIN META: EntityExtractor
    # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-002"]
    # Purpose: Extract entities from text
    # END META
    """

    # Regex patterns for common entities
    PATTERNS = {
        EntityType.EMAIL: r'\b[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,}\b',
        EntityType.URL: r'https?://[^\s]+',
        EntityType.PHONE: r'\b(?:\+\d{1,3}[-.]?)?\(?\d{3}\)?[-.]?\d{3}[-.]?\d{4}\b',
        EntityType.DATE: r'\b\d{1,2}[/-]\d{1,2}[/-]\d{2,4}\b|\b(?:Jan|Feb|Mar|Apr|May|Jun|Jul|Aug|Sep|Oct|Nov|Dec)[a-z]* \d{1,2},? \d{4}\b',
        EntityType.TIME: r'\b\d{1,2}:\d{2}(?::\d{2})?\s*(?:AM|PM|am|pm)?\b',
        EntityType.NUMBER: r'\b\d+(?:\.\d+)?\b',
        EntityType.PERCENTAGE: r'\b\d+(?:\.\d+)?%\b',
        EntityType.MONEY: r'\$\d+(?:\.\d{2})?|\d+(?:\.\d{2})?\s*(?:dollars?|USD|EUR|GBP)',
        EntityType.VERSION: r'\bv?\d+\.\d+(?:\.\d+)?(?:-\w+)?\b',
        EntityType.FILE_PATH: r'(?:[A-Za-z]:\\|/)?(?:[\w.-]+[/\\])*[\w.-]+\.\w+',
        EntityType.HASHTAG: r'#\w+',
        EntityType.MENTION: r'@\w+',
    }

    # Programming languages
    PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGES = {
        "python", "javascript", "typescript", "java", "c++", "c#", "go", "rust",
        "ruby", "php", "swift", "kotlin", "scala", "r", "matlab", "perl",
        "bash", "shell", "powershell", "sql", "html", "css", "react", "vue",
        "angular", "node", "nodejs", "django", "flask", "fastapi",
    }

    def __init__(self):
        self.custom_patterns: Dict[EntityType, str] = {}

    def extract(self, text: str) -> List[ExtractedEntity]:
        """
        Extract entities from text.

        # BEGIN META: extract
        # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-002"]
        # Purpose: Find and extract entities from text
        # END META
        """
        import re
        entities = []

        # Extract using patterns
        for entity_type, pattern in self.PATTERNS.items():
            for match in re.finditer(pattern, text, re.IGNORECASE):
                entities.append(ExtractedEntity(
                    text=match.group(),
                    entity_type=entity_type,
                    start_pos=match.start(),
                    end_pos=match.end(),
                    confidence=0.9,
                ))

        # Extract programming languages
        words = text.lower().split()
        for i, word in enumerate(words):
            clean_word = re.sub(r'[^\w]', '', word)
            if clean_word in self.PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGES:
                # Find position in original text
                start = text.lower().find(clean_word)
                if start >= 0:
                    entities.append(ExtractedEntity(
                        text=clean_word,
                        entity_type=EntityType.PROGRAMMING_LANGUAGE,
                        start_pos=start,
                        end_pos=start + len(clean_word),
                        confidence=0.95,
                    ))

        # Remove duplicates (prefer higher confidence)
        entities = self._deduplicate_entities(entities)

        return sorted(entities, key=lambda e: e.start_pos)

    def _deduplicate_entities(self, entities: List[ExtractedEntity]) -> List[ExtractedEntity]:
        """Remove overlapping entities, keeping highest confidence."""
        if not entities:
            return []

        # Sort by position and confidence
        sorted_entities = sorted(entities, key=lambda e: (e.start_pos, -e.confidence))

        result = []
        last_end = -1

        for entity in sorted_entities:
            if entity.start_pos >= last_end:
                result.append(entity)
                last_end = entity.end_pos

        return result


class SentimentAnalyzer:
    """
    Sentiment analysis using lexicon-based approach.

    # BEGIN META: SentimentAnalyzer
    # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-003"]
    # Purpose: Analyze sentiment of text
    # END META
    """

    # Positive words lexicon
    POSITIVE_WORDS = {
        "good", "great", "excellent", "amazing", "wonderful", "fantastic",
        "awesome", "love", "like", "best", "happy", "joy", "perfect",
        "beautiful", "brilliant", "superb", "outstanding", "magnificent",
        "terrific", "fabulous", "marvelous", "splendid", "delightful",
        "pleasant", "positive", "success", "win", "winner", "helpful",
        "useful", "efficient", "effective", "impressive", "remarkable",
        "exceptional", "extraordinary", "incredible", "thank", "thanks",
        "appreciate", "grateful", "pleased", "satisfied", "enjoy",
    }

    # Negative words lexicon
    NEGATIVE_WORDS = {
        "bad", "terrible", "horrible", "awful", "poor", "worst", "hate",
        "dislike", "ugly", "stupid", "dumb", "fail", "failure", "wrong",
        "error", "mistake", "problem", "issue", "bug", "broken", "crash",
        "slow", "useless", "worthless", "disappointing", "disappointed",
        "frustrating", "frustrated", "annoying", "annoyed", "angry",
        "sad", "unhappy", "painful", "difficult", "hard", "confusing",
        "confused", "complicated", "mess", "garbage", "trash", "waste",
        "sorry", "apologize", "regret", "unfortunately", "sadly",
    }

    # Intensifiers
    INTENSIFIERS = {"very", "really", "extremely", "absolutely", "totally", "completely"}

    # Negators
    NEGATORS = {"not", "no", "never", "neither", "nobody", "nothing", "nowhere"}

    def __init__(self):
        self.preprocessor = TextPreprocessor()

    def analyze(self, text: str) -> SentimentResult:
        """
        Analyze sentiment of text.

        # BEGIN META: analyze
        # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-003"]
        # Purpose: Calculate sentiment score and classification
        # END META
        """
        processed = self.preprocessor.preprocess(text)
        tokens = self.preprocessor.tokenize(processed)

        positive_count = 0
        negative_count = 0
        positive_words = []
        negative_words = []
        neutral_words = []

        # Track negation
        negation_active = False

        for i, token in enumerate(tokens):
            # Check for negation
            if token in self.NEGATORS:
                negation_active = True
                continue

            # Check for intensifier (increases weight of next word)
            intensity = 1.5 if i > 0 and tokens[i-1] in self.INTENSIFIERS else 1.0

            # Score the token
            if token in self.POSITIVE_WORDS:
                if negation_active:
                    negative_count += intensity
                    negative_words.append(token)
                else:
                    positive_count += intensity
                    positive_words.append(token)
                negation_active = False
            elif token in self.NEGATIVE_WORDS:
                if negation_active:
                    positive_count += intensity
                    positive_words.append(token)
                else:
                    negative_count += intensity
                    negative_words.append(token)
                negation_active = False
            else:
                neutral_words.append(token)
                # Reset negation after two neutral words
                if len(neutral_words) >= 2:
                    negation_active = False

        # Calculate score
        total = positive_count + negative_count
        if total == 0:
            score = 0.0
            sentiment = SentimentType.NEUTRAL
            confidence = 0.5
        else:
            score = (positive_count - negative_count) / total
            confidence = min(total / 5.0, 1.0)  # More words = higher confidence

            if score > 0.5:
                sentiment = SentimentType.VERY_POSITIVE
            elif score > 0.1:
                sentiment = SentimentType.POSITIVE
            elif score < -0.5:
                sentiment = SentimentType.VERY_NEGATIVE
            elif score < -0.1:
                sentiment = SentimentType.NEGATIVE
            elif positive_count > 0 and negative_count > 0:
                sentiment = SentimentType.MIXED
            else:
                sentiment = SentimentType.NEUTRAL

        return SentimentResult(
            sentiment=sentiment,
            score=score,
            confidence=confidence,
            positive_words=positive_words,
            negative_words=negative_words,
            neutral_words=neutral_words[:10],  # Limit neutral words
        )


class LanguageDetector:
    """
    Language detection using character and word patterns.

    # BEGIN META: LanguageDetector
    # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-004"]
    # Purpose: Detect language of text
    # END META
    """

    # Common words by language
    LANGUAGE_MARKERS = {
        LanguageCode.EN: {"the", "is", "are", "was", "were", "have", "has", "been", "will", "would"},
        LanguageCode.ES: {"el", "la", "los", "las", "es", "son", "está", "están", "que", "de"},
        LanguageCode.FR: {"le", "la", "les", "est", "sont", "avec", "pour", "que", "dans", "une"},
        LanguageCode.DE: {"der", "die", "das", "ist", "sind", "ein", "eine", "und", "mit", "für"},
        LanguageCode.IT: {"il", "la", "i", "le", "è", "sono", "che", "per", "con", "una"},
        LanguageCode.PT: {"o", "a", "os", "as", "é", "são", "que", "para", "com", "uma"},
    }

    def detect(self, text: str) -> LanguageResult:
        """
        Detect language of text.

        # BEGIN META: detect
        # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-004"]
        # Purpose: Identify the language of input text
        # END META
        """
        if not text:
            return LanguageResult(
                primary_language=LanguageCode.UNKNOWN,
                confidence=0.0,
            )

        words = set(text.lower().split())
        scores: Dict[LanguageCode, int] = {}

        for lang, markers in self.LANGUAGE_MARKERS.items():
            score = len(words.intersection(markers))
            if score > 0:
                scores[lang] = score

        if not scores:
            return LanguageResult(
                primary_language=LanguageCode.EN,  # Default to English
                confidence=0.3,
            )

        sorted_langs = sorted(scores.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
        primary_lang = sorted_langs[0][0]
        primary_score = sorted_langs[0][1]

        # Calculate confidence
        total_score = sum(scores.values())
        confidence = primary_score / total_score if total_score > 0 else 0.5

        detected_languages = [(lang, score / total_score) for lang, score in sorted_langs]
        is_multilingual = len(scores) > 1 and sorted_langs[1][1] > 1

        return LanguageResult(
            primary_language=primary_lang,
            confidence=confidence,
            detected_languages=detected_languages,
            is_multilingual=is_multilingual,
        )


class TopicClassifier:
    """
    Topic classification using keyword matching.

    # BEGIN META: TopicClassifier
    # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-005"]
    # Purpose: Classify text into topic categories
    # END META
    """

    TOPIC_KEYWORDS = {
        TopicCategory.PROGRAMMING: {
            "code", "programming", "function", "variable", "class", "method",
            "api", "debug", "compile", "syntax", "algorithm", "loop", "array",
            "string", "integer", "boolean", "import", "export", "module",
        },
        TopicCategory.TECHNOLOGY: {
            "software", "hardware", "computer", "technology", "digital", "app",
            "application", "system", "device", "network", "internet", "cloud",
            "server", "database", "storage", "memory", "processor", "cpu",
        },
        TopicCategory.DATA_SCIENCE: {
            "data", "machine learning", "ai", "artificial intelligence", "model",
            "training", "prediction", "analysis", "statistics", "neural",
            "deep learning", "dataset", "feature", "classification", "regression",
        },
        TopicCategory.DEVOPS: {
            "deploy", "deployment", "docker", "kubernetes", "ci/cd", "pipeline",
            "container", "infrastructure", "aws", "azure", "gcp", "terraform",
            "ansible", "jenkins", "git", "github", "gitlab", "monitoring",
        },
        TopicCategory.SECURITY: {
            "security", "authentication", "authorization", "encrypt", "password",
            "token", "jwt", "oauth", "ssl", "tls", "https", "firewall",
            "vulnerability", "attack", "hack", "malware", "phishing",
        },
        TopicCategory.BUSINESS: {
            "business", "company", "market", "sales", "revenue", "profit",
            "customer", "client", "product", "service", "strategy", "growth",
        },
        TopicCategory.EDUCATION: {
            "learn", "study", "course", "tutorial", "lesson", "teach",
            "education", "school", "university", "degree", "certification",
        },
    }

    def __init__(self):
        self.preprocessor = TextPreprocessor()

    def classify(self, text: str) -> TopicResult:
        """
        Classify text into topic categories.

        # BEGIN META: classify_topic
        # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-005"]
        # Purpose: Determine primary and secondary topics
        # END META
        """
        processed = self.preprocessor.preprocess(text)
        tokens = set(self.preprocessor.tokenize(processed))

        scores: Dict[TopicCategory, int] = {}
        matched_keywords: List[str] = []

        for topic, keywords in self.TOPIC_KEYWORDS.items():
            matches = tokens.intersection(keywords)
            if matches:
                scores[topic] = len(matches)
                matched_keywords.extend(matches)

        if not scores:
            return TopicResult(
                primary_topic=TopicCategory.GENERAL,
                confidence=0.5,
                keywords=[],
            )

        sorted_topics = sorted(scores.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
        primary_topic = sorted_topics[0][0]
        total_score = sum(scores.values())

        return TopicResult(
            primary_topic=primary_topic,
            confidence=sorted_topics[0][1] / total_score if total_score > 0 else 0.5,
            secondary_topics=[(t, s / total_score) for t, s in sorted_topics[1:4]],
            keywords=list(set(matched_keywords))[:10],
        )


class TextSimilarity:
    """
    Text similarity calculations.

    # BEGIN META: TextSimilarity
    # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-007"]
    # Purpose: Calculate similarity between texts
    # END META
    """

    def __init__(self):
        self.preprocessor = TextPreprocessor()

    def jaccard_similarity(self, text1: str, text2: str) -> float:
        """Calculate Jaccard similarity between two texts."""
        tokens1 = set(self.preprocessor.tokenize(text1))
        tokens2 = set(self.preprocessor.tokenize(text2))

        if not tokens1 or not tokens2:
            return 0.0

        intersection = len(tokens1.intersection(tokens2))
        union = len(tokens1.union(tokens2))

        return intersection / union if union > 0 else 0.0

    def cosine_similarity(self, text1: str, text2: str) -> float:
        """Calculate cosine similarity between two texts using TF."""
        tokens1 = self.preprocessor.tokenize(text1)
        tokens2 = self.preprocessor.tokenize(text2)

        # Build vocabulary
        vocab = set(tokens1 + tokens2)

        # Create term frequency vectors
        vec1 = {word: tokens1.count(word) for word in vocab}
        vec2 = {word: tokens2.count(word) for word in vocab}

        # Calculate cosine similarity
        dot_product = sum(vec1[w] * vec2[w] for w in vocab)
        norm1 = sum(v ** 2 for v in vec1.values()) ** 0.5
        norm2 = sum(v ** 2 for v in vec2.values()) ** 0.5

        if norm1 == 0 or norm2 == 0:
            return 0.0

        return dot_product / (norm1 * norm2)

    def levenshtein_distance(self, text1: str, text2: str) -> int:
        """Calculate Levenshtein (edit) distance between two strings."""
        if len(text1) < len(text2):
            text1, text2 = text2, text1

        if len(text2) == 0:
            return len(text1)

        previous_row = range(len(text2) + 1)

        for i, c1 in enumerate(text1):
            current_row = [i + 1]
            for j, c2 in enumerate(text2):
                insertions = previous_row[j + 1] + 1
                deletions = current_row[j] + 1
                substitutions = previous_row[j] + (c1 != c2)
                current_row.append(min(insertions, deletions, substitutions))
            previous_row = current_row

        return previous_row[-1]

    def normalized_levenshtein(self, text1: str, text2: str) -> float:
        """Calculate normalized Levenshtein similarity (0-1)."""
        distance = self.levenshtein_distance(text1, text2)
        max_len = max(len(text1), len(text2))
        if max_len == 0:
            return 1.0
        return 1.0 - (distance / max_len)


class NLUPipeline:
    """
    Complete NLU processing pipeline.

    # BEGIN META: NLUPipeline
    # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-001", "SRS-NLU-002", "SRS-NLU-003", "SRS-NLU-004", "SRS-NLU-005"]
    # Purpose: Orchestrate all NLU components for comprehensive analysis
    # END META
    """

    def __init__(self):
        self.preprocessor = TextPreprocessor()
        self.intent_classifier = IntentClassifier()
        self.entity_extractor = EntityExtractor()
        self.sentiment_analyzer = SentimentAnalyzer()
        self.language_detector = LanguageDetector()
        self.topic_classifier = TopicClassifier()
        self.text_similarity = TextSimilarity()
        self._cache: Dict[str, NLUResult] = {}
        self._cache_ttl = 300  # 5 minutes

    def analyze(self, text: str, use_cache: bool = True) -> NLUResult:
        """
        Perform complete NLU analysis on text.

        # BEGIN META: analyze_nlu
        # SRS: ["SRS-NLU-001"]
        # Purpose: Run full NLU pipeline on input text
        # END META
        """
        if not text:
            return self._empty_result("")

        # Check cache
        cache_key = hashlib.md5(text.encode()).hexdigest()
        if use_cache and cache_key in self._cache:
            return self._cache[cache_key]

        start_time = time.time()

        # Preprocess
        processed_text = self.preprocessor.preprocess(text)
        tokens = self.preprocessor.tokenize(text)

        # Run all analyzers
        intent = self.intent_classifier.classify(text)
        entities = self.entity_extractor.extract(text)
        sentiment = self.sentiment_analyzer.analyze(text)
        language = self.language_detector.detect(text)
        topics = self.topic_classifier.classify(text)

        processing_time = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000

        result = NLUResult(
            original_text=text,
            processed_text=processed_text,
            intent=intent,
            entities=entities,
            sentiment=sentiment,
            language=language,
            topics=topics,
            tokens=tokens,
            processing_time_ms=processing_time,
        )

        # Cache result
        if use_cache:
            self._cache[cache_key] = result

        return result

    def _empty_result(self, text: str) -> NLUResult:
        """Create empty NLU result."""
        return NLUResult(
            original_text=text,
            processed_text="",
            intent=IntentResult(
                primary_intent=IntentCategory.UNKNOWN,
                confidence=0.0,
            ),
            entities=[],
            sentiment=SentimentResult(
                sentiment=SentimentType.NEUTRAL,
                score=0.0,
                confidence=0.0,
            ),
            language=LanguageResult(
                primary_language=LanguageCode.UNKNOWN,
                confidence=0.0,
            ),
            topics=TopicResult(
                primary_topic=TopicCategory.GENERAL,
                confidence=0.0,
            ),
        )

    def clear_cache(self) -> int:
        """Clear the analysis cache."""
        count = len(self._cache)
        self._cache.clear()
        return count

    def get_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get pipeline statistics."""
        return {
            "cache_size": len(self._cache),
            "cache_ttl_seconds": self._cache_ttl,
        }


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 43: RESPONSE PIPELINE & FORMATTING
# Response generation, formatting, and output pipeline system
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


class ResponseFormat(Enum):
    """
    Response output formats.

    # BEGIN META: ResponseFormat
    # SRS: ["SRS-RESP-001"]
    # Purpose: Define output format types
    # END META
    """
    PLAIN_TEXT = ("plain_text", "Plain text without formatting")
    MARKDOWN = ("markdown", "Markdown formatted text")
    HTML = ("html", "HTML formatted text")
    JSON = ("json", "JSON structured response")
    RICH_TEXT = ("rich_text", "Rich text with styling")
    CODE = ("code", "Code block formatted")
    TABLE = ("table", "Tabular format")

    def __init__(self, key: str, description: str):
        self.key = key
        self.description = description


class ResponseTone(Enum):
    """
    Response tone settings.

    # BEGIN META: ResponseTone
    # SRS: ["SRS-RESP-002"]
    # Purpose: Define response tone types
    # END META
    """
    FORMAL = ("formal", "Professional and formal tone")
    CASUAL = ("casual", "Friendly and casual tone")
    TECHNICAL = ("technical", "Technical and precise tone")
    FRIENDLY = ("friendly", "Warm and approachable tone")
    CONCISE = ("concise", "Brief and to-the-point tone")
    DETAILED = ("detailed", "Comprehensive and thorough tone")
    PLAYFUL = ("playful", "Fun and engaging tone")
    NEUTRAL = ("neutral", "Balanced and objective tone")

    def __init__(self, key: str, description: str):
        self.key = key
        self.description = description


class ResponsePriority(Enum):
    """
    Response priority levels.

    # BEGIN META: ResponsePriority
    # SRS: ["SRS-RESP-003"]
    # Purpose: Define response priority levels
    # END META
    """
    CRITICAL = ("critical", "Highest priority - immediate attention needed", 0)
    HIGH = ("high", "High priority response", 1)
    NORMAL = ("normal", "Standard priority", 2)
    LOW = ("low", "Low priority - can wait", 3)
    BACKGROUND = ("background", "Background/supplementary information", 4)

    def __init__(self, key: str, description: str, level: int):
        self.key = key
        self.description = description
        self.level = level


@dataclass
class ResponseSection:
    """
    A section of a response.

    # BEGIN META: ResponseSection
    # SRS: ["SRS-RESP-004"]
    # Purpose: Structure response into sections
    # END META
    """
    title: Optional[str] = None
    content: str = ""
    format: ResponseFormat = ResponseFormat.PLAIN_TEXT
    priority: ResponsePriority = ResponsePriority.NORMAL
    collapsible: bool = False
    default_collapsed: bool = False
    metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)


@dataclass
class ResponseConfig:
    """
    Response generation configuration.

    # BEGIN META: ResponseConfig
    # SRS: ["SRS-RESP-001"]
    # Purpose: Configure response generation
    # END META
    """
    format: ResponseFormat = ResponseFormat.MARKDOWN
    tone: ResponseTone = ResponseTone.FRIENDLY
    max_length: int = 2000
    include_greeting: bool = True
    include_signature: bool = False
    include_timestamp: bool = False
    code_highlighting: bool = True
    emoji_enabled: bool = True
    language: str = "en"
    custom_greeting: Optional[str] = None
    custom_signature: Optional[str] = None


@dataclass
class FormattedResponse:
    """
    Complete formatted response.

    # BEGIN META: FormattedResponse
    # SRS: ["SRS-RESP-004"]
    # Purpose: Store formatted response with all components
    # END META
    """
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid4()))
    sections: List[ResponseSection] = field(default_factory=list)
    greeting: Optional[str] = None
    main_content: str = ""
    signature: Optional[str] = None
    format: ResponseFormat = ResponseFormat.MARKDOWN
    tone: ResponseTone = ResponseTone.FRIENDLY
    word_count: int = 0
    character_count: int = 0
    created_at: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat())
    metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)

    def to_string(self) -> str:
        """Convert to final string output."""
        parts = []
        if self.greeting:
            parts.append(self.greeting)
        if self.sections:
            for section in self.sections:
                if section.title:
                    parts.append(f"\n**{section.title}**\n")
                parts.append(section.content)
        elif self.main_content:
            parts.append(self.main_content)
        if self.signature:
            parts.append(f"\n---\n{self.signature}")
        return "\n".join(parts)


class ResponseFormatter:
    """
    Format responses for different output types.

    # BEGIN META: ResponseFormatter
    # SRS: ["SRS-RESP-001"]
    # Purpose: Format responses for various outputs
    # END META
    """

    # Greeting templates by tone
    GREETINGS = {
        ResponseTone.FORMAL: ["Greetings.", "Hello.", "Good day."],
        ResponseTone.CASUAL: ["Hey!", "Hi there!", "What's up!"],
        ResponseTone.FRIENDLY: ["Hello!", "Hi!", "Hey there!"],
        ResponseTone.TECHNICAL: ["Acknowledged.", "Processing your request."],
        ResponseTone.PLAYFUL: ["Howdy!", "Greetings, friend!", "Hey hey!"],
        ResponseTone.NEUTRAL: ["Hello.", "Hi."],
    }

    # Signature templates
    SIGNATURES = {
        ResponseTone.FORMAL: "Best regards,\nNexus Agent",
        ResponseTone.CASUAL: "Cheers!\n- Nexus",
        ResponseTone.FRIENDLY: "Happy to help!\n- Your Nexus Agent",
        ResponseTone.TECHNICAL: "-- End of response --",
        ResponseTone.PLAYFUL: "Stay awesome! 🌟\n- Nexus",
        ResponseTone.NEUTRAL: "- Nexus Agent",
    }

    def __init__(self, config: ResponseConfig = None):
        self.config = config or ResponseConfig()

    def format(self, content: str, **kwargs) -> FormattedResponse:
        """
        Format content into a complete response.

        # BEGIN META: format
        # SRS: ["SRS-RESP-001"]
        # Purpose: Apply formatting to response content
        # END META
        """
        config = kwargs.get("config", self.config)

        # Get greeting
        greeting = None
        if config.include_greeting:
            if config.custom_greeting:
                greeting = config.custom_greeting
            else:
                greetings = self.GREETINGS.get(config.tone, ["Hello."])
                greeting = random.choice(greetings)

        # Get signature
        signature = None
        if config.include_signature:
            if config.custom_signature:
                signature = config.custom_signature
            else:
                signature = self.SIGNATURES.get(config.tone, "- Nexus Agent")

        # Format main content based on format type
        formatted_content = self._apply_format(content, config.format)

        # Truncate if needed
        if len(formatted_content) > config.max_length:
            formatted_content = formatted_content[:config.max_length - 3] + "..."

        response = FormattedResponse(
            greeting=greeting,
            main_content=formatted_content,
            signature=signature,
            format=config.format,
            tone=config.tone,
            word_count=len(content.split()),
            character_count=len(content),
        )

        return response

    def _apply_format(self, content: str, format_type: ResponseFormat) -> str:
        """Apply specific formatting."""
        if format_type == ResponseFormat.PLAIN_TEXT:
            return self._strip_markdown(content)
        elif format_type == ResponseFormat.HTML:
            return self._markdown_to_html(content)
        elif format_type == ResponseFormat.JSON:
            return json.dumps({"content": content}, indent=2)
        else:
            return content

    def _strip_markdown(self, text: str) -> str:
        """Remove markdown formatting."""
        import re
        # Remove headers
        text = re.sub(r'^#+\s*', '', text, flags=re.MULTILINE)
        # Remove bold/italic
        text = re.sub(r'\*\*([^*]+)\*\*', r'\1', text)
        text = re.sub(r'\*([^*]+)\*', r'\1', text)
        text = re.sub(r'__([^_]+)__', r'\1', text)
        text = re.sub(r'_([^_]+)_', r'\1', text)
        # Remove links
        text = re.sub(r'\[([^\]]+)\]\([^)]+\)', r'\1', text)
        return text

    def _markdown_to_html(self, text: str) -> str:
        """Convert markdown to HTML (basic conversion)."""
        import re
        # Headers
        text = re.sub(r'^### (.+)$', r'<h3>\1</h3>', text, flags=re.MULTILINE)
        text = re.sub(r'^## (.+)$', r'<h2>\1</h2>', text, flags=re.MULTILINE)
        text = re.sub(r'^# (.+)$', r'<h1>\1</h1>', text, flags=re.MULTILINE)
        # Bold
        text = re.sub(r'\*\*([^*]+)\*\*', r'<strong>\1</strong>', text)
        # Italic
        text = re.sub(r'\*([^*]+)\*', r'<em>\1</em>', text)
        # Links
        text = re.sub(r'\[([^\]]+)\]\(([^)]+)\)', r'<a href="\2">\1</a>', text)
        # Code blocks
        text = re.sub(r'```(\w*)\n(.*?)\n```', r'<pre><code class="\1">\2</code></pre>', text, flags=re.DOTALL)
        # Inline code
        text = re.sub(r'`([^`]+)`', r'<code>\1</code>', text)
        # Paragraphs
        text = re.sub(r'\n\n', '</p><p>', text)
        return f'<p>{text}</p>'

    def format_code_block(self, code: str, language: str = "") -> str:
        """Format a code block."""
        return f"```{language}\n{code}\n```"

    def format_list(self, items: List[str], ordered: bool = False) -> str:
        """Format a list."""
        if ordered:
            return "\n".join(f"{i+1}. {item}" for i, item in enumerate(items))
        else:
            return "\n".join(f"- {item}" for item in items)

    def format_table(self, headers: List[str], rows: List[List[str]]) -> str:
        """Format a markdown table."""
        # Header row
        header_row = "| " + " | ".join(headers) + " |"
        # Separator
        separator = "| " + " | ".join("-" * len(h) for h in headers) + " |"
        # Data rows
        data_rows = []
        for row in rows:
            data_rows.append("| " + " | ".join(str(cell) for cell in row) + " |")
        return "\n".join([header_row, separator] + data_rows)


class ResponsePipeline:
    """
    Response generation pipeline.

    # BEGIN META: ResponsePipeline
    # SRS: ["SRS-RESP-005"]
    # Purpose: Process responses through configurable pipeline stages
    # END META
    """

    def __init__(self, formatter: ResponseFormatter = None):
        self.formatter = formatter or ResponseFormatter()
        self.preprocessors: List[Callable[[str], str]] = []
        self.postprocessors: List[Callable[[str], str]] = []
        self.validators: List[Callable[[str], Tuple[bool, str]]] = []

    def add_preprocessor(self, processor: Callable[[str], str]) -> None:
        """Add a preprocessing step."""
        self.preprocessors.append(processor)

    def add_postprocessor(self, processor: Callable[[str], str]) -> None:
        """Add a postprocessing step."""
        self.postprocessors.append(processor)

    def add_validator(self, validator: Callable[[str], Tuple[bool, str]]) -> None:
        """Add a validation step."""
        self.validators.append(validator)

    def process(self, content: str, config: ResponseConfig = None) -> FormattedResponse:
        """
        Process content through the pipeline.

        # BEGIN META: process
        # SRS: ["SRS-RESP-005"]
        # Purpose: Execute full response pipeline
        # END META
        """
        # Preprocessing
        for processor in self.preprocessors:
            content = processor(content)

        # Format
        response = self.formatter.format(content, config=config)

        # Postprocessing
        final_content = response.main_content
        for processor in self.postprocessors:
            final_content = processor(final_content)
        response.main_content = final_content

        # Validation
        for validator in self.validators:
            is_valid, message = validator(final_content)
            if not is_valid:
                response.metadata["validation_warning"] = message

        return response


class ResponseTemplateEngine:
    """
    Template-based response generation.

    # BEGIN META: ResponseTemplateEngine
    # SRS: ["SRS-RESP-006"]
    # Purpose: Generate responses from templates
    # END META
    """

    def __init__(self):
        self.templates: Dict[str, str] = {}
        self._load_default_templates()

    def _load_default_templates(self) -> None:
        """Load default response templates."""
        self.templates = {
            "greeting": "Hello! I'm {agent_name}. {custom_message}",
            "error": "I encountered an issue: {error_message}. Please try again.",
            "success": "Great news! {action} completed successfully.",
            "xp_award": "You earned **{xp_amount} XP** for {reason}! Total: {total_xp} XP",
            "rank_up": "Congratulations! You've reached **{new_rank}** rank!",
            "badge_unlock": "Badge Unlocked: **{badge_name}** - {badge_description}",
            "quest_complete": "Quest Complete: **{quest_name}**\nReward: {xp_reward} XP, {tp_reward} TP",
            "help": "Here's what I can help you with:\n{help_items}",
            "status": "**Status Report**\nXP: {xp} | TP: {tp} | Rank: {rank}\nStreak: {streak} days",
            "farewell": "Goodbye! {farewell_message}",
        }

    def register_template(self, name: str, template: str) -> None:
        """Register a custom template."""
        self.templates[name] = template

    def render(self, template_name: str, **variables) -> str:
        """
        Render a template with variables.

        # BEGIN META: render
        # SRS: ["SRS-RESP-006"]
        # Purpose: Render template with variable substitution
        # END META
        """
        template = self.templates.get(template_name)
        if not template:
            return f"Template '{template_name}' not found."

        try:
            return template.format(**variables)
        except KeyError as e:
            return f"Missing template variable: {e}"

    def list_templates(self) -> List[str]:
        """List available templates."""
        return list(self.templates.keys())

        "accent": "#4ade80",

        "bg_secondary": "#1a1a2e",
        "bg_card": "#16213e",
        "bg_hover": "#1e3a5f",

        "accent": "#22d3ee",
        "warning": "#f59e0b",
        "danger": "#ef4444",
        "bg_primary": "#0f0a1a",
        "bg_secondary": "#1a0f2e",
        "bg_card": "#1e1030",
        "bg_hover": "#2d1a4a",
        "text_primary": "#ffffff",
        "text_secondary": "#b8a0c0",
        "border": "#3a2a5a",
        "gradient_start": "#a855f7",
        "gradient_end": "#ec4899",
    },
    OADTheme.BROTHERHOOD_GOLD: {
        "name": "Brotherhood Gold",
        "primary": "#fbbf24",
        "secondary": "#f59e0b",
        "accent": "#22c55e",
        "warning": "#fb923c",
        "danger": "#dc2626",
        "bg_primary": "#0f0d0a",
        "bg_secondary": "#1a1610",
        "bg_card": "#242018",
        "bg_hover": "#302820",
        "text_primary": "#fef3c7",
        "text_secondary": "#d4a574",
        "border": "#4a3a2a",
        "gradient_start": "#fbbf24",
        "gradient_end": "#f59e0b",
    },
    OADTheme.MATRIX_GREEN: {
        "name": "Matrix Green",
        "primary": "#22c55e",
        "secondary": "#10b981",
        "accent": "#06b6d4",
        "warning": "#eab308",
        "danger": "#ef4444",
        "bg_primary": "#000a00",
        "bg_secondary": "#001a00",
        "bg_card": "#002800",
        "bg_hover": "#003800",
        "text_primary": "#22c55e",
        "text_secondary": "#15803d",
        "border": "#166534",
        "gradient_start": "#22c55e",
        "gradient_end": "#10b981",
    },
    OADTheme.CYBERPUNK: {
        "name": "Cyberpunk",
        "primary": "#f0f000",
        "secondary": "#ff00ff",
        "accent": "#00ffff",
        "warning": "#ff6600",
        "danger": "#ff0040",
        "bg_primary": "#0a0014",
        "bg_secondary": "#140028",
        "bg_card": "#1e0038",
        "bg_hover": "#280048",
        "text_primary": "#ffffff",
        "text_secondary": "#c0a0e0",
        "border": "#400070",
        "gradient_start": "#f0f000",
        "gradient_end": "#ff00ff",
    },
}

# Default to Citadel Dark
OAD_THEMES[OADTheme.CITADEL_LIGHT] = OAD_THEMES[OADTheme.CITADEL_DARK].copy()
OAD_THEMES[OADTheme.CITADEL_LIGHT].update({
    "name": "Citadel Light",
    "bg_primary": "#f0f4f8",
    "bg_secondary": "#e2e8f0",
    "bg_card": "#ffffff",
    "bg_hover": "#edf2f7",
    "text_primary": "#1a202c",
    "text_secondary": "#4a5568",
    "border": "#cbd5e0",
})


# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# SECTION 44.3: OAD DASHBOARD SERVER
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

class OADServer:
    """
    Operator Access Dashboard WebSocket server.

    # BEGIN META: OADServer
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Serve stunning OAD dashboard with real-time updates
    # SRS: ["SRS-OAD-001", "SRS-OAD-002"]
    # Pattern: Multi-panel dashboard with WebSocket sync
    # Tags: ["server", "dashboard", "websocket", "oad"]
    # Categories: ["UI", "Operator Tools"]
    # KnowledgeSectors: ["Web Development", "Real-time Communication"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # Description: Full-featured operator dashboard combining all agent systems
    #              into a visually stunning, controllable interface.
    # END META
    """

    def __init__(
        self,
        agent: Any,  # NexusTamagotchiAgentPro
        config: Optional[OADConfig] = None,
    ):
        """
        Initialize OAD server.

        # BEGIN META: OADServer.__init__
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Initialize OAD dashboard server
        # SRS: ["SRS-OAD-001"]
        # Tags: ["init", "server"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META
        """
        self.agent = agent
        self.config = config or OADConfig()
        self.state = OADState()
        self._server = None
        self._connections: set = set()
        self._update_tasks: List[Any] = []
        self._oad_checker: Optional[OADIntegrationChecker] = None
        self._memory_browser: Optional["MemoryBrowser"] = None

    def _get_theme_css(self) -> str:
        """
        Generate CSS variables for current theme.

        # BEGIN META: _get_theme_css
        # SRS: ["SRS-OAD-001"]
        # Purpose: Generate theme-based CSS variables
        # END META
        """
        theme = OAD_THEMES.get(self.config.theme, OAD_THEMES[OADTheme.CITADEL_DARK])
        css_vars = []
        for key, value in theme.items():
            if key != "name":
                css_vars.append(f"--{key.replace('_', '-')}: {value};")
        return "\n            ".join(css_vars)

    def _generate_dashboard_html(self) -> str:
        """
        Generate the complete OAD dashboard HTML.

        # BEGIN META: _generate_dashboard_html
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Generate stunning multi-panel dashboard HTML
        # SRS: ["SRS-OAD-001", "SRS-OAD-002"]
        # Pattern: Modern dashboard with glass morphism and animations
        # Tags: ["html", "ui", "generate", "dashboard"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META
        """
        agent_name = getattr(self.agent, 'agent_name', 'Nexus Agent')
        port = self.config.port
        theme_css = self._get_theme_css()

        return f'''<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>{self.config.window_title}</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {{
            {theme_css}
            --font-sans: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
            --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
            --radius-sm: 6px;
            --radius-md: 10px;
            --radius-lg: 16px;
            --radius-xl: 24px;
            --shadow-sm: 0 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
            --shadow-md: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
            --shadow-lg: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            --shadow-glow: 0 0 20px var(--primary);
            --transition-fast: 150ms ease;
            --transition-normal: 250ms ease;
            --transition-slow: 400ms ease;
        }}

        * {{
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }}

        body {{
            font-family: var(--font-sans);
            background: var(--bg-primary);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            min-height: 100vh;
            overflow: hidden;
        }}

        /* Animated background */
        .oad-background {{
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            z-index: -1;
            overflow: hidden;
        }}

        .oad-background::before {{
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: -50%;
            left: -50%;
            width: 200%;
            height: 200%;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, var(--primary) 0%, transparent 50%);
            opacity: 0.03;
            animation: pulse-bg 15s ease-in-out infinite;
        }}

        .oad-background::after {{
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background:
                linear-gradient(135deg, transparent 40%, var(--primary) 40.5%, transparent 41%),
                linear-gradient(-135deg, transparent 40%, var(--secondary) 40.5%, transparent 41%);
            background-size: 60px 60px;
            opacity: 0.02;
            animation: grid-shift 30s linear infinite;
        }}

        @keyframes pulse-bg {{
            0%, 100% {{ transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.03; }}
            50% {{ transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 0.06; }}
        }}

        @keyframes grid-shift {{
            0% {{ background-position: 0 0, 0 0; }}
            100% {{ background-position: 60px 60px, -60px 60px; }}
        }}

        /* Main Layout */
        .oad-container {{
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr;
            grid-template-rows: 70px 1fr;
            height: 100vh;
        }}

        /* Top Bar */
        .oad-topbar {{
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            background: var(--bg-secondary);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 0 24px;
            backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        }}

        .oad-logo {{
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 16px;
        }}

        .oad-logo-icon {{
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 20px;
            font-weight: bold;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow);
            animation: logo-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite;
        }}

        @keyframes logo-pulse {{
            0%, 100% {{ box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--primary); }}
            50% {{ box-shadow: 0 0 25px var(--primary), 0 0 40px var(--secondary); }}
        }}

        .oad-logo-text {{
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 600;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
        }}

        .oad-logo-subtitle {{
            font-size: 11px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            margin-top: 2px;
        }}

        .oad-topbar-stats {{
            display: flex;
            gap: 32px;
        }}

        .oad-stat {{
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
        }}

        .oad-stat-value {{
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 700;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--accent));
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
        }}

        .oad-stat-label {{
            font-size: 10px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }}

        .oad-topbar-actions {{
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
        }}

        .oad-connection-status {{
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            padding: 6px 12px;
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            font-size: 12px;
        }}

        .oad-status-dot {{
            width: 8px;
            height: 8px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--accent);
            animation: status-blink 2s ease-in-out infinite;
        }}

        .oad-status-dot.disconnected {{
            background: var(--danger);
            animation: none;
        }}

        @keyframes status-blink {{
            0%, 100% {{ opacity: 1; }}
            50% {{ opacity: 0.4; }}
        }}

        /* Sidebar Navigation */
        .oad-sidebar {{
            background: var(--bg-secondary);
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 16px 0;
            gap: 8px;
        }}

        .oad-nav-item {{
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all var(--transition-fast);
            position: relative;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            font-size: 20px;
        }}

        .oad-nav-item:hover {{
            background: var(--bg-hover);
            color: var(--text-primary);
        }}

        .oad-nav-item.active {{
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            color: var(--bg-primary);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow);
        }}

        .oad-nav-item::after {{
            content: attr(data-tooltip);
            position: absolute;
            left: 60px;
            background: var(--bg-card);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            padding: 6px 12px;
            border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
            font-size: 12px;
            white-space: nowrap;
            opacity: 0;
            visibility: hidden;
            transition: all var(--transition-fast);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            z-index: 1000;
        }}

        .oad-nav-item:hover::after {{
            opacity: 1;
            visibility: visible;
        }}

        .oad-nav-divider {{
            width: 32px;
            height: 1px;
            background: var(--border);
            margin: 8px 0;
        }}

        /* Main Content Area */
        .oad-main {{
            overflow: auto;
            padding: 24px;
        }}

        .oad-panel {{
            display: none;
            animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease;
        }}

        .oad-panel.active {{
            display: block;
        }}

        @keyframes fadeIn {{
            from {{ opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }}
            to {{ opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }}
        }}

        /* Overview Panel */
        .oad-overview-grid {{
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
            margin-bottom: 24px;
        }}

        .oad-card {{
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            padding: 20px;
            transition: all var(--transition-normal);
        }}

        .oad-card:hover {{
            border-color: var(--primary);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-md), 0 0 20px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.1);
        }}

        .oad-card-header {{
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }}

        .oad-card-title {{
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 1px;
        }}

        .oad-card-icon {{
            font-size: 20px;
        }}

        .oad-big-number {{
            font-size: 48px;
            font-weight: 700;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
            line-height: 1;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }}

        .oad-number-label {{
            font-size: 12px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }}

        .oad-progress-bar {{
            height: 8px;
            background: var(--border);
            border-radius: 4px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-top: 12px;
        }}

        .oad-progress-fill {{
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            border-radius: 4px;
            transition: width var(--transition-normal);
        }}

        /* Rank Display */
        .oad-rank-badge {{
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 14px;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow);
        }}

        /* Memory Visualization */
        .oad-memory-grid {{
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(80px, 1fr));
            gap: 8px;
            margin-top: 16px;
        }}

        .oad-memory-cell {{
            aspect-ratio: 1;
            background: var(--bg-secondary);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 10px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            transition: all var(--transition-fast);
            cursor: pointer;
        }}

        .oad-memory-cell:hover {{
            background: var(--bg-hover);
            border-color: var(--primary);
            transform: scale(1.05);
        }}

        .oad-memory-cell.active {{
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            color: var(--bg-primary);
            font-weight: 600;
        }}

        /* Professor Network */
        .oad-professor-grid {{
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(150px, 1fr));
            gap: 12px;
        }}

        .oad-professor-card {{
            background: var(--bg-secondary);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            padding: 16px;
            text-align: center;
            transition: all var(--transition-fast);
            cursor: pointer;
        }}

        .oad-professor-card:hover {{
            border-color: var(--primary);
            transform: translateY(-4px);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
        }}

        .oad-professor-avatar {{
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            border-radius: 50%;
            margin: 0 auto 12px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 24px;
        }}

        .oad-professor-name {{
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }}

        .oad-professor-domain {{
            font-size: 11px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }}

        /* Mission Tracker */
        .oad-mission-list {{
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 12px;
        }}

        .oad-mission-item {{
            background: var(--bg-secondary);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            padding: 16px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 16px;
            transition: all var(--transition-fast);
        }}

        .oad-mission-item:hover {{
            border-color: var(--primary);
        }}

        .oad-mission-icon {{
            width: 40px;
            height: 40px;
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 20px;
        }}

        .oad-mission-details {{
            flex: 1;
        }}

        .oad-mission-name {{
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }}

        .oad-mission-desc {{
            font-size: 12px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }}

        .oad-mission-reward {{
            font-size: 12px;
            color: var(--accent);
            font-weight: 600;
        }}

        /* Skill Tree */
        .oad-skill-tree {{
            display: flex;
            gap: 24px;
            overflow-x: auto;
            padding: 16px 0;
        }}

        .oad-skill-branch {{
            min-width: 200px;
            background: var(--bg-secondary);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            padding: 16px;
        }}

        .oad-skill-branch-title {{
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            text-align: center;
            padding-bottom: 12px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }}

        .oad-skill-node {{
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            padding: 12px;
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            transition: all var(--transition-fast);
        }}

        .oad-skill-node.unlocked {{
            border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);
        }}

        .oad-skill-node.available {{
            border-left: 3px solid var(--warning);
        }}

        .oad-skill-node.locked {{
            opacity: 0.5;
        }}

        .oad-skill-icon {{
            font-size: 20px;
        }}

        .oad-skill-name {{
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 500;
        }}

        /* Chat Panel */
        .oad-chat-container {{
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            height: calc(100vh - 140px);
        }}

        .oad-chat-messages {{
            flex: 1;
            overflow-y: auto;
            padding: 16px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 16px;
        }}

        .oad-chat-message {{
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
            max-width: 80%;
            animation: slideIn 0.3s ease;
        }}

        @keyframes slideIn {{
            from {{ opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-20px); }}
            to {{ opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }}
        }}

        .oad-chat-message.user {{
            align-self: flex-end;
            flex-direction: row-reverse;
        }}

        .oad-chat-message.user .oad-chat-bubble {{
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            color: var(--bg-primary);
        }}

        .oad-chat-avatar {{
            width: 36px;
            height: 36px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--bg-card);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 18px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }}

        .oad-chat-bubble {{
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            padding: 12px 16px;
            line-height: 1.5;
        }}

        .oad-chat-input-area {{
            padding: 16px;
            background: var(--bg-secondary);
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
        }}

        .oad-chat-input {{
            flex: 1;
            background: var(--bg-primary);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            padding: 12px 16px;
            color: var(--text-primary);
            font-family: var(--font-sans);
            font-size: 14px;
            resize: none;
            outline: none;
            transition: border-color var(--transition-fast);
        }}

        .oad-chat-input:focus {{
            border-color: var(--primary);
        }}

        .oad-chat-send {{
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            border: none;
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            color: var(--bg-primary);
            font-size: 20px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all var(--transition-fast);
        }}

        .oad-chat-send:hover {{
            transform: scale(1.05);
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow);
        }}

        /* Integration Health */
        .oad-integration-grid {{
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(250px, 1fr));
            gap: 16px;
        }}

        .oad-integration-card {{
            background: var(--bg-secondary);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            padding: 16px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 16px;
        }}

        .oad-integration-icon {{
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 24px;
        }}

        .oad-integration-status {{
            width: 8px;
            height: 8px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }}

        .oad-integration-status.ok {{ background: var(--accent); }}
        .oad-integration-status.warning {{ background: var(--warning); }}
        .oad-integration-status.error {{ background: var(--danger); }}

        /* Analytics Charts */
        .oad-chart-container {{
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            padding: 20px;
            height: 300px;
        }}

        /* Settings Panel */
        .oad-settings-grid {{
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
        }}

        .oad-settings-section {{
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
            padding: 20px;
        }}

        .oad-settings-title {{
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            padding-bottom: 12px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }}

        .oad-setting-row {{
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }}

        .oad-setting-row:last-child {{
            border-bottom: none;
        }}

        .oad-toggle {{
            width: 48px;
            height: 24px;
            background: var(--border);
            border-radius: 12px;
            cursor: pointer;
            position: relative;
            transition: background var(--transition-fast);
        }}

        .oad-toggle.active {{
            background: var(--primary);
        }}

        .oad-toggle::after {{
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            top: 2px;
            left: 2px;
            transition: left var(--transition-fast);
        }}

        .oad-toggle.active::after {{
            left: 26px;
        }}

        .oad-select {{
            background: var(--bg-secondary);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
            padding: 8px 12px;
            color: var(--text-primary);
            font-family: var(--font-sans);
        }}

        /* Button Styles */
        .oad-btn {{
            padding: 10px 20px;
            border: none;
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            font-family: var(--font-sans);
            font-size: 13px;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all var(--transition-fast);
        }}

        .oad-btn-primary {{
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            color: var(--bg-primary);
        }}

        .oad-btn-primary:hover {{
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }}

        .oad-btn-secondary {{
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text-primary);
        }}

        .oad-btn-secondary:hover {{
            border-color: var(--primary);
        }}

        /* Notifications */
        .oad-notifications {{
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 24px;
            right: 24px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 12px;
            z-index: 2000;
        }}

        .oad-notification {{
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: var(--radius-md);
            padding: 16px 20px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
            animation: slideInRight 0.3s ease;
            max-width: 360px;
        }}

        @keyframes slideInRight {{
            from {{ opacity: 0; transform: translateX(100px); }}
            to {{ opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }}
        }}

        .oad-notification.success {{ border-left: 4px solid var(--accent); }}
        .oad-notification.warning {{ border-left: 4px solid var(--warning); }}
        .oad-notification.error {{ border-left: 4px solid var(--danger); }}
        .oad-notification.info {{ border-left: 4px solid var(--primary); }}

        /* Scrollbar */
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {{
            width: 8px;
            height: 8px;
        }}

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {{
            background: var(--bg-primary);
        }}

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {{
            background: var(--border);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }}

        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {{
            background: var(--primary);
        }}

        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 768px) {{
            .oad-container {{
                grid-template-columns: 60px 1fr;
            }}

            .oad-topbar-stats {{
                display: none;
            }}

            .oad-overview-grid {{
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }}
        }}
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="oad-background"></div>

    <div class="oad-container">
        <!-- Top Bar -->
        <header class="oad-topbar">
            <div class="oad-logo">
                <div class="oad-logo-icon">N</div>
                <div>
                    <div class="oad-logo-text">CITADEL OAD</div>
                    <div class="oad-logo-subtitle">Operator Access Dashboard</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="oad-topbar-stats">
                <div class="oad-stat">
                    <span class="oad-stat-value" id="xpStat">0</span>
                    <span class="oad-stat-label">Total XP</span>
                </div>
                <div class="oad-stat">
                    <span class="oad-stat-value" id="tpStat">0</span>
                    <span class="oad-stat-label">Tavern Points</span>
                </div>
                <div class="oad-stat">
                    <span class="oad-stat-value" id="memoryStat">0</span>
                    <span class="oad-stat-label">Memories</span>
                </div>
                <div class="oad-stat">
                    <span class="oad-stat-value" id="interactionStat">0</span>
                    <span class="oad-stat-label">Interactions</span>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="oad-topbar-actions">
                <div class="oad-connection-status">
                    <div class="oad-status-dot" id="connectionDot"></div>
                    <span id="connectionText">Connecting...</span>
                </div>
                <button class="oad-btn oad-btn-secondary" onclick="toggleTheme()">🎨 Theme</button>
                <button class="oad-btn oad-btn-primary" onclick="showNotification('info', 'OAD v1.0', 'Operator Access Dashboard Ready')">ℹ️ Info</button>
            </div>
        </header>

        <!-- Sidebar -->
        <nav class="oad-sidebar">
            <div class="oad-nav-item active" data-panel="overview" data-tooltip="Overview" onclick="switchPanel('overview')">📊</div>
            <div class="oad-nav-item" data-panel="chat" data-tooltip="Chat" onclick="switchPanel('chat')">💬</div>
            <div class="oad-nav-divider"></div>
            <div class="oad-nav-item" data-panel="memory" data-tooltip="Memory" onclick="switchPanel('memory')">🧠</div>
            <div class="oad-nav-item" data-panel="professors" data-tooltip="Professors" onclick="switchPanel('professors')">🎓</div>
            <div class="oad-nav-item" data-panel="missions" data-tooltip="Missions" onclick="switchPanel('missions')">🎯</div>
            <div class="oad-nav-item" data-panel="skills" data-tooltip="Skills" onclick="switchPanel('skills')">⚡</div>
            <div class="oad-nav-divider"></div>
            <div class="oad-nav-item" data-panel="integrations" data-tooltip="Integrations" onclick="switchPanel('integrations')">🔌</div>
            <div class="oad-nav-item" data-panel="analytics" data-tooltip="Analytics" onclick="switchPanel('analytics')">📈</div>
            <div class="oad-nav-divider"></div>
            <div class="oad-nav-item" data-panel="settings" data-tooltip="Settings" onclick="switchPanel('settings')">⚙️</div>
        </nav>

        <!-- Main Content -->
        <main class="oad-main">
            <!-- Overview Panel -->
            <div class="oad-panel active" id="panel-overview">
                <h2 style="margin-bottom: 24px;">Agent Overview</h2>
                <div class="oad-overview-grid">
                    <div class="oad-card">
                        <div class="oad-card-header">
                            <span class="oad-card-title">Experience Points</span>
                            <span class="oad-card-icon">⭐</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-big-number" id="xpDisplay">0</div>
                        <div class="oad-number-label">Points earned across all interactions</div>
                        <div class="oad-progress-bar">
                            <div class="oad-progress-fill" id="xpProgress" style="width: 0%"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="oad-card">
                        <div class="oad-card-header">
                            <span class="oad-card-title">Current Rank</span>
                            <span class="oad-card-icon">🏆</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-rank-badge" id="rankBadge">
                            <span>👤</span>
                            <span id="rankDisplay">INITIATE</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-number-label" style="margin-top: 16px;">Progress to next rank</div>
                        <div class="oad-progress-bar">
                            <div class="oad-progress-fill" id="rankProgress" style="width: 0%"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="oad-card">
                        <div class="oad-card-header">
                            <span class="oad-card-title">Emotional State</span>
                            <span class="oad-card-icon">💭</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-big-number" id="emotionDisplay" style="font-size: 36px;">😊</div>
                        <div class="oad-number-label" id="emotionLabel">Neutral - Ready to assist</div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="oad-card">
                        <div class="oad-card-header">
                            <span class="oad-card-title">Daily Streak</span>
                            <span class="oad-card-icon">🔥</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-big-number" id="streakDisplay">0</div>
                        <div class="oad-number-label">Consecutive days of activity</div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="oad-card">
                        <div class="oad-card-header">
                            <span class="oad-card-title">Active Quests</span>
                            <span class="oad-card-icon">📋</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-big-number" id="questDisplay">0</div>
                        <div class="oad-number-label">Quests in progress</div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="oad-card">
                        <div class="oad-card-header">
                            <span class="oad-card-title">Skills Unlocked</span>
                            <span class="oad-card-icon">🏅</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-big-number" id="badgeDisplay">0</div>
                        <div class="oad-number-label">Unlocked skill nodes</div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <h3 style="margin: 24px 0 16px;">Recent Activity</h3>
                <div class="oad-card" id="activityFeed">
                    <p style="color: var(--text-secondary);">No recent activity</p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Chat Panel -->
            <div class="oad-panel" id="panel-chat">
                <div class="oad-chat-container">
                    <div class="oad-chat-messages" id="chatMessages">
                        <div class="oad-chat-message">
                            <div class="oad-chat-avatar">🤖</div>
                            <div class="oad-chat-bubble">
                                Welcome to the Operator Access Dashboard! I'm {agent_name}, your Citadel Nexus Agent. How can I assist you today?
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
