                    <div class="oad-chat-input-area">
                        <textarea class="oad-chat-input" id="chatInput" placeholder="Type your message..." rows="1" onkeydown="handleChatKeydown(event)"></textarea>
                        <button class="oad-chat-send" onclick="sendChatMessage()">→</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Memory Panel -->
            <div class="oad-panel" id="panel-memory">
                <h2 style="margin-bottom: 24px;">Memory System</h2>
                <div class="oad-overview-grid">
                    <div class="oad-card">
                        <div class="oad-card-header">
                            <span class="oad-card-title">Short-Term Memory</span>
                            <span class="oad-card-icon">⚡</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-big-number" id="stmCount">0</div>
                        <div class="oad-number-label">Recent memories in buffer</div>
                        <div class="oad-progress-bar">
                            <div class="oad-progress-fill" id="stmProgress" style="width: 0%"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="oad-card">
                        <div class="oad-card-header">
                            <span class="oad-card-title">Long-Term Memory</span>
                            <span class="oad-card-icon">🧠</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-big-number" id="ltmCount">0</div>
                        <div class="oad-number-label">Consolidated memories stored</div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="oad-card">
                        <div class="oad-card-header">
                            <span class="oad-card-title">Learning Domains</span>
                            <span class="oad-card-icon">📚</span>
                        </div>
                        <div id="domainList" style="margin-top: 12px;">
                            <div style="color: var(--text-secondary);">Loading domains...</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <h3 style="margin: 24px 0 16px;">Memory Visualization</h3>
                <div class="oad-card">
                    <div class="oad-card-header">
                        <span class="oad-card-title">Memory Grid</span>
                        <select class="oad-select" id="memoryDomain" onchange="updateMemoryGrid()">
                            <option value="all">All Domains</option>
                            <option value="conversation">Conversation</option>
                            <option value="skills">Skills</option>
                            <option value="facts">Facts</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="oad-memory-grid" id="memoryGrid">
                        <!-- Memory cells will be populated dynamically -->
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Professors Panel -->
            <div class="oad-panel" id="panel-professors">
                <h2 style="margin-bottom: 24px;">Professor Network</h2>
                <p style="color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 24px;">28 domain expert professors available for specialized knowledge routing</p>
                <div class="oad-professor-grid" id="professorGrid">
                    <!-- Professors will be populated dynamically -->
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Missions Panel -->
            <div class="oad-panel" id="panel-missions">
                <h2 style="margin-bottom: 24px;">Active Missions</h2>
                <div class="oad-mission-list" id="missionList">
                    <div class="oad-mission-item">
                        <div class="oad-mission-icon">🎯</div>
                        <div class="oad-mission-details">
                            <div class="oad-mission-name">Daily Interaction</div>
                            <div class="oad-mission-desc">Complete 5 interactions today</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-mission-reward">+50 XP</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="oad-mission-item">
                        <div class="oad-mission-icon">📚</div>
                        <div class="oad-mission-details">
                            <div class="oad-mission-name">Knowledge Seeker</div>
                            <div class="oad-mission-desc">Learn 3 new facts</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-mission-reward">+100 XP</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="oad-mission-item">
                        <div class="oad-mission-icon">🎓</div>
                        <div class="oad-mission-details">
                            <div class="oad-mission-name">Professor Consult</div>
                            <div class="oad-mission-desc">Ask a professor for expertise</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-mission-reward">+75 XP</div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <h3 style="margin: 32px 0 16px;">Daily Quests</h3>
                <div class="oad-mission-list" id="questList">
                    <!-- Quests populated dynamically -->
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Skills Panel -->
            <div class="oad-panel" id="panel-skills">
                <h2 style="margin-bottom: 24px;">Skill Tree</h2>
                <div class="oad-skill-tree" id="skillTree">
                    <div class="oad-skill-branch">
                        <div class="oad-skill-branch-title">💬 Conversation</div>
                        <div class="oad-skill-node unlocked">
                            <span class="oad-skill-icon">👋</span>
                            <span class="oad-skill-name">Greeting</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-skill-node unlocked">
                            <span class="oad-skill-icon">🗣️</span>
                            <span class="oad-skill-name">Small Talk</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-skill-node locked">
                            <span class="oad-skill-icon">🎭</span>
                            <span class="oad-skill-name">Persuasion</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="oad-skill-branch">
                        <div class="oad-skill-branch-title">📚 Knowledge</div>
                        <div class="oad-skill-node unlocked">
                            <span class="oad-skill-icon">🔍</span>
                            <span class="oad-skill-name">Recall</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-skill-node locked">
                            <span class="oad-skill-icon">🧩</span>
                            <span class="oad-skill-name">Synthesis</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-skill-node locked">
                            <span class="oad-skill-icon">💡</span>
                            <span class="oad-skill-name">Insight</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="oad-skill-branch">
                        <div class="oad-skill-branch-title">🛠️ Technical</div>
                        <div class="oad-skill-node unlocked">
                            <span class="oad-skill-icon">📝</span>
                            <span class="oad-skill-name">Code Review</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-skill-node locked">
                            <span class="oad-skill-icon">🔧</span>
                            <span class="oad-skill-name">Debugging</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-skill-node locked">
                            <span class="oad-skill-icon">🏗️</span>
                            <span class="oad-skill-name">Architecture</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Integrations Panel -->
            <div class="oad-panel" id="panel-integrations">
                <h2 style="margin-bottom: 24px;">Integration Health</h2>
                <div class="oad-integration-grid" id="integrationGrid">
                    <div class="oad-integration-card">
                        <div class="oad-integration-icon">🔗</div>
                        <div style="flex: 1;">
                            <div style="font-weight: 600;">Supabase</div>
                            <div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary);">Database & Auth</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-integration-status ok"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="oad-integration-card">
                        <div class="oad-integration-icon">💬</div>
                        <div style="flex: 1;">
                            <div style="font-weight: 600;">Discord</div>
                            <div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary);">Bot Integration</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-integration-status ok"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="oad-integration-card">
                        <div class="oad-integration-icon">📊</div>
                        <div style="flex: 1;">
                            <div style="font-weight: 600;">PostHog</div>
                            <div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary);">Analytics</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-integration-status ok"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="oad-integration-card">
                        <div class="oad-integration-icon">🐕</div>
                        <div style="flex: 1;">
                            <div style="font-weight: 600;">Datadog</div>
                            <div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary);">Monitoring</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-integration-status warning"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="oad-integration-card">
                        <div class="oad-integration-icon">💳</div>
                        <div style="flex: 1;">
                            <div style="font-weight: 600;">Stripe</div>
                            <div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary);">Billing</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-integration-status ok"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="oad-integration-card">
                        <div class="oad-integration-icon">📝</div>
                        <div style="flex: 1;">
                            <div style="font-weight: 600;">Notion</div>
                            <div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary);">Knowledge Sync</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-integration-status ok"></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Analytics Panel -->
            <div class="oad-panel" id="panel-analytics">
                <h2 style="margin-bottom: 24px;">Analytics Dashboard</h2>
                <div class="oad-overview-grid">
                    <div class="oad-chart-container">
                        <div class="oad-card-title" style="margin-bottom: 16px;">XP Growth Over Time</div>
                        <div id="xpChart" style="display: flex; align-items: flex-end; height: 200px; gap: 8px;">
                            <!-- Chart bars will be populated -->
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="oad-chart-container">
                        <div class="oad-card-title" style="margin-bottom: 16px;">Interaction Distribution</div>
                        <div id="interactionChart" style="text-align: center; padding-top: 40px;">
                            <span style="font-size: 48px;">📊</span>
                            <p style="color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 16px;">Analytics data loading...</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Settings Panel -->
            <div class="oad-panel" id="panel-settings">
                <h2 style="margin-bottom: 24px;">Dashboard Settings</h2>
                <div class="oad-settings-grid">
                    <div class="oad-settings-section">
                        <div class="oad-settings-title">Appearance</div>
                        <div class="oad-setting-row">
                            <span>Theme</span>
                            <select class="oad-select" id="themeSelect" onchange="changeTheme(this.value)">
                                <option value="citadel_dark">Citadel Dark</option>
                                <option value="nexus_purple">Nexus Purple</option>
                                <option value="brotherhood_gold">Brotherhood Gold</option>
                                <option value="matrix_green">Matrix Green</option>
                                <option value="cyberpunk">Cyberpunk</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-setting-row">
                            <span>Animations</span>
                            <div class="oad-toggle active" onclick="toggleSetting(this, 'animations')"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-setting-row">
                            <span>Compact Mode</span>
                            <div class="oad-toggle" onclick="toggleSetting(this, 'compact')"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="oad-settings-section">
                        <div class="oad-settings-title">Notifications</div>
                        <div class="oad-setting-row">
                            <span>Enable Notifications</span>
                            <div class="oad-toggle active" onclick="toggleSetting(this, 'notifications')"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-setting-row">
                            <span>Sound Effects</span>
                            <div class="oad-toggle" onclick="toggleSetting(this, 'sounds')"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-setting-row">
                            <span>XP Milestones</span>
                            <div class="oad-toggle active" onclick="toggleSetting(this, 'milestones')"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="oad-settings-section">
                        <div class="oad-settings-title">Agent Configuration</div>
                        <div class="oad-setting-row">
                            <span>Response Length</span>
                            <select class="oad-select" id="responseLength">
                                <option value="concise">Concise</option>
                                <option value="balanced" selected>Balanced</option>
                                <option value="detailed">Detailed</option>
                                <option value="elongated">Elongated</option>
                            </select>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-setting-row">
                            <span>Enable Professors</span>
                            <div class="oad-toggle active" onclick="toggleSetting(this, 'professors')"></div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-setting-row">
                            <span>Enable Gamification</span>
                            <div class="oad-toggle active" onclick="toggleSetting(this, 'gamification')"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="oad-settings-section">
                        <div class="oad-settings-title">Data Management</div>
                        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; margin-top: 12px;">
                            <button class="oad-btn oad-btn-secondary" onclick="exportData()">📥 Export Agent Data</button>
                            <button class="oad-btn oad-btn-secondary" onclick="clearMemory()">🗑️ Clear Memory</button>
                            <button class="oad-btn oad-btn-secondary" onclick="resetProgress()">🔄 Reset Progress</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </main>
    </div>

    <!-- Notifications Container -->
    <div class="oad-notifications" id="notifications"></div>

    <script>
        // WebSocket connection
        let ws;
        let reconnectAttempts = 0;
        const maxReconnectAttempts = 10;

        // State
        let state = {{
            panel: 'overview',
            theme: 'citadel_dark',
            connected: false,
            xp: 0,
            tp: 0,
            rank: 'INITIATE',
            emotion: 'neutral',
            streak: 0,
            memories: 0,
            interactions: 0
        }};

        // Initialize
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {{
            connect();
            startStatsPolling();
        }});

        function connect() {{
            ws = new WebSocket('ws://{self.config.host}:{port}/ws');

            ws.onopen = () => {{
                state.connected = true;
                reconnectAttempts = 0;
                updateConnectionStatus(true);
                ws.send(JSON.stringify({{ type: 'init' }}));
                requestPanelData();
                showNotification('success', 'Connected', 'OAD connected to agent successfully');
            }};

            ws.onclose = () => {{
                state.connected = false;
                updateConnectionStatus(false);
                if (reconnectAttempts < maxReconnectAttempts) {{
                    reconnectAttempts++;
                    setTimeout(connect, 1000 * Math.min(reconnectAttempts, 5));
                }}
            }};

            ws.onmessage = (event) => {{
                const data = JSON.parse(event.data);
                handleMessage(data);
            }};

            ws.onerror = (error) => {{
                console.error('WebSocket error:', error);
            }};
        }}

        function handleMessage(data) {{
            switch (data.type) {{
                case 'status':
                    updateStats(data);
                    break;
                case 'response':
                    addChatMessage('agent', data.content);
                    break;
                case 'xp_award':
                    animateXPAward(data.amount);
                    showNotification('success', 'XP Earned!', `+${{data.amount}} XP: ${{data.reason}}`);
                    break;
                case 'rank_up':
                    showNotification('success', 'Rank Up!', `You've reached ${{data.new_rank}}!`);
                    break;
                case 'badge_unlock':
                    showNotification('success', 'Badge Unlocked!', data.badge_name);
                    break;
                case 'memory_update':
                    renderMemories(data.memories, data.domains || {{}}, data.stm_count, data.ltm_count);
                    break;
                case 'professors':
                    renderProfessors(data.professors || []);
                    break;
                case 'missions':
                    renderMissions(data.missions || [], data.quests || []);
                    break;
                case 'skills':
                    renderSkills(data.trees || []);
                    break;
                case 'integrations':
                    renderIntegrations(data.integrations || []);
                    break;
                case 'analytics':
                    renderAnalytics(data.analytics || {{}}, data.telemetry || null);
                    break;
                case 'command_result':
                    if (data.message) {{
                        addChatMessage('agent', data.message);
                    }}
                    break;
                case 'professor_response':
                    showProfessorResponse(data);
                    break;
            }}
        }}

        function updateConnectionStatus(connected) {{
            const dot = document.getElementById('connectionDot');
            const text = document.getElementById('connectionText');
            if (connected) {{
                dot.classList.remove('disconnected');
                text.textContent = 'Connected';
            }} else {{
                dot.classList.add('disconnected');
                text.textContent = 'Disconnected';
            }}
        }}

        function updateStats(data) {{
            if (data.xp !== undefined) {{
                state.xp = data.xp;
                document.getElementById('xpStat').textContent = data.xp.toLocaleString();
                document.getElementById('xpDisplay').textContent = data.xp.toLocaleString();
            }}
            if (data.tp !== undefined) {{
                state.tp = data.tp;
                document.getElementById('tpStat').textContent = data.tp.toLocaleString();
            }}
            if (data.rank) {{
                state.rank = data.rank;
                document.getElementById('rankDisplay').textContent = data.rank;
            }}
            if (data.rank_progress !== undefined) {{
                const pct = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, data.rank_progress));
                document.getElementById('rankProgress').style.width = pct + '%';
                document.getElementById('xpProgress').style.width = pct + '%';
            }}
            if (data.emotion) {{
                state.emotion = data.emotion;
                updateEmotionDisplay(data.emotion);
            }}
            if (data.streak !== undefined) {{
                document.getElementById('streakDisplay').textContent = data.streak;
            }}
            if (data.memories !== undefined) {{
                document.getElementById('memoryStat').textContent = data.memories;
            }}
            if (data.interactions !== undefined) {{
                document.getElementById('interactionStat').textContent = data.interactions;
            }}
            if (data.active_missions !== undefined || data.active_quests !== undefined) {{
                const total = (data.active_missions || 0) + (data.active_quests || 0);
                document.getElementById('questDisplay').textContent = total;
            }}
            if (data.skills_unlocked !== undefined) {{
                document.getElementById('badgeDisplay').textContent = data.skills_unlocked;
            }}
        }}

        function updateEmotionDisplay(emotion) {{
            const emotionMap = {{
                'happy': ['😊', 'Feeling great!'],
                'excited': ['🤩', 'Very excited!'],
                'curious': ['🤔', 'Curious and engaged'],
                'focused': ['🎯', 'Deeply focused'],
                'neutral': ['😐', 'Ready to assist'],
                'tired': ['😴', 'Running low on energy'],
                'confused': ['😕', 'Need clarification']
            }};
            const [emoji, label] = emotionMap[emotion] || ['😐', 'Neutral'];
            document.getElementById('emotionDisplay').textContent = emoji;
            document.getElementById('emotionLabel').textContent = label;
        }}

        function switchPanel(panel) {{
            // Update nav
            document.querySelectorAll('.oad-nav-item').forEach(item => {{
                item.classList.remove('active');
                if (item.dataset.panel === panel) {{
                    item.classList.add('active');
                }}
            }});

            // Update panels
            document.querySelectorAll('.oad-panel').forEach(p => {{
                p.classList.remove('active');
            }});
            document.getElementById('panel-' + panel).classList.add('active');

            state.panel = panel;
        }}

        // Chat functions
        function sendChatMessage() {{
            const input = document.getElementById('chatInput');
            const message = input.value.trim();
            if (!message) return;

            addChatMessage('user', message);
            sendWS({{ type: 'message', content: message }});
            input.value = '';
        }}

        function addChatMessage(role, content) {{
            const messages = document.getElementById('chatMessages');
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.className = 'oad-chat-message ' + role;

            const avatar = role === 'user' ? '👤' : '🤖';
            div.innerHTML = `
                <div class="oad-chat-avatar">${{avatar}}</div>
                <div class="oad-chat-bubble">${{escapeHtml(content)}}</div>
            `;

            messages.appendChild(div);
            messages.scrollTop = messages.scrollHeight;
        }}

        function handleChatKeydown(event) {{
            if (event.key === 'Enter' && !event.shiftKey) {{
                event.preventDefault();
                sendChatMessage();
            }}
        }}

        // Professor network
        function renderProfessors(professors) {{
            const iconMap = {{
                systems_engineering: '🧩',
                product_management: '📈',
                legal_compliance: '⚖️',
                security_privacy: '🔐',
                financial_ops: '💰',
                operations_infra: '🏗️',
                data_science_ml: '🤖',
                devops_deploy: '⚙️',
                ux_design: '🎨',
                marketing: '📣',
                sales_growth: '📊',
                customer_success: '🤝',
                testing: '🧪',
                documentation: '📝',
                community_building: '🫂',
                growth_strategy: '🚀',
                talent_recruitment: '🎯',
                strategic_planning: '🧭',
                infrastructure: '🛰️',
            }};
            const grid = document.getElementById('professorGrid');
            if (!professors.length) {{
                grid.innerHTML = '<div style="color: var(--text-secondary);">No professors available</div>';
                return;
            }}
            grid.innerHTML = professors.map(p => {{
                const icon = iconMap[p.domain] || '🎓';
                const domainLabel = (p.domain || '').replace(/_/g, ' ');
                const displayName = p.name || domainLabel || 'Professor';
                const expertise = Array.isArray(p.expertise) ? p.expertise.join(', ') : '';
                return `
                <div class="oad-professor-card" onclick="consultProfessor('${{displayName}}')" title="${{escapeHtml(expertise)}}">
                    <div class="oad-professor-avatar">${{icon}}</div>
                    <div class="oad-professor-name">${{escapeHtml(displayName)}}</div>
                    <div class="oad-professor-domain">${{escapeHtml(domainLabel)}}</div>
                </div>
                `;
            }}).join('');
        }}

        function consultProfessor(name) {{
            showNotification('info', 'Consulting...', `Routing question to ${{name}}`);
            // Switch to chat and add system message
            switchPanel('chat');
        }}

        function showProfessorResponse(data) {{
            if (data && data.answer) {{
                addChatMessage('agent', data.answer);
            }}
        }}

        // Memory grid
        function renderMemories(memories, domains, stmCount, ltmCount) {{
            const grid = document.getElementById('memoryGrid');
            const domainList = document.getElementById('domainList');
            if (!memories || !memories.length) {{
                grid.innerHTML = '<div style="color: var(--text-secondary);">No memory entries</div>';
            }} else {{
                const maxCells = 48;
                grid.innerHTML = memories.slice(0, maxCells).map((m, idx) => {{
                    const label = (m.domain || '').slice(0, 2).toUpperCase() || (idx + 1);
                    const active = m.is_stm ? 'active' : '';
                    const title = escapeHtml(m.content || '');
                    return `<div class="oad-memory-cell ${{active}}" title="${{title}}">${{label}}</div>`;
                }}).join('');
            }}
            if (stmCount !== undefined && stmCount !== null) {{
                document.getElementById('stmCount').textContent = stmCount;
            }}
            if (ltmCount !== undefined && ltmCount !== null) {{
                document.getElementById('ltmCount').textContent = ltmCount;
            }}
            const total = (stmCount || 0) + (ltmCount || 0);
            if (total > 0) {{
                const pct = Math.round(((stmCount || 0) / total) * 100);
                document.getElementById('stmProgress').style.width = pct + '%';
            }}
            const domainEntries = Object.entries(domains || {{}});
            if (!domainEntries.length) {{
                domainList.innerHTML = '<div style="color: var(--text-secondary);">No domain data</div>';
            }} else {{
                domainList.innerHTML = domainEntries.map(([key, count]) => `
                    <div style="display:flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 6px;">
                        <span>${{escapeHtml(key.replace(/_/g, ' '))}}</span>
                        <span style="color: var(--text-secondary);">${{count}}</span>
                    </div>
                `).join('');
            }}
        }}

        function requestMemories() {{
            const domainSelect = document.getElementById('memoryDomain');
            sendWS({{ type: 'get_memories', domain: domainSelect ? domainSelect.value : 'all' }});
        }}

        function updateMemoryGrid() {{
            requestMemories();
        }}

        function formatRequirement(key) {{
            return key.replace(/_/g, ' ');
        }}

        function buildRequirementSummary(requirements, progress) {{
            if (!requirements) return '';
            return Object.keys(requirements).map(key => {{
                const req = requirements[key];
                const prog = progress && progress[key] !== undefined ? progress[key] : 0;
                const label = formatRequirement(key);
                if (typeof req === 'number') {{
                    const shown = Math.min(prog, req);
                    return `${{label}}: ${{shown}}/${{req}}`;
                }}
                if (typeof req === 'string') {{
                    return `${{label}}: ${{req}}`;
                }}
                return `${{label}}: ${{prog}}`;
            }}).join(' • ');
        }}

        // Missions
        function renderMissions(missions, quests) {{
            const missionList = document.getElementById('missionList');
            const questList = document.getElementById('questList');
            const iconMap = {{
                learning: '📚',
                exploration: '🔍',
                social: '💬',
                challenge: '🎯',
                daily: '🗓️',
                weekly: '📅',
                epic: '🔥'
            }};
            if (!missions.length) {{
                missionList.innerHTML = '<div style="color: var(--text-secondary);">No active missions</div>';
            }} else {{
                missionList.innerHTML = missions.map(m => {{
                    const icon = iconMap[m.type] || '🎯';
                    const summary = buildRequirementSummary(m.requirements, m.progress);
                    const desc = summary ? `${{m.description}} • ${{summary}}` : m.description;
                    return `
                        <div class="oad-mission-item">
                            <div class="oad-mission-icon">${{icon}}</div>
                            <div class="oad-mission-details">
                                <div class="oad-mission-name">${{escapeHtml(m.title)}}</div>
                                <div class="oad-mission-desc">${{escapeHtml(desc)}}</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="oad-mission-reward">+${{m.xp_reward}} XP</div>
                        </div>
                    `;
                }}).join('');
            }}
            if (!quests.length) {{
                questList.innerHTML = '<div style="color: var(--text-secondary);">No daily quests available</div>';
            }} else {{
                questList.innerHTML = quests.map(q => {{
                    const summary = buildRequirementSummary(q.requirements, q.progress);
                    const desc = summary ? `${{q.description}} • ${{summary}}` : q.description;
                    return `
                        <div class="oad-mission-item">
                            <div class="oad-mission-icon">🏹</div>
                            <div class="oad-mission-details">
                                <div class="oad-mission-name">${{escapeHtml(q.title)}}</div>
                                <div class="oad-mission-desc">${{escapeHtml(desc)}}</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="oad-mission-reward">+${{q.xp_reward}} XP</div>
                        </div>
                    `;
                }}).join('');
            }}
        }}

        // Skills
        function renderSkills(trees) {{
            const container = document.getElementById('skillTree');
            if (!trees.length) {{
                container.innerHTML = '<div style="color: var(--text-secondary);">No skill data available</div>';
                return;
            }}
            container.innerHTML = trees.map(tree => {{
                const skillsHtml = (tree.skills || []).map(s => {{
                    const status = s.unlocked ? 'unlocked' : (s.available ? 'available' : 'locked');
                    const cost = `XP ${{s.xp_cost || 0}} • TP ${{s.tp_cost || 0}}`;
                    const tooltip = s.description ? `${{cost}} | ${{s.description}}` : cost;
                    return `
                        <div class="oad-skill-node ${{status}}" title="${{escapeHtml(tooltip)}}">
                            <span class="oad-skill-icon">${{s.icon || '⭐'}}</span>
                            <span class="oad-skill-name">${{escapeHtml(s.name)}} <span style="color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 11px;">T${{s.tier}}</span></span>
                        </div>
                    `;
                }}).join('');
                return `
                    <div class="oad-skill-branch">
                        <div class="oad-skill-branch-title">${{tree.icon || '⚡'}} ${{escapeHtml(tree.name)}}</div>
                        ${{skillsHtml}}
                    </div>
                `;
            }}).join('');
        }}

        // Integrations
        function renderIntegrations(integrations) {{
            const grid = document.getElementById('integrationGrid');
            const statusMap = {{
                ok: 'ok',
                skipped: 'warning',
                not_configured: 'warning',
                fail: 'error'
            }};
            if (!integrations.length) {{
                grid.innerHTML = '<div style="color: var(--text-secondary);">No integration data available</div>';
                return;
            }}
            grid.innerHTML = integrations.map(i => {{
                const statusClass = statusMap[i.status] || 'warning';
                return `
                    <div class="oad-integration-card" title="${{escapeHtml(i.message || '')}}">
                        <div class="oad-integration-icon">🔌</div>
                        <div style="flex: 1;">
                            <div style="font-weight: 600;">${{escapeHtml(i.name)}}</div>
                            <div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary);">${{escapeHtml(i.category || '')}}</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="oad-integration-status ${{statusClass}}"></div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }}).join('');
        }}

        // Analytics
        function renderAnalytics(analytics, telemetry) {{
            const xpChart = document.getElementById('xpChart');
            const interactionChart = document.getElementById('interactionChart');
            const events = analytics.events_by_type || {{}};
            const entries = Object.entries(events).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
            if (!entries.length) {{
                xpChart.innerHTML = '<p style="color: var(--text-secondary);">No analytics yet</p>';
            }} else {{
                const maxVal = Math.max(...entries.map(e => e[1]), 1);
                xpChart.innerHTML = entries.slice(0, 8).map(([name, count]) => {{
                    const height = Math.max(8, Math.round((count / maxVal) * 100));
                    const label = name.replace(/_/g, ' ').slice(0, 10);
                    return `
                        <div style="flex:1; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:6px;">
                            <div style="width: 100%; height:${{height}}%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary)); border-radius: 6px;" title="${{label}}: ${{count}}"></div>
                            <div style="font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-secondary); text-align:center;">${{label}}</div>
                        </div>
                    `;
                }}).join('');
            }}
            if (analytics.recent_events && analytics.recent_events.length) {{
                interactionChart.innerHTML = analytics.recent_events.map(e => `
                    <div style="text-align:left; margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary);">${{escapeHtml(e)}}</div>
                `).join('');
            }} else {{
                interactionChart.innerHTML = '<p style="color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 16px;">Analytics data loading...</p>';
            }}
            renderActivityFeed(analytics.recent_events || []);
        }}

        function renderActivityFeed(items) {{
            const feed = document.getElementById('activityFeed');
            if (!items.length) {{
                feed.innerHTML = '<p style="color: var(--text-secondary);">No recent activity</p>';
                return;
            }}
            feed.innerHTML = items.map(item => `
                <div style="padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 12px;">${{escapeHtml(item)}}</div>
            `).join('');
        }}

        // Notifications
        function showNotification(type, title, message) {{
            const container = document.getElementById('notifications');
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.className = 'oad-notification ' + type;
            div.innerHTML = `
                <div>
                    <strong>${{title}}</strong>
                    <div style="font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px;">${{message}}</div>
                </div>
            `;
            container.appendChild(div);

            setTimeout(() => {{
                div.style.animation = 'slideInRight 0.3s ease reverse';
                setTimeout(() => div.remove(), 300);
            }}, 4000);
        }}

        // XP animation
        function animateXPAward(amount) {{
            const display = document.getElementById('xpDisplay');
            display.style.transform = 'scale(1.2)';
            display.style.transition = 'transform 0.2s';
            setTimeout(() => {{
                display.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
            }}, 200);
        }}

        // Settings
        function toggleSetting(element, setting) {{
            element.classList.toggle('active');
            const enabled = element.classList.contains('active');
            console.log(`Setting ${{setting}} = ${{enabled}}`);
        }}

        function changeTheme(theme) {{
            state.theme = theme;
            // Theme change would require page reload or dynamic CSS variable update
            showNotification('info', 'Theme Changed', `Switched to ${{theme}}`);
        }}

        function toggleTheme() {{
            const themes = ['citadel_dark', 'nexus_purple', 'brotherhood_gold', 'matrix_green', 'cyberpunk'];
            const current = themes.indexOf(state.theme);
            const next = (current + 1) % themes.length;
            changeTheme(themes[next]);
        }}

        // Data management
        function exportData() {{
            showNotification('info', 'Exporting...', 'Preparing agent data for export');
        }}

        function clearMemory() {{
            if (confirm('Are you sure you want to clear all memory? This cannot be undone.')) {{
                showNotification('warning', 'Memory Cleared', 'All memories have been reset');
            }}
        }}

        function resetProgress() {{
            if (confirm('Are you sure you want to reset all progress? This cannot be undone.')) {{
                showNotification('warning', 'Progress Reset', 'All XP and achievements have been reset');
            }}
        }}

        // Stats polling
        function startStatsPolling() {{
            setInterval(() => {{
                sendWS({{ type: 'get_status' }});
            }}, {self.config.stats_update_interval});
        }}

        // Utilities
        function escapeHtml(text) {{
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.textContent = text;
            return div.innerHTML;
        }}

        // Keyboard shortcuts
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {{
            if (e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) {{
                switch(e.key) {{
                    case '1': switchPanel('overview'); e.preventDefault(); break;
                    case '2': switchPanel('chat'); e.preventDefault(); break;
                    case '3': switchPanel('memory'); e.preventDefault(); break;
                    case '4': switchPanel('professors'); e.preventDefault(); break;
                    case '5': switchPanel('missions'); e.preventDefault(); break;
                }}
            }}
        }});
    </script>
</body>
</html>'''

    async def _handle_websocket(self, websocket, path=None):
        """
        Handle WebSocket connections (path is optional for newer websockets lib).

        # BEGIN META: _handle_websocket
        # SRS: ["SRS-OAD-002"]
        # Purpose: Process OAD WebSocket messages
        # END META
        """
        self._connections.add(websocket)
        try:
            async for message in websocket:
                await self._process_message(websocket, json.loads(message))
        finally:
            self._connections.discard(websocket)

    async def _process_message(self, websocket, data: Dict[str, Any]):
        """
        Process incoming WebSocket message.

        # BEGIN META: _process_message
        # SRS: ["SRS-OAD-002"]
        # Purpose: Route and handle OAD messages
        # END META
        """
        msg_type = data.get("type", "")

        if msg_type == "init":
            # Send initial status
            await self._send_status(websocket)
            # Also send available commands
            await self._send_commands(websocket)

        elif msg_type == "message":
            # Process chat message (check if it's a command)
            content = data.get("content", "").strip()
            if content.startswith("/"):
                # Handle as command
                await self._execute_command(websocket, content)
            elif content and hasattr(self.agent, 'interact'):
                response = await asyncio.to_thread(self.agent.interact, content)
                await websocket.send(json.dumps({
                    "type": "response",
                    "content": response
                }))
            await self._send_status(websocket)

        elif msg_type == "command":
            # Execute specific command
            cmd = data.get("command", "")
            if cmd:
                await self._execute_command(websocket, cmd)

        elif msg_type == "get_status":
            await self._send_status(websocket)

        elif msg_type == "get_commands":
            await self._send_commands(websocket)

        elif msg_type == "get_professors":
            await self._send_professors(websocket)

        elif msg_type == "get_memories":
            await self._send_memories(websocket, data.get("domain", "all"))

        elif msg_type == "get_missions":
            await self._send_missions(websocket)

        elif msg_type == "get_skills":
            await self._send_skills(websocket)

        elif msg_type == "get_integrations":
            await self._send_integrations(websocket)

        elif msg_type == "get_analytics":
            await self._send_analytics(websocket)

    async def _execute_command(self, websocket, command: str):
        """
        Execute a slash command and return result.

        # BEGIN META: _execute_command
        # SRS: ["SRS-OAD-002"]
        # Purpose: Execute slash commands from OAD UI
        # END META
        """
        cmd = command.lower().strip()

        try:
            result = {"type": "command_result", "command": cmd, "success": True}

            # Map commands to actions
            if cmd in ("/status", "/stats"):
                stats = {
                    "xp": self.agent.brotherhood.total_xp if hasattr(self.agent, 'brotherhood') else 0,
                    "tp": self.agent.brotherhood.total_tp if hasattr(self.agent, 'brotherhood') else 0,
                    "rank": self.agent.brotherhood.rank if hasattr(self.agent, 'brotherhood') else "INITIATE",
                    "streak": self.agent.brotherhood.streak_days if hasattr(self.agent, 'brotherhood') else 0,
                    "memories": len(self.agent.stm.entries) if hasattr(self.agent, 'stm') and self.agent.stm else 0,
                    "interactions": getattr(self.agent.vitals, 'interaction_count', 0) if hasattr(self.agent, 'vitals') else 0,
                }
                result["data"] = stats
                result["message"] = f"XP: {stats['xp']:,} | TP: {stats['tp']:,} | Rank: {stats['rank']}"

            elif cmd in ("/brain", "/zigzag"):
                if not hasattr(self.agent, '_zigzag_visualizer') or not self.agent._zigzag_visualizer:
                    self.agent._zigzag_visualizer = ZigZagPanelVisualizer(self.agent)
                self.agent._zigzag_visualizer.capture_node("brain_activation", {
                    "trigger": "oad_command",
                    "command": cmd,
                })
                flow_data = self.agent._zigzag_visualizer.get_flow_data()
                result["data"] = flow_data
                result["message"] = f"ZigZag: {flow_data['total_nodes']} nodes captured"

            elif cmd in ("/scan", "/selfscan"):
                if hasattr(self.agent, '_self_scanner'):
                    scan_result = self.agent._self_scanner.scan()
                    result["data"] = {"sections": scan_result.total_sections, "functions": scan_result.total_functions}
                    result["message"] = f"Scan: {scan_result.total_sections} sections, {scan_result.total_functions} functions"
                else:
                    result["message"] = "Self scanner not available"

            elif cmd in ("/diagnostic", "/diag"):
                result["message"] = "Running diagnostics... Check console for full results."
                # Run in background
                if hasattr(self.agent, '_diagnostic_system'):
                    await asyncio.to_thread(self.agent._diagnostic_system.run_all_tests)

            elif cmd in ("/srs", "/compliance"):
                validator = OperationalSRSValidator(self.agent)
                report = validator.get_compliance_json()
                result["data"] = report
                result["message"] = f"SRS Compliance: {report['passed']}/{report['total_requirements']} ({report['compliance_percentage']:.1f}%)"

            elif cmd in ("/memory", "/mem"):
                stm_count = len(self.agent.stm.entries) if hasattr(self.agent, 'stm') and self.agent.stm else 0
                ltm_count = len(self.agent.ltm.entries) if hasattr(self.agent, 'ltm') and self.agent.ltm else 0
                result["data"] = {"stm": stm_count, "ltm": ltm_count}
                result["message"] = f"Memory: STM={stm_count}, LTM={ltm_count}"

            elif cmd in ("/professors", "/prof"):
                if hasattr(self.agent, 'professor_network'):
                    profs = list(self.agent.professor_network.professors.keys())
                    result["data"] = {"count": len(profs), "names": profs[:10]}
                    result["message"] = f"{len(profs)} professors available"
                else:
                    result["message"] = "Professor network not initialized"

            elif cmd in ("/badges", "/achievements"):
                if hasattr(self.agent, 'gamification'):
                    unlocked = [b for b in self.agent.gamification.BADGES.values() if b.is_unlocked]
                    result["data"] = {"unlocked": len(unlocked), "total": len(self.agent.gamification.BADGES)}
                    result["message"] = f"Badges: {len(unlocked)}/{len(self.agent.gamification.BADGES)} unlocked"
                else:
                    result["message"] = "Gamification not initialized"

            elif cmd in ("/install", "/bootstrap"):
                # Run auto-installation check
                installer = get_auto_installer()
                install_result = installer.run_full_installation_check(notify_user=False)
                result["data"] = {
                    "packages_installed": install_result.get("packages_installed", []),
                    "files_created": install_result.get("files_created", []),
                    "directories_created": install_result.get("directories_created", []),
                    "status": install_result.get("status", "unknown"),
                }
                total_actions = (
                    len(result["data"]["packages_installed"]) +
                    len(result["data"]["files_created"]) +
                    len(result["data"]["directories_created"])
                )
                if total_actions > 0:
                    result["message"] = f"Installation check complete: {total_actions} items installed/created"
                else:
                    result["message"] = "All dependencies present - environment is ready"

            elif cmd in ("/help", "/?"):
                result["message"] = "Available commands: /status, /brain, /scan, /diagnostic, /srs, /memory, /professors, /badges, /install, /help"

            else:
                result["success"] = False
                result["message"] = f"Unknown command: {cmd}. Type /help for available commands."

            await websocket.send(json.dumps(result))

        except Exception as e:
            await websocket.send(json.dumps({
                "type": "command_result",
                "command": cmd,
                "success": False,
                "message": f"Error: {str(e)}"
            }))

    async def _send_commands(self, websocket):
        """
        Send available commands list.

        # BEGIN META: _send_commands
        # SRS: ["SRS-OAD-002"]
        # Purpose: Send command registry to OAD client
        # END META
        """
        commands = [
            {"cmd": "/status", "desc": "Show XP, TP, rank stats", "icon": "📊", "category": "info"},
            {"cmd": "/brain", "desc": "ZigZag brain visualization", "icon": "🧠", "category": "cognitive"},
            {"cmd": "/scan", "desc": "Self-scan code analysis", "icon": "🔍", "category": "diagnostic"},
            {"cmd": "/diagnostic", "desc": "Run full diagnostics", "icon": "🩺", "category": "diagnostic"},
            {"cmd": "/srs", "desc": "SRS compliance report", "icon": "✅", "category": "compliance"},
            {"cmd": "/memory", "desc": "Memory statistics", "icon": "💾", "category": "memory"},
            {"cmd": "/professors", "desc": "Professor network", "icon": "🎓", "category": "knowledge"},
            {"cmd": "/badges", "desc": "Achievement badges", "icon": "🏆", "category": "gamification"},
            {"cmd": "/missions", "desc": "Active missions", "icon": "🎯", "category": "gamification"},
            {"cmd": "/skills", "desc": "Skill tree status", "icon": "⚡", "category": "progression"},
            {"cmd": "/integrations", "desc": "Integration status", "icon": "🔌", "category": "system"},
            {"cmd": "/telemetry", "desc": "Telemetry report", "icon": "📡", "category": "monitoring"},
            {"cmd": "/install", "desc": "Check/install dependencies", "icon": "📦", "category": "system"},
            {"cmd": "/help", "desc": "Show all commands", "icon": "❓", "category": "help"},
        ]
        await websocket.send(json.dumps({
            "type": "commands",
            "commands": commands
        }))

    def _get_rank_progress(self, xp: int) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Return rank progress metadata based on Brotherhood thresholds."""
        thresholds = [
            ("INITIATE", 0),
            ("APPRENTICE", 901),
            ("JOURNEYMAN", 4429),
            ("EXPERT", 13285),
            ("MASTER", 40855),
            ("LEGEND", 133428),
            ("ARCHITECT", 500001),
            ("SAGE", 2000001),
        ]
        current_idx = 0
        for idx, (_, xp_req) in enumerate(thresholds):
            if xp >= xp_req:
                current_idx = idx
        current_rank, current_xp = thresholds[current_idx]
        next_rank = None
        next_xp = None
        if current_idx + 1 < len(thresholds):
            next_rank, next_xp = thresholds[current_idx + 1]
        if next_xp is None:
            progress_pct = 100
            xp_to_next = 0
        else:
            progress_pct = int(((xp - current_xp) / max(1, next_xp - current_xp)) * 100)
            xp_to_next = max(0, next_xp - xp)
        return {
            "current_rank": current_rank,
            "next_rank": next_rank,
            "progress_pct": max(0, min(100, progress_pct)),
            "xp_current": xp,
            "xp_next": next_xp,
            "xp_to_next": xp_to_next,
        }

    def _get_emotion_label(self) -> str:
        """Normalize agent emotion into a string label."""
        emotion = getattr(self.agent, "current_emotion", None)
        if emotion is None and hasattr(self.agent, "vitals"):
            emotion = getattr(self.agent.vitals, "emotional_state", None)
        if hasattr(emotion, "value"):
            return str(emotion.value).lower()
        if isinstance(emotion, str):
            return emotion.lower()
        return "neutral"

    def _get_question_count(self) -> int:
        """Return tracked question count if available."""
        return int(getattr(self.agent, "question_count", 0) or 0)

    def _ensure_mission_engine(self) -> Optional["MissionEngine"]:
        """Ensure mission engine exists on the agent."""
        if hasattr(self.agent, "mission_engine") and self.agent.mission_engine:
            return self.agent.mission_engine
        try:
            self.agent.mission_engine = MissionEngine(self.agent.brotherhood)
            return self.agent.mission_engine
        except Exception:
            return None

    def _ensure_quest_system(self) -> Optional["QuestSystem"]:
        """Ensure quest system exists on the agent."""
        if hasattr(self.agent, "quest_system") and self.agent.quest_system:
            return self.agent.quest_system
        try:
            self.agent.quest_system = QuestSystem(self.agent.brotherhood)
            return self.agent.quest_system
        except Exception:
            return None

    def _ensure_skill_system(self) -> Optional["SkillTreeSystem"]:
        """Ensure skill tree system exists on the agent."""
        if hasattr(self.agent, "skill_tree_system") and self.agent.skill_tree_system:
            return self.agent.skill_tree_system
        if hasattr(self.agent, "skill_tree") and self.agent.skill_tree:
            return self.agent.skill_tree
        try:
            self.agent.skill_tree_system = SkillTreeSystem(brotherhood=getattr(self.agent, "brotherhood", None))
            return self.agent.skill_tree_system
        except Exception:
            return None

    def _ensure_memory_browser(self) -> Optional["MemoryBrowser"]:
        """Ensure memory browser exists for structured entries."""
        if self._memory_browser:
            return self._memory_browser
        try:
            self._memory_browser = MemoryBrowser(self.agent)
            return self._memory_browser
        except Exception:
            return None

    async def _send_status(self, websocket):
        """
        Send current agent status.

        # BEGIN META: _send_status
        # SRS: ["SRS-OAD-002"]
        # Purpose: Send agent status to OAD client
        # END META
        """
        xp_value = getattr(self.agent, 'total_xp', 0) if hasattr(self.agent, 'total_xp') else (
            self.agent.brotherhood.total_xp if hasattr(self.agent, 'brotherhood') else 0
        )
        tp_value = getattr(self.agent, 'total_tp', 0) if hasattr(self.agent, 'total_tp') else (
            self.agent.brotherhood.total_tp if hasattr(self.agent, 'brotherhood') else 0
        )
        rank_progress = self._get_rank_progress(xp_value)
        active_missions = None
        if hasattr(self.agent, "mission_engine") and self.agent.mission_engine:
            active_missions = len(self.agent.mission_engine.active_missions)
        active_quests = None
        if hasattr(self.agent, "quest_system") and self.agent.quest_system:
            active_quests = len(self.agent.quest_system.get_active_quests())
        skills_unlocked = None
        if hasattr(self.agent, "skill_tree_system") and self.agent.skill_tree_system:
            skills_unlocked = len([s for s in self.agent.skill_tree_system.skills.values() if s.is_unlocked])
        elif hasattr(self.agent, "skill_tracker") and self.agent.skill_tracker:
            skills_unlocked = len(self.agent.skill_tracker.tracked_skills)
        memory_count = None
        if hasattr(self.agent, "vitals"):
            memory_count = getattr(self.agent.vitals, "memory_count", None)
        if memory_count is None:
            memory_count = len(self.agent.stm.entries) if hasattr(self.agent, "stm") and self.agent.stm else 0
        status = {
            "type": "status",
            "xp": xp_value,
            "tp": tp_value,
            "rank": self.agent.brotherhood.current_rank if hasattr(self.agent, 'brotherhood') else "INITIATE",
            "emotion": self._get_emotion_label(),
            "streak": self.agent.brotherhood.streak_days if hasattr(self.agent, 'brotherhood') else 0,
            "memories": memory_count,
            "interactions": getattr(self.agent.vitals, 'interaction_count', 0) if hasattr(self.agent, 'vitals') else 0,
            "rank_progress": rank_progress.get("progress_pct"),
            "rank_next": rank_progress.get("next_rank"),
            "xp_to_next": rank_progress.get("xp_to_next"),
            "active_missions": active_missions,
            "active_quests": active_quests,
            "skills_unlocked": skills_unlocked,
        }
        await websocket.send(json.dumps(status))

    async def _send_professors(self, websocket):
        """Send professor network info."""
        if hasattr(self.agent, 'professors') and self.agent.professors:
            professors = [
                {
                    "id": domain_id,
                    "name": data.get("name", domain_id),
                    "domain": domain_id,
                    "expertise": data.get("expertise", []),
                    "active": data.get("active", True),
                    "queries_handled": data.get("queries_handled", 0),
                    "findings_count": data.get("findings_count", 0),
                }
                for domain_id, data in self.agent.professors.professors.items()
            ]
        else:
            professors = []
        await websocket.send(json.dumps({
            "type": "professors",
            "professors": professors
        }))

    async def _send_memories(self, websocket, domain: str):
        """Send memory info."""
        memories = []
        domain_counts: Dict[str, int] = {}
        browser = self._ensure_memory_browser()
        if browser:
            browser.state.selected_domain = domain or "all"
            entries = browser.get_entries(refresh=True)
            for entry in entries:
                payload = entry.to_dict()
                memories.append(payload)
                domain_counts[payload["domain"]] = domain_counts.get(payload["domain"], 0) + 1
        stm_count = 0
        ltm_count = 0
        if hasattr(self.agent, "stm") and self.agent.stm:
            stm_count = len(getattr(self.agent.stm, "entries", []))
        if hasattr(self.agent, "ltm") and self.agent.ltm:
            try:
                ltm_count = len(self.agent.ltm.get("metadata", []))
            except Exception:
                ltm_count = 0
        await websocket.send(json.dumps({
            "type": "memory_update",
            "memories": memories,
            "domains": domain_counts,
            "stm_count": stm_count,
            "ltm_count": ltm_count,
        }))

    async def _send_missions(self, websocket):
        """Send missions and quests data."""
        missions_payload = []
        quests_payload = []
        mission_engine = self._ensure_mission_engine()
        if mission_engine:
            for mission in mission_engine.active_missions.values():
                progress = {}
                for req_key, req_val in mission.requirements.items():
                    if req_key in ("interactions", "daily_interactions", "weekly_interactions"):
                        progress[req_key] = getattr(self.agent.vitals, "interaction_count", 0)
                    elif req_key == "questions":
                        progress[req_key] = self._get_question_count()
                    elif req_key == "reflections":
                        progress[req_key] = getattr(self.agent.vitals, "reflection_count", 0)
                    elif req_key == "rank":
                        progress[req_key] = getattr(self.agent.brotherhood, "rank", "INITIATE")
                    else:
                        progress[req_key] = mission.progress.get(req_key, 0)
                missions_payload.append({
                    "id": mission.id,
                    "title": mission.title,
                    "description": mission.description,
                    "type": mission.mission_type.value if hasattr(mission.mission_type, "value") else str(mission.mission_type),
                    "status": mission.status.value if hasattr(mission.status, "value") else str(mission.status),
                    "xp_reward": mission.xp_reward,
                    "tp_reward": mission.tp_reward,
                    "requirements": mission.requirements,
                    "progress": progress,
                })
        quest_system = self._ensure_quest_system()
        if quest_system:
            for quest in quest_system.get_active_quests():
                progress = {}
                for req_key, req_val in quest.requirements.items():
                    if req_key == "interactions":
                        progress[req_key] = getattr(self.agent.vitals, "interaction_count", 0)
                    elif req_key == "questions":
                        progress[req_key] = self._get_question_count()
                    elif req_key == "reflections":
                        progress[req_key] = getattr(self.agent.vitals, "reflection_count", 0)
                    elif req_key == "memories":
                        progress[req_key] = getattr(self.agent.vitals, "memory_count", 0)
                    elif req_key == "skills_unlocked":
                        progress[req_key] = len(self.agent.skill_tracker.tracked_skills) if hasattr(self.agent, "skill_tracker") and self.agent.skill_tracker else 0
                    else:
                        progress[req_key] = quest.progress.get(req_key, 0)
                quests_payload.append({
                    "id": quest.id,
                    "title": quest.title,
                    "description": quest.description,
                    "type": quest.quest_type,
                    "xp_reward": quest.xp_reward,
                    "tp_reward": quest.tp_reward,
                    "requirements": quest.requirements,
                    "progress": progress,
                })
        await websocket.send(json.dumps({
            "type": "missions",
            "missions": missions_payload,
            "quests": quests_payload,
        }))

    async def _send_skills(self, websocket):
        """Send skill tree data."""
        skill_system = self._ensure_skill_system()
        trees_payload = []
        if skill_system:
            for tree_id, tree in skill_system.skill_trees.items():
                tree_skills = []
                tier_groups = [
                    (1, tree.tier_1_skills),
                    (2, tree.tier_2_skills),
                    (3, tree.tier_3_skills),
                    (4, tree.tier_4_skills),
                ]
                for tier, skill_ids in tier_groups:
                    for skill_id in skill_ids:
                        skill = skill_system.skills.get(skill_id)
                        if not skill:
                            continue
                        available = False
                        if hasattr(self.agent, "brotherhood"):
                            available = (
                                self.agent.brotherhood.total_xp >= skill.unlock_xp_cost and
                                self.agent.brotherhood.total_tp >= skill.unlock_tp_cost
                            )
                        tree_skills.append({
                            "id": skill.id,
                            "name": skill.name,
                            "icon": skill.icon,
                            "tier": tier,
                            "unlocked": skill.is_unlocked,
                            "available": available and not skill.is_unlocked,
                            "xp_cost": skill.unlock_xp_cost,
                            "tp_cost": skill.unlock_tp_cost,
                            "description": skill.description,
                        })
                if tree.ultimate_skill:
                    ultimate = skill_system.skills.get(tree.ultimate_skill)
                    if ultimate:
                        tree_skills.append({
                            "id": ultimate.id,
                            "name": ultimate.name,
                            "icon": ultimate.icon,
                            "tier": 5,
                            "unlocked": ultimate.is_unlocked,
                            "available": False,
                            "xp_cost": ultimate.unlock_xp_cost,
                            "tp_cost": ultimate.unlock_tp_cost,
                            "description": ultimate.description,
                        })
                trees_payload.append({
                    "id": tree_id,
                    "name": tree.name,
                    "icon": tree.icon,
                    "skills": tree_skills,
                })
        await websocket.send(json.dumps({
            "type": "skills",
            "trees": trees_payload,
        }))

    async def _send_integrations(self, websocket):
        """Send integration health data."""
        integrations_payload = []
        try:
            if self._oad_checker is None:
                self._oad_checker = OADIntegrationChecker()
            chain = self._oad_checker.run_chain("full", skip_http=True)
            descriptions = {
                "CODE_QUALITY": "Code & CI",
                "TECHNICAL": "Platform Services",
                "COMMUNICATION": "Messaging",
                "CUSTOMER_FEEDBACK": "Customer Signals",
                "AGENT_PERFORMANCE": "AI & Analytics",
                "FINANCIAL": "Billing",
            }
            for result in chain.results:
                integrations_payload.append({
                    "name": result.service,
                    "status": result.status,
                    "message": result.message,
                    "token_key": result.token_key,
                    "token_masked": result.token_masked,
                    "category": descriptions.get(result.signal_class, result.signal_class.replace("_", " ").title()),
                })
        except Exception:
            integrations_payload = []
        await websocket.send(json.dumps({
            "type": "integrations",
            "integrations": integrations_payload,
        }))

    async def _send_analytics(self, websocket):
        """Send analytics summary for dashboard display."""
        analytics = {}
        if hasattr(self.agent, "deep_analytics") and self.agent.deep_analytics:
            try:
                analytics = self.agent.deep_analytics.get_analytics_summary()
            except Exception:
                analytics = {}
        telemetry = None
        if hasattr(self.agent, "_telemetry_stack") and self.agent._telemetry_stack:
            try:
                telemetry = self.agent._telemetry_stack.get_metrics_summary()
            except Exception:
                telemetry = None
        await websocket.send(json.dumps({
            "type": "analytics",
            "analytics": analytics,
            "telemetry": telemetry,
        }))

    def launch(self):
        """
        Launch the OAD dashboard.

        # BEGIN META: launch
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Start OAD server and open browser
        # SRS: ["SRS-OAD-001"]
        # Tags: ["launch", "server"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META
        """
        import webbrowser
        import threading
        from http.server import HTTPServer, BaseHTTPRequestHandler

        # Generate HTML content
        html_content = self._generate_dashboard_html()

        # Try to import websockets
        try:
            import websockets
        except ImportError:
            print("[OAD] websockets library not installed. Installing...")
            os.system(f"{sys.executable} -m pip install websockets")
            import websockets

        # HTTP handler for serving the dashboard HTML
        class OADHTTPHandler(BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
            def do_GET(handler_self):
                handler_self.send_response(200)
                handler_self.send_header('Content-type', 'text/html; charset=utf-8')
                handler_self.send_header('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*')
                handler_self.end_headers()
                handler_self.wfile.write(html_content.encode('utf-8'))

            def log_message(handler_self, format, *args):
                pass  # Suppress HTTP logs

        # Start HTTP server in a separate thread
        http_port = self.config.port + 1
        http_server = HTTPServer((self.config.host, http_port), OADHTTPHandler)
        http_thread = threading.Thread(target=http_server.serve_forever)
        http_thread.daemon = True
        http_thread.start()

        http_url = f"http://{self.config.host}:{http_port}"
        print(f"[OAD] HTTP server started at {http_url}")

        async def serve():
            # Start WebSocket server
            print(f"[OAD] Starting WebSocket server on ws://{self.config.host}:{self.config.port}/ws")
            async with websockets.serve(self._handle_websocket, self.config.host, self.config.port):
                # Open browser to HTTP URL (not file://)
                if self.config.auto_open_browser:
                    print(f"[OAD] Opening dashboard in browser...")
                    webbrowser.open(http_url)

                print(f"[OAD] Dashboard ready! Access at: {http_url}")
                print(f"[OAD] WebSocket endpoint: ws://{self.config.host}:{self.config.port}")
                print("[OAD] Press Ctrl+C to stop")

                # Keep server running
                await asyncio.Future()

        try:
            asyncio.run(serve())
        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            print("\n[OAD] Shutting down...")
            http_server.shutdown()


# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# SECTION 44.4: OAD LAUNCHER FUNCTION
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

def launch_oad(
    agent: Any,
    port: int = 8888,
    auto_open: bool = True,
    theme: str = "citadel_dark",
):
    """
    Launch the Operator Access Dashboard.

    # BEGIN META: launch_oad
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Convenience function to launch OAD dashboard
    # SRS: ["SRS-OAD-001"]
    # Tags: ["launch", "oad", "function"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META

    Args:
        agent: The NexusTamagotchiAgentPro instance
        port: WebSocket server port
        auto_open: Whether to auto-open browser
        theme: Visual theme name

    Example:
        agent = NexusTamagotchiAgentPro(agent_name="Aurora")
        launch_oad(agent, theme="cyberpunk")
    """
    # Find available port using port management system
    actual_port = _find_available_port(port, "oad_panel")
    if actual_port != port:
        print(f"[OAD] Port {port} busy, using port {actual_port}")

    theme_enum = OADTheme(theme) if theme in [t.value for t in OADTheme] else OADTheme.CITADEL_DARK

    config = OADConfig(
        port=actual_port,
        auto_open_browser=auto_open,
        theme=theme_enum,
    )

    try:
        server = OADServer(agent, config)
        server.launch()
    finally:
        # Release port on exit
        _release_panel_port("oad_panel")

# SECTION 45: Z_UP INTEGRATION (CAPS, REHYDRATION, CONTEXT MAPPING)
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SRS: SRS-CAPS-001, SRS-REHYDRATE-001, SRS-CONTEXT-001, SRS-ZAYARA-001
# Purpose: Integrate Zayara system concepts - CAPS protocol, rehydration, context awareness
# Pattern: Recursive cognition with self-healing and ledger-based evolution
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# SECTION 45.1: CAPS PROTOCOL ENUMERATIONS
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

class CAPSProtocolVersion(str, Enum):
    """
    CAPS protocol versions.

    # BEGIN META: CAPSProtocolVersion
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Track CAPS protocol versions for compatibility
    # SRS: ["SRS-CAPS-001"]
    # Tags: ["caps", "version", "protocol"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """
    V1_0 = "1.0"
    V1_1 = "1.1"
    V2_0 = "2.0"


class CAPSAgentStatus(str, Enum):
    """
    CAPS agent operational status.

    # BEGIN META: CAPSAgentStatus
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Track agent operational state per CAPS protocol
    # SRS: ["SRS-CAPS-001"]
    # Tags: ["caps", "status", "agent"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """
    INITIALIZING = "INITIALIZING"
    ACTIVE = "ACTIVE"
    DEGRADED = "DEGRADED"
    RECOVERING = "RECOVERING"
    HIBERNATING = "HIBERNATING"
    TERMINATED = "TERMINATED"

@dataclass
class CAPSModuleMetadata:
    """
    CAPS protocol module metadata header.

    # BEGIN META: CAPSModuleMetadata
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Self-describing module metadata per CAPS protocol
    # SRS: ["SRS-CAPS-001"]
    # Tags: ["caps", "metadata", "module"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """
    file_name: str
    enum_family: str
    reflex_trigger_group: CAPSReflexTriggerGroup
    srs_code: str
    caps_quality_score: float = 0.8
    caps_trust_score: float = 0.8
    reflex_iteration: int = 0
    ledger_link: str = "caps_ledger.jsonl"
    agent_status: CAPSAgentStatus = CAPSAgentStatus.ACTIVE
    agent_role: CAPSAgentRole = CAPSAgentRole.BUILD_ARCHITECT
    protocol_version: CAPSProtocolVersion = CAPSProtocolVersion.V2_0
    created_at: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat())


@dataclass
class CAPSReflexDefinition:
    """
    CAPS reflex definition for autonomous behaviors.

    # BEGIN META: CAPSReflexDefinition
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Define self-healing reflexes per CAPS protocol
    # SRS: ["SRS-CAPS-001"]
    # Tags: ["caps", "reflex", "definition"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """
    reflex_id: str
    name: str
    trigger_group: CAPSReflexTriggerGroup
    trigger_event: str
    action_code: str
    fallback_message: str
    xp_gate: int = 0
    cooldown_seconds: int = 60
    max_retries: int = 3
    is_active: bool = True
    last_triggered: Optional[str] = None
    execution_count: int = 0


@dataclass
class RehydrationResult:
    """
    Result of a rehydration operation.

    # BEGIN META: RehydrationResult
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Track rehydration outcomes
    # SRS: ["SRS-REHYDRATE-001"]
    # Tags: ["rehydration", "result", "restore"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """
    success: bool
    source: RehydrationSource
    items_restored: int
    duration_ms: float
    timestamp: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat())
    errors: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)

    """

    node_type: str  # 'belief', 'emotion', 'fact', 'event', 'reflex'
    enum_tags: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)

    connections: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    weight: float = 1.0
    created_at: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat())
    last_accessed: Optional[str] = None
    access_count: int = 0

# -------------------------------------------------------------------
# SECTION 45.3: CAPS LEDGER MANAGER
# -------------------------------------------------------------------

class CAPSLedgerManager:
    """
    CAPS protocol ledger manager for audit trails.

    # BEGIN META: CAPSLedgerManager
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Manage CAPS ledger for evolution tracking and self-healing
    # SRS: ["SRS-CAPS-001"]
    # Pattern: Append-only JSONL ledger with hash chain
    # Tags: ["caps", "ledger", "audit"]
    # Categories: ["Audit", "Evolution"]
    # KnowledgeSectors: ["Governance", "Self-Healing"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # Description: Manages immutable ledger for CAPS protocol events,
    #              enabling reflexive evolution and rehydration.
    # END META
    """

    def __init__(self, ledger_path: Path):
        """
        Initialize CAPS ledger manager.

        # BEGIN META: CAPSLedgerManager.__init__
        # SRS: ["SRS-CAPS-001"]
