            latency = (time.time() - start) * 1000

            return IntegrationHealth(
                name="stm",
                status=IntegrationStatus.OK,
                latency_ms=latency,
                metadata={"entry_count": stats.get("entry_count", 0)},
            )
        except Exception as e:
            return IntegrationHealth(
                name="stm",
                status=IntegrationStatus.FAIL,
                error_message=str(e),
            )

    def _check_ltm_health(self) -> IntegrationHealth:
        """Check LTM health."""
        if not self._ltm:
            return IntegrationHealth(
                name="ltm",
                status=IntegrationStatus.UNKNOWN,
                error_message="LTM not initialized",
            )

        try:
            import time
            start = time.time()
            stats = self._ltm.get_stats()
            latency = (time.time() - start) * 1000

            return IntegrationHealth(
                name="ltm",
                status=IntegrationStatus.OK,
                latency_ms=latency,
                metadata={"total_entries": stats.get("total_entries", 0)},
            )
        except Exception as e:
            return IntegrationHealth(
                name="ltm",
                status=IntegrationStatus.FAIL,
                error_message=str(e),
            )

    def get_self_description(self) -> str:
        """
        Generate self-description.

        # BEGIN META: SelfAwarenessModule.get_self_description
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Generate self-description
        # SRS: ["SRS-AWARENESS-001"]
        # Tags: ["awareness", "self-description"]
        # Categories: ["Awareness"]
        # Guild: "CNWB"
        # END META
        """
        parts = [
            f"I am {self.agent_name}, an AI assistant with advanced memory capabilities.",
            f"I currently hold {self._stm.get_stats().get('entry_count', 0) if self._stm else 0} "
            f"short-term memories and access to long-term knowledge across multiple domains.",
            f"My current emotional state is '{self._current_emotion}'.",
        ]

        if self._analytics:
            analytics = self._analytics.compute_analytics()
            parts.append(
                f"I have processed {analytics.learning_events} learning events "
                f"with an average reward of {analytics.avg_reward:.2f}."
            )

        return " ".join(parts)

    def get_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get self-awareness module statistics."""
        return {
            "agent_id": self.agent_id,
            "agent_name": self.agent_name,
            "current_emotion": self._current_emotion,
            "emotion_history_length": len(self._emotion_history),
            "emotional_stability": self._compute_emotional_stability(),
            "capabilities_count": len(self._capabilities),
            "limitations_count": len(self._limitations),
            "registered_integrations": list(self._integration_checkers.keys()),
        }


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 60: MEMORY UTILITIES & HELPERS
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# Utility functions and helper classes for memory systems
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


class MemoryFingerprinter:
    """
    Generate fingerprints for memory deduplication.

    # BEGIN META: MemoryFingerprinter
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Generate fingerprints for memory deduplication
    # SRS: ["SRS-DEDUP-001", "SRS-MEMORY-001"]
    # Tags: ["fingerprint", "dedup", "utility"]
    # Categories: ["Memory", "Utility"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """

    @staticmethod
    def compute_fingerprint(content: str, include_case: bool = False) -> str:
        """Compute SHA-256 fingerprint of content."""
        import hashlib
        normalized = content if include_case else content.lower()
        normalized = " ".join(normalized.split())  # Normalize whitespace
        return hashlib.sha256(normalized.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]

    @staticmethod
    def compute_semantic_fingerprint(embedding: List[float], precision: int = 4) -> str:
        """Compute fingerprint from embedding vector."""
        import hashlib
        # Quantize embedding
        quantized = [round(v, precision) for v in embedding[:32]]  # First 32 dims
        fingerprint_str = ",".join(map(str, quantized))
        return hashlib.md5(fingerprint_str.encode()).hexdigest()[:12]


class MemoryTextProcessor:
    """
    Text processing utilities for memories.

    # BEGIN META: MemoryTextProcessor
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Text processing for memory content
    # SRS: ["SRS-TEXT-001", "SRS-MEMORY-001"]
    # Tags: ["text", "processing", "utility"]
    # Categories: ["Memory", "Utility"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """

    @staticmethod
    def extract_keywords(text: str, max_keywords: int = 10) -> List[str]:
        """Extract keywords from text."""
        import re
        # Simple keyword extraction
        words = re.findall(r'\b[a-zA-Z]{3,}\b', text.lower())

        # Remove common stop words
        stop_words = {
            'the', 'and', 'for', 'are', 'but', 'not', 'you', 'all',
            'can', 'had', 'her', 'was', 'one', 'our', 'out', 'has',
            'have', 'been', 'were', 'they', 'will', 'with', 'this',
            'that', 'from', 'what', 'there', 'their', 'which',
        }

        keywords = [w for w in words if w not in stop_words]

        # Count and sort
        from collections import Counter
        counts = Counter(keywords)
        return [word for word, _ in counts.most_common(max_keywords)]

    @staticmethod
    def summarize_text(text: str, max_length: int = 200) -> str:
        """Create simple summary of text."""
        if len(text) <= max_length:
            return text

        # Find sentence boundary near max_length
        end = max_length
        for char in ['.', '!', '?', '\n']:
            pos = text.rfind(char, 0, max_length)
            if pos > max_length // 2:
                end = pos + 1
                break

        return text[:end].strip()

    @staticmethod
    def detect_emotion(text: str) -> str:
        """Simple emotion detection from text."""
        text_lower = text.lower()

        emotion_keywords = {
            "happy": ["happy", "glad", "joy", "excited", "great", "wonderful", "love"],
            "sad": ["sad", "unhappy", "depressed", "down", "disappointed", "sorry"],
            "angry": ["angry", "mad", "furious", "annoyed", "frustrated"],
            "fearful": ["afraid", "scared", "worried", "anxious", "nervous"],
            "surprised": ["surprised", "amazed", "shocked", "unexpected"],
            "curious": ["curious", "wonder", "interested", "question", "how", "why"],
            "grateful": ["thank", "grateful", "appreciate", "thanks"],
        }

        for emotion, keywords in emotion_keywords.items():
            if any(kw in text_lower for kw in keywords):
                return emotion

        return "neutral"


class MemoryExporter:
    """
    Export memories in various formats.

    # BEGIN META: MemoryExporter
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Export memories in various formats
    # SRS: ["SRS-EXPORT-001", "SRS-MEMORY-001"]
    # Tags: ["export", "utility"]
    # Categories: ["Memory", "Utility"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """

    @staticmethod
    def to_jsonl(entries: List[Union[MiraSTMEntry, MiraLTMEntry]], path: Path) -> int:
        """Export entries to JSONL file."""
        count = 0
        with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            for entry in entries:
                f.write(json.dumps(asdict(entry), default=str) + "\n")
                count += 1
        return count

    @staticmethod
    def to_markdown(entries: List[Union[MiraSTMEntry, MiraLTMEntry]]) -> str:
        """Export entries to Markdown."""
        lines = ["# Memory Export", ""]

        for entry in entries:
            lines.append(f"## {entry.entry_id[:8]}")
            lines.append(f"- **Timestamp:** {entry.timestamp}")
            lines.append(f"- **Content:** {entry.content[:200]}")

            if hasattr(entry, 'emotion'):
                lines.append(f"- **Emotion:** {entry.emotion}")

            if hasattr(entry, 'domain'):
                lines.append(f"- **Domain:** {entry.domain}")

            if entry.tags:
                lines.append(f"- **Tags:** {', '.join(entry.tags)}")

            lines.append("")

        return "\n".join(lines)

    @staticmethod
    def to_csv(entries: List[Union[MiraSTMEntry, MiraLTMEntry]], path: Path) -> int:
        """Export entries to CSV file."""
        import csv

        if not entries:
            return 0

        fieldnames = ['entry_id', 'timestamp', 'content', 'emotion', 'tags', 'trust_score']

        with open(path, "w", newline="", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            writer = csv.DictWriter(f, fieldnames=fieldnames, extrasaction='ignore')
            writer.writeheader()

            count = 0
            for entry in entries:
                row = {
                    'entry_id': entry.entry_id,
                    'timestamp': entry.timestamp,
                    'content': entry.content[:500],
                    'emotion': getattr(entry, 'emotion', ''),
                    'tags': ','.join(entry.tags),
                    'trust_score': getattr(entry, 'trust_score', 1.0),
                }
                writer.writerow(row)
                count += 1

        return count


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 55-60 AUTO-INTEGRATION
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

# Store reference for further patching
_section54_mira_init = NexusTamagotchiAgentPro.__init__

def _memory_utilities_enhanced_init(self, *args, **kwargs):
    """Enhanced __init__ with memory utilities and rehydration."""
    _section54_mira_init(self, *args, **kwargs)

    # Add memory utilities integration
    try:
        state_dir = _ensure_state_dir(self)
        # Initialize Context Rehydrator
        self._context_rehydrator = ContextRehydrator(
            stm=getattr(self, '_mira_stm', None),
            ltm=getattr(self, '_mira_ltm', None),
            attention=getattr(self, '_mira_attention', None),
            session_dir=state_dir / "sessions",
            logger=self.logger,
        )

        # Initialize Association Network
        self._association_network = MemoryAssociationNetwork(
            storage_path=state_dir / "associations.json",
            logger=self.logger,
        )

        # Initialize Consolidation Scheduler
        self._consolidation_scheduler = MemoryConsolidationScheduler(
            stm=getattr(self, '_mira_stm', None),
            ltm=getattr(self, '_mira_ltm', None),
            retention=getattr(self, '_mira_retention', None),
            association_network=self._association_network,
            logger=self.logger,
        )

        # Initialize Analytics Engine
        self._memory_analytics = MemoryAnalyticsEngine(
            stm=getattr(self, '_mira_stm', None),
            ltm=getattr(self, '_mira_ltm', None),
            learning=getattr(self, '_mira_learning', None),
            association_network=self._association_network,
            logger=self.logger,
        )

        # Initialize Self-Awareness Module
        self._self_awareness = SelfAwarenessModule(
            agent_id=getattr(self, 'agent_id', str(uuid4())),
            agent_name=getattr(self, 'agent_name', 'Nexus Agent'),
            stm=getattr(self, '_mira_stm', None),
            ltm=getattr(self, '_mira_ltm', None),
            analytics=self._memory_analytics,
            logger=self.logger,
        )

        self.logger.info("Memory utilities initialized: Rehydrator, Associations, Scheduler, Analytics, Awareness")

    except Exception as e:
        self.logger.warning(f"Memory utilities initialization failed: {e}")

NexusTamagotchiAgentPro.__init__ = _memory_utilities_enhanced_init

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 61: SAPIENT PACKET SYSTEM
# Core work units that flow through the AGS pipeline
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class SapientPacketType(Enum):
    """
    Types of Sapient Packets in the AGS system.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Classify packet types for routing and processing
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-001", "SRS-PACKET-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "packet", "enum"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Core"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    QUERY = "query"                    # User questions
    COMMAND = "command"                # Direct instructions
    REFLECTION = "reflection"          # Self-analysis
    PLANNING = "planning"              # Goal decomposition
    EXECUTION = "execution"            # Action execution
    SYNTHESIS = "synthesis"            # Information combination
    VALIDATION = "validation"          # Output verification
    LEARNING = "learning"              # Knowledge acquisition
    GOVERNANCE = "governance"          # Policy decisions
    EMERGENCY = "emergency"            # Critical interventions
    MAINTENANCE = "maintenance"        # System upkeep
    SOCIAL = "social"                  # Brotherhood interactions


class SapientPacketPriority(Enum):
    """
    Priority levels for packet processing.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Prioritize packet processing order
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-001", "SRS-PRIORITY-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "priority", "enum"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Core"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    CRITICAL = 0      # Immediate processing required
    HIGH = 1          # Process before normal packets
    NORMAL = 2        # Standard processing
    LOW = 3           # Background processing
    DEFERRED = 4      # Process when idle


class SapientPacketStatus(Enum):
    """
    Status of a Sapient Packet in the pipeline.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Track packet lifecycle state
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-001", "SRS-STATUS-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "status", "enum"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Core"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    CREATED = "created"
    QUEUED = "queued"
    INGRESS = "ingress"
    GOVERNOR = "governor"
    COUNCIL = "council"
    DEBATING = "debating"
    VERDICT = "verdict"
    EXECUTOR = "executor"
    EXECUTING = "executing"
    EGRESS = "egress"
    COMPLETED = "completed"
    FAILED = "failed"
    REJECTED = "rejected"
    DEFERRED = "deferred"


@dataclass
class SapientPacketMetadata:
    """
    Metadata attached to each Sapient Packet.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Store packet provenance and routing information
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-001", "SRS-METADATA-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "metadata", "dataclass"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Core"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    source_agent: str = "unknown"
    source_guild: str = "CNWB"
    source_channel: str = "internal"
    correlation_id: str = ""
    parent_packet_id: Optional[str] = None
    child_packet_ids: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    retry_count: int = 0
    max_retries: int = 3
    timeout_seconds: float = 30.0
    created_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.now)
    updated_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.now)
    tags: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    custom_data: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)


@dataclass
class SapientPacketPayload:
    """
    The actual content/data of a Sapient Packet.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Store packet content and context
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-001", "SRS-PAYLOAD-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "payload", "dataclass"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Core"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    content: str = ""
    content_type: str = "text"
    intent: str = ""
    entities: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
    context: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
    attachments: List[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)
    embedding: Optional[List[float]] = None
    language: str = "en"
    sentiment: float = 0.0
    confidence: float = 1.0


@dataclass
class SapientPacketRouting:
    """
    Routing information for pipeline navigation.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Control packet flow through stages
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-001", "SRS-ROUTING-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "routing", "dataclass"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Core"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    current_stage: str = "created"
    next_stage: Optional[str] = None
    skip_stages: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    force_stages: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    stage_history: List[Tuple[str, datetime]] = field(default_factory=list)
    processing_path: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    branch_conditions: Dict[str, str] = field(default_factory=dict)


@dataclass
class SapientPacketResult:
    """
    Result from processing a Sapient Packet.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Store stage processing results
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-001", "SRS-RESULT-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "result", "dataclass"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Core"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    stage: str
    success: bool
    output: Any = None
    error: Optional[str] = None
    duration_ms: float = 0.0
    tokens_used: int = 0
    cost_estimate: float = 0.0
    metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)


@dataclass
class SapientPacket:
    """
    Core work unit in the AGS Cognition Engine.

    Sapient Packets flow through the processing pipeline:
    INGRESS → GOVERNOR → COUNCIL → EXECUTOR → EGRESS

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Primary data structure for AGS processing
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-001", "SRS-PACKET-002"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "packet", "core"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Core"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    packet_id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid4()))
    packet_type: SapientPacketType = SapientPacketType.QUERY
    priority: SapientPacketPriority = SapientPacketPriority.NORMAL
    status: SapientPacketStatus = SapientPacketStatus.CREATED
    metadata: SapientPacketMetadata = field(default_factory=SapientPacketMetadata)
    payload: SapientPacketPayload = field(default_factory=SapientPacketPayload)
    routing: SapientPacketRouting = field(default_factory=SapientPacketRouting)
    results: List[SapientPacketResult] = field(default_factory=list)
    verdict: Optional['AGSVerdict'] = None
    final_output: Optional[str] = None

    def add_result(self, result: SapientPacketResult) -> None:
        """Add a processing result to the packet."""
        self.results.append(result)
        self.routing.stage_history.append((result.stage, datetime.now()))
        self.metadata.updated_at = datetime.now()

    def get_latest_result(self) -> Optional[SapientPacketResult]:
        """Get the most recent processing result."""
        return self.results[-1] if self.results else None

    def get_total_duration_ms(self) -> float:
        """Get total processing time across all stages."""
        return sum(r.duration_ms for r in self.results)

    def get_total_tokens(self) -> int:
        """Get total tokens used across all stages."""
        return sum(r.tokens_used for r in self.results)

    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Convert packet to dictionary."""
        return {
            'packet_id': self.packet_id,
            'packet_type': self.packet_type.value,
            'priority': self.priority.value,
            'status': self.status.value,
            'metadata': asdict(self.metadata),
            'payload': asdict(self.payload),
            'routing': {
                'current_stage': self.routing.current_stage,
                'next_stage': self.routing.next_stage,
                'skip_stages': self.routing.skip_stages,
                'stage_history': [(s, t.isoformat()) for s, t in self.routing.stage_history],
            },
            'results': [asdict(r) for r in self.results],
            'final_output': self.final_output,
        }


class SapientPacketFactory:
    """
    Factory for creating Sapient Packets with proper initialization.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Standardize packet creation
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-001", "SRS-FACTORY-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "factory", "pattern"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Core"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """

    def __init__(
        self,
        default_agent: str = "nexus",
        default_guild: str = "CNWB",
        logger: Optional[logging.Logger] = None,
    ):
        self.default_agent = default_agent
        self.default_guild = default_guild
        self.logger = logger or logging.getLogger(__name__)
        self._packet_counter = 0

    def create_query_packet(
        self,
        content: str,
        intent: str = "",
        context: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
        priority: SapientPacketPriority = SapientPacketPriority.NORMAL,
    ) -> SapientPacket:
        """Create a query packet."""
        self._packet_counter += 1

        return SapientPacket(
            packet_type=SapientPacketType.QUERY,
            priority=priority,
            metadata=SapientPacketMetadata(
                source_agent=self.default_agent,
                source_guild=self.default_guild,
                correlation_id=f"query-{self._packet_counter}",
            ),
            payload=SapientPacketPayload(
                content=content,
                intent=intent,
                context=context or {},
            ),
        )

    def create_command_packet(
        self,
        command: str,
        parameters: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
        priority: SapientPacketPriority = SapientPacketPriority.HIGH,
    ) -> SapientPacket:
        """Create a command packet."""
        self._packet_counter += 1

        return SapientPacket(
            packet_type=SapientPacketType.COMMAND,
            priority=priority,
            metadata=SapientPacketMetadata(
                source_agent=self.default_agent,
                source_guild=self.default_guild,
                correlation_id=f"cmd-{self._packet_counter}",
            ),
            payload=SapientPacketPayload(
                content=command,
                intent="execute_command",
                entities=parameters or {},
            ),
        )

    def create_reflection_packet(
        self,
        topic: str,
        context: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
    ) -> SapientPacket:
        """Create a reflection packet for self-analysis."""
        self._packet_counter += 1

        return SapientPacket(
            packet_type=SapientPacketType.REFLECTION,
            priority=SapientPacketPriority.LOW,
            metadata=SapientPacketMetadata(
                source_agent=self.default_agent,
                source_guild=self.default_guild,
                correlation_id=f"reflect-{self._packet_counter}",
            ),
            payload=SapientPacketPayload(
                content=topic,
                intent="self_reflection",
                context=context or {},
            ),
        )

    def create_planning_packet(
        self,
        goal: str,
        constraints: Optional[List[str]] = None,
        resources: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
    ) -> SapientPacket:
        """Create a planning packet for goal decomposition."""
        self._packet_counter += 1

        return SapientPacket(
            packet_type=SapientPacketType.PLANNING,
            priority=SapientPacketPriority.NORMAL,
            metadata=SapientPacketMetadata(
                source_agent=self.default_agent,
                source_guild=self.default_guild,
                correlation_id=f"plan-{self._packet_counter}",
            ),
            payload=SapientPacketPayload(
                content=goal,
                intent="goal_planning",
                context={
                    'constraints': constraints or [],
                    'resources': resources or {},
                },
            ),
        )

    def create_emergency_packet(
        self,
        issue: str,
        severity: str = "high",
        affected_systems: Optional[List[str]] = None,
    ) -> SapientPacket:
        """Create an emergency packet for critical interventions."""
        self._packet_counter += 1

        return SapientPacket(
            packet_type=SapientPacketType.EMERGENCY,
            priority=SapientPacketPriority.CRITICAL,
            metadata=SapientPacketMetadata(
                source_agent=self.default_agent,
                source_guild=self.default_guild,
                correlation_id=f"emergency-{self._packet_counter}",
                timeout_seconds=10.0,  # Faster timeout for emergencies
            ),
            payload=SapientPacketPayload(
                content=issue,
                intent="emergency_response",
                context={
                    'severity': severity,
                    'affected_systems': affected_systems or [],
                },
            ),
        )

    def create_child_packet(
        self,
        parent: SapientPacket,
        packet_type: SapientPacketType,
        content: str,
    ) -> SapientPacket:
        """Create a child packet linked to a parent."""
        self._packet_counter += 1

        child = SapientPacket(
            packet_type=packet_type,
            priority=parent.priority,
            metadata=SapientPacketMetadata(
                source_agent=self.default_agent,
                source_guild=self.default_guild,
                correlation_id=parent.metadata.correlation_id,
                parent_packet_id=parent.packet_id,
            ),
            payload=SapientPacketPayload(
                content=content,
                context=parent.payload.context.copy(),
            ),
        )

        parent.metadata.child_packet_ids.append(child.packet_id)

        return child


class SapientPacketQueue:
    """
    Priority queue for managing Sapient Packets.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Manage packet processing order
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-001", "SRS-QUEUE-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "queue", "priority"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Core"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """

    def __init__(
        self,
        max_size: int = 1000,
        logger: Optional[logging.Logger] = None,
    ):
        self.max_size = max_size
        self.logger = logger or logging.getLogger(__name__)
        self._queue: List[Tuple[int, datetime, SapientPacket]] = []
        self._packet_index: Dict[str, SapientPacket] = {}
        self._lock = threading.Lock()
        self._stats = {
            'enqueued': 0,
            'dequeued': 0,
            'rejected': 0,
            'expired': 0,
        }

    def enqueue(self, packet: SapientPacket) -> bool:
        """Add a packet to the queue."""
        with self._lock:
            if len(self._queue) >= self.max_size:
                self._stats['rejected'] += 1
                self.logger.warning(f"Queue full, rejecting packet {packet.packet_id[:8]}")
                return False

            # Priority tuple: (priority_value, timestamp, packet)
            # Lower priority value = higher priority
            entry = (packet.priority.value, packet.metadata.created_at, packet)
            heapq.heappush(self._queue, entry)

            self._packet_index[packet.packet_id] = packet
            packet.status = SapientPacketStatus.QUEUED
            self._stats['enqueued'] += 1

            return True

    def dequeue(self) -> Optional[SapientPacket]:
        """Remove and return the highest priority packet."""
        with self._lock:
            while self._queue:
                _, _, packet = heapq.heappop(self._queue)

                # Check if packet still in index (not cancelled)
                if packet.packet_id in self._packet_index:
                    del self._packet_index[packet.packet_id]
                    self._stats['dequeued'] += 1
                    return packet

            return None

    def peek(self) -> Optional[SapientPacket]:
        """View the highest priority packet without removing it."""
        with self._lock:
            if self._queue:
                return self._queue[0][2]
            return None

    def cancel(self, packet_id: str) -> bool:
        """Cancel a packet in the queue."""
        with self._lock:
            if packet_id in self._packet_index:
                del self._packet_index[packet_id]
                return True
            return False

    def get_packet(self, packet_id: str) -> Optional[SapientPacket]:
        """Get a packet by ID without removing it."""
        with self._lock:
            return self._packet_index.get(packet_id)

    def size(self) -> int:
        """Get current queue size."""
        with self._lock:
            return len(self._packet_index)

    def clear_expired(self) -> int:
        """Remove expired packets from the queue."""
        now = datetime.now()
        expired_count = 0

        with self._lock:
            expired_ids = []

            for packet_id, packet in self._packet_index.items():
                age = (now - packet.metadata.created_at).total_seconds()
                if age > packet.metadata.timeout_seconds:
                    expired_ids.append(packet_id)

            for packet_id in expired_ids:
                del self._packet_index[packet_id]
                expired_count += 1

            self._stats['expired'] += expired_count

        return expired_count

    def get_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get queue statistics."""
        with self._lock:
            return {
                **self._stats,
                'current_size': len(self._packet_index),
                'max_size': self.max_size,
            }


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 62: AGS PROCESSING STAGE PIPELINE
# Framework for multi-stage packet processing
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class AGSStageType(Enum):
    """
    Types of processing stages in the AGS pipeline.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Define pipeline stage types
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-002", "SRS-STAGE-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "stage", "enum"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Pipeline"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    INGRESS = "ingress"       # Input processing and validation
    GOVERNOR = "governor"     # Policy and routing decisions
    COUNCIL = "council"       # Multi-agent deliberation
    EXECUTOR = "executor"     # Action execution
    EGRESS = "egress"         # Output formatting and delivery


@dataclass
class AGSStageConfig:
    """
    Configuration for a processing stage.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Configure stage behavior
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-002", "SRS-CONFIG-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "config", "dataclass"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Pipeline"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    stage_type: AGSStageType
    enabled: bool = True
    timeout_seconds: float = 30.0
    max_retries: int = 2
    parallel_processing: bool = False
    cache_results: bool = True
    cache_ttl_seconds: int = 300
    metrics_enabled: bool = True
    custom_config: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)


@dataclass
class AGSStageMetrics:
    """
    Metrics collected for a stage.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Track stage performance
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-002", "SRS-METRICS-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "metrics", "dataclass"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Pipeline"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    stage_type: AGSStageType
    total_processed: int = 0
    successful: int = 0
    failed: int = 0
    retried: int = 0
    total_duration_ms: float = 0.0
    avg_duration_ms: float = 0.0
    min_duration_ms: float = float('inf')
    max_duration_ms: float = 0.0
    last_processed: Optional[datetime] = None
    error_types: Dict[str, int] = field(default_factory=dict)


class AGSStage(ABC):
    """
    Abstract base class for AGS processing stages.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Define stage interface
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-002", "SRS-STAGE-002"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "stage", "abstract"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Pipeline"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """

    def __init__(
        self,
        config: AGSStageConfig,
        logger: Optional[logging.Logger] = None,
    ):
        self.config = config
        self.logger = logger or logging.getLogger(__name__)
        self.metrics = AGSStageMetrics(stage_type=config.stage_type)
        self._cache: Dict[str, Tuple[datetime, Any]] = {}
        self._is_running = False

    @abstractmethod
    async def process(self, packet: SapientPacket) -> SapientPacketResult:
        """Process a packet through this stage."""
        pass

    def _get_cache_key(self, packet: SapientPacket) -> str:
        """Generate cache key for a packet."""
        return f"{packet.packet_type.value}:{hash(packet.payload.content)}"

    def _check_cache(self, packet: SapientPacket) -> Optional[Any]:
        """Check if result is cached."""
        if not self.config.cache_results:
            return None

        key = self._get_cache_key(packet)
        if key in self._cache:
            cached_time, cached_result = self._cache[key]
            age = (datetime.now() - cached_time).total_seconds()

            if age < self.config.cache_ttl_seconds:
                return cached_result
            else:
                del self._cache[key]

        return None

    def _store_cache(self, packet: SapientPacket, result: Any) -> None:
        """Store result in cache."""
        if self.config.cache_results:
            key = self._get_cache_key(packet)
            self._cache[key] = (datetime.now(), result)

    def _update_metrics(self, result: SapientPacketResult) -> None:
        """Update stage metrics."""
        if not self.config.metrics_enabled:
            return

        self.metrics.total_processed += 1
        self.metrics.total_duration_ms += result.duration_ms
        self.metrics.last_processed = datetime.now()

        if result.success:
            self.metrics.successful += 1
        else:
            self.metrics.failed += 1
            if result.error:
                error_type = type(result.error).__name__ if isinstance(result.error, Exception) else "Unknown"
                self.metrics.error_types[error_type] = self.metrics.error_types.get(error_type, 0) + 1

        self.metrics.min_duration_ms = min(self.metrics.min_duration_ms, result.duration_ms)
        self.metrics.max_duration_ms = max(self.metrics.max_duration_ms, result.duration_ms)

        if self.metrics.total_processed > 0:
            self.metrics.avg_duration_ms = self.metrics.total_duration_ms / self.metrics.total_processed

    async def execute(self, packet: SapientPacket) -> SapientPacketResult:
        """Execute the stage with error handling and metrics."""
        start_time = time.time()

        # Check cache first
        cached = self._check_cache(packet)
        if cached is not None:
            return SapientPacketResult(
                stage=self.config.stage_type.value,
                success=True,
                output=cached,
                duration_ms=0.0,
                metadata={'cached': True},
            )

        # Process with retries
        last_error = None
        for attempt in range(self.config.max_retries + 1):
            try:
                result = await asyncio.wait_for(
                    self.process(packet),
                    timeout=self.config.timeout_seconds,
                )

                if result.success:
                    self._store_cache(packet, result.output)

                result.duration_ms = (time.time() - start_time) * 1000
                self._update_metrics(result)

                return result

            except asyncio.TimeoutError:
                last_error = f"Stage timeout after {self.config.timeout_seconds}s"
                self.metrics.retried += 1

            except Exception as e:
                last_error = str(e)
                self.metrics.retried += 1
                self.logger.warning(f"Stage {self.config.stage_type.value} attempt {attempt + 1} failed: {e}")

        # All retries exhausted
        result = SapientPacketResult(
            stage=self.config.stage_type.value,
            success=False,
            error=last_error,
            duration_ms=(time.time() - start_time) * 1000,
        )
        self._update_metrics(result)

        return result

    def get_metrics(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get stage metrics as dictionary."""
        return {
            'stage': self.config.stage_type.value,
            'total_processed': self.metrics.total_processed,
            'successful': self.metrics.successful,
            'failed': self.metrics.failed,
            'retried': self.metrics.retried,
            'avg_duration_ms': self.metrics.avg_duration_ms,
            'min_duration_ms': self.metrics.min_duration_ms if self.metrics.min_duration_ms != float('inf') else 0,
            'max_duration_ms': self.metrics.max_duration_ms,
            'success_rate': self.metrics.successful / max(1, self.metrics.total_processed),
            'error_types': self.metrics.error_types,
        }


class AGSPipeline:
    """
    The complete AGS processing pipeline.

    Pipeline flow: INGRESS → GOVERNOR → COUNCIL → EXECUTOR → EGRESS

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Orchestrate multi-stage packet processing
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-002", "SRS-PIPELINE-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "pipeline", "orchestration"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Pipeline"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """

    STAGE_ORDER = [
        AGSStageType.INGRESS,
        AGSStageType.GOVERNOR,
        AGSStageType.COUNCIL,
        AGSStageType.EXECUTOR,
        AGSStageType.EGRESS,
    ]

    def __init__(
        self,
        stages: Optional[Dict[AGSStageType, AGSStage]] = None,
        packet_queue: Optional[SapientPacketQueue] = None,
        logger: Optional[logging.Logger] = None,
    ):
        self.stages = stages or {}
        self.packet_queue = packet_queue or SapientPacketQueue()
        self.logger = logger or logging.getLogger(__name__)
        self._is_running = False
        self._processed_count = 0
        self._failed_count = 0
        self._pipeline_metrics = {
            'total_processed': 0,
            'successful': 0,
            'failed': 0,
            'avg_total_duration_ms': 0.0,
        }

    def register_stage(self, stage: AGSStage) -> None:
        """Register a processing stage."""
        self.stages[stage.config.stage_type] = stage
        self.logger.info(f"Registered stage: {stage.config.stage_type.value}")

    def get_stage(self, stage_type: AGSStageType) -> Optional[AGSStage]:
        """Get a stage by type."""
        return self.stages.get(stage_type)

    async def process_packet(self, packet: SapientPacket) -> SapientPacket:
        """Process a packet through all stages."""
        self.logger.debug(f"Processing packet {packet.packet_id[:8]} type={packet.packet_type.value}")

        for stage_type in self.STAGE_ORDER:
            # Check if stage should be skipped
            if stage_type.value in packet.routing.skip_stages:
                self.logger.debug(f"Skipping stage {stage_type.value} for packet {packet.packet_id[:8]}")
                continue

            # Get stage
            stage = self.stages.get(stage_type)
            if stage is None or not stage.config.enabled:
                continue

            # Update packet status
            packet.status = SapientPacketStatus(stage_type.value.upper())
            packet.routing.current_stage = stage_type.value

            # Execute stage
            result = await stage.execute(packet)
            packet.add_result(result)

            # Check for failure
            if not result.success:
                packet.status = SapientPacketStatus.FAILED
                self._failed_count += 1
                self.logger.error(f"Packet {packet.packet_id[:8]} failed at stage {stage_type.value}: {result.error}")
                break

            # Check for rejection by governor
            if stage_type == AGSStageType.GOVERNOR and result.metadata.get('rejected'):
                packet.status = SapientPacketStatus.REJECTED
                break

        # Mark completion
        if packet.status not in [SapientPacketStatus.FAILED, SapientPacketStatus.REJECTED]:
            packet.status = SapientPacketStatus.COMPLETED
            self._processed_count += 1

        # Update pipeline metrics
        self._update_pipeline_metrics(packet)

        return packet

    def _update_pipeline_metrics(self, packet: SapientPacket) -> None:
        """Update pipeline-level metrics."""
        self._pipeline_metrics['total_processed'] += 1

        if packet.status == SapientPacketStatus.COMPLETED:
            self._pipeline_metrics['successful'] += 1
        else:
            self._pipeline_metrics['failed'] += 1

        total_duration = packet.get_total_duration_ms()
        count = self._pipeline_metrics['total_processed']
        self._pipeline_metrics['avg_total_duration_ms'] = (
            (self._pipeline_metrics['avg_total_duration_ms'] * (count - 1) + total_duration) / count
        )

    async def run(self, max_packets: int = 0) -> None:
        """Run the pipeline, processing packets from the queue."""
        self._is_running = True
        packets_processed = 0

        self.logger.info("AGS Pipeline started")

        while self._is_running:
            if max_packets > 0 and packets_processed >= max_packets:
                break

            packet = self.packet_queue.dequeue()
            if packet is None:
                await asyncio.sleep(0.1)
                continue

            await self.process_packet(packet)
            packets_processed += 1

        self.logger.info(f"AGS Pipeline stopped after processing {packets_processed} packets")

    def stop(self) -> None:
        """Stop the pipeline."""
        self._is_running = False

    def get_metrics(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get comprehensive pipeline metrics."""
        stage_metrics = {
            stage_type.value: stage.get_metrics()
            for stage_type, stage in self.stages.items()
        }

        return {
            'pipeline': self._pipeline_metrics,
            'stages': stage_metrics,
            'queue': self.packet_queue.get_stats(),
        }

@dataclass
class IngressAnalysis:
    """
    Analysis results from the ingress stage.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Store input analysis results
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-003", "SRS-INGRESS-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "ingress", "analysis"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Ingress"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """
    is_valid: bool = True
    validation_errors: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    detected_intent: str = ""
    intent_confidence: float = 0.0
    detected_entities: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
    detected_language: str = "en"
    sentiment_score: float = 0.0
    toxicity_score: float = 0.0
    complexity_score: float = 0.0
    embedding: Optional[List[float]] = None
    suggested_type: Optional[SapientPacketType] = None
    suggested_priority: Optional[SapientPacketPriority] = None
    enrichments: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)


class IntentClassifier:
    """
    Classifies user intent from input text.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Detect intent from natural language
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-003", "SRS-INTENT-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "intent", "nlp"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Ingress"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # END META
    """

    # Intent patterns (keyword-based baseline)
    INTENT_PATTERNS = {
        'query': ['what', 'who', 'where', 'when', 'why', 'how', 'explain', 'describe', 'tell me'],
        'command': ['do', 'execute', 'run', 'create', 'delete', 'update', 'set', 'change', 'make'],
        'planning': ['plan', 'schedule', 'organize', 'prepare', 'design', 'strategy'],
        'reflection': ['think', 'analyze', 'reflect', 'consider', 'evaluate', 'review'],
        'emergency': ['urgent', 'emergency', 'critical', 'asap', 'immediately', 'help'],
        'social': ['hello', 'hi', 'thanks', 'bye', 'please', 'sorry'],
    }

    def __init__(self, logger: Optional[logging.Logger] = None):
        self.logger = logger or logging.getLogger(__name__)
        self._custom_patterns: Dict[str, List[str]] = {}

    def add_pattern(self, intent: str, keywords: List[str]) -> None:
        """Add custom intent pattern."""
        self._custom_patterns[intent] = keywords

    def classify(self, text: str) -> Tuple[str, float]:
        """Classify intent from text."""
        text_lower = text.lower()
        words = text_lower.split()

        all_patterns = {**self.INTENT_PATTERNS, **self._custom_patterns}
        scores: Dict[str, float] = {}

        for intent, keywords in all_patterns.items():
            score = 0.0
            for keyword in keywords:
                if keyword in text_lower:
                    score += 1.0
                    # Bonus for word-boundary match
                    if keyword in words:
                        score += 0.5

            if score > 0:
                scores[intent] = score / len(keywords)

        if not scores:
            return ('query', 0.5)  # Default to query

        best_intent = max(scores, key=scores.get)
        confidence = min(scores[best_intent], 1.0)

        return (best_intent, confidence)


class NLPCommandRouter:
    """
    Routes natural language input to internal agent functions via NLP triggers.

    # AIMB - Autonomous Intelligence Metadata Block
    # Author: CNWB
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Map natural language to slash commands and internal functions
    # SRS: ["SRS-AGS-004", "SRS-NLP-001", "SRS-COMMAND-001"]
    # Tags: ["ags", "nlp", "command-routing", "function-triggers"]
    # Categories: ["AGS", "Ingress", "Command-Processing"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    #
    # _function: NLPCommandRouter
    # _purpose: Enable natural language triggering of internal agent functions
    #           without requiring explicit slash commands
    # _metrics: [nlp_matches, false_positives, command_executions, confidence_avg]
    # _xp_values: {"nlp_route_success": 5, "nlp_route_failure": -1, "new_pattern_learned": 15}
    # _tp_values: {"unlock_custom_pattern": 25, "pattern_mastery": 100}
    # END META
    """

    # NLP patterns mapped to slash commands and internal functions
    # Format: "pattern_key": {"triggers": [...], "command": "...", "function": "...", "confidence_threshold": 0.6}
    NLP_COMMAND_PATTERNS: Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]] = {
        # Status & Stats
        "status": {
            "triggers": ["how am i doing", "show my status", "what's my xp", "check my stats",
                        "show stats", "my progress", "how much xp", "rank status", "level check"],
            "command": "/status",
            "function": "_print_vitals",
            "description": "Display XP, TP, rank, and progression stats",
            "confidence_threshold": 0.6
        },
        "diagnostic": {
            "triggers": ["run diagnostics", "health check", "system check", "check yourself",
                        "self test", "diagnostic scan", "run a test", "test yourself", "diag"],
            "command": "/diagnostic",
            "function": "run_diagnostics",
            "description": "Run full system diagnostics",
            "confidence_threshold": 0.7
        },
        "brain_view": {
            "triggers": ["show brain", "cognitive view", "zigzag view", "show thinking",
                        "brain visualization", "neural view", "mind map", "show cognition"],
            "command": "/brain",
            "function": "_show_zigzag",
            "description": "Display ZigZag cognitive visualization",
            "confidence_threshold": 0.65
        },
        "memory": {
            "triggers": ["show memories", "memory browser", "what do you remember", "recall",
                        "list memories", "memory status", "show memory", "past conversations"],
            "command": "/memory",
            "function": "_show_memory_browser",
            "description": "Browse stored memories (STM/LTM)",
            "confidence_threshold": 0.6
        },
        "menu_option": {
            "triggers": ["menu option", "run menu", "select menu", "choose menu", "menu item"],
            "command": "/menu",
            "function": "run_menu_option",
            "description": "Run a menu option by id or keyword",
            "confidence_threshold": 0.6,
            "requires_argument": True
        },
        "menu_options": {
            "triggers": ["list menu options", "menu options", "menu list", "show menu options"],
            "command": "/menu",
            "function": "get_menu_options",
            "description": "List programmable menu options",
            "confidence_threshold": 0.6
        },
        "sanctum_enrich": {
            "triggers": ["sanctum enrich", "run sanctum", "enrich memories", "perplexity enrich"],
            "command": "/sanctum",
            "function": "run_sanctum_enrichment",
            "description": "Run sanctum enrichment with Perplexity",
            "confidence_threshold": 0.6
        },
        "monitoring_verify": {
            "triggers": ["verify monitoring", "monitoring check", "check datadog", "check posthog", "verify analytics"],
            "command": "/monitoring",

        "scan": {

            "command": "/scan",
            "function": "_run_self_scan",
            "description": "Run self-scan code analysis",
            "confidence_threshold": 0.7

        "integrations": {
            "triggers": ["show integrations", "check connections", "api status", "service status",
                        "what's connected", "integration check", "external services"],

        "help": {
            "triggers": ["help me", "show help", "command list", "what commands", "how to use",

            "command": "/help",
            "function": "_show_help",
            "description": "Display help and available commands",
            "confidence_threshold": 0.5
        },
