# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

def _initialize_meta_systems(agent: 'NexusTamagotchiAgentPro') -> None:
    """
    Initialize and attach all meta-systems to agent.

    # BEGIN META: _initialize_meta_systems
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Wire meta-systems into agent
    # SRS: ["SRS-META-005", "SRS-INTEGRATION-001"]
    # Tags: ["meta", "integration", "setup"]
    # Categories: ["Meta-Systems"]
    # END META

    Args:
        agent: Agent instance to enhance with meta-systems
    """
    storage_dir = Path(".nexus_agent_data")

    # Initialize individual systems
    agent._self_model_system = SelfModelSystem(
        agent_id=agent.agent_id,
        agent_name=agent.name,
        storage_dir=storage_dir / "self_model"
    )

    agent._evolution_engine = EvolutionEngine(
        self_model=agent._self_model_system,
        storage_dir=storage_dir / "evolution"
    )

    agent._knowledge_synthesis = KnowledgeSynthesisEngine(
        storage_dir=storage_dir / "knowledge"
    )

    agent._autonomous_goals = AutonomousGoalSystem(
        self_model=agent._self_model_system,
        storage_dir=storage_dir / "goals"
    )

    # Initialize orchestrator
    agent._meta_orchestrator = MetaOrchestrator(
        self_model=agent._self_model_system,
        evolution=agent._evolution_engine,
        knowledge=agent._knowledge_synthesis,
        goals=agent._autonomous_goals,
        storage_dir=storage_dir / "orchestration"
    )


def _run_meta_cycle_on_interaction(agent: 'NexusTamagotchiAgentPro', interaction_context: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    """
    Trigger meta-system updates after interaction.

    # BEGIN META: _run_meta_cycle_on_interaction
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Update meta-systems post-interaction
    # SRS: ["SRS-META-005"]
    # Tags: ["meta", "integration", "cycle"]
    # Categories: ["Meta-Systems"]
    # END META

    Args:
        agent: Agent instance
        interaction_context: Context from completed interaction
    """
    if not hasattr(agent, '_meta_orchestrator'):
        return

    # Update self-model based on interaction
    if hasattr(agent, '_self_model_system'):
        success = interaction_context.get('success', True)
        domain_str = interaction_context.get('domain', 'conversation')
        try:
            domain = CapabilityDomain(domain_str)
        except ValueError:
            domain = CapabilityDomain.CONVERSATION

        agent._self_model_system.record_interaction_outcome(
            domain=domain,
            success=success,
            context=interaction_context.get('context', ''),
            notes=interaction_context.get('notes', '')
        )

    # Feed evolution signals
    if hasattr(agent, '_evolution_engine'):
        if interaction_context.get('user_feedback'):
            agent._evolution_engine.receive_signal(
                pressure_type=EvolutionaryPressure.USER_FEEDBACK,
                signal_strength=interaction_context.get('feedback_strength', 0.5),
                description=interaction_context.get('user_feedback', ''),
                evidence=[],
                affected_domains=[]
            )

    # Add knowledge fragments
    if hasattr(agent, '_knowledge_synthesis'):
        if interaction_context.get('learned_content'):
            agent._knowledge_synthesis.add_fragment(
                content=interaction_context.get('learned_content', ''),
                knowledge_type=KnowledgeType.PROCEDURAL,
                domain=interaction_context.get('domain', 'general'),
                source='interaction',
                confidence=0.7
            )

    # Progress active goals
    if hasattr(agent, '_autonomous_goals'):
        active_goals = agent._autonomous_goals.get_active_goals()
        for goal in active_goals[:1]:  # Progress top goal
            if interaction_context.get('goal_relevant', False):
                agent._autonomous_goals.record_action(
                    goal_id=goal.id,
                    description="Interaction completed",
                    success=interaction_context.get('success', True),
                    progress_delta=0.05,
                    metrics_updated={},
                    notes=""
                )


def get_agent_meta_status(agent: 'NexusTamagotchiAgentPro') -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """
    Get comprehensive meta-system status from agent.

    # BEGIN META: get_agent_meta_status
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Retrieve meta-system status
    # SRS: ["SRS-META-005"]
    # Tags: ["meta", "status", "introspection"]
    # Categories: ["Meta-Systems"]
    # END META

    Args:
        agent: Agent instance

    Returns:
        Meta-system status dictionary
    """
    status = {
        'meta_systems_initialized': hasattr(agent, '_meta_orchestrator'),
        'self_model': None,
        'evolution': None,
        'knowledge': None,
        'goals': None,
        'orchestration': None
    }

    if hasattr(agent, '_self_model_system'):
        status['self_model'] = agent._self_model_system.get_introspection_summary()

    if hasattr(agent, '_evolution_engine'):
        status['evolution'] = agent._evolution_engine.get_evolution_summary()

    if hasattr(agent, '_knowledge_synthesis'):
        status['knowledge'] = agent._knowledge_synthesis.get_synthesis_summary()

    if hasattr(agent, '_autonomous_goals'):
        status['goals'] = agent._autonomous_goals.get_goal_summary()

    if hasattr(agent, '_meta_orchestrator'):
        status['orchestration'] = agent._meta_orchestrator.get_orchestration_summary()

    return status

# END SECTION 100: META-ORCHESTRATION LAYER
# Total Section 100 LOC: ~1150
# Cumulative File LOC: ~52,600

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 101: MEMORY SANCTUM - UNIFIED MEMORY MANAGEMENT
# Privacy-preserving memory with local facts, scrubbed fan-outs, and continuity
# Target: ~1500 LOC | Cumulative: ~54,100 LOC
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

class MemoryPrivacyLevel(Enum):
    """
    Privacy levels for memory content.

    # BEGIN META: MemoryPrivacyLevel
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Define privacy classification for memories
    # SRS: ["SRS-PRIVACY-001", "SRS-SANCTUM-001"]
    # Tags: ["memory", "privacy", "sanctum"]
    # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
    # END META
    """
    PUBLIC = "public"           # Safe to fan-out anywhere
    INTERNAL = "internal"       # Can sync to backend, not public
    PRIVATE = "private"         # Local only, never synced
    SENSITIVE = "sensitive"     # Encrypted local storage only


class MemoryCategory(Enum):
    """
    Categories for organizing memory content.

    # BEGIN META: MemoryCategory
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Categorize memory for routing and indexing
    # SRS: ["SRS-SANCTUM-001"]
    # Tags: ["memory", "category", "sanctum"]
    # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
    # END META
    """
    USER_FACT = "user_fact"             # Facts about the user (private)
    USER_PREFERENCE = "user_preference" # User preferences (private)
    CONVERSATION = "conversation"       # Chat history (internal)
    LEARNING = "learning"               # Learned knowledge (internal)
    REFLECTION = "reflection"           # Agent reflections (internal)
    SYSTEM = "system"                   # System state (internal)
    ENRICHMENT = "enrichment"           # External enrichment (public)


class SanctumStorageType(Enum):
    """
    Storage backends for sanctum data.

    # BEGIN META: SanctumStorageType
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Define storage backend types
    # SRS: ["SRS-SANCTUM-001"]
    # Tags: ["memory", "storage", "sanctum"]
    # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
    # END META
    """
    JSONL = "jsonl"             # Append-only log
    JSON = "json"               # Full state snapshot
    FAISS = "faiss"             # Vector index
    NPY = "npy"                 # Raw numpy arrays
    ENCRYPTED = "encrypted"    # AES-encrypted JSON


@dataclass
class SanctumMemoryEntry:
    """
    A single memory entry in the sanctum.

    # BEGIN META: SanctumMemoryEntry
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Structured memory entry with privacy metadata
    # SRS: ["SRS-SANCTUM-001", "SRS-PRIVACY-001"]
    # Tags: ["memory", "entry", "sanctum"]
    # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
    # END META
    """
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid4()))
    timestamp: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat())
    category: MemoryCategory = MemoryCategory.CONVERSATION
    privacy: MemoryPrivacyLevel = MemoryPrivacyLevel.INTERNAL
    content: str = ""
    summary: str = ""
    tags: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    embedding: Optional[List[float]] = None
    source: str = "agent"
    session_id: Optional[str] = None
    metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)
    scrubbed_content: Optional[str] = None  # PII-scrubbed version for fan-out


@dataclass
class UserFact:
    """
    A fact about the user - always stays local.

    # BEGIN META: UserFact
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Store user-specific facts locally
    # SRS: ["SRS-PRIVACY-001", "SRS-SANCTUM-001"]
    # Tags: ["memory", "user", "privacy", "sanctum"]
    # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
    # END META
    """
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid4()))
    created_at: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat())
    updated_at: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat())
    fact_type: str = "general"  # name, preference, history, context
    key: str = ""               # e.g., "user_name", "favorite_language"
    value: str = ""
    confidence: float = 1.0
    source: str = "conversation"
    evidence: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)  # Supporting quotes


@dataclass
class SessionContinuity:
    """
    Session state for continuity across restarts.

    # BEGIN META: SessionContinuity
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Track session state for rehydration
    # SRS: ["SRS-CONTINUITY-001", "SRS-SANCTUM-001"]
    # Tags: ["memory", "continuity", "session", "sanctum"]
    # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
    # END META
    """
    session_id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid4()))
    started_at: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat())
    last_active: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat())
    interaction_count: int = 0
    memory_count: int = 0
    topics_discussed: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    emotional_trajectory: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    xp_earned_session: int = 0
    pending_goals: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    context_summary: str = ""
    last_user_input: str = ""
    last_agent_response: str = ""


class PerplexityEnricher:
    """
    Enrich memories using Perplexity API for web search.

    # BEGIN META: PerplexityEnricher
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: External knowledge enrichment via Perplexity
    # SRS: ["SRS-ENRICHMENT-001", "SRS-SANCTUM-001"]
    # Tags: ["memory", "enrichment", "perplexity", "api"]
    # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
    # END META
    """

    def __init__(self, api_key: Optional[str] = None):
        """
        Initialize Perplexity enricher.

        # BEGIN META: PerplexityEnricher.__init__
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Initialize Perplexity API client
        # SRS: ["SRS-ENRICHMENT-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "init", "api"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META
        """
        self._api_key = api_key or os.getenv("PERPLEXITY_API_KEY")
        self._host = os.getenv("PERPLEXITY_HOST", "https://api.perplexity.ai")
        self._model = "llama-3.1-sonar-small-128k-online"
        self._enabled = bool(self._api_key)

    def is_available(self) -> bool:
        """Check if Perplexity is configured."""
        return self._enabled

    def enrich(self, query: str, context: str = "") -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """
        Enrich a query with web search results.

        # BEGIN META: PerplexityEnricher.enrich
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Fetch enrichment from Perplexity
        # SRS: ["SRS-ENRICHMENT-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "enrichment", "search"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Args:
            query: Search query
            context: Additional context

        Returns:
            Enrichment result or None
        """
        if not self._enabled:
            return None

        try:
            import requests
            url = f"{self._host.rstrip('/')}/chat/completions"

            system_prompt = "You are a research assistant. Return concise, factual bullet points."
            if context:
                system_prompt += f" Context: {context[:500]}"

            payload = {
                "model": self._model,
                "messages": [
                    {"role": "system", "content": system_prompt},
                    {"role": "user", "content": query},
                ],
                "max_tokens": 800,
                "temperature": 0.3,
            }

            resp = requests.post(
                url,
                json=payload,
                timeout=25,
                headers={
                    "Authorization": f"Bearer {self._api_key}",
                    "Content-Type": "application/json",
                },
            )
            resp.raise_for_status()
            data = resp.json()
            content = data.get("choices", [{}])[0].get("message", {}).get("content", "")

            return {
                "query": query,
                "enrichment": content.strip(),
                "model": self._model,
                "source": "perplexity",
                "timestamp": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
            }
        except Exception as e:
            return {"error": str(e), "query": query}


class OpenAIMemoryService:
    """
    OpenAI service for embeddings and memory synthesis.

    # BEGIN META: OpenAIMemoryService
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Generate embeddings and synthesize memories
    # SRS: ["SRS-EMBEDDING-001", "SRS-SANCTUM-001"]
    # Tags: ["memory", "openai", "embeddings", "synthesis"]
    # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
    # END META
    """

    EMBED_MODEL = "text-embedding-3-small"
    EMBED_DIM = 1536
    SYNTHESIS_MODEL = "gpt-4o-mini"

    def __init__(self, api_key: Optional[str] = None):
        """
        Initialize OpenAI service.

        # BEGIN META: OpenAIMemoryService.__init__
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Initialize OpenAI API client
        # SRS: ["SRS-EMBEDDING-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "init", "openai"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META
        """
        self._api_key = api_key or os.getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY")
        self._client = None
        if self._api_key and OpenAI:
            try:
                self._client = OpenAI(api_key=self._api_key)
            except Exception:
                pass
        self._enabled = self._client is not None

    def is_available(self) -> bool:
        """Check if OpenAI is configured."""
        return self._enabled

    def embed(self, text: str) -> Optional[List[float]]:
        """
        Generate embedding for text.

        # BEGIN META: OpenAIMemoryService.embed
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Generate text embeddings
        # SRS: ["SRS-EMBEDDING-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "embedding", "openai"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Args:
            text: Text to embed

        Returns:
            Embedding vector or None
        """
        if not self._enabled or not text.strip():
            return None

        try:
            response = self._client.embeddings.create(
                model=self.EMBED_MODEL,
                input=text[:8000]  # Token limit safety
            )
            return response.data[0].embedding
        except Exception:
            return None

    def synthesize_summary(self, memories: List[str], query: str = "") -> Optional[str]:
        """
        Synthesize a summary from multiple memories.

        # BEGIN META: OpenAIMemoryService.synthesize_summary
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Generate summary from memories
        # SRS: ["SRS-SYNTHESIS-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "synthesis", "openai"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Args:
            memories: List of memory contents
            query: Optional query for focused synthesis

        Returns:
            Synthesized summary or None
        """
        if not self._enabled or not memories:
            return None

        try:
            context = "\n---\n".join(memories[:10])  # Limit context
            prompt = f"Synthesize these memories into a coherent summary:\n\n{context}"
            if query:
                prompt += f"\n\nFocus on: {query}"

            response = self._client.chat.completions.create(
                model=self.SYNTHESIS_MODEL,
                messages=[
                    {"role": "system", "content": "You are a memory synthesis assistant. Create concise, accurate summaries."},
                    {"role": "user", "content": prompt}
                ],
                max_tokens=500,
                temperature=0.3
            )
            return response.choices[0].message.content
        except Exception:
            return None

    def extract_user_facts(self, conversation: str) -> List[Dict[str, str]]:
        """
        Extract potential user facts from conversation.

        # BEGIN META: OpenAIMemoryService.extract_user_facts
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Extract facts about user from text
        # SRS: ["SRS-FACT-EXTRACTION-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "extraction", "facts"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Args:
            conversation: Conversation text

        Returns:
            List of extracted facts
        """
        if not self._enabled or not conversation.strip():
            return []

        try:
            prompt = f"""Extract any facts about the user from this conversation.
Return as JSON array with keys: key, value, confidence (0-1).
Examples: name, location, preferences, profession, interests.
Only include facts explicitly stated.

Conversation:
{conversation[:3000]}"""

            response = self._client.chat.completions.create(
                model=self.SYNTHESIS_MODEL,
                messages=[
                    {"role": "system", "content": "You extract user facts as JSON. Return [] if no facts found."},
                    {"role": "user", "content": prompt}
                ],
                max_tokens=500,
                temperature=0.1
            )
            content = response.choices[0].message.content
            # Try to parse JSON from response
            import re
            json_match = re.search(r'\[.*\]', content, re.DOTALL)
            if json_match:
                return json.loads(json_match.group())
            return []
        except Exception:
            return []


class PIIScrubber:
    """
    Scrub PII from content before fan-out.

    # BEGIN META: PIIScrubber
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Remove PII from content for safe sharing
    # SRS: ["SRS-PRIVACY-001", "SRS-SCRUB-001"]
    # Tags: ["memory", "privacy", "scrubbing"]
    # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
    # END META
    """

    # Common PII patterns
    PATTERNS = {
        'email': r'\b[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,}\b',
        'phone': r'\b(?:\+?1[-.\s]?)?(?:\(?\d{3}\)?[-.\s]?)?\d{3}[-.\s]?\d{4}\b',
        'ssn': r'\b\d{3}[-.\s]?\d{2}[-.\s]?\d{4}\b',
        'credit_card': r'\b(?:\d{4}[-.\s]?){3}\d{4}\b',
        'ip_address': r'\b(?:\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}\b',
    }

    # Replacement tokens
    REPLACEMENTS = {
        'email': '[EMAIL]',
        'phone': '[PHONE]',
        'ssn': '[SSN]',
        'credit_card': '[CARD]',
        'ip_address': '[IP]',
    }

    def scrub(self, content: str, extra_patterns: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None) -> str:
        """
        Scrub PII from content.

        # BEGIN META: PIIScrubber.scrub
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Remove PII patterns from text
        # SRS: ["SRS-PRIVACY-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "privacy", "scrubbing"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Args:
            content: Text to scrub
            extra_patterns: Additional patterns to scrub

        Returns:
            Scrubbed content
        """
        import re
        result = content

        # Apply standard patterns
        for pii_type, pattern in self.PATTERNS.items():
            replacement = self.REPLACEMENTS.get(pii_type, f'[{pii_type.upper()}]')
            result = re.sub(pattern, replacement, result, flags=re.IGNORECASE)

        # Apply extra patterns
        if extra_patterns:
            for pattern, replacement in extra_patterns.items():
                result = re.sub(pattern, replacement, result, flags=re.IGNORECASE)

        return result

    def has_pii(self, content: str) -> bool:
        """Check if content contains potential PII."""
        import re
        for pattern in self.PATTERNS.values():
            if re.search(pattern, content, flags=re.IGNORECASE):
                return True
        return False


class MemorySanctum:
    """
    Unified memory management with privacy, persistence, and fan-out.

    Directory structure:
    .nexus_sanctum/
    ├── local/                  # Never synced (PRIVATE/SENSITIVE)
    │   ├── user_facts.json     # User-specific facts
    │   ├── preferences.json    # User preferences
    │   └── sessions/           # Session continuity
    │       └── {session_id}.json
    ├── memories/               # Can sync to backend (INTERNAL)
    │   ├── conversations.jsonl # Conversation history
    │   ├── learnings.jsonl     # Learned knowledge
    │   └── reflections.jsonl   # Agent reflections
    ├── index/                  # FAISS indexes
    │   ├── memories.faiss
    │   ├── memories_map.pkl
    │   └── memories_vectors.npy
    ├── enrichments/            # External enrichments (PUBLIC)
    │   └── perplexity.jsonl
    └── continuity.json         # Current session state

    # BEGIN META: MemorySanctum
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Unified privacy-preserving memory management
    # SRS: ["SRS-SANCTUM-001", "SRS-PRIVACY-001", "SRS-CONTINUITY-001"]
    # Tags: ["memory", "sanctum", "privacy", "persistence"]
    # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
    # KnowledgeSectors: ["Memory", "Privacy", "Storage"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """

    VECTOR_DIM = 1536

    def __init__(
        self,
        base_dir: Optional[Path] = None,
        agent_id: str = "",
        agent_name: str = "Agent"
    ):
        """
        Initialize Memory Sanctum.

        # BEGIN META: MemorySanctum.__init__
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Initialize sanctum directory structure
        # SRS: ["SRS-SANCTUM-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "init", "sanctum"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META
        """
        self._base_dir = base_dir or Path(".nexus_sanctum")
        self._agent_id = agent_id
        self._agent_name = agent_name

        # Create directory structure
        self._local_dir = self._base_dir / "local"
        self._memories_dir = self._base_dir / "memories"
        self._index_dir = self._base_dir / "index"
        self._enrichments_dir = self._base_dir / "enrichments"
        self._sessions_dir = self._local_dir / "sessions"

        for d in [self._local_dir, self._memories_dir, self._index_dir,
                  self._enrichments_dir, self._sessions_dir]:
            d.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

        # Core services
        self._openai = OpenAIMemoryService()
        self._perplexity = PerplexityEnricher()
        self._scrubber = PIIScrubber()

        # In-memory caches
        self._user_facts: Dict[str, UserFact] = {}
        self._memories: List[SanctumMemoryEntry] = []
        self._session: Optional[SessionContinuity] = None

        # FAISS index (lazy init)
        self._faiss_index: Optional[Any] = None
        self._faiss_id_map: Dict[int, str] = {}

        # Load existing data
        self._load_user_facts()
        self._load_session_continuity()

    def _load_user_facts(self) -> None:
        """Load user facts from local storage."""
        facts_path = self._local_dir / "user_facts.json"
        if facts_path.exists():
            try:
                with open(facts_path, 'r') as f:
                    data = json.load(f)
                for fact_data in data.get('facts', []):
                    fact = UserFact(
                        id=fact_data.get('id', str(uuid4())),
                        created_at=fact_data.get('created_at', ''),
                        updated_at=fact_data.get('updated_at', ''),
                        fact_type=fact_data.get('fact_type', 'general'),
                        key=fact_data.get('key', ''),
                        value=fact_data.get('value', ''),
                        confidence=fact_data.get('confidence', 1.0),
                        source=fact_data.get('source', 'loaded'),
                        evidence=fact_data.get('evidence', [])
                    )
                    self._user_facts[fact.key] = fact
            except Exception:
                pass

    def _save_user_facts(self) -> None:
        """Save user facts to local storage."""
        facts_path = self._local_dir / "user_facts.json"
        data = {
            'agent_id': self._agent_id,
            'updated_at': datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
            'facts': [
                {
                    'id': f.id,
                    'created_at': f.created_at,
                    'updated_at': f.updated_at,
                    'fact_type': f.fact_type,
                    'key': f.key,
                    'value': f.value,
                    'confidence': f.confidence,
                    'source': f.source,
                    'evidence': f.evidence
                }
                for f in self._user_facts.values()
            ]
        }
        with open(facts_path, 'w') as f:
            json.dump(data, f, indent=2)

    def _load_session_continuity(self) -> None:
        """Load or create session continuity."""
        continuity_path = self._base_dir / "continuity.json"
        if continuity_path.exists():
            try:
                with open(continuity_path, 'r') as f:
                    data = json.load(f)
                self._session = SessionContinuity(
                    session_id=data.get('session_id', str(uuid4())),
                    started_at=data.get('started_at', ''),
                    last_active=data.get('last_active', ''),
                    interaction_count=data.get('interaction_count', 0),
                    memory_count=data.get('memory_count', 0),
                    topics_discussed=data.get('topics_discussed', []),
                    emotional_trajectory=data.get('emotional_trajectory', []),
                    xp_earned_session=data.get('xp_earned_session', 0),
                    pending_goals=data.get('pending_goals', []),
                    context_summary=data.get('context_summary', ''),
                    last_user_input=data.get('last_user_input', ''),
                    last_agent_response=data.get('last_agent_response', '')
                )
            except Exception:
                self._session = SessionContinuity()
        else:
            self._session = SessionContinuity()

    def _save_session_continuity(self) -> None:
        """Save session continuity."""
        if not self._session:
            return
        self._session.last_active = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
        continuity_path = self._base_dir / "continuity.json"
        data = {
            'session_id': self._session.session_id,
            'started_at': self._session.started_at,
            'last_active': self._session.last_active,
            'interaction_count': self._session.interaction_count,
            'memory_count': self._session.memory_count,
            'topics_discussed': self._session.topics_discussed[-50:],
            'emotional_trajectory': self._session.emotional_trajectory[-20:],
            'xp_earned_session': self._session.xp_earned_session,
            'pending_goals': self._session.pending_goals[-10:],
            'context_summary': self._session.context_summary,
            'last_user_input': self._session.last_user_input,
            'last_agent_response': self._session.last_agent_response
        }
        with open(continuity_path, 'w') as f:
            json.dump(data, f, indent=2)

    def store_user_fact(
        self,
        key: str,
        value: str,
        fact_type: str = "general",
        confidence: float = 1.0,
        evidence: Optional[List[str]] = None
    ) -> UserFact:
        """
        Store a user fact (local only, never synced).

        # BEGIN META: MemorySanctum.store_user_fact
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Store user-specific facts locally
        # SRS: ["SRS-PRIVACY-001", "SRS-SANCTUM-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "user", "facts", "privacy"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Args:
            key: Fact key (e.g., "user_name")
            value: Fact value
            fact_type: Type classification
            confidence: Confidence score
            evidence: Supporting evidence

        Returns:
            Stored UserFact
        """
        if key in self._user_facts:
            # Update existing
            fact = self._user_facts[key]
            fact.value = value
            fact.updated_at = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
            fact.confidence = max(fact.confidence, confidence)
            if evidence:
                fact.evidence.extend(evidence)
                fact.evidence = fact.evidence[-10:]  # Keep last 10
        else:
            # Create new
            fact = UserFact(
                fact_type=fact_type,
                key=key,
                value=value,
                confidence=confidence,
                evidence=evidence or []
            )
            self._user_facts[key] = fact

        self._save_user_facts()
        return fact

    def get_user_fact(self, key: str) -> Optional[str]:
        """Get a user fact value by key."""
        fact = self._user_facts.get(key)
        return fact.value if fact else None

    def get_all_user_facts(self) -> Dict[str, str]:
        """Get all user facts as key-value dict."""
        return {k: v.value for k, v in self._user_facts.items()}

    def store_memory(
        self,
        content: str,
        category: MemoryCategory = MemoryCategory.CONVERSATION,
        privacy: MemoryPrivacyLevel = MemoryPrivacyLevel.INTERNAL,
        tags: Optional[List[str]] = None,
        metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
        generate_embedding: bool = True
    ) -> SanctumMemoryEntry:
        """
        Store a memory entry with appropriate privacy handling.

        # BEGIN META: MemorySanctum.store_memory
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Store memory with privacy classification
        # SRS: ["SRS-SANCTUM-001", "SRS-PRIVACY-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "storage", "sanctum"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Args:
            content: Memory content
            category: Memory category
            privacy: Privacy level
            tags: Optional tags
            metadata: Optional metadata
            generate_embedding: Whether to generate embedding

        Returns:
            Stored memory entry
        """
        entry = SanctumMemoryEntry(
            category=category,
            privacy=privacy,
            content=content,
            tags=tags or [],
            session_id=self._session.session_id if self._session else None,
            metadata=metadata or {}
        )

        # Generate embedding if requested
        if generate_embedding and self._openai.is_available():
            entry.embedding = self._openai.embed(content)

        # Generate scrubbed version for non-private content
        if privacy not in (MemoryPrivacyLevel.PRIVATE, MemoryPrivacyLevel.SENSITIVE):
            entry.scrubbed_content = self._scrubber.scrub(content)

        # Generate summary
        if len(content) > 200:
            entry.summary = content[:200] + "..."
        else:
            entry.summary = content

        # Store to appropriate location
        self._memories.append(entry)
        self._append_to_log(entry)

        # Update FAISS index
        if entry.embedding:
            self._add_to_faiss_index(entry)

        # Update session
        if self._session:
            self._session.memory_count += 1
            self._save_session_continuity()

        return entry

    def _append_to_log(self, entry: SanctumMemoryEntry) -> None:
        """Append memory to appropriate JSONL log."""
        log_map = {
            MemoryCategory.CONVERSATION: "conversations.jsonl",
            MemoryCategory.LEARNING: "learnings.jsonl",
            MemoryCategory.REFLECTION: "reflections.jsonl",
            MemoryCategory.USER_FACT: None,  # Stored separately
            MemoryCategory.USER_PREFERENCE: None,
            MemoryCategory.ENRICHMENT: None,
            MemoryCategory.SYSTEM: "system.jsonl"
        }

        log_name = log_map.get(entry.category)
        if not log_name:
            return

        log_path = self._memories_dir / log_name
        log_entry = {
            'id': entry.id,
            'timestamp': entry.timestamp,
            'category': entry.category.value,
            'privacy': entry.privacy.value,
            'content': entry.content if entry.privacy != MemoryPrivacyLevel.SENSITIVE else "[REDACTED]",
            'summary': entry.summary,
            'tags': entry.tags,
            'session_id': entry.session_id,
            'has_embedding': entry.embedding is not None
        }

        with open(log_path, 'a') as f:
            f.write(json.dumps(log_entry) + "\n")

    def _add_to_faiss_index(self, entry: SanctumMemoryEntry) -> None:
        """Add memory to FAISS index."""
        if not entry.embedding:
            return

        try:
            import numpy as np

            # Lazy init FAISS
            if self._faiss_index is None:
                try:
                    import faiss
                    self._faiss_index = faiss.IndexFlatL2(self.VECTOR_DIM)
                except ImportError:
                    return  # FAISS not available

            import faiss
            vector = np.array([entry.embedding], dtype=np.float32)
            idx = self._faiss_index.ntotal
            self._faiss_index.add(vector)
            self._faiss_id_map[idx] = entry.id
        except Exception:
            pass

    def search_memories(
        self,
        query: str,
        top_k: int = 5,
        categories: Optional[List[MemoryCategory]] = None
    ) -> List[SanctumMemoryEntry]:
        """
        Search memories semantically.

        # BEGIN META: MemorySanctum.search_memories
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Semantic memory search via FAISS
        # SRS: ["SRS-SEARCH-001", "SRS-SANCTUM-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "search", "faiss"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Args:
            query: Search query
            top_k: Number of results
            categories: Optional category filter

        Returns:
            Matching memories
        """
        if not self._openai.is_available() or self._faiss_index is None:
            # Fallback to keyword search
            return self._keyword_search(query, top_k, categories)

        try:
            import numpy as np

            query_embedding = self._openai.embed(query)
            if not query_embedding:
                return self._keyword_search(query, top_k, categories)

            query_vector = np.array([query_embedding], dtype=np.float32)
            distances, indices = self._faiss_index.search(query_vector, min(top_k * 2, self._faiss_index.ntotal))

            results = []
            for idx in indices[0]:
                if idx < 0:
                    continue
                memory_id = self._faiss_id_map.get(int(idx))
                if not memory_id:
                    continue
                for mem in self._memories:
                    if mem.id == memory_id:
                        if categories and mem.category not in categories:
                            continue
                        results.append(mem)
                        break
                if len(results) >= top_k:
                    break

            return results
        except Exception:
            return self._keyword_search(query, top_k, categories)

    def _keyword_search(
        self,
        query: str,
        top_k: int,
        categories: Optional[List[MemoryCategory]]
    ) -> List[SanctumMemoryEntry]:
        """Fallback keyword search."""
        query_lower = query.lower()
        results = []
        for mem in reversed(self._memories):
            if categories and mem.category not in categories:
                continue
            if query_lower in mem.content.lower():
                results.append(mem)
                if len(results) >= top_k:
                    break
        return results

    def enrich_with_perplexity(self, query: str, context: str = "") -> Optional[SanctumMemoryEntry]:
        """
        Enrich knowledge using Perplexity search.

        # BEGIN META: MemorySanctum.enrich_with_perplexity
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: External knowledge enrichment
        # SRS: ["SRS-ENRICHMENT-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "enrichment", "perplexity"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Args:
            query: Search query
            context: Additional context

        Returns:
            Enrichment memory entry or None
        """
        if not self._perplexity.is_available():
            return None

        result = self._perplexity.enrich(query, context)
        if not result or 'error' in result:
            return None

        # Store as enrichment memory
        entry = self.store_memory(
            content=f"Query: {query}\n\nEnrichment:\n{result['enrichment']}",
            category=MemoryCategory.ENRICHMENT,
            privacy=MemoryPrivacyLevel.PUBLIC,
            tags=["perplexity", "enrichment"],
            metadata=result,
            generate_embedding=True
        )

        # Also log to enrichments dir
        enrichment_log = self._enrichments_dir / "perplexity.jsonl"
        with open(enrichment_log, 'a') as f:
            f.write(json.dumps(result) + "\n")

        return entry

    def extract_and_store_user_facts(self, conversation: str) -> List[UserFact]:
        """
        Extract user facts from conversation and store them.

        # BEGIN META: MemorySanctum.extract_and_store_user_facts
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Auto-extract user facts from conversation
        # SRS: ["SRS-FACT-EXTRACTION-001", "SRS-PRIVACY-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "extraction", "facts", "privacy"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Args:
            conversation: Conversation text

        Returns:
            List of extracted and stored facts
        """
        extracted = self._openai.extract_user_facts(conversation)
        stored_facts = []

        for fact_data in extracted:
            key = fact_data.get('key', '')
            value = fact_data.get('value', '')
            confidence = fact_data.get('confidence', 0.5)

            if key and value:
                fact = self.store_user_fact(
                    key=key,
                    value=value,
                    fact_type="extracted",
                    confidence=confidence,
                    evidence=[conversation[:200]]
                )
                stored_facts.append(fact)

        return stored_facts

    def get_scrubbed_for_fanout(
        self,
        categories: Optional[List[MemoryCategory]] = None,
        limit: int = 100
    ) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
        """
        Get scrubbed memories safe for fan-out to integrations.

        # BEGIN META: MemorySanctum.get_scrubbed_for_fanout
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Get PII-scrubbed data for external sync
        # SRS: ["SRS-PRIVACY-001", "SRS-FANOUT-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "scrubbing", "fanout", "privacy"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Args:
            categories: Optional category filter
            limit: Maximum entries

        Returns:
            List of scrubbed memory dicts
        """
        results = []
        for mem in reversed(self._memories):
            if mem.privacy in (MemoryPrivacyLevel.PRIVATE, MemoryPrivacyLevel.SENSITIVE):
                continue
            if categories and mem.category not in categories:
                continue

            results.append({
                'id': mem.id,
                'timestamp': mem.timestamp,
                'category': mem.category.value,
                'content': mem.scrubbed_content or self._scrubber.scrub(mem.content),
                'summary': mem.summary,
                'tags': mem.tags,
                'session_id': mem.session_id
            })

            if len(results) >= limit:
                break

        return results

    def rehydrate_context(self, query: str = "", max_memories: int = 10) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """
        Rehydrate context from stored memories and facts.

        # BEGIN META: MemorySanctum.rehydrate_context
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Restore context from persistent storage
        # SRS: ["SRS-CONTINUITY-001", "SRS-REHYDRATION-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "rehydration", "continuity"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Args:
            query: Optional query for focused rehydration
            max_memories: Maximum memories to retrieve

        Returns:
            Rehydrated context dictionary
        """
        context = {
            'session': None,
            'user_facts': self.get_all_user_facts(),
            'recent_memories': [],
            'relevant_memories': [],
            'context_summary': ""
        }

        # Session continuity
        if self._session:
            context['session'] = {
                'session_id': self._session.session_id,
                'started_at': self._session.started_at,
                'last_active': self._session.last_active,
                'interaction_count': self._session.interaction_count,
                'memory_count': self._session.memory_count,
                'topics_discussed': self._session.topics_discussed[-10:],
                'context_summary': self._session.context_summary,
                'last_exchange': {
                    'user': self._session.last_user_input,
                    'agent': self._session.last_agent_response
                }
            }

        # Recent memories
        recent = self._memories[-max_memories:] if self._memories else []
        context['recent_memories'] = [
            {
                'id': m.id,
                'timestamp': m.timestamp,
                'category': m.category.value,
                'summary': m.summary
            }
            for m in recent
        ]

        # Query-relevant memories
        if query:
            relevant = self.search_memories(query, top_k=max_memories // 2)
            context['relevant_memories'] = [
                {
                    'id': m.id,
                    'timestamp': m.timestamp,
                    'category': m.category.value,
                    'content': m.content[:500]
                }
                for m in relevant
            ]

        # Generate context summary
        if self._session and self._session.context_summary:
            context['context_summary'] = self._session.context_summary
        elif self._memories:
            summaries = [m.summary for m in self._memories[-5:]]
            context['context_summary'] = " | ".join(summaries)

        return context

    def update_session(
        self,
        user_input: str,
        agent_response: str,
        topic: Optional[str] = None,
        emotion: Optional[str] = None,
        xp_earned: int = 0
    ) -> None:
        """
        Update session continuity after interaction.

        # BEGIN META: MemorySanctum.update_session
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Track session state for continuity
        # SRS: ["SRS-CONTINUITY-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "session", "continuity"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Args:
            user_input: User's input
            agent_response: Agent's response
            topic: Optional conversation topic
            emotion: Optional emotional state
            xp_earned: XP earned this interaction
        """
        if not self._session:
            self._session = SessionContinuity()

        self._session.interaction_count += 1
        self._session.last_user_input = user_input
        self._session.last_agent_response = agent_response
        self._session.xp_earned_session += xp_earned

        if topic and topic not in self._session.topics_discussed:
            self._session.topics_discussed.append(topic)

        if emotion:
            self._session.emotional_trajectory.append(emotion)

        # Generate context summary periodically
        if self._session.interaction_count % 5 == 0:
            self._session.context_summary = self._generate_context_summary()

        self._save_session_continuity()

    def _generate_context_summary(self) -> str:
        """Generate a summary of recent context."""
        if not self._memories:
            return ""

        if self._openai.is_available():
            recent_content = [m.content for m in self._memories[-5:]]
            summary = self._openai.synthesize_summary(recent_content)
            if summary:
                return summary

        # Fallback: concatenate summaries
        return " | ".join(m.summary for m in self._memories[-3:])

    def save_session_snapshot(self) -> Path:
        """
        Save full session snapshot for recovery.

        # BEGIN META: MemorySanctum.save_session_snapshot
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Save complete session state
        # SRS: ["SRS-CONTINUITY-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "session", "snapshot"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Returns:
            Path to saved snapshot
        """
        if not self._session:
            self._session = SessionContinuity()

        snapshot_path = self._sessions_dir / f"{self._session.session_id}.json"
        snapshot = {
            'session': {
                'session_id': self._session.session_id,
                'started_at': self._session.started_at,
                'last_active': datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
                'interaction_count': self._session.interaction_count,
                'memory_count': self._session.memory_count,
                'topics_discussed': self._session.topics_discussed,
                'emotional_trajectory': self._session.emotional_trajectory,
                'xp_earned_session': self._session.xp_earned_session,
                'pending_goals': self._session.pending_goals,
                'context_summary': self._session.context_summary,
                'last_user_input': self._session.last_user_input,
                'last_agent_response': self._session.last_agent_response
            },
            'user_facts': {k: {'value': v.value, 'confidence': v.confidence}
                          for k, v in self._user_facts.items()},
            'memory_count': len(self._memories),
            'agent_id': self._agent_id,
            'agent_name': self._agent_name
        }

        with open(snapshot_path, 'w') as f:
            json.dump(snapshot, f, indent=2)

        return snapshot_path

    def get_sanctum_status(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """
        Get comprehensive sanctum status.

        # BEGIN META: MemorySanctum.get_sanctum_status
        # Date: 2026-01-14
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Generate sanctum status summary
        # SRS: ["SRS-SANCTUM-001"]
        # Tags: ["memory", "status", "sanctum"]
        # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
        # END META

        Returns:
            Status dictionary
        """
        return {
            'initialized': True,
            'base_dir': str(self._base_dir),
            'user_facts_count': len(self._user_facts),
            'memories_count': len(self._memories),
            'faiss_indexed': self._faiss_index.ntotal if self._faiss_index else 0,
            'session': {
                'session_id': self._session.session_id if self._session else None,
                'interaction_count': self._session.interaction_count if self._session else 0,
                'memory_count': self._session.memory_count if self._session else 0
            },
            'services': {
                'openai_available': self._openai.is_available(),
                'perplexity_available': self._perplexity.is_available()
            },
            'privacy_distribution': self._get_privacy_distribution()
        }

    def _get_privacy_distribution(self) -> Dict[str, int]:
        """Get count of memories by privacy level."""
        dist = {level.value: 0 for level in MemoryPrivacyLevel}
        for mem in self._memories:
            dist[mem.privacy.value] += 1
        return dist


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SANCTUM INTEGRATION INTO AGENT
# Wire MemorySanctum into NexusTamagotchiAgentPro
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

def _initialize_memory_sanctum(agent: 'NexusTamagotchiAgentPro') -> None:
    """
    Initialize MemorySanctum for the agent.

    # BEGIN META: _initialize_memory_sanctum
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Wire MemorySanctum into agent
    # SRS: ["SRS-SANCTUM-001", "SRS-INTEGRATION-001"]
    # Tags: ["memory", "sanctum", "integration"]
    # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
    # END META
    """
    agent._memory_sanctum = MemorySanctum(
        base_dir=Path(".nexus_sanctum") / agent.agent_name,
        agent_id=agent.agent_id,
        agent_name=agent.agent_name
    )


def _update_sanctum_on_interaction(
    agent: 'NexusTamagotchiAgentPro',
    user_input: str,
    response: str,
    xp_earned: int = 0
) -> None:
    """
    Update sanctum after interaction.

    # BEGIN META: _update_sanctum_on_interaction
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Feed interaction data to sanctum
    # SRS: ["SRS-SANCTUM-001"]
    # Tags: ["memory", "sanctum", "interaction"]
    # Categories: ["Memory-Sanctum"]
    # END META
    """
    if not hasattr(agent, '_memory_sanctum'):
        return

    sanctum = agent._memory_sanctum

    # Store conversation memory
    sanctum.store_memory(
        content=f"User: {user_input}\n\nAgent: {response}",
        category=MemoryCategory.CONVERSATION,
        privacy=MemoryPrivacyLevel.INTERNAL,
        tags=["interaction"],
        generate_embedding=True
    )

    # Extract potential user facts
    sanctum.extract_and_store_user_facts(user_input)

    # Update session
    sanctum.update_session(
        user_input=user_input,
        agent_response=response,
        xp_earned=xp_earned
    )


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# END SECTION 101: MEMORY SANCTUM
# Total Section 101 LOC: ~1500
# Cumulative File LOC: ~54,400
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════




# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# MAIN ENTRY POINT FUNCTION
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

def _suppress_threading_shutdown_interrupt() -> None:
    """Prevent KeyboardInterrupt noise during thread shutdown."""
    import threading

    original_shutdown = getattr(threading, "_shutdown", None)
    if not original_shutdown:
        return

    def _safe_shutdown():
        try:
            original_shutdown()
        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            pass

    threading._shutdown = _safe_shutdown


def _main():
    """
    Main entry point - wrapped in function so all classes are defined before execution.

    # BEGIN META: _main
    # Date: 2026-01-14
    # Purpose: Deferred main entry to ensure OADIntegrationChecker and FunctionAbilityScanner are defined
    # END META
    """
    import argparse

    _suppress_threading_shutdown_interrupt()

    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="Citadel Nexus Tamagotchi Agent v5.0 - 25k LOC Edition",
        formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
        epilog="""
Distribution Commands:
  install     Install agent as system service
  uninstall   Remove agent service
  status      Check service status
  preflight   Run preflight validation only
  progress    Show build progress

Cognitive Commands:
  ui          Launch browser-based chat UI
  oad         Launch Operator Access Dashboard (stunning multi-panel UI)
  godot       Launch Godot game world with real-time thought visualization
  introspect  Generate self-awareness report
  brain-map   Generate brain synapse visualization
  learn       Add knowledge to learning database
  discord     Launch Discord bot with memory sharding & self-learning

Response Length Presets:
  --response concise     Short responses (~150 tokens)
  --response balanced    Standard responses (~500 tokens)
  --response detailed    Detailed responses (~1500 tokens)
  --response elongated   Extended responses (~4000 tokens)
  --response maximum     Maximum detail (~8000 tokens)

Examples:
  python citadel_nexus_pro.py                          # Interactive mode
  python citadel_nexus_pro.py ui                       # Launch UI in browser
  python citadel_nexus_pro.py oad                      # Launch OAD dashboard
  python citadel_nexus_pro.py godot                    # Launch Godot game world
  python citadel_nexus_pro.py oad --theme cyberpunk    # OAD with theme
  python citadel_nexus_pro.py --response elongated     # Elongated responses
  python citadel_nexus_pro.py --demo                   # Demo mode
  python citadel_nexus_pro.py install                  # Install as service
  python citadel_nexus_pro.py introspect               # Self-awareness report
  python citadel_nexus_pro.py brain-map                # Generate visualization
        """
    )
    parser.add_argument("--name", default="Aurora", help="Agent name")
    parser.add_argument("--model", default="gpt-4o-mini", help="LLM model")
    parser.add_argument("--demo", action="store_true", help="Run demo mode with pre-defined messages")
    parser.add_argument("--service", action="store_true", help="Run in service mode (no interactive input)")
    parser.add_argument("--response", choices=["concise", "balanced", "detailed", "elongated", "maximum"],
                       default="balanced", help="Response length preset")
    parser.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=8765, help="Port for UI WebSocket server")
    parser.add_argument("--no-browser", action="store_true", help="Don't auto-open browser for UI")
    parser.add_argument("--cognitive", action="store_true", help="Enable cognitive systems (STM/LTM/FAISS)")

    # Logging control
    parser.add_argument("-q", "--quiet", action="store_true", help="Reduce logging output (only warnings/errors)")
    parser.add_argument("-v", "--verbose", action="store_true", help="Enable verbose debug logging")

    # OAD theme option
    parser.add_argument("--theme", choices=["citadel_dark", "nexus_purple", "brotherhood_gold",
                                           "matrix_green", "cyberpunk"],
                       default="citadel_dark", help="OAD dashboard theme")

    # Distribution and cognitive subcommands
    parser.add_argument("command", nargs="?",
                       choices=["install", "uninstall", "status", "preflight", "progress",
                               "ui", "oad", "introspect", "brain-map", "learn", "discord", "godot"],
                       help="Command to run")

    args = parser.parse_args()

    # Configure logging level based on quiet/verbose flags
    if args.quiet:
        logging.basicConfig(level=logging.WARNING, format="%(message)s")
        logging.getLogger().setLevel(logging.WARNING)
    elif args.verbose:
        logging.basicConfig(level=logging.DEBUG, format="%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(name)s: %(message)s")
        logging.getLogger().setLevel(logging.DEBUG)
    else:
        # Default: only show critical info, suppress most INFO logs
        logging.basicConfig(level=logging.WARNING, format="%(message)s")
        logging.getLogger().setLevel(logging.WARNING)

    # Run preflight validation before launching interactive/runtime modes
    if args.command not in ("install", "uninstall", "status", "preflight", "progress"):
        distro = DistributionFramework(ServiceConfig(
            agent_name=args.name,
            model=args.model,
        ))
        print("\nRunning preflight validation...")
        if not distro.run_preflight():
            print("Preflight failed. Resolve issues before launching.")
            sys.exit(1)

    # Handle UI command
    if args.command == "ui":
        print("\n" + "="*60)
        print("  CITADEL NEXUS AGENT - WEB UI")
        print("="*60)

        # Create agent
        agent = NexusTamagotchiAgentPro(
            agent_name=args.name,
            model=args.model,
            enable_council=True,
            enable_gamification=True,
            enable_professors=True,
            enable_audit_trail=True
        )

        # Integrate cognitive systems
        print("[System] Initializing cognitive systems...")
        cognitive_systems = integrate_cognitive_systems(agent)

        # Launch UI
        print(f"[System] Launching UI on port {args.port}...")
        launch_agent_ui(
            agent,
            port=args.port,
            auto_open=not args.no_browser,
            response_preset=args.response,
        )
        sys.exit(0)

    # Handle OAD (Operator Access Dashboard) command
    if args.command == "oad":
        print("\n" + "="*60)
        print("  CITADEL OAD - OPERATOR ACCESS DASHBOARD")
        print("="*60)
        print(f"  Theme: {args.theme}")
        print(f"  Port: {args.port}")
        print("="*60 + "\n")

        # Create agent with all systems enabled
        agent = NexusTamagotchiAgentPro(
            agent_name=args.name,
            model=args.model,
            enable_council=True,
            enable_gamification=True,
            enable_professors=True,
            enable_audit_trail=True
        )

        # Integrate cognitive systems
        print("[OAD] Initializing cognitive systems...")
        cognitive_systems = integrate_cognitive_systems(agent)

        # Apply response preset
        if hasattr(agent, 'response_config'):
            preset_map = {
                "concise": ResponseLengthPreset.CONCISE,
                "balanced": ResponseLengthPreset.BALANCED,
                "detailed": ResponseLengthPreset.DETAILED,
                "elongated": ResponseLengthPreset.ELONGATED,
                "maximum": ResponseLengthPreset.MAXIMUM,
            }
            if args.response in preset_map:
                agent.response_config.preset = preset_map[args.response]

        print("[OAD] Launching Operator Access Dashboard...")
        print("[OAD] Combined module operations enabled:")
        print("      - Real-time XP/TP tracking")
        print("      - Memory system visualization")
        print("      - Professor network routing")
        print("      - Mission & quest management")
        print("      - Skill tree progression")
        print("      - Integration health monitoring")
        print("      - Analytics dashboard")
        print("")

        # Launch OAD
        launch_oad(
            agent,
            port=args.port,
            auto_open=not args.no_browser,
            theme=args.theme,
        )
        sys.exit(0)

    # Handle Godot command
    if args.command == "godot":
        print("\n" + "="*60)
        print("  CITADEL NEXUS AGENT - GODOT GAME WORLD")
        print("="*60)
        
        # Create agent with all systems enabled
        agent = NexusTamagotchiAgentPro(
            agent_name=args.name,
            model=args.model,
            enable_council=True,
            enable_gamification=True,
            enable_professors=True,
            enable_audit_trail=True
        )
        
        # Integrate cognitive systems
        print("[Godot] Initializing cognitive systems...")
        try:
            cognitive_systems = integrate_cognitive_systems(agent)
            print("[Godot] Cognitive systems initialized successfully")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[Godot] Cognitive initialization error: {e}")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            sys.exit(1)
        
        # Initialize Godot bridge
        print("[Godot] Starting WebSocket bridge...")
        try:
            # Import bridge components
            import sys
            from pathlib import Path
            nexus_path = Path(__file__).parent / ".nexus"
            if str(nexus_path) not in sys.path:
                sys.path.insert(0, str(nexus_path))
            
            from godot_bridge.websocket_server import GodotBridgeServer
            from godot_bridge.thought_stream import get_thought_stream
            
            # Create bridge server
            bridge = GodotBridgeServer(agent, port=args.port, auto_open_browser=not args.no_browser)
            agent._godot_bridge = bridge
            
            # Enable thought stream
            thought_stream = get_thought_stream()
            thought_stream.enable()
            
            print(f"[Godot] WebSocket bridge initialized")
            print(f"[Godot] Thought capture: {'Enabled' if thought_stream.is_enabled() else 'Disabled'}")
            print(f"[Godot] Server will run on http://localhost:{args.port}")
            print(f"[Godot] WebSocket available at ws://localhost:{args.port}/ws")
            print("")
            print("Ready! The browser will open automatically...")
            print("You can interact with the agent, and thoughts will appear in real-time!")
            print("")
            
            # Run server (blocking)
            bridge.run()
            
        except ImportError as e:
            print(f"[Godot] Import error: {e}")
            print("[Godot] Make sure FastAPI and uvicorn are installed:")
            print("        pip install fastapi uvicorn websockets")
            sys.exit(1)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[Godot] Error: {e}")
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            sys.exit(1)
        
        sys.exit(0)

    # Handle introspect command
    if args.command == "introspect":
        print("\n" + "="*60)
        print("  CITADEL NEXUS AGENT - INTROSPECTION REPORT")
        print("="*60)

        # Create agent
        agent = NexusTamagotchiAgentPro(
            agent_name=args.name,
            model=args.model,
        )

        # Integrate cognitive systems
        cognitive_systems = integrate_cognitive_systems(agent)

        # Generate report
        if hasattr(agent, 'self_awareness') and agent.self_awareness:
            report = agent.self_awareness.introspect()
            print(f"\n  Agent: {report.agent_name}")
            print(f"  Agent ID: {report.agent_id}")
            print(f"\n  Memory Status:")
            print(f"    STM Entries: {report.stm_entry_count}")
            print(f"    LTM Entries: {report.ltm_total_vectors}")
            for domain, count in report.ltm_domains.items():
                print(f"      - {domain}: {count}")
            print(f"\n  Learning Status:")
            print(f"    Total Learnings: {report.total_learnings}")
            print(f"    Learning Velocity: {report.learning_velocity:.2f}/hour")
            print(f"\n  Emotional Status:")
            print(f"    Current: {report.current_emotion}")
            print(f"    Stability: {report.emotional_stability:.2f}")
            print(f"\n  Integration Health:")
            for name, health in report.integrations.items():
                status_icon = "✅" if health.status == "OK" else "❌" if health.status == "FAIL" else "⚠️"
                print(f"    {status_icon} {name}: {health.status}")
            print(f"\n  Self-Description:")
            print(f"    {report.self_description}")
        else:
            print("  Self-awareness module not available")
        print("="*60 + "\n")
        sys.exit(0)

    # Handle brain-map command
    if args.command == "brain-map":
        print("\n" + "="*60)
        print("  CITADEL NEXUS AGENT - BRAIN SYNAPSE MAP")
        print("="*60)

        # Create agent
        agent = NexusTamagotchiAgentPro(
            agent_name=args.name,
            model=args.model,
        )

        # Integrate cognitive systems
        cognitive_systems = integrate_cognitive_systems(agent)

        # Generate visualization
        if hasattr(agent, 'memory_renderer') and agent.memory_renderer:
            output_dir = Path.home() / ".nexus_agent_data" / "visualizations"
            output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

            html_path = output_dir / f"brain_map_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.html"
            json_path = output_dir / f"brain_map_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.json"

            # Generate files
            agent.memory_renderer.render_to_html(html_path)
            agent.memory_renderer.render_to_json(json_path)

            stats = agent.memory_renderer.get_growth_stats()
            print(f"\n  Generated brain map visualization:")
            print(f"    HTML: {html_path}")
            print(f"    JSON: {json_path}")
            print(f"\n  Statistics:")
            print(f"    Total Memories: {stats['total_memories']}")
            print(f"    Domains: {', '.join(stats['domains'])}")
            print(f"    Avg Daily Growth: {stats['avg_daily_growth']:.2f}")

            # Try to open in browser
            import webbrowser
            webbrowser.open(f"file://{html_path}")
        else:
            print("  Memory renderer not available")
        print("="*60 + "\n")
        sys.exit(0)

    # Handle learn command
    if args.command == "learn":
        print("\n" + "="*60)
        print("  CITADEL NEXUS AGENT - LEARN KNOWLEDGE")
        print("="*60)
        print("  Enter knowledge to learn (Ctrl+C to finish):")

        # Create agent
        agent = NexusTamagotchiAgentPro(agent_name=args.name, model=args.model)
        cognitive_systems = integrate_cognitive_systems(agent)

        if hasattr(agent, 'learning_engine') and agent.learning_engine:
            try:
                while True:
                    content = input("\n  > ").strip()
                    if content:
                        result = agent.learning_engine.learn(content)
                        if result.success:
                            print(f"  ✅ Learned in domain '{result.domain}' (ID: {result.entry_id[:8]}...)")
                        else:
                            print(f"  ❌ Failed to learn: {result.error or 'duplicate'}")
            except KeyboardInterrupt:
                print("\n\n  Learning session ended.")
                stats = agent.learning_engine.get_domain_stats()
                for domain, s in stats.items():
                    print(f"    {domain}: {s.total_learnings} learnings")
        else:
            print("  Learning engine not available")
        print("="*60 + "\n")
        sys.exit(0)

    # Handle discord command - launch Discord bot
    if args.command == "discord":
        print("\n" + "="*60)
        print("  CITADEL NEXUS - DISCORD BOT")
        print("="*60)

        # Check for token
        token = os.environ.get("DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN")
        if not token:
            print("  [!] DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN environment variable not set!")
            print("")
            print("  To use the Discord bot:")
            print("    1. Create a bot at https://discord.com/developers/applications")
            print("    2. Enable MESSAGE CONTENT INTENT in Bot settings")
            print("    3. Get the bot token and set it:")
            print("")
            print("       Windows PowerShell:")
            print("         $env:DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN='your_token_here'")
            print("")
            print("       Windows CMD:")
            print("         set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=your_token_here")
            print("")
            print("       Linux/Mac:")
            print("         export DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN='your_token_here'")
            print("")
            print("    4. Run this command again")
            print("="*60 + "\n")
            sys.exit(1)

        # Check for discord.py
        try:
            import discord
            print(f"  [✓] discord.py {discord.__version__} installed")
        except ImportError:
            print("  [!] discord.py not installed!")
            print("  [!] Install with: pip install discord.py")
            print("="*60 + "\n")
            sys.exit(1)

        # Create agent with full systems
        print("  [i] Initializing agent...")
        agent = NexusTamagotchiAgentPro(
            agent_name=args.name,
            model=args.model,
            enable_council=True,
            enable_gamification=True,
            enable_professors=True,
            enable_audit_trail=True
        )
        cognitive_systems = integrate_cognitive_systems(agent)

        print(f"  [i] Agent: {agent.agent_name}")
        print(f"  [i] Memory Sharding: 10 domains")
        print(f"  [i] Self-Learning: 30-minute cycles")
        print("="*60)
        print("  [i] Starting Discord bot (blocking)...")
        print("  [i] Press Ctrl+C to stop")
        print("="*60 + "\n")

        # Launch bot (blocking)
        try:
            launch_discord_bot(agent, background=False)
        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            print("\n\n[Discord] Bot stopped by user")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"\n[Discord] Error: {e}")
        sys.exit(0)

    # Handle distribution commands
    if args.command:
        distro = DistributionFramework(ServiceConfig(
            agent_name=args.name,
            model=args.model,
        ))

        if args.command == "install":
            success = distro.install()
            sys.exit(0 if success else 1)

        elif args.command == "uninstall":
            success = distro.uninstall()
            sys.exit(0 if success else 1)

        elif args.command == "status":
            status = distro.status()
            print(f"\n{'='*60}")
            print(f"  CITADEL NEXUS AGENT - STATUS")
            print(f"{'='*60}")
            print(f"  Installed: {'Yes' if status['installed'] else 'No'}")
            print(f"  Running: {'Yes' if status['running'] else 'No'}")
            print(f"  Platform: {status['platform']['system']} ({status['platform']['service_method']})")
            print(f"{'='*60}\n")
            sys.exit(0)

        elif args.command == "preflight":
            success = distro.run_preflight()
            sys.exit(0 if success else 1)

        elif args.command == "progress":
            progress = PROGRESSION_SHEET.get_overall_progress()
            print(f"\n{'='*60}")
            print(f"  CITADEL NEXUS AGENT - BUILD PROGRESS")
            print(f"{'='*60}")
            print(f"  Total Capabilities: {progress['total_capabilities']}")
            print(f"  Completed: {progress['completed']}")
            print(f"  In Progress: {progress['in_progress']}")
            print(f"  Planned: {progress['planned']}")
            print(f"  Completion: {progress['completion_percentage']:.1f}%")
            print(f"  LOC: {progress['loc_actual']} / {progress['loc_estimate']} ({progress['loc_percentage']:.1f}%)")
            print(f"  Tools Registered: {progress['tools_registered']}")
            print(f"\n  By Category:")
            for cat, data in progress['by_category'].items():
                print(f"    {cat}: {data['complete']}/{data['total']}")
            print(f"{'='*60}\n")
            sys.exit(0)

    # Create agent (will load persisted state if exists)
    agent = NexusTamagotchiAgentPro(
        agent_name=args.name,
        model=args.model,
        enable_council=True,
        enable_gamification=True,
        enable_professors=True,
        enable_audit_trail=True
    )

    # Capture cognitive frame on startup
    PROGRESSION_SHEET.capture_cognitive_frame(
        thought=f"Agent {args.name} initializing with model {args.model}",
        state="active",
        archetype="adaptive",
        criticality="low"
    )

    # Show initial status
    agent._print_vitals()

    if args.service:
        # Service mode - run without interactive input, just stay alive
        print(f"\n[{agent.agent_name}]: Running in service mode...")
        print("Press Ctrl+C to stop.")
        try:
            while True:
                time.sleep(60)
                # Could add periodic health checks here
        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            print(f"\n[{agent.agent_name}]: Service stopped.")
            agent._save_state()
            sys.exit(0)

    elif args.demo:
        # Demo mode - run pre-defined messages
        messages = [
            "Hello! Tell me about yourself.",
            "How do you think about governance and AI?",
            "What makes you grow and evolve?",
            "Can you remember what I told you earlier?"
        ]
        for msg in messages:
            print(f"\n[User]: {msg}")
            response = agent.interact(msg)
            print(f"[{agent.agent_name}]:\n{response}")

        print("\n" + "="*70)
        print("Final Status:")
        agent._print_vitals()
        print("="*70)
    else:
        # Interactive mode - REPL with enhanced commands
        print("\n" + "="*70)
        print(f"  Interactive session with {agent.agent_name}")
        print("  Type 'quit' or 'exit' to end, 'status' to see vitals")
        print("  State is saved after each interaction")
        print("="*70)
        print("  Commands:")
        print("    /ui           - Launch Master Panel (chat + RPG card + skills)")
        print("    /oad          - Launch Memory & ZigZag Panel (memory + cognitive flow)")
        print("    /brain        - Activate ZigZag brain visualization (live cognitive map)")
        print("    /memory       - Launch Memory Browser (STM/LTM exploration)")
        print("    /integrations - Show integration status")
        print("    /abilities    - List agent abilities (RPG skill tree)")
        print("    /scan         - Deep scan (usage, operability, interconnectivity)")
        print("    /web <query>  - Perform web search")
        print("    /settings     - Open settings menu (API keys, preferences)")
        print("    /onboard      - Run onboarding wizard (tutorial + setup)")
        print("    /discord      - Launch Discord bot (chat, XP tracking, learning)")
        print("    /menu         - Open interactive main menu (20+ options)")
        print("  Governance & Protocols:")
        print("    /contracts    - Manage agent behavioral contracts")
        print("    /icp          - Manage Inter-Component Protocols")
        print("    /rls          - Manage Row-Level Security policies")
        print("  Self-Assessment:")
        print("    /live         - Run live integration test (all systems)")
        print("    /rehydrate    - Validate memory continuity and restoration")
        print("  Analytics & Lingo:")
        print("    /lingo        - View your linguistic profile (emotion, slang, vocabulary)")
        print("    /analytics    - View deep analytics dashboard (PostHog, Datadog)")
        print("  Cognitive Architecture:")
        print("    /cognitive    - View Nexus Cognitive status (Cortex, Mind, Sense, Sanctum)")
        print("    /cogtest      - Run cognitive operations test (MIRA, nested learning)")
        print("  Telemetry (25 Metrics):")
        print("    /telemetry    - View unified telemetry dashboard (Supabase/Datadog/PostHog)")
        print("    /brain        - Display simulated brain visualization")
        print("    /context      - View context linking and failure pattern analysis")
        print("  Diagnostics (ULMS/TaskIR/College):")
        print("    /diagnostic   - Run full diagnostic suite (25 tests, CAPS rating)")
        print("    /diag         - Quick diagnostic summary")
        print("  Other:")
        print("    status        - Show current vitals with character card")
        print("    clear         - Clear conversation memories")
        print("    quit/exit     - End session")
        print("="*70)
        print("  TIP: You can also use natural language! Try: 'show my stats' or 'run diagnostics'")
        print("="*70)

        # Initialize NLP Command Router for natural language function triggers
        nlp_router = NLPCommandRouter(agent=agent, logger=agent.logger)
        print(f"[System] NLP Command Router initialized with {len(nlp_router.NLP_COMMAND_PATTERNS)} patterns")

        while True:
            try:
                user_input = input(f"\n[You]: ").strip()

                if not user_input:
                    continue

                if user_input.lower() in ("quit", "exit", "q"):
                    print(f"\n[{agent.agent_name}]: Goodbye! See you next time.")
                    agent._print_vitals()
                    break

                if user_input.lower() in ("status", "/status", "/stats"):
                    agent._print_vitals()
                    continue

                if user_input.lower() == "clear":
                    # Clear memories and reset (memories is a Dict[str, MemoryObject])
                    agent.cognitive_domain.memories = {}
                    agent.vitals.memory_count = 0
                    agent._save_state()
                    print(f"[System]: Memories cleared.")
                    continue

                # NLP Natural Language Command Routing (check before slash commands)
