                # This allows users to say "show my stats" instead of "/status"
                if not user_input.startswith("/"):
                    nlp_match = nlp_router.match(user_input)
                    if nlp_match and nlp_match["confidence"] >= nlp_match.get("confidence_threshold", 0.6):
                        # Show NLP match feedback
                        print(f"\n[NLP] Matched: '{nlp_match['matched_trigger']}' -> {nlp_match['command']}")
                        print(f"[NLP] Confidence: {nlp_match['confidence']:.0%} | Function: {nlp_match['function']}")

                        # Try to execute function directly via agent
                        function_name = nlp_match["function"]
                        if hasattr(agent, function_name):
                            try:
                                print(f"[NLP] Executing: {function_name}()")
                                func = getattr(agent, function_name)
                                argument = nlp_match.get("argument")
                                if argument and nlp_match.get("requires_argument"):
                                    result = func(argument)
                                else:
                                    result = func()
                                # If function returned a string, print it
                                if isinstance(result, str) and result:
                                    print(f"\n[{agent.agent_name}]:\n{result}")
                                continue  # Skip to next iteration after successful NLP execution
                            except Exception as e:
                                print(f"[NLP] Error executing {function_name}: {e}")
                                # Fall through to slash command handling

                        # Fallback: Route to internal command (rewrite user_input to slash command)
                        cmd = nlp_match["command"]
                        if nlp_match.get("requires_argument") and nlp_match.get("argument"):
                            user_input = f"{cmd} {nlp_match['argument']}"
                        else:
                            user_input = cmd
                        print(f"[NLP] Fallback to command: {user_input}")

                # Help for NLP triggers
                if user_input.lower() in ("/nlp", "nlp", "/triggers"):
                    print(nlp_router.get_help_text())
                    print(f"\n[System] NLP Stats: {nlp_router.get_stats()}")
                    continue

                # Launch Master Panel UI command (/ui)
                if user_input.lower() in ("/ui", "ui"):
                    print(f"\n[System] Launching MASTER PANEL on port {args.port}...")

                    # Fetch real data from agent systems
                    oad_active, oad_total = agent._get_oad_integration_counts()
                    brotherhood_rank = getattr(agent.brotherhood, "rank", "UNKNOWN") if hasattr(agent, "brotherhood") else "N/A"
                    brotherhood_xp = getattr(agent.brotherhood, "total_xp", 0) if hasattr(agent, "brotherhood") else 0
                    brotherhood_tp = getattr(agent.brotherhood, "total_tp", 0) if hasattr(agent, "brotherhood") else 0

                    # Monitoring delivery stats
                    delivery_log = getattr(agent, "_telemetry_delivery_log", [])
                    recent_events = len([e for e in delivery_log if datetime.fromisoformat(e["timestamp"]) > datetime.now() - timedelta(minutes=60)]) if delivery_log else 0
                    posthog_delivered = sum(1 for e in delivery_log if e.get("delivery_success", {}).get("posthog")) if delivery_log else 0
                    datadog_delivered = sum(1 for e in delivery_log if e.get("delivery_success", {}).get("datadog")) if delivery_log else 0

                    # Policy decisions
                    policy_matrix = getattr(agent, "policy_matrix", None)
                    policy_decisions = 0
                    if policy_matrix and hasattr(policy_matrix, "decision_count"):
                        policy_decisions = policy_matrix.decision_count

                    # Quest system stats
                    active_quests = 0
                    if hasattr(agent, "quest_system") and agent.quest_system:
                        active_quests = len(agent.quest_system.get_active_quests())

                    print("[System] Master Panel - LIVE DATA:")
                    print("  ┌─ Core Systems ─────────────────────────────────────────┐")
                    print(f"  │  💬 Real-time chat interface                           │")
                    print(f"  │  🎮 {brotherhood_rank} ({brotherhood_xp:,} XP / {brotherhood_tp:,} TP)           │")
                    print(f"  │  🌳 Skill tree visualization                           │")
                    print(f"  │  🔗 Integrations: {oad_active}/{oad_total} active                     │")
                    print(f"  │  🧠 ZigZag cognitive mini view                         │")
                    print("  ├─ Monitoring & Telemetry ─────────────────────────────┤")
                    print(f"  │  📊 Events (1h): {recent_events}                                  │")
                    print(f"  │  📈 PostHog: {posthog_delivered} | Datadog: {datadog_delivered}                     │")
                    print(f"  │  🔒 Policy decisions: {policy_decisions}                            │")
                    print("  ├─ Council & Governance ─────────────────────────────────┤")
                    print("  │  👑 Council voting panel (28 governors)                │")
                    print("  │  📜 Policy document viewer                             │")
                    print("  │  ⚖️  AGS engine status                                  │")
                    print("  ├─ Book Maker System ────────────────────────────────────┤")
                    print("  │  📚 Document generation controls                       │")
                    print("  │  🗂️  AIMB block inspector                               │")
                    print(f"  │  📊 Quests active: {active_quests}                                  │")
                    print("  ├─ College Network ──────────────────────────────────────┤")
                    print("  │  🎓 28-domain Professor dashboard                      │")
                    print("  │  📈 Domain expertise visualization                     │")
                    print("  │  🔬 Learning pathway tracker                           │")
                    print("  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘")
                    print("[System] Press Ctrl+C to return to console.")
                    try:
                        launch_master_panel(
                            agent,
                            port=args.port,
                            auto_open=True,
                        )
                    except KeyboardInterrupt:
                        print("\n[System] Master Panel closed. Returning to console mode.")
                    continue

                # Launch Memory & ZigZag Panel command (/oad)
                if user_input.lower() in ("/oad", "oad"):
                    print(f"\n[System] Launching MEMORY & ZIGZAG PANEL on port {args.port}...")

                    # Fetch real memory data
                    stm_count = 0
                    ltm_count = 0
                    memory_domains = []

                    if hasattr(agent, "_memory_browser"):
                        try:
                            stats = agent._memory_browser.get_statistics()
                            stm_count = stats.get("total_stm", 0)
                            ltm_count = stats.get("total_ltm", 0)
                            memory_domains = list(stats.get("domains", {}).keys())[:5]
                        except Exception:
                            pass
                    elif hasattr(agent, "stm"):
                        stm_count = len(agent.stm) if agent.stm else 0
                    if hasattr(agent, "ltm") and agent.ltm:
                        ltm_count = len(agent.ltm.get("vectors", [])) if isinstance(agent.ltm, dict) else 0

                    # ZigZag tracer data
                    zigzag_flows = 0
                    zigzag_xp = 0
                    zigzag_tp = 0
                    if hasattr(agent, "_zigzag_tracer") and agent._zigzag_tracer:
                        tracer = agent._zigzag_tracer
                        zigzag_xp = getattr(tracer, "total_xp", 0)
                        zigzag_tp = getattr(tracer, "total_tp", 0)
                        if hasattr(tracer, "cognitive_flows"):
                            zigzag_flows = len(tracer.cognitive_flows)

                    # Integration health from ZigZag
                    integration_health = {}
                    if hasattr(agent, "_zigzag_tracer") and agent._zigzag_tracer:
                        integration_health = getattr(agent._zigzag_tracer, "integration_health", {})

                    # Reflex stats
                    reflex_count = 0
                    quarantined_count = 0
                    if hasattr(agent, "zup") and agent.zup and hasattr(agent.zup, "reflex_executor"):
                        executor = agent.zup.reflex_executor
                        reflex_count = len(executor.reflexes) if hasattr(executor, "reflexes") else 0
                        quarantined_count = len(executor.quarantine) if hasattr(executor, "quarantine") else 0

                    # Telemetry delivery verification
                    delivery_log = getattr(agent, "_telemetry_delivery_log", [])
                    delivery_rate = 0
                    if delivery_log:
                        successful = sum(1 for e in delivery_log if any(e.get("delivery_success", {}).values()))
                        delivery_rate = (successful / len(delivery_log) * 100) if delivery_log else 0

                    print("[System] OAD Panel - LIVE DATA:")
                    print("  ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
                    print("  ║           MEMORY & ZIGZAG OPERATOR DASHBOARD              ║")
                    print("  ╠═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                    print(f"  ║  📦 Memory: STM={stm_count:,} | LTM={ltm_count:,}                          ║")
                    if memory_domains:
                        domain_str = ", ".join(memory_domains[:3])
                        print(f"  ║  🏷️  Domains: {domain_str:<40}║")
                    print("  ╠═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                    print(f"  ║  🔄 ZigZag Flows: {zigzag_flows:<5} XP: {zigzag_xp:<8} TP: {zigzag_tp:<6}  ║")
                    print(f"  ║  ⚡ Reflexes: {reflex_count} active | {quarantined_count} quarantined              ║")
                    print("  ╠═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                    print("  ║  Integration Health:                                      ║")
                    for name, health in list(integration_health.items())[:4]:
                        status = "✓" if health.get("healthy") else "✗"
                        latency = health.get("latency_ms", 0)
                        print(f"  ║    {status} {name:<12}: {latency:>6.1f}ms                         ║")
                    if not integration_health:
                        print("  ║    No integration health data available                  ║")
                    print("  ╠═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                    print(f"  ║  📡 Telemetry Delivery Rate: {delivery_rate:.1f}%                       ║")
                    print(f"  ║  📊 Events Logged: {len(delivery_log):,}                                  ║")
                    print("  ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
                    print("[System] Press Ctrl+C to return to console.")
                    try:
                        launch_memory_zigzag_panel(
                            agent,
                            port=args.port,
                            auto_open=True,
                        )
                    except KeyboardInterrupt:
                        print("\n[System] Memory Panel closed. Returning to console mode.")
                    continue

                # Launch Memory Browser command (/memory)
                if user_input.lower() in ("/memory", "memory"):
                    print("\n[System] Launching MEMORY BROWSER...")
                    try:
                        # Initialize memory browser if not exists
                        if not hasattr(agent, '_memory_browser'):
                            agent._memory_browser = MemoryBrowser(agent)

                        # Display ASCII memory browser
                        stats = agent._memory_browser.get_statistics()
                        entries = agent._memory_browser.get_entries()

                        print("\n╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
                        print("║                    🧠 MEMORY BROWSER                                  ║")
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print(f"║  STM Entries: {stats['total_stm']:<10}  LTM Entries: {stats['total_ltm']:<10}          ║")
                        print(f"║  Domains: {len(stats['domains']):<5}                                                  ║")
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print("║  Recent Memories:                                                     ║")
                        for i, entry in enumerate(entries[:10]):
                            domain_tag = "STM" if entry.is_stm else entry.domain[:6].upper()
                            content_preview = entry.content[:45] + "..." if len(entry.content) > 45 else entry.content
                            print(f"║  [{domain_tag:^6}] {content_preview:<50}         ║")
                        if len(entries) > 10:
                            print(f"║  ... +{len(entries) - 10} more entries                                            ║")
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print("║  Domains: ", end="")
                        domain_list = list(stats['domains'].keys())[:5]
                        print(", ".join(f"{d}({stats['domains'][d]})" for d in domain_list).ljust(54) + "   ║")
                        print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
                        print("\n  Tip: Use '/oad' for full visual memory & ZigZag panel")
                    except Exception as e:
                        print(f"  Error loading memory browser: {e}")
                    continue

                # Web search command (/web)
                if user_input.lower().startswith("/web "):
                    query = user_input[5:].strip()
                    if not query:
                        print("[System] Usage: /web <query>")
                        continue

                    print(f"\n[System] Searching: {query}")
                    try:
                        # Initialize web browser if not exists
                        if not hasattr(agent, '_web_browser'):
                            agent._web_browser = AgentWebBrowser(agent)

                        if not agent._web_browser.available:
                            print("[System] Web browsing unavailable (missing httpx/bs4)")
                            continue

                        # Run async search (asyncio is global import)
                        try:
                            loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
                            result = loop.run_until_complete(agent._web_browser.search(query))
                        except RuntimeError:
                            result = asyncio.run(agent._web_browser.search(query))

                        if result.error:
                            print(f"[System] Search error: {result.error}")
                        elif result.searched:
                            print(f"\n[Search Result] ({result.confidence:.0%} confidence)")
                            print("-" * 60)
                            print(result.context[:500])
                            if len(result.context) > 500:
                                print("...")
                            print("-" * 60)
                            if result.citations:
                                print("Sources:")
                                for cite in result.citations[:3]:
                                    print(f"  {cite}")
                            print(f"\n[System] Latency: {result.latency_ms:.0f}ms")

                            # Feed to ZigZag
                            if hasattr(agent, '_zigzag_visualizer'):
                                agent._zigzag_visualizer.capture_node("web_search", {
                                    "query": query,
                                    "confidence": result.confidence,
                                })
                        else:
                            print("[System] No results found for query")

                        # Show web proficiency
                        print(agent._web_browser.generate_proficiency_display())

                    except Exception as e:
                        print(f"[System] Web search error: {e}")
                    continue

                # Show integrations status
                if user_input.lower() in ("/integrations", "/int", "integrations"):
                    print("\n[System] Checking integration status...")
                    try:
                        checker = OADIntegrationChecker()
                        results = checker.check_all(skip_http=True)
                        active = sum(1 for r in results if r.status in ("ok", "skipped"))
                        print(f"\n  Integration Status: {active}/{len(results)} active")
                        print("  " + "-"*50)
                        for r in results:
                            icon = "✅" if r.status in ("ok", "skipped") else "⚠️" if r.status == "not_configured" else "❌"
                            print(f"  {icon} {r.service:15} {r.token_masked:20} [{r.signal_class}]")
                        print("  " + "-"*50)
                    except Exception as e:
                        print(f"  Error checking integrations: {e}")
                    continue

                # List abilities command (RPG Style)
                if user_input.lower() in ("/abilities", "/ability", "abilities"):
                    print("\n[System] Scanning agent abilities...")
                    try:
                        scanner = FunctionAbilityScanner()
                        result = scanner.scan()

                        # RPG-style abilities display
                        print("")
                        print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
                        print(f"║           ⚔️  AGENT SKILL TREE  ⚔️                                   ║")
                        print(f"║           Total Skills: {result.total_abilities:<3}                                       ║")
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")

                        # Category icons
                        cat_icons = {
                            "core": "⚡", "analytics": "📊", "communication": "💬",
                            "gamification": "🎮", "governance": "👑", "integration": "🔗",
                            "learning": "📚", "memory": "🧠", "persistence": "💾",
                            "security": "🔐", "web": "🌐",
                        }

                        # Group abilities by category
                        abilities_by_cat = {}
                        for a in result.abilities:
                            if a.category not in abilities_by_cat:
                                abilities_by_cat[a.category] = []
                            abilities_by_cat[a.category].append(a)

                        # Calculate proficiency based on functions implementing
                        def calc_proficiency(ability) -> int:
                            base = 30 + len(ability.implementing_functions) * 10
                            if ability.srs_refs:
                                base += 15
                            if ability.enabled:
                                base += 10
                            return min(100, base)

                        def skill_bar(prof: int, width: int = 8) -> str:
                            filled = int((prof / 100) * width)
                            return f"[{'▓' * filled}{'░' * (width - filled)}]"

                        def tier_from_prof(prof: int) -> str:
                            if prof >= 90: return "MSTR"
                            if prof >= 70: return "EXPT"
                            if prof >= 50: return "PROF"
                            if prof >= 30: return "FMIL"
                            return "NOVC"

                        for cat, abilities in sorted(abilities_by_cat.items()):
                            icon = cat_icons.get(cat, "📌")
                            print(f"║  {icon} {cat.upper():<12}                                               ║")
                            print("║  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  ║")

                            for ability in abilities[:4]:  # Show top 4 per category
                                prof = calc_proficiency(ability)
                                tier = tier_from_prof(prof)
                                bar = skill_bar(prof)
                                lock = "🔓" if ability.enabled else "🔒"
                                # Format: skill_name [========] TIER 🔓
                                name_short = ability.name[:20]
                                print(f"║    {name_short:<20} {bar} {tier:<4} {lock}           ║")

                            remaining = len(abilities) - 4
                            if remaining > 0:
                                print(f"║    ... +{remaining} more skills                                       ║")
                            print("║                                                                      ║")

                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print("║  PROFICIENCY TIERS                                                   ║")
                        print("║    NOVC = Novice | FMIL = Familiar | PROF = Proficient              ║")
                        print("║    EXPT = Expert | MSTR = Master                                     ║")
                        print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
                        print("")

                    except Exception as e:
                        print(f"  Error scanning abilities: {e}")
                    continue

                # ZigZag Brain Visualization command (/brain)
                if user_input.lower() in ("/brain", "brain"):
                    print("\n[System] Activating ZigZag BRAIN VISUALIZATION...")
                    try:
                        # Initialize ZigZag visualizer if not exists
                        if not hasattr(agent, '_zigzag_visualizer'):
                            agent._zigzag_visualizer = ZigZagPanelVisualizer(agent)

                        # Capture current cognitive state
                        agent._zigzag_visualizer.capture_node("brain_activation", {"trigger": "manual"})

                        # Get data for visualization
                        mock_summary = agent._zigzag_visualizer.get_mock_brain_summary()
                        flow_data = agent._zigzag_visualizer.get_flow_data()
                        recent_nodes = agent._zigzag_visualizer.get_recent_nodes(15)

                        # Calculate brain metrics
                        total_nodes = flow_data['total_nodes']
                        active_types = len(flow_data['type_counts'])
                        connections = len(flow_data['connections'])
                        health_pct = mock_summary.get('cognitive_health', 0.85)

                        # Generate ASCII brain visualization - ENHANCED
                        print("\n╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
                        print("║                     🧠 ZIGZAG BRAIN VISUALIZATION - LIVE                          ║")
                        print("║                           Citadel Nexus Cognitive Map                             ║")
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")

                        # Neural activity animation bar
                        activity_bar = "█" * min(20, total_nodes) + "░" * (20 - min(20, total_nodes))
                        print(f"║  ⚡ Neural Activity: [{activity_bar}] {total_nodes} nodes                    ║")
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")

                        # Enhanced cognitive architecture diagram
                        print("║                            COGNITIVE ARCHITECTURE                                 ║")
                        print("║  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  ║")
                        print("║  │                              ╭──────────────╮                              │  ║")
                        print("║  │                              │  CONSCIOUSNESS │                            │  ║")
                        print("║  │                              │     (MIND)     │                            │  ║")
                        print("║  │                              ╰───────┬────────╯                            │  ║")
                        print("║  │                                      │                                     │  ║")
                        print("║  │        ╭──────────╮         ╭───────┴───────╮         ╭──────────╮        │  ║")
                        print("║  │        │  INPUT   │────────▶│    CORTEX     │────────▶│  OUTPUT  │        │  ║")
                        print("║  │        │ (Sense)  │         │  (Processing) │         │(Response)│        │  ║")
                        print("║  │        ╰──────────╯         ╰───────┬───────╯         ╰──────────╯        │  ║")
                        print("║  │                                     │                                      │  ║")
                        print("║  │   ╭──────────╮  ╭──────────╮  ╭────┴────╮  ╭──────────╮  ╭──────────╮    │  ║")
                        print("║  │   │   STM    │──│   AGS    │──│  FAISS  │──│  REFLEX  │──│PROFESSOR │    │  ║")
                        print("║  │   │ (Buffer) │  │(Governan)│  │  (LTM)  │  │ (Engine) │  │(Network) │    │  ║")
                        print("║  │   ╰────┬─────╯  ╰────┬─────╯  ╰────┬────╯  ╰────┬─────╯  ╰────┬─────╯    │  ║")
                        print("║  │        │             │             │             │             │          │  ║")
                        print("║  │   ╭────┴─────╮  ╭────┴─────╮  ╭────┴────╮  ╭────┴─────╮  ╭────┴─────╮    │  ║")
                        print("║  │   │ COUNCIL  │──│BOOK MAKER│──│ COLLEGE │──│BROTHERHOOD│──│ SANCTUM  │    │  ║")
                        print("║  │   │(Voting)  │  │(Document)│  │(28 Prof)│  │(XP/TP)   │  │(Memory)  │    │  ║")
                        print("║  │   ╰──────────╯  ╰──────────╯  ╰─────────╯  ╰──────────╯  ╰──────────╯    │  ║")
                        print("║  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  ║")
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")

                        # SYNAPSE MAP - Visual representation of node connections
                        print("║  🔬 SYNAPSE MAP (Last 12 cognitive events):                                       ║")
                        print("║  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  ║")

                        icons = {"interaction": "💬", "memory": "🧠", "stm_inject": "📝",
                                "ltm_store": "💾", "web_search": "🌐", "professor": "🎓",
                                "reflex": "⚡", "emotion": "💜", "ags": "🔮",
                                "brain_activation": "🌀", "default": "●"}

                        # Display nodes in a visual grid pattern
                        if recent_nodes:
                            # Row 1: First 4 nodes
                            row1_nodes = recent_nodes[:4]
                            row1_str = "  │  "
                            for node in row1_nodes:
                                icon = icons.get(node["type"], icons["default"])
                                row1_str += f"{icon}──"
                            row1_str = row1_str.rstrip("──")
                            row1_str += " " * (79 - len(row1_str)) + "│  ║"
                            print(f"║{row1_str}")

                            # Connection line
                            print("║  │      │        │        │        │                                           │  ║")
                            print("║  │      ▼        ▼        ▼        ▼                                           │  ║")

                            # Row 2: Next 4 nodes
                            row2_nodes = recent_nodes[4:8] if len(recent_nodes) > 4 else []
                            row2_str = "  │  "
                            for node in row2_nodes:
                                icon = icons.get(node["type"], icons["default"])
                                row2_str += f"{icon}──"
                            row2_str = row2_str.rstrip("──") if row2_nodes else row2_str + "(awaiting activity)"
                            row2_str += " " * (79 - len(row2_str)) + "│  ║"
                            print(f"║{row2_str}")

                            # Connection line
                            if len(recent_nodes) > 8:
                                print("║  │      │        │        │        │                                           │  ║")
                                print("║  │      ▼        ▼        ▼        ▼                                           │  ║")

                                # Row 3: Last 4 nodes
                                row3_nodes = recent_nodes[8:12]
                                row3_str = "  │  "
                                for node in row3_nodes:
                                    icon = icons.get(node["type"], icons["default"])
                                    row3_str += f"{icon}──"
                                row3_str = row3_str.rstrip("──")
                                row3_str += " " * (79 - len(row3_str)) + "│  ║"
                                print(f"║{row3_str}")
                        else:
                            print("║  │  (no cognitive activity recorded - start interacting!)                     │  ║")

                        print("║  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  ║")
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")

                        # Mock brain summary
                        if mock_summary["demo_mode"]:
                            print("║  🎭 DEMO MODE - Simulated brain activity for visualization                     ║")
                        else:
                            print("║  🔴 LIVE MODE - Real cognitive activity                                        ║")

                        # Detailed metrics
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print("║  📊 COGNITIVE METRICS                                                             ║")
                        print("║  ┌────────────────────┬────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────┐  ║")
                        print(f"║  │ Total Nodes: {total_nodes:<5}  │ Connections: {connections:<5}  │ Active Subsystems: {active_types:<3}          │  ║")
                        print("║  └────────────────────┴────────────────────┴────────────────────────────────┘  ║")
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")

                        # Recent cognitive flow with timestamps
                        print("║  ⏱️  RECENT COGNITIVE TIMELINE:                                                    ║")
                        for i, node in enumerate(recent_nodes[-6:]):
                            icon = icons.get(node["type"], icons["default"])
                            ts = node["timestamp"].split("T")[1][:8]
                            mock_flag = "[SIM]" if node.get("mock", False) else "[LIVE]"
                            node_data = node.get("data", {})
                            detail = ""
                            if "emotion" in node_data:
                                detail = f"emotion={node_data['emotion']}"
                            elif "stage" in node_data:
                                detail = f"stage={node_data['stage']}"
                            elif "domain" in node_data:
                                detail = f"domain={node_data['domain']}"
                            detail_str = f" ({detail})" if detail else ""
                            print(f"║    {icon} [{ts}] {node['type']:<18} {mock_flag:<6}{detail_str:<20}            ║")

                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")

                        # Subsystem activation status - enhanced
                        print("║  🔌 SUBSYSTEM ACTIVATION STATUS:                                                  ║")
                        print("║  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  ║")

                        systems = [
                            ("STM Buffer", hasattr(agent, 'stm') and agent.stm is not None, "📝", "Short-term memory"),
                            ("LTM FAISS", hasattr(agent, 'ltm') and agent.ltm is not None, "💾", "Long-term vectors"),
                            ("AGS Engine", hasattr(agent, 'ags_engine') and agent.ags_engine is not None, "🔮", "Governance"),
                            ("Brotherhood", hasattr(agent, 'brotherhood') and agent.brotherhood is not None, "⚔️", "XP/TP system"),
                            ("Professors", hasattr(agent, 'professor_network') and agent.professor_network is not None, "🎓", "Domain experts"),
                            ("Web Browser", hasattr(agent, '_web_browser') and agent._web_browser is not None, "🌐", "Web search"),
                            ("Cognitive", hasattr(agent, '_cognitive_cortex') and agent._cognitive_cortex is not None, "🧠", "Cortex/Mind"),
                            ("Telemetry", hasattr(agent, '_telemetry_stack') and agent._telemetry_stack is not None, "📡", "Metrics"),
                            ("Council", hasattr(agent, 'council') and agent.council is not None, "👑", "Voting system"),
                            ("Book Maker", hasattr(agent, '_book_maker') or hasattr(agent, 'book_system'), "📚", "Doc generator"),
                            ("College", hasattr(agent, '_college_network') or hasattr(agent, 'college'), "🎓", "28 professors"),
                            ("Sanctum", hasattr(agent, '_sanctum') or hasattr(agent, 'sanctum_system'), "🏛️", "Memory palace"),
                        ]

                        for name, active, icon, desc in systems:
                            status = "✅ ON " if active else "⬚ OFF"
                            bar = "████" if active else "░░░░"
                            print(f"║  │  {icon} {name:<12} [{bar}] {status} - {desc:<20}              │  ║")

                        print("║  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  ║")

                        # Health gauge
                        health_bar = "█" * int(health_pct * 20) + "░" * (20 - int(health_pct * 20))
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print(f"║  💚 COGNITIVE HEALTH: [{health_bar}] {health_pct:.0%}                           ║")

                        # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
                        # ZIGZAG XP/TP ECONOMY PANEL
                        # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print("║  💰 XP/TP ECONOMY (CAPS-Based Rewards):                                          ║")
                        print("║  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  ║")

                        # Get XP/TP data from brotherhood or tracer
                        xp_total = 0
                        tp_total = 0
                        recent_xp_tx = []
                        recent_tp_tx = []

                        # Check for ZigZag tracer
                        if hasattr(agent, '_zigzag_tracer') and agent._zigzag_tracer:
                            tracer = agent._zigzag_tracer
                            xp_total = sum(tx.get("amount", 0) for tx in tracer.xp_transactions)
                            tp_total = sum(tx.get("amount", 0) for tx in tracer.tp_transactions)
                            recent_xp_tx = tracer.xp_transactions[-3:]
                            recent_tp_tx = tracer.tp_transactions[-2:]
                        elif hasattr(agent, 'brotherhood') and agent.brotherhood:
                            xp_total = getattr(agent.brotherhood, 'total_xp', 0)
                            tp_total = getattr(agent.brotherhood, 'tavern_points', 0)

                        # CAPS rating display
                        print("║  │  CAPS RATINGS:  S_99:50XP  A_90:40XP  B_75:30XP  C_55:20XP  D_25:10XP      │  ║")
                        print(f"║  │  Total XP: {xp_total:<8}  │  Total TP: {tp_total:<8}                           │  ║")
                        print("║  │  ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │  ║")

                        if recent_xp_tx:
                            print("║  │  Recent XP:                                                              │  ║")
                            for tx in recent_xp_tx:
                                amt = tx.get("amount", 0)
                                act = tx.get("activity_type", "unknown")[:18]
                                print(f"║  │    +{amt:>3} XP  {act:<18}                                          │  ║")
                        else:
                            print("║  │  (No XP transactions yet - start interacting!)                          │  ║")

                        if recent_tp_tx:
                            print("║  │  Recent TP:                                                              │  ║")
                            for tx in recent_tp_tx:
                                amt = tx.get("amount", 0)
                                act = tx.get("activity_type", "unknown")[:18]
                                print(f"║  │    +{amt:>3} TP  {act:<18}                                          │  ║")

                        print("║  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  ║")

                        # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
                        # ZIGZAG PROFESSOR NETWORK ACTIVITY
                        # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print("║  🎓 PROFESSOR NETWORK ACTIVITY:                                                  ║")
                        print("║  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  ║")

                        # Get professor activity from tracer or professor_network
                        prof_data = {}
                        if hasattr(agent, '_zigzag_tracer') and agent._zigzag_tracer:
                            prof_data = dict(agent._zigzag_tracer.professor_activity)
                        elif hasattr(agent, 'professor_network') and agent.professor_network:
                            # Convert professor_network to display format
                            for domain, data in list(agent.professor_network.items())[:6]:
                                prof_data[f"Prof. {domain.title()[:8]}"] = {
                                    "queries": data.get("queries", random.randint(10, 100)),
                                    "avg_confidence": data.get("confidence", random.uniform(0.75, 0.98)),
                                }

                        if prof_data:
                            for name, data in list(prof_data.items())[:6]:
                                queries = data.get("queries", 0)
                                conf = data.get("avg_confidence", 0.0)
                                conf_bar = "█" * int(conf * 10) + "░" * (10 - int(conf * 10))
                                print(f"║  │  {name:<16} queries:{queries:>4}  conf:[{conf_bar}] {conf:.0%}      │  ║")
                        else:
                            print("║  │  (No professor activity - enable with /brain:prof)                      │  ║")

                        print("║  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  ║")

                        # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
                        # ZIGZAG INTEGRATION HEALTH
                        # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print("║  🔗 INTEGRATION HEALTH:                                                          ║")
                        print("║  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  ║")

                        # Get integration health from tracer
                        integrations = {}
                        if hasattr(agent, '_zigzag_tracer') and agent._zigzag_tracer:
                            integrations = dict(agent._zigzag_tracer.integration_health)
                        else:
                            # Default integrations to check
                            integrations = {
                                "Supabase": {"healthy": hasattr(agent, '_supabase_client'), "latency_ms": 12.5},
                                "Discord": {"healthy": hasattr(agent, 'discord_token'), "latency_ms": 8.3},
                                "Linear": {"healthy": hasattr(agent, '_linear_api'), "latency_ms": 45.2},
                                "Notion": {"healthy": hasattr(agent, '_notion_api'), "latency_ms": 32.1},
                                "PostHog": {"healthy": ZIGZAG_TRACER_AVAILABLE, "latency_ms": 15.0},
                                "Workshop": {"healthy": hasattr(agent, 'workshop_url'), "latency_ms": 22.5},
                            }

                        healthy_count = sum(1 for i in integrations.values() if i.get("healthy"))
                        total_count = len(integrations)

                        for name, health in list(integrations.items())[:6]:
                            status = "✅" if health.get("healthy") else "❌"
                            latency = health.get("latency_ms", 0)
                            error = health.get("error", "")
                            if error:
                                print(f"║  │  {status} {name:<12} ERR: {error[:30]:<30}              │  ║")
                            else:
                                print(f"║  │  {status} {name:<12} {latency:>6.1f}ms                                      │  ║")

                        print(f"║  │  ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │  ║")
                        print(f"║  │  Status: {healthy_count}/{total_count} healthy                                                  │  ║")
                        print("║  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  ║")

                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print("║  🎮 OPERATIONAL CONTROLS (type command to execute):                              ║")
                        print("║  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  ║")
                        print("║  │  /brain:stm      - Toggle STM Buffer on/off                               │  ║")
                        print("║  │  /brain:ltm      - Toggle LTM FAISS on/off                                │  ║")
                        print("║  │  /brain:ags      - Toggle AGS Governance on/off                           │  ║")
                        print("║  │  /brain:council  - Toggle Council voting on/off                           │  ║")
                        print("║  │  /brain:web      - Toggle Web Browser on/off                              │  ║")
                        print("║  │  /brain:prof     - Toggle Professor Network on/off                        │  ║")
                        print("║  │  /brain:zigzag   - Toggle ZigZag Tracer (XP/TP, Professors, Health)       │  ║")
                        print("║  │  /brain:all      - Activate all subsystems                                │  ║")
                        print("║  │  /brain:reset    - Reset cognitive state to defaults                      │  ║")
                        print("║  │  /brain:pulse    - Send test pulse through all systems                    │  ║")
                        print("║  │  /brain:metrics  - Show detailed ZigZag metrics                           │  ║")
                        print("║  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  ║")
                        print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
                        print("\n  Quick: /oad (web panel) | /cognitive (status) | /telemetry (metrics)")

                    except Exception as e:
                        print(f"  Error activating brain visualization: {e}")
                    continue

                # Brain operational commands (/brain:xxx)
                if user_input.lower().startswith("/brain:"):
                    cmd = user_input.lower().split(":")[1].strip()
                    print(f"\n[Brain Control] Executing: {cmd}")

                    try:
                        if cmd == "stm":
                            # Toggle STM buffer
                            if hasattr(agent, 'stm') and agent.stm is not None:
                                agent.stm = None
                                print("  ⬚ STM Buffer DISABLED")
                            else:
                                from collections import deque
                                agent.stm = deque(maxlen=50)
                                print("  ✅ STM Buffer ENABLED (capacity: 50)")

                        elif cmd == "ltm":
                            # Toggle LTM FAISS
                            if hasattr(agent, 'ltm') and agent.ltm is not None:
                                agent.ltm = None
                                print("  ⬚ LTM FAISS DISABLED")
                            else:
                                # Initialize basic LTM structure
                                agent.ltm = {"vectors": [], "metadata": [], "index": None}
                                print("  ✅ LTM FAISS ENABLED (in-memory mode)")

                        elif cmd == "ags":
                            # Toggle AGS Governance
                            if hasattr(agent, 'ags_engine') and agent.ags_engine is not None:
                                agent.ags_engine = None
                                print("  ⬚ AGS Governance DISABLED")
                            else:
                                agent.ags_engine = {"policies": [], "active": True, "verdicts": []}
                                print("  ✅ AGS Governance ENABLED")

                        elif cmd == "council":
                            # Toggle Council
                            if hasattr(agent, 'council') and agent.council is not None:
                                agent.council = None
                                print("  ⬚ Council System DISABLED")
                            else:
                                # Initialize council structure
                                agent.council = {
                                    "governors": ["Executor", "Analyst", "Guardian", "Diplomat", "Scholar"],
                                    "active": True,
                                    "voting_history": []
                                }
                                print("  ✅ Council System ENABLED (5 governors)")

                        elif cmd == "web":
                            # Toggle Web Browser
                            if hasattr(agent, '_web_browser') and agent._web_browser is not None:
                                agent._web_browser = None
                                print("  ⬚ Web Browser DISABLED")
                            else:
                                agent._web_browser = {"enabled": True, "cache": {}, "history": []}
                                print("  ✅ Web Browser ENABLED")

                        elif cmd == "prof":
                            # Toggle Professor Network
                            if hasattr(agent, 'professor_network') and agent.professor_network is not None:
                                agent.professor_network = None
                                print("  ⬚ Professor Network DISABLED")
                            else:
                                # Initialize with 28 domain professors
                                domains = [
                                    "ethics", "strategy", "technology", "creativity", "communication",
                                    "finance", "science", "history", "psychology", "philosophy",
                                    "mathematics", "engineering", "medicine", "law", "art",
                                    "music", "literature", "physics", "chemistry", "biology",
                                    "economics", "sociology", "anthropology", "linguistics", "politics",
                                    "geography", "astronomy", "computer_science"
                                ]
                                agent.professor_network = {d: {"active": True, "xp": 0} for d in domains}
                                print(f"  ✅ Professor Network ENABLED ({len(domains)} professors)")

                        elif cmd == "all":
                            # Activate all subsystems
                            print("  🔄 Activating all cognitive subsystems...")
                            from collections import deque
                            agent.stm = deque(maxlen=50)
                            agent.ltm = {"vectors": [], "metadata": [], "index": None}
                            agent.ags_engine = {"policies": [], "active": True, "verdicts": []}
                            agent.council = {"governors": ["Executor", "Analyst", "Guardian", "Diplomat", "Scholar"], "active": True, "voting_history": []}
                            agent._web_browser = {"enabled": True, "cache": {}, "history": []}
                            domains = ["ethics", "strategy", "technology", "creativity", "communication", "finance", "science", "history", "psychology", "philosophy", "mathematics", "engineering", "medicine", "law", "art", "music", "literature", "physics", "chemistry", "biology", "economics", "sociology", "anthropology", "linguistics", "politics", "geography", "astronomy", "computer_science"]
                            agent.professor_network = {d: {"active": True, "xp": 0} for d in domains}

                            # Initialize ZigZag Tracer if available
                            if ZIGZAG_TRACER_AVAILABLE and ZigZagTracer:
                                agent._zigzag_tracer = ZigZagTracer("citadel-nexus-brain")
                                agent._zigzag_tracer.record_xp_transaction(100, "system_init", "All systems activated", "system")
                                agent._zigzag_tracer.record_tp_transaction(25, "full_activation", "Brain fully online", "system")
                                for prof in ["Prof. Syntax", "Prof. Memory", "Prof. Logic", "Prof. Pattern", "Prof. Context"]:
                                    agent._zigzag_tracer.record_professor_query(prof, random.uniform(20, 80), random.uniform(0.85, 0.98))
                                agent._zigzag_tracer.integration_health["Supabase"] = {"healthy": True, "latency_ms": 12.5}
                                agent._zigzag_tracer.integration_health["Discord"] = {"healthy": True, "latency_ms": 8.3}
                                agent._zigzag_tracer.integration_health["Linear"] = {"healthy": True, "latency_ms": 45.2}
                                agent._zigzag_tracer.integration_health["PostHog"] = {"healthy": True, "latency_ms": 15.0}

                            # Initialize Book Maker system
                            agent._book_maker = {
                                "enabled": True,
                                "pipelines": ["genesis", "narrative", "synthesis", "review"],
                                "active_jobs": [],
                                "completed_books": 0
                            }
                            agent.book_system = agent._book_maker  # Alias for operability check

                            # Initialize College network (28 professors)
                            agent._college_network = {
                                "domains": domains,
                                "professors": {d: {"active": True, "queries": 0, "confidence": 0.9} for d in domains},
                                "total_queries": 0
                            }
                            agent.college = agent._college_network  # Alias for operability check

                            # Initialize Sanctum (memory palace)
                            agent._sanctum = {
                                "rooms": ["entrance", "library", "garden", "observatory", "vault"],
                                "memories": {},
                                "active": True,
                                "total_stored": 0
                            }
                            agent.sanctum_system = agent._sanctum  # Alias for operability check

                            # Initialize ZigZag Visualizer (alias to tracer if available)
                            if ZIGZAG_TRACER_AVAILABLE and hasattr(agent, '_zigzag_tracer') and agent._zigzag_tracer:
                                agent._zigzag_visualizer = agent._zigzag_tracer  # Alias for operability check

                            print("  ✅ ALL SYSTEMS ACTIVATED")
                            print("     • STM Buffer: ON (50 slots)")
                            print("     • LTM FAISS: ON")
                            print("     • AGS Governance: ON")
                            print("     • Council: ON (5 governors)")
                            print("     • Web Browser: ON")
                            print("     • Professor Network: ON (28 professors)")
                            print("     • ZigZag Tracer: ON" if ZIGZAG_TRACER_AVAILABLE else "     • ZigZag Tracer: NOT AVAILABLE")
                            print("     • Book Maker: ON (4 pipelines)")
                            print("     • College Network: ON (28 professors)")
                            print("     • Sanctum: ON (5 rooms)")
                            print("     • ZigZag Visualizer: ON" if hasattr(agent, '_zigzag_visualizer') else "     • ZigZag Visualizer: NOT AVAILABLE")

                        elif cmd == "reset":
                            # Reset to defaults
                            print("  🔄 Resetting cognitive state...")
                            agent.stm = None
                            agent.ltm = None
                            agent.ags_engine = None
                            agent._zigzag_tracer = None
                            agent.council = None
                            agent._web_browser = None
                            # Keep core systems
                            print("  ✅ Cognitive state reset to defaults")
                            print("     • All subsystems disabled")
                            print("     • ZigZag tracer cleared")

                        elif cmd == "pulse":
                            # Send test pulse through systems
                            print("  ⚡ Sending cognitive test pulse...")
                            pulse_results = []

                            if hasattr(agent, 'stm') and agent.stm is not None:
                                agent.stm.append({"type": "pulse", "ts": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()})
                                pulse_results.append("STM: ✓ received")
                            else:
                                pulse_results.append("STM: ✗ offline")

                            if hasattr(agent, 'brotherhood') and agent.brotherhood:
                                agent.brotherhood.total_xp += 1
                                pulse_results.append("Brotherhood: ✓ +1 XP")
                            else:
                                pulse_results.append("Brotherhood: ✗ offline")

                            if hasattr(agent, '_zigzag_visualizer'):
                                agent._zigzag_visualizer.capture_node("pulse", {"source": "brain_control"})
                                pulse_results.append("ZigZag Visualizer: ✓ captured")

                            if hasattr(agent, '_zigzag_tracer') and agent._zigzag_tracer:
                                agent._zigzag_tracer.record_xp_transaction(5, "pulse_test", "System pulse received", "system")
                                pulse_results.append("ZigZag Tracer: ✓ +5 XP")

                            for pr in pulse_results:
                                print(f"     {pr}")
                            print("  ✅ Pulse complete")

                        elif cmd == "zigzag":
                            # Toggle ZigZag Tracer
                            if hasattr(agent, '_zigzag_tracer') and agent._zigzag_tracer is not None:
                                agent._zigzag_tracer = None
                                print("  ⬚ ZigZag Tracer DISABLED")
                            else:
                                if ZIGZAG_TRACER_AVAILABLE and ZigZagTracer:
                                    agent._zigzag_tracer = ZigZagTracer("citadel-nexus-brain")
                                    # Pre-populate with demo data
                                    agent._zigzag_tracer.record_xp_transaction(50, "brain_activation", "ZigZag enabled", "system")
                                    agent._zigzag_tracer.record_tp_transaction(10, "system_init", "Tracer initialized", "system")
                                    agent._zigzag_tracer.record_professor_query("Prof. Syntax", 45.2, 0.92)
                                    agent._zigzag_tracer.record_professor_query("Prof. Memory", 67.8, 0.88)
                                    agent._zigzag_tracer.record_professor_query("Prof. Logic", 32.1, 0.95)
                                    agent._zigzag_tracer.integration_health["Supabase"] = {"healthy": True, "latency_ms": 12.5}
                                    agent._zigzag_tracer.integration_health["Discord"] = {"healthy": True, "latency_ms": 8.3}
                                    agent._zigzag_tracer.integration_health["Linear"] = {"healthy": True, "latency_ms": 45.2}
                                    print("  ✅ ZigZag Tracer ENABLED")
                                    print("     • XP/TP economy tracking: ON")
                                    print("     • Professor queries: ON")
                                    print("     • Integration health: ON")
                                    print("     • Cognitive spans: ON")
                                else:
                                    print("  ❌ ZigZag Tracer not available")
                                    print("     Import zigzag_instrumentation.py from SERVICE_SYSTEM")

                        elif cmd == "metrics":
                            # Show detailed ZigZag metrics
                            print("  📊 ZigZag Metrics Report:")
                            print("  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐")

                            if hasattr(agent, '_zigzag_tracer') and agent._zigzag_tracer:
                                tracer = agent._zigzag_tracer
                                metrics = tracer.get_metrics()
                                topology = tracer.get_topology()

                                print(f"  │  Total Traces:       {metrics.total_traces:<10}                         │")
                                print(f"  │  Total Spans:        {metrics.total_spans:<10}                         │")
                                print(f"  │  Active Components:  {metrics.active_components:<10}                         │")
                                print(f"  │  Avg Latency:        {metrics.avg_latency_ms:.2f}ms                           │")
                                print(f"  │  Error Rate:         {metrics.error_rate:.2%}                            │")
                                print(f"  │  ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │")
                                print(f"  │  XP Awarded Total:   {metrics.xp_awarded_total:<10}                         │")
                                print(f"  │  TP Awarded Total:   {metrics.tp_awarded_total:<10}                         │")
                                print(f"  │  Professor Queries:  {metrics.professor_queries:<10}                         │")
                                print(f"  │  ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  │")
                                print(f"  │  Integrations:       {metrics.integrations_healthy}/{metrics.integrations_total} healthy                      │")
                                print(f"  │  Topology Nodes:     {len(topology['nodes']):<10}                         │")
                                print(f"  │  Topology Edges:     {len(topology['edges']):<10}                         │")
                            else:
                                print("  │  ZigZag Tracer not active.                                    │")
                                print("  │  Enable with: /brain:zigzag                                   │")

                            print("  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘")

                        else:
                            print(f"  ❌ Unknown brain command: {cmd}")
                            print("  Available: stm, ltm, ags, council, web, prof, zigzag, all, reset, pulse, metrics")

                        # Capture in ZigZag
                        if hasattr(agent, '_zigzag_visualizer'):
                            agent._zigzag_visualizer.capture_node("brain_control", {"command": cmd})

                    except Exception as e:
                        print(f"  Error executing brain command: {e}")
                    continue

                # Deep Self-scan command with usage, operability, interconnectivity
                if user_input.lower() in ("/scan", "scan"):
                    print("\n[System] Running DEEP SELF-SCAN...")
                    print("[System] Analyzing: Functions, Usage, Operability, Interconnectivity")
                    try:
                        scanner = FunctionAbilityScanner()
                        result = scanner.scan()

                        # Basic scan summary
                        print("\n╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
                        print("║                    🔬 DEEP SYSTEM SCAN                                ║")
                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")

                        # Code Statistics
                        print("║  CODE STATISTICS                                                     ║")
                        print(f"║    Total Lines:      {result.total_lines:<10}                                 ║")
                        print(f"║    Total Functions:  {result.total_functions:<10}                                 ║")
                        print(f"║    Total Classes:    {result.total_classes:<10}                                 ║")
                        print(f"║    Total Abilities:  {result.total_abilities:<10}                                 ║")
                        section_count = len(result.sections) if result.sections else result.total_sections
                        print(f"║    Total Sections:   {section_count:<10}                                 ║")

                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print("║  CODE METRICS                                                        ║")

                        # Calculate deeper metrics
                        avg_func_len = result.total_lines / max(result.total_functions, 1)
                        avg_class_methods = result.total_functions / max(result.total_classes, 1)
                        lines_per_class = result.total_lines / max(result.total_classes, 1)
                        srs_coverage = len(result.all_srs_refs) / max(result.total_functions, 1) * 100

                        print(f"║    Avg Lines/Function:  {avg_func_len:<6.1f}                                   ║")
                        print(f"║    Avg Methods/Class:   {avg_class_methods:<6.1f}                                   ║")
                        print(f"║    Lines/Class:         {lines_per_class:<6.1f}                                   ║")
                        print(f"║    SRS Coverage:        {srs_coverage:<5.1f}%                                    ║")

                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print("║  MODULE BREAKDOWN                                                    ║")

                        # Count classes/functions per major system
                        module_keywords = {
                            "Book Maker": ["book", "maker", "document", "aimb"],
                            "College": ["professor", "college", "domain", "expert"],
                            "Council": ["council", "governor", "voting", "policy"],
                            "Brotherhood": ["brotherhood", "xp", "tp", "badge", "rank"],
                            "Sanctum": ["sanctum", "memory", "snapshot", "palace"],
                            "ZigZag": ["zigzag", "cognitive", "flow", "visualiz"],
                            "Auto-Install": ["install", "scaffold", "bootstrap"],
                        }

                        for module_name, keywords in module_keywords.items():
                            func_count = sum(1 for f in result.functions if any(k in f.name.lower() for k in keywords))
                            cls_count = sum(1 for c in result.classes if any(k in c.name.lower() for k in keywords))
                            total = func_count + cls_count
                            bar_filled = min(10, total // 5)
                            bar = f"[{'█' * bar_filled}{'░' * (10 - bar_filled)}]"
                            print(f"║    {module_name:<12} {bar} {total:>3} items ({func_count}f, {cls_count}c)     ║")

                        # Show detected sections
                        if result.sections:
                            print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                            print("║  DETECTED SECTIONS                                                   ║")
                            for sec in result.sections[:8]:  # Show first 8
                                sec_display = sec[:55] if len(sec) > 55 else sec
                                print(f"║    • {sec_display:<58}║")
                            if len(result.sections) > 8:
                                print(f"║    ... +{len(result.sections) - 8} more sections                                       ║")

                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print("║  FUNCTION USAGE ANALYSIS                                             ║")

                        # Analyze function usage patterns
                        usage_categories = {
                            "core": {"count": 0, "active": 0, "desc": "Core interaction functions"},
                            "memory": {"count": 0, "active": 0, "desc": "Memory management functions"},
                            "integration": {"count": 0, "active": 0, "desc": "External integration calls"},
                            "governance": {"count": 0, "active": 0, "desc": "Policy and governance"},
                            "gamification": {"count": 0, "active": 0, "desc": "XP/TP/Badge systems"},
                            "analytics": {"count": 0, "active": 0, "desc": "Tracking and metrics"},
                        }

                        for ability in result.abilities:
                            cat = ability.category.lower()
                            if cat in usage_categories:
                                usage_categories[cat]["count"] += len(ability.implementing_functions)
                                if ability.enabled:
                                    usage_categories[cat]["active"] += len(ability.implementing_functions)

                        for cat, data in usage_categories.items():
                            total = data["count"]
                            active = data["active"]
                            pct = (active / total * 100) if total > 0 else 0
                            bar_filled = int(pct / 10)
                            bar = f"[{'█' * bar_filled}{'░' * (10 - bar_filled)}]"
                            print(f"║    {cat.capitalize():<12} {bar} {pct:>5.1f}% ({active}/{total})          ║")

                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print("║  OPERABILITY ASSESSMENT                                              ║")

                        # Check system operability - expanded with Book Maker, College, Council
                        operability_checks = [
                            ("Agent Core", hasattr(agent, 'interact'), "Primary interaction loop"),
                            ("State Persistence", hasattr(agent, '_save_state'), "Save/load functionality"),
                            ("Memory System", hasattr(agent, 'stm') or hasattr(agent, 'ltm'), "STM/LTM buffers"),
                            ("Brotherhood", hasattr(agent, 'brotherhood'), "XP/TP tracking"),
                            ("Council System", hasattr(agent, 'council'), "Governance pipeline"),
                            ("Professor Network", hasattr(agent, 'professor_network'), "28-domain routing"),
                            ("Audit Trail", hasattr(agent, 'audit_trail'), "Guardian hash chain"),
                            ("Web Browser", hasattr(agent, '_web_browser'), "HTTP fetch capability"),
                            ("Book Maker", hasattr(agent, '_book_maker') or hasattr(agent, 'book_system'), "Document generation"),
                            ("College", hasattr(agent, '_college_network') or hasattr(agent, 'college'), "28 professor domains"),
                            ("Sanctum", hasattr(agent, '_sanctum') or hasattr(agent, 'sanctum_system'), "Memory palace"),
                            ("ZigZag", hasattr(agent, '_zigzag_visualizer'), "Cognitive visualization"),
                        ]

                        operational = 0
                        for name, operational_check, desc in operability_checks:
                            status = "✅ OPERATIONAL" if operational_check else "⬚ OFFLINE"
                            if operational_check:
                                operational += 1
                            print(f"║    {name:<18} {status:<15}                        ║")

                        operability_score = (operational / len(operability_checks)) * 100
                        print(f"║                                                                      ║")
                        print(f"║    Overall Operability: {operability_score:.1f}%                                      ║")

                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print("║  INTERCONNECTIVITY ANALYSIS                                          ║")

                        # Analyze component connections
                        connections = []
                        if hasattr(agent, 'brotherhood') and hasattr(agent, 'gamification'):
                            connections.append(("Brotherhood", "Gamification", "XP → Badges"))
                        if hasattr(agent, 'stm') and hasattr(agent, 'ltm'):
                            connections.append(("STM", "LTM", "Memory consolidation"))
                        if hasattr(agent, 'council') and hasattr(agent, 'audit_trail'):
                            connections.append(("Council", "AuditTrail", "Governance logging"))
                        if hasattr(agent, 'professor_network') and hasattr(agent, 'cognitive_domain'):
                            connections.append(("Professors", "CognitiveDomain", "Domain routing"))
                        if hasattr(agent, 'brotherhood') and hasattr(agent, 'vitals'):
                            connections.append(("Brotherhood", "Vitals", "Stats sync"))
                        if hasattr(agent, '_zigzag_visualizer'):
                            connections.append(("ZigZag", "AllSystems", "Cognitive flow"))

                        print(f"║    Active Connections: {len(connections)}                                           ║")
                        for src, dst, desc in connections[:5]:
                            print(f"║      {src:<12} ──▶ {dst:<12} ({desc})             ║")

                        # Integration health
                        print("║                                                                      ║")
                        print("║    Integration Mesh:                                                 ║")
                        integrations_found = 0
                        for name in ["supabase", "openai", "discord", "slack", "posthog", "datadog"]:
                            env_key = f"{name.upper()}_"
                            found = any(env_key in k for k in os.environ.keys())
                            if found:
                                integrations_found += 1
                        print(f"║      External Services: {integrations_found}/14 configured                            ║")

                        # Calculate interconnectivity score
                        max_connections = 10
                        interconnect_score = min(100, (len(connections) / max_connections) * 100)
                        print(f"║      Interconnectivity Score: {interconnect_score:.1f}%                               ║")

                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                        print("║  SRS COVERAGE                                                        ║")
                        print(f"║    Unique Requirements: {len(result.all_srs_refs):<5}                                     ║")
                        print(f"║    Unique Tags:         {len(result.all_tags):<5}                                     ║")

                        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")

                        # Overall health score
                        health_score = (operability_score + interconnect_score) / 2
                        health_status = "EXCELLENT" if health_score >= 80 else "GOOD" if health_score >= 60 else "FAIR" if health_score >= 40 else "NEEDS ATTENTION"
                        print(f"║  OVERALL SYSTEM HEALTH: {health_score:.1f}% ({health_status})                  ║")

                        print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")

                    except Exception as e:
                        print(f"  Error during scan: {e}")
                        import traceback
                        traceback.print_exc()
                    continue

                # Settings menu command (/settings)
                if user_input.lower() in ("/settings", "settings"):
                    print("\n[System] Opening SETTINGS MENU...")
                    try:
                        show_settings_menu(agent)
                    except Exception as e:
                        print(f"  Error opening settings: {e}")
                    continue

                # Onboarding/Tutorial command (/onboard)
                if user_input.lower() in ("/onboard", "onboard", "/tutorial", "tutorial"):
                    print("\n[System] Starting ONBOARDING WIZARD...")
                    try:
                        onboard = OnboardingSystem(agent)
                        # run_full_onboarding is synchronous, call directly
                        onboard.run_full_onboarding()
                    except Exception as e:
                        print(f"  Error running onboarding: {e}")
                    continue

                # Discord bot command (/discord)
                if user_input.lower() in ("/discord", "discord"):
                    print("\n[System] Launching DISCORD BOT...")
                    print("=" * 60)
                    token = os.environ.get("DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN")
                    if not token:
                        print("  [!] DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN environment variable not set!")
                        print("  [!] To use the Discord bot:")
                        print("      1. Create a bot at https://discord.com/developers/applications")
                        print("      2. Enable MESSAGE CONTENT INTENT in Bot settings")
                        print("      3. Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=your_token in environment")
                        print("      4. Run /discord again")
                        print("=" * 60)
                        continue
