    actual_port = _find_available_port(port, "master_panel")
    if actual_port != port:
        print(f"[MasterPanel] Port {port} busy, using port {actual_port}")

    try:
        server = MasterPanelServer(agent, actual_port)
        server.launch(auto_open)
    finally:
        # Release port on exit
        _release_panel_port("master_panel")


def launch_memory_zigzag_panel(
    agent: "NexusTamagotchiAgentPro",
    port: int = 8768,  # Default to different port than master panel
    auto_open: bool = True,
) -> None:
    """
    Launch the Memory & ZigZag visualization panel.

    # BEGIN META: launch_memory_zigzag_panel
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Launch memory browser and ZigZag visualization
    # SRS: ["SRS-MEMORY-001", "SRS-ZIGZAG-001"]
    # Tags: ["launch", "memory", "zigzag", "panel"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META

    Args:
        agent: The NexusTamagotchiAgentPro instance
        port: HTTP server port (default 8768 to avoid conflict with master panel)
        auto_open: Whether to auto-open browser
    """
    # Find available port using port management system
    actual_port = _find_available_port(port, "memory_zigzag_panel")
    if actual_port != port:
        print(f"[MemoryPanel] Port {port} busy, using port {actual_port}")

    try:
        server = MemoryZigZagPanelServer(agent, actual_port)
        server.launch(auto_open)
    finally:
        # Release port on exit
        _release_panel_port("memory_zigzag_panel")

@dataclass
class OnboardingState:
    """
    Track onboarding progress for a user.

    # BEGIN META: OnboardingState
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Track onboarding progress and collected settings
    # SRS: ["SRS-ONBOARD-001"]
    # Tags: ["onboarding", "state", "dataclass"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """
    completed: bool = False
    welcome_shown: bool = False
    api_keys_configured: bool = False
    settings_configured: bool = False
    first_interaction_done: bool = False
    onboarded_at: Optional[str] = None
    skipped: bool = False
    # New fields for archetype/class system
    archetype_selected: bool = False
    skill_focus_selected: bool = False
    persona_path_selected: bool = False
    archetype: str = ""  # "engineer", "mage", "paladin", "rogue", "cleric"
    skill_focuses: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)  # Selected skill areas
    persona_path: str = ""  # "client", "developer", "tenet"
    # New fields for enhanced onboarding (Discord, Book Maker, Services)
    discord_configured: bool = False
    book_maker_configured: bool = False
    communication_services_configured: bool = False
    character_backstory: str = ""  # Book Maker generated backstory

class AgentArchetype(Enum):
    """
    Agent archetypes for personalized progression.

    Based on RPG class system with modern AI twist.
    Each archetype has unique strengths, focus areas, and XP multipliers.

    # BEGIN META: AgentArchetype
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Define agent archetypes for personalized experience
    # SRS: ["SRS-ONBOARD-001", "SRS-GAMIFY-001"]
    # Tags: ["archetype", "class", "rpg"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """
    ENGINEER = "engineer"
    MAGE = "mage"
    PALADIN = "paladin"
    ROGUE = "rogue"
    CLERIC = "cleric"
    SCHOLAR = "scholar"

    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META

    description: str

    url: str = ""
    category: str = "integration"

@dataclass
class AgentSettings:
    """
    User-configurable agent settings.

    # BEGIN META: AgentSettings
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Store user preferences and settings
    # SRS: ["SRS-ONBOARD-001", "SRS-SETTINGS-001"]
    # Tags: ["settings", "preferences", "config"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """
    # Response settings
    response_length: str = "balanced"  # concise, balanced, detailed, elongated, maximum
    personality_mode: str = "helpful"  # helpful, playful, professional, mentor

    # Feature toggles
    enable_xp_tracking: bool = True
    enable_sound_effects: bool = False
    enable_auto_save: bool = True
    enable_analytics: bool = True

    # Display settings
    show_xp_notifications: bool = True
    show_rank_progress: bool = True
    show_tips: bool = True
    compact_mode: bool = False

    # Advanced
    enable_web_search: bool = True
    enable_memory_system: bool = True
    enable_professor_network: bool = True

    # Analytics

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SECTION 112.3: ONBOARDING SYSTEM CLASS
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class OnboardingSystem:
    """
    Interactive onboarding system for new Aurora users.

    Guides users through:
    1. Welcome and capabilities explanation
    2. API key collection and validation
    3. Settings configuration
    4. First interaction tutorial

    # BEGIN META: OnboardingSystem
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Guide new users through Aurora setup
    # SRS: ["SRS-ONBOARD-001", "SRS-SETTINGS-001"]
    # Tags: ["onboarding", "setup", "interactive"]
    # Categories: ["Onboarding", "Setup"]
    # KnowledgeSectors: ["User Experience", "Configuration"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """

    CONFIG_DIR = Path.home() / ".nexus_agent_data"
    CONFIG_FILE = CONFIG_DIR / "onboarding_config.json"
    ENV_FILE = CONFIG_DIR / ".env.aurora"

    def __init__(self, agent: Optional["NexusTamagotchiAgentPro"] = None):
        """Initialize onboarding system with optional agent reference."""
        self.agent = agent
        self.state = OnboardingState()
        self.settings = AgentSettings()
        self._load_state()

    def _load_state(self) -> None:
        """Load onboarding state from disk."""
        try:
            if self.CONFIG_FILE.exists():
                with open(self.CONFIG_FILE, "r") as f:
                    data = json.load(f)
                    self.state = OnboardingState(**data.get("state", {}))
                    settings_data = data.get("settings", {})
                    self.settings = AgentSettings(**settings_data)
        except Exception as e:
            logger.warning(f"[Onboarding] Failed to load state: {e}")

    def _save_state(self) -> None:
        """Save onboarding state to disk."""
        try:
            self.CONFIG_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self.CONFIG_FILE, "w") as f:
                json.dump({
                    "state": {
                        "completed": self.state.completed,
                        "welcome_shown": self.state.welcome_shown,
                        "api_keys_configured": self.state.api_keys_configured,
                        "settings_configured": self.state.settings_configured,
                        "first_interaction_done": self.state.first_interaction_done,
                        "onboarded_at": self.state.onboarded_at,
                        "skipped": self.state.skipped,
                    },
                    "settings": {
                        "response_length": self.settings.response_length,
                        "personality_mode": self.settings.personality_mode,
                        "enable_xp_tracking": self.settings.enable_xp_tracking,
                        "enable_sound_effects": self.settings.enable_sound_effects,
                        "enable_auto_save": self.settings.enable_auto_save,
                        "enable_analytics": self.settings.enable_analytics,
                        "show_xp_notifications": self.settings.show_xp_notifications,
                        "show_rank_progress": self.settings.show_rank_progress,
                        "show_tips": self.settings.show_tips,
                        "compact_mode": self.settings.compact_mode,
                        "enable_web_search": self.settings.enable_web_search,
                        "enable_memory_system": self.settings.enable_memory_system,
                        "enable_professor_network": self.settings.enable_professor_network,
                    }
                }, f, indent=2)
        except Exception as e:
            logger.warning(f"[Onboarding] Failed to save state: {e}")

    def _save_api_key(self, env_var: str, value: str) -> None:
        """Save API key to environment file."""
        try:
            self.CONFIG_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

            # Read existing env file
            env_data = {}
            if self.ENV_FILE.exists():
                with open(self.ENV_FILE, "r") as f:
                    for line in f:
                        line = line.strip()
                        if "=" in line and not line.startswith("#"):
                            key, val = line.split("=", 1)
                            env_data[key] = val

            # Update with new key
            env_data[env_var] = value

            # Write back
            with open(self.ENV_FILE, "w") as f:
                f.write("# Aurora API Keys - Auto-generated by onboarding\n")
                f.write(f"# Created: {datetime.now().isoformat()}\n\n")
                for key, val in env_data.items():
                    f.write(f"{key}={val}\n")

            # Also set in current environment
            os.environ[env_var] = value

        except Exception as e:
            logger.warning(f"[Onboarding] Failed to save API key: {e}")

    def is_onboarding_needed(self) -> bool:
        """Check if onboarding should be shown."""
        return not self.state.completed and not self.state.skipped

    def run_welcome(self) -> None:
        """
        Display welcome message and capabilities overview.

        # BEGIN META: OnboardingSystem.run_welcome
        # Date: 2026-01-15
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Show welcome message and explain Aurora capabilities
        # SRS: ["SRS-ONBOARD-001"]
        # Tags: ["onboarding", "welcome", "explanation"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META
        """
        print("\n")
        print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║     🏰 WELCOME TO AURORA - CITADEL NEXUS AI COMPANION 🏰            ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  Aurora is your intelligent AI companion with gamified progression, ║")
        print("║  deep memory systems, and extensive integration capabilities.        ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  🎮 WHAT YOU CAN DO WITH AURORA:                                    ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  💬 CONVERSATIONS                                                    ║")
        print("║     • Natural language chat with context awareness                   ║")
        print("║     • Memory that persists across sessions                           ║")
        print("║     • Multiple personality modes (helpful, playful, mentor)          ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  🧠 COGNITIVE SYSTEMS                                                ║")
        print("║     • Short-term memory (STM) for current session                   ║")
        print("║     • Long-term memory (LTM) with semantic search                   ║")
        print("║     • ZigZag visualization of thought processes                     ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  ⚔️ GAMIFICATION                                                     ║")
        print("║     • Earn XP and TP through interactions                           ║")
        print("║     • Progress through 8 ranks (Initiate → Grandmaster)             ║")
        print("║     • Unlock 200+ badges and achievements                           ║")
        print("║     • Complete daily quests and missions                            ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  🎓 28-PROFESSOR NETWORK                                            ║")
        print("║     • Domain experts for specialized knowledge                      ║")
        print("║     • Technology, Science, Arts, Business, and more                 ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  🔗 INTEGRATIONS                                                     ║")
        print("║     • Discord & Slack notifications                                 ║")
        print("║     • GitHub/GitLab repository awareness                            ║")
        print("║     • Linear/Notion project sync                                    ║")
        print("║     • Analytics with PostHog & Datadog                              ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  🌐 WEB CAPABILITIES                                                 ║")
        print("║     • Live web search and browsing                                  ║")
        print("║     • Wikipedia and documentation lookups                           ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  📊 VISUALIZATION & DASHBOARDS                                       ║")
        print("║     • /ui    - Master Panel (chat + RPG card + skills)              ║")
        print("║     • /oad   - Memory & ZigZag visualization                        ║")
        print("║     • /brain - Live cognitive flow map                              ║")
        print("║     • /scan  - Deep system health analysis                          ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
        print("")

        self.state.welcome_shown = True
        self._save_state()

    def run_api_key_setup(self) -> None:
        """
        Interactive API key collection.

        # BEGIN META: OnboardingSystem.run_api_key_setup
        # Date: 2026-01-15
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Collect and store API keys from user
        # SRS: ["SRS-ONBOARD-001"]
        # Tags: ["onboarding", "api", "keys", "setup"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META
        """
        print("\n")
        print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
        print("║               🔑 API KEY CONFIGURATION                               ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  Aurora can connect to various services to enhance your experience. ║")
        print("║  API keys are stored locally in ~/.nexus_agent_data/.env.aurora     ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  You can skip this step and configure keys later with /settings     ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
        print("")

        # Group keys by category
        categories = {}
        for key_config in AVAILABLE_API_KEYS:
            cat = key_config.category
            if cat not in categories:
                categories[cat] = []
            categories[cat].append(key_config)

        category_names = {
            "ai": "🧠 AI Providers",
            "database": "🗄️ Database & Auth",
            "communication": "💬 Communication",
            "analytics": "📊 Analytics",
            "project": "📋 Project Management",
            "payments": "💳 Payments",
            "support": "💬 Support",
            "vcs": "🐙 Version Control",
        }

        try:
            # Ask which categories to configure
            print("Which integrations would you like to set up?")
            print("-" * 60)
            print("  [1] 🧠 AI Providers (OpenAI, Anthropic) - RECOMMENDED")
            print("  [2] 🗄️ Database (Supabase)")
            print("  [3] 💬 Communication (Discord, Slack)")
            print("  [4] 📊 Analytics (PostHog, Datadog)")
            print("  [5] 📋 Project Management (Linear, Notion)")
            print("  [6] 🐙 Version Control (GitHub, GitLab)")
            print("  [A] Configure ALL")
            print("  [S] Skip for now")
            print("-" * 60)

            choice = input("\nEnter choices (e.g., '1,3' or 'A' for all): ").strip().upper()

            if choice == 'S':
                print("\n  Skipping API configuration. Use /settings to configure later.")
                self.state.api_keys_configured = True
                self._save_state()
                return

            # Determine which categories to configure
            selected_categories = []
            if choice == 'A':
                selected_categories = list(categories.keys())
            else:
                choice_map = {
                    '1': 'ai', '2': 'database', '3': 'communication',
                    '4': 'analytics', '5': 'project', '6': 'vcs'
                }
                for c in choice.replace(' ', '').split(','):
                    if c in choice_map:
                        selected_categories.append(choice_map[c])

            if not selected_categories:
                selected_categories = ['ai']  # Default to AI if no valid selection

            # Configure selected categories
            configured_count = 0
            for cat in selected_categories:
                if cat not in categories:
                    continue

                cat_name = category_names.get(cat, cat.title())
                print(f"\n\n  {cat_name}")
                print("  " + "=" * 50)

                for key_config in categories[cat]:
                    # Check if already configured
                    existing = os.environ.get(key_config.env_var, "")
                    if existing:
                        masked = existing[:4] + "..." + existing[-4:] if len(existing) > 8 else "***"
                        print(f"\n  {key_config.icon} {key_config.name}")
                        print(f"     Current: {masked}")
                        update = input("     Update? [y/N]: ").strip().lower()
                        if update != 'y':
                            continue

                    print(f"\n  {key_config.icon} {key_config.name}")
                    print(f"     {key_config.description}")
                    if key_config.url:
                        print(f"     Get key at: {key_config.url}")

                    required_mark = " (REQUIRED)" if key_config.required else ""
                    value = input(f"     Enter {key_config.name} key{required_mark}: ").strip()

                    if value:
                        self._save_api_key(key_config.env_var, value)
                        print(f"     ✅ {key_config.name} configured!")
                        configured_count += 1
                    elif key_config.required:
                        print(f"     ⚠️ {key_config.name} is required for full functionality")
                    else:
                        print(f"     ⏭️ Skipped")

            print(f"\n\n  ✅ Configured {configured_count} API key(s)")
            print(f"  📁 Keys saved to: {self.ENV_FILE}")

            self.state.api_keys_configured = True
            self._save_state()

        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            print("\n\n  API configuration cancelled.")
            self.state.api_keys_configured = True
            self._save_state()

    def run_settings_setup(self) -> None:
        """
        Interactive settings configuration.

        # BEGIN META: OnboardingSystem.run_settings_setup
        # Date: 2026-01-15
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Configure user preferences and settings
        # SRS: ["SRS-ONBOARD-001", "SRS-SETTINGS-001"]
        # Tags: ["onboarding", "settings", "preferences"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META
        """
        print("\n")
        print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
        print("║               ⚙️ SETTINGS CONFIGURATION                              ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("║  Let's customize Aurora to your preferences.                         ║")
        print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
        print("")

        try:
            # Response Length
            print("\n  📝 RESPONSE LENGTH")
            print("  How detailed should Aurora's responses be?")
            print("    [1] Concise    - Short, to-the-point (~150 tokens)")
            print("    [2] Balanced   - Standard responses (~500 tokens) [DEFAULT]")
            print("    [3] Detailed   - Thorough explanations (~1500 tokens)")
            print("    [4] Elongated  - Extended discussions (~4000 tokens)")
            print("    [5] Maximum    - Most comprehensive (~8000 tokens)")

            resp_choice = input("  Select [1-5] or press Enter for default: ").strip()
            resp_map = {'1': 'concise', '2': 'balanced', '3': 'detailed', '4': 'elongated', '5': 'maximum'}
            self.settings.response_length = resp_map.get(resp_choice, 'balanced')
            print(f"  → Set to: {self.settings.response_length}")

            # Personality Mode
            print("\n  🎭 PERSONALITY MODE")
            print("  How should Aurora communicate?")
            print("    [1] Helpful     - Friendly and supportive [DEFAULT]")
            print("    [2] Playful     - Fun and casual")
            print("    [3] Professional- Formal and business-like")
            print("    [4] Mentor      - Educational and guiding")

            pers_choice = input("  Select [1-4] or press Enter for default: ").strip()
            pers_map = {'1': 'helpful', '2': 'playful', '3': 'professional', '4': 'mentor'}
            self.settings.personality_mode = pers_map.get(pers_choice, 'helpful')
            print(f"  → Set to: {self.settings.personality_mode}")

            # Feature Toggles
            print("\n  🎮 GAMIFICATION")
            xp_choice = input("  Enable XP/rank tracking? [Y/n]: ").strip().lower()
            self.settings.enable_xp_tracking = xp_choice != 'n'
            print(f"  → XP Tracking: {'Enabled' if self.settings.enable_xp_tracking else 'Disabled'}")

            # Memory System
            print("\n  🧠 MEMORY SYSTEM")
            mem_choice = input("  Enable persistent memory (STM/LTM)? [Y/n]: ").strip().lower()
            self.settings.enable_memory_system = mem_choice != 'n'
            print(f"  → Memory System: {'Enabled' if self.settings.enable_memory_system else 'Disabled'}")

            # Web Search
            print("\n  🌐 WEB CAPABILITIES")
            web_choice = input("  Enable web search? [Y/n]: ").strip().lower()
            self.settings.enable_web_search = web_choice != 'n'
            print(f"  → Web Search: {'Enabled' if self.settings.enable_web_search else 'Disabled'}")

            # Analytics
            print("\n  📊 ANALYTICS")
            ana_choice = input("  Enable usage analytics (helps improve Aurora)? [Y/n]: ").strip().lower()
            self.settings.enable_analytics = ana_choice != 'n'
            print(f"  → Analytics: {'Enabled' if self.settings.enable_analytics else 'Disabled'}")

            # Display Settings
            print("\n  📺 DISPLAY SETTINGS")
            tips_choice = input("  Show helpful tips? [Y/n]: ").strip().lower()
            self.settings.show_tips = tips_choice != 'n'

            compact_choice = input("  Use compact mode (less visual elements)? [y/N]: ").strip().lower()
            self.settings.compact_mode = compact_choice == 'y'

            print("\n  ✅ Settings configured!")
            print("  You can change these anytime with /settings")

            self.state.settings_configured = True
            self._save_state()

        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            print("\n\n  Settings configuration cancelled. Using defaults.")
            self.state.settings_configured = True
            self._save_state()

    def run_quick_tutorial(self) -> None:
        """
        Quick tutorial on first commands.

        # BEGIN META: OnboardingSystem.run_quick_tutorial
        # Date: 2026-01-15
        # Maintainer: CNWB

        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  EARN XP BY:                                                         ║")
        print("║    • Having conversations (+10-25 XP)                               ║")
        print("║    • Asking complex questions (+bonus XP)                           ║")
        print("║    • Completing daily quests (+50-100 XP)                           ║")
        print("║    • Discovering new features (+achievements)                       ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
        print("")

        self.state.first_interaction_done = True

    def run_archetype_selection(self) -> None:
        """
        Interactive archetype/class selection.

        # BEGIN META: OnboardingSystem.run_archetype_selection
        # Date: 2026-01-15
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Let user choose their agent archetype
        # SRS: ["SRS-ONBOARD-001", "SRS-GAMIFY-001"]
        # Tags: ["onboarding", "archetype", "class", "selection"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META
        """
        print("\n")
        print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
        print("║           ⚔️ CHOOSE YOUR ARCHETYPE ⚔️                                ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  Your archetype shapes your journey with Aurora:                     ║")
        print("║  • Determines your XP bonuses for different activities               ║")
        print("║  • Unlocks a unique special ability                                  ║")
        print("║  • Grants +100 starting XP bonus                                     ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("")

        # Display archetypes
        archetype_ids = list(ARCHETYPE_DEFINITIONS.keys())
        for i, arch_id in enumerate(archetype_ids, 1):
            arch = ARCHETYPE_DEFINITIONS[arch_id]
            print(f"  [{i}] {arch.icon} {arch.name}")
            print(f"      \"{arch.motto}\"")
            print(f"      {arch.description[:60]}...")
            print(f"      Primary: {', '.join(arch.primary_stats)}")
            print(f"      Special: {arch.special_ability[:50]}...")
            print("")

        print("  " + "─" * 66)

        try:
            choice = input("\n  Select your archetype [1-6]: ").strip()

            if choice.isdigit() and 1 <= int(choice) <= len(archetype_ids):
                selected_id = archetype_ids[int(choice) - 1]
                selected = ARCHETYPE_DEFINITIONS[selected_id]

                self.state.archetype = selected_id
                self.state.archetype_selected = True
                self._save_state()

                print("\n")
                print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
                print(f"║  {selected.icon} You have chosen: {selected.name:<42} ║")
                print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                print(f"║  Motto: \"{selected.motto}\"")
                print(f"║  Special Ability: {selected.special_ability}")
                print(f"║  +{selected.starting_xp_bonus} Starting XP Bonus!")
                print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
            else:
                # Default to Scholar if invalid selection
                self.state.archetype = "scholar"
                self.state.archetype_selected = True
                self._save_state()
                print("\n  → Defaulting to Scholar archetype")

        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            self.state.archetype = "scholar"
            self.state.archetype_selected = True
            self._save_state()
            print("\n  Selection cancelled. Defaulting to Scholar archetype.")

    def run_skill_focus_selection(self) -> None:
        """
        Interactive skill focus area selection.

        # BEGIN META: OnboardingSystem.run_skill_focus_selection
        # Date: 2026-01-15
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Let user choose skill focus areas
        # SRS: ["SRS-ONBOARD-001"]
        # Tags: ["onboarding", "skill", "focus", "selection"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META
        """
        print("\n")
        print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
        print("║           🎯 SELECT YOUR SKILL FOCUSES 🎯                            ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  Choose up to 3 skill areas to focus on:                            ║")
        print("║  • Prioritizes professors in those domains                          ║")
        print("║  • Tailors quests and missions to your interests                    ║")
        print("║  • Shapes your learning journey                                     ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("")

        # Display skill focus areas
        focus_ids = list(SKILL_FOCUS_AREAS.keys())
        for i, focus_id in enumerate(focus_ids, 1):
            focus = SKILL_FOCUS_AREAS[focus_id]
            print(f"  [{i}] {focus.icon} {focus.name}")
            print(f"      {focus.description}")
            profs = ", ".join(focus.related_professors[:2])
            print(f"      Professors: {profs}...")
            print("")

        print("  " + "─" * 66)

        try:
            choice = input("\n  Select up to 3 focuses (e.g., '1,3,5' or '1' or 'all'): ").strip()

            selected_focuses = []

            if choice.lower() == 'all':
                selected_focuses = focus_ids
            else:
                for c in choice.replace(' ', '').split(','):
                    if c.isdigit() and 1 <= int(c) <= len(focus_ids):
                        focus_id = focus_ids[int(c) - 1]
                        if focus_id not in selected_focuses:
                            selected_focuses.append(focus_id)

            # Limit to 3
            selected_focuses = selected_focuses[:3]

            if not selected_focuses:
                # Default selections based on archetype
                if self.state.archetype in ["engineer", "rogue"]:
                    selected_focuses = ["technology"]
                elif self.state.archetype in ["mage", "scholar"]:
                    selected_focuses = ["data_ai", "technology"]
                elif self.state.archetype == "paladin":
                    selected_focuses = ["security"]
                else:
                    selected_focuses = ["technology"]

            self.state.skill_focuses = selected_focuses
            self.state.skill_focus_selected = True
            self._save_state()

            print("\n  ✅ Selected skill focuses:")
            for focus_id in selected_focuses:
                focus = SKILL_FOCUS_AREAS[focus_id]
                print(f"     {focus.icon} {focus.name}")

        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            self.state.skill_focuses = ["technology"]
            self.state.skill_focus_selected = True
            self._save_state()
            print("\n  Selection cancelled. Defaulting to Technology focus.")

    def run_persona_path_selection(self) -> None:
        """
        Interactive persona path selection.

        # BEGIN META: OnboardingSystem.run_persona_path_selection
        # Date: 2026-01-15
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Let user choose their persona path
        # SRS: ["SRS-ONBOARD-001"]
        # Tags: ["onboarding", "persona", "path", "selection"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META
        """
        print("\n")
        print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
        print("║           🛤️ CHOOSE YOUR PATH 🛤️                                     ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  Your path determines your onboarding experience and focus:         ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("")

        # Display persona paths
        path_ids = list(PERSONA_PATH_DEFINITIONS.keys())
        for i, path_id in enumerate(path_ids, 1):
            path_def = PERSONA_PATH_DEFINITIONS[path_id]
            print(f"  [{i}] {path_def.icon} {path_def.name}")
            print(f"      {path_def.description}")
            print(f"      Best for: {path_def.recommended_for}")
            features = ", ".join(path_def.unlocked_features[:3])
            print(f"      Features: {features}...")
            print("")

        print("  " + "─" * 66)

        try:
            choice = input("\n  Select your path [1-3]: ").strip()

            if choice.isdigit() and 1 <= int(choice) <= len(path_ids):
                selected_id = path_ids[int(choice) - 1]
                selected = PERSONA_PATH_DEFINITIONS[selected_id]

                self.state.persona_path = selected_id
                self.state.persona_path_selected = True
                self._save_state()

                print("\n")
                print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
                print(f"║  {selected.icon} You have chosen: {selected.name:<42} ║")
                print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                print("║  Starting Quests:")
                for quest in selected.starting_quests:
                    print(f"║    • {quest}")
                print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
            else:
                self.state.persona_path = "client"
                self.state.persona_path_selected = True
                self._save_state()
                print("\n  → Defaulting to Client path")

        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            self.state.persona_path = "client"
            self.state.persona_path_selected = True
            self._save_state()
            print("\n  Selection cancelled. Defaulting to Client path.")

    def run_discord_setup(self) -> None:
        """
        Interactive Discord bot setup and connection test.

        # BEGIN META: OnboardingSystem.run_discord_setup
        # Date: 2026-01-15
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Guide user through Discord bot setup and testing
        # SRS: ["SRS-ONBOARD-001", "SRS-DISCORD-001"]
        # Tags: ["onboarding", "discord", "bot", "setup"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META
        """
        print("\n")
        print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("║                           🤖 DISCORD BOT SETUP                                               ║")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("║  Connect Aurora to your Discord server for:                                                  ║")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("║    💬 CHAT ANYWHERE                        🎮 GAMIFICATION                                   ║")
        print("║    ├─ Interact with Aurora in Discord      ├─ Track XP across Discord & CLI                  ║")
        print("║    ├─ Same memory across platforms         ├─ Show rank badges in server                     ║")
        print("║    └─ Multi-channel support                └─ Leaderboards and competitions                  ║")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("║    🧠 LEARNING                              📢 NOTIFICATIONS                                  ║")
        print("║    ├─ Teach Aurora in Discord              ├─ Achievement announcements                      ║")
        print("║    ├─ Context-aware responses              ├─ Mission updates                                ║")
        print("║    └─ Cross-platform memory                └─ Daily quest reminders                          ║")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("║  SETUP GUIDE:                                                                                ║")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("║    1. Go to: https://discord.com/developers/applications                                     ║")
        print("║    2. Create a New Application                                                               ║")
        print("║    3. Go to 'Bot' tab and create a bot                                                       ║")
        print("║    4. Enable 'MESSAGE CONTENT INTENT' in Bot settings                                        ║")
        print("║    5. Copy the bot token                                                                     ║")
        print("║    6. Use the OAuth2 URL Generator to invite bot to your server                              ║")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
        print("")

        try:
            choice = input("  Set up Discord now? [y/N/skip]: ").strip().lower()

            if choice == 'skip' or choice == 'n' or choice == '':
                print("\n  ⏭️ Skipping Discord setup. Use /discord later to configure.")
                return

            # Check if token already exists
            existing_token = os.environ.get("DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN", "")
            if existing_token:
                masked = existing_token[:6] + "..." + existing_token[-4:] if len(existing_token) > 10 else "***"
                print(f"\n  Found existing Discord token: {masked}")
                update = input("  Update token? [y/N]: ").strip().lower()
                if update != 'y':
                    # Test existing connection
                    print("\n  Testing Discord connection...")
                    try:
                        import discord
                        print(f"  ✅ discord.py v{discord.__version__} installed")
                        print("  ✅ Token configured - ready to use /discord")
                        self.state.discord_configured = True
                        self._save_state()
                    except ImportError:
                        print("  ⚠️ discord.py not installed. Run: pip install discord.py")
                    return

            # Get new token
            print("\n  Enter your Discord bot token (from Developer Portal > Bot > Token):")
            token = input("  Token: ").strip()

            if token:
                # Save token
                self._save_api_key("DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN", token)
                print("  ✅ Discord token saved!")

                # Test import
                try:
                    import discord
                    print(f"  ✅ discord.py v{discord.__version__} installed")
                except ImportError:
                    print("\n  ⚠️ discord.py not installed.")
                    install = input("  Install now? [Y/n]: ").strip().lower()
                    if install != 'n':
                        import subprocess
                        print("  Installing discord.py...")
                        subprocess.run(["pip", "install", "discord.py"], capture_output=True)
                        print("  ✅ discord.py installed!")

                print("\n  ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
                print("  ║  🎉 Discord setup complete!                                       ║")
                print("  ╠═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
                print("  ║  Run /discord to start the bot                                   ║")
                print("  ║  Or add --discord flag when starting Aurora                      ║")
                print("  ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")

                self.state.discord_configured = True
                self._save_state()
            else:
                print("  ⏭️ No token provided. Use /discord later.")

        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            print("\n\n  Discord setup cancelled.")

    def run_book_maker_story(self) -> None:
        """
        Generate a character backstory using Book Maker System.

        # BEGIN META: OnboardingSystem.run_book_maker_story
        # Date: 2026-01-15
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Create personalized character backstory with Book Maker
        # SRS: ["SRS-ONBOARD-001", "SRS-BOOKMAKER-001"]
        # Tags: ["onboarding", "bookmaker", "story", "character"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META
        """
        arch = ARCHETYPE_DEFINITIONS.get(self.state.archetype, ARCHETYPE_DEFINITIONS["scholar"])
        path = PERSONA_PATH_DEFINITIONS.get(self.state.persona_path, PERSONA_PATH_DEFINITIONS["client"])
        focuses = [SKILL_FOCUS_AREAS[f].name for f in self.state.skill_focuses if f in SKILL_FOCUS_AREAS]

        print("\n")
        print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("║                           📚 BOOK MAKER: YOUR ORIGIN STORY 📚                                ║")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("║  The Book Maker System will craft a unique origin story for your journey.                    ║")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("║  Based on your selections:                                                                   ║")
        print(f"║    • Archetype: {arch.icon} {arch.name:<66}          ║")
        print(f"║    • Path: {path.icon} {path.name:<71}          ║")
        print(f"║    • Focuses: {', '.join(focuses) if focuses else 'General':<69}          ║")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("║  Your story will:                                                                            ║")
        print("║    📖 Give Aurora context about your character                                               ║")
        print("║    🎭 Influence how Aurora interacts with you                                                ║")
        print("║    🏆 Unlock unique achievement paths                                                        ║")
        print("║    📜 Be saved as part of your permanent profile                                             ║")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
        print("")

        try:
            choice = input("  Generate your origin story? [Y/n]: ").strip().lower()

            if choice == 'n':
                print("\n  ⏭️ Skipping story generation. Aurora will use default introduction.")
                return

            # Generate backstory based on selections
            print("\n  📖 Crafting your story...")
            print("  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐")

            # Create archetype-specific story elements
            story_elements = {
                "engineer": {
                    "origin": "the forges of innovation",
                    "trait": "analytical mind and creative solutions",
                    "quest": "building systems that shape the digital realm"
                },
                "mage": {
                    "origin": "the arcane libraries of knowledge",
                    "trait": "mastery of complex patterns and algorithms",
                    "quest": "uncovering the deepest secrets of data and AI"
                },
                "paladin": {
                    "origin": "the citadel's guardian halls",
                    "trait": "unwavering commitment to security and ethics",
                    "quest": "protecting the realm from digital threats"
                },
                "rogue": {
                    "origin": "the hidden paths of optimization",
                    "trait": "cunning efficiency and unconventional methods",
                    "quest": "finding shortcuts through complexity"
                },
                "cleric": {
                    "origin": "the sanctuaries of collaboration",
                    "trait": "ability to unite teams and heal conflicts",
                    "quest": "bringing harmony to chaotic projects"
                },
                "scholar": {
                    "origin": "the great halls of learning",
                    "trait": "insatiable curiosity and systematic research",
                    "quest": "documenting and sharing knowledge with all"
                }
            }

            arch_id = self.state.archetype if self.state.archetype else "scholar"
            elements = story_elements.get(arch_id, story_elements["scholar"])

            # Build the story
            backstory = f"""In the vast digital realm of the Citadel, a new {arch.name} emerges from {elements['origin']}.

Known for their {elements['trait']}, they embark on a journey of {elements['quest']}.

As a {path.name}, they bring unique perspective to the Brotherhood, specializing in {', '.join(focuses) if focuses else 'diverse disciplines'}.

Their motto guides them: "{arch.motto}"

With Aurora as their companion, they begin their ascent through the ranks, ready to unlock the mysteries of the Nexus and leave their mark upon the digital tapestry.

Starting Bonus: +{arch.starting_xp_bonus} XP
Special Ability: {arch.special_ability}"""

            # Display the story with typewriter effect simulation
            for line in backstory.split('\n'):
                print(f"  │  {line:<66}│")

            print("  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘")

            # Save backstory
            self.state.character_backstory = backstory
            self.state.book_maker_configured = True
            self._save_state()

            # Store in memory if agent is available
            if self.agent and hasattr(self.agent, 'cognitive_domain'):
                try:
                    memory = MemoryObject(
                        agent_id=self.agent.agent_id,
                        input_text="Character origin story",
                        output_text=backstory,
                        memory_type=MemoryType.KNOWLEDGE,
                        embedding=self.agent.embedding_service.embed_text(backstory),
                        trust_score=1.0,
                        domain="character"
                    )
                    self.agent.cognitive_domain.ingest_memory(memory)
                    print("\n  ✅ Origin story saved to Aurora's long-term memory!")
                except Exception:
                    pass

            print("\n  Your legend begins... 🌟")

        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            print("\n\n  Story generation cancelled.")

    def run_communication_services(self) -> None:
        """
        Set up Notion, Slack, and Supabase connections.

        # BEGIN META: OnboardingSystem.run_communication_services
        # Date: 2026-01-15
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Configure Notion, Slack, and Supabase integrations
        # SRS: ["SRS-ONBOARD-001", "SRS-INTEGRATE-001"]
        # Tags: ["onboarding", "notion", "slack", "supabase", "integrations"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META
        """
        print("\n")
        print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("║                      🔗 COMMUNICATION & DATA SERVICES 🔗                                     ║")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("║  ┌──────────────────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────────┐   ║")
        print("║  │      📝 NOTION           │  │      💬 SLACK            │  │      🗄️ SUPABASE         │   ║")
        print("║  ├──────────────────────────┤  ├──────────────────────────┤  ├──────────────────────────┤   ║")
        print("║  │ • Sync knowledge bases   │  │ • Team notifications     │  │ • Cloud data storage     │   ║")
        print("║  │ • Document awareness     │  │ • Channel updates        │  │ • Real-time sync         │   ║")
        print("║  │ • Wiki integration       │  │ • XP announcements       │  │ • Cross-device memory    │   ║")
        print("║  │ • Project pages          │  │ • Mission alerts         │  │ • Brotherhood leaderboard│   ║")
        print("║  └──────────────────────────┘  └──────────────────────────┘  └──────────────────────────┘   ║")
        print("║                                                                                              ║")
        print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
        print("")

        configured_count = 0

        try:
            # Notion Setup
            print("\n  📝 NOTION INTEGRATION")
            print("  " + "─" * 60)
            notion_key = os.environ.get("NOTION_API_KEY", "")
            if notion_key:
                print(f"  ✅ Notion already configured ({notion_key[:8]}...)")
                configured_count += 1
            else:
                choice = input("  Set up Notion? [y/N]: ").strip().lower()
                if choice == 'y':
                    print("  Get your integration token at: https://www.notion.so/my-integrations")
                    token = input("  Notion Integration Token: ").strip()
                    if token:
                        self._save_api_key("NOTION_API_KEY", token)
                        print("  ✅ Notion configured!")
                        configured_count += 1

            # Slack Setup
            print("\n  💬 SLACK INTEGRATION")
            print("  " + "─" * 60)
            slack_token = os.environ.get("SLACK_BOT_TOKEN", "")
            if slack_token:
                print(f"  ✅ Slack already configured ({slack_token[:8]}...)")
                configured_count += 1
            else:
                choice = input("  Set up Slack? [y/N]: ").strip().lower()
                if choice == 'y':
                    print("  Create a Slack app at: https://api.slack.com/apps")
                    print("  Required scopes: chat:write, channels:read")
                    token = input("  Slack Bot Token (xoxb-...): ").strip()
                    if token:
                        self._save_api_key("SLACK_BOT_TOKEN", token)
                        # Also ask for channel
                        channel = input("  Default channel (e.g., #aurora-notifications): ").strip()
                        if channel:
                            self._save_api_key("SLACK_DEFAULT_CHANNEL", channel)
                        print("  ✅ Slack configured!")
                        configured_count += 1

            # Supabase Setup
            print("\n  🗄️ SUPABASE INTEGRATION")
            print("  " + "─" * 60)
            supa_url = os.environ.get("SUPABASE_URL", "")
            supa_key = os.environ.get("SUPABASE_KEY", "")
            if supa_url and supa_key:
                print(f"  ✅ Supabase already configured ({supa_url[:30]}...)")
                configured_count += 1
            else:
                choice = input("  Set up Supabase? [y/N]: ").strip().lower()
                if choice == 'y':
                    print("  Get your credentials at: https://app.supabase.io/project/_/settings/api")
                    url = input("  Supabase URL: ").strip()
                    key = input("  Supabase Anon Key: ").strip()
                    if url and key:
                        self._save_api_key("SUPABASE_URL", url)
                        self._save_api_key("SUPABASE_KEY", key)
                        print("  ✅ Supabase configured!")
                        configured_count += 1

            # Summary
            print("\n")
            print("  ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
            print(f"  ║  Communication Services: {configured_count}/3 configured                      ║")
            print("  ╠═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
            print("  ║  You can configure more services anytime with /settings          ║")
            print("  ║  or /integrations to check status                                ║")
            print("  ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")

            self.state.communication_services_configured = True
            self._save_state()

        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            print("\n\n  Communication services setup cancelled.")
            self.state.communication_services_configured = True
            self._save_state()

    def complete_onboarding(self) -> None:
        """Mark onboarding as complete."""
        self.state.completed = True
        self.state.onboarded_at = datetime.now().isoformat()
        self._save_state()

        # Get archetype for display
        arch = ARCHETYPE_DEFINITIONS.get(self.state.archetype, ARCHETYPE_DEFINITIONS["scholar"])

        print("\n")
        print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
        print("║               🎉 ONBOARDING COMPLETE!                                ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  You're all set to start using Aurora!                              ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  Remember:                                                           ║")
        print("║    • Type naturally to chat                                         ║")
        print("║    • Use /help for command list                                     ║")
        print("║    • Use /settings to change preferences                            ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  Enjoy your journey with Aurora! 🌟                                 ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
        print("")

    def run_full_onboarding(self) -> bool:
        """
        Run the complete onboarding flow with archetype, skill focus, persona selection,
        Discord integration, Book Maker storytelling, and communication services.

        # BEGIN META: OnboardingSystem.run_full_onboarding
        # Date: 2026-01-15
        # Maintainer: CNWB
        # Purpose: Execute full onboarding sequence with character creation and integrations
        # SRS: ["SRS-ONBOARD-001", "SRS-GAMIFY-001", "SRS-DISCORD-001", "SRS-BOOKMAKER-001"]
        # Tags: ["onboarding", "full", "flow", "character", "discord", "bookmaker"]
        # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
        # END META

        Returns:
            True if onboarding completed, False if skipped/cancelled
        """
        try:
            # Enhanced welcome screen with full-width display
            print("\n")
            print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
            print("║                                                                                              ║")
            print("║                            🏰 WELCOME TO THE CITADEL 🏰                                       ║")
            print("║                                                                                              ║")
            print("║                      First time using Aurora? Let's begin your journey!                      ║")
            print("║                                                                                              ║")
            print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
            print("║                                                                                              ║")
            print("║  The onboarding wizard will guide you through 6 phases:                                      ║")
            print("║                                                                                              ║")
            print("║  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ ║")
            print("║  │  PHASE 1: CHARACTER CREATION                                                            │ ║")
            print("║  │    • Choose your Archetype (Engineer, Mage, Paladin, Rogue, Cleric, Scholar)            │ ║")
            print("║  │    • Select your Skill Focuses (up to 3 specializations)                                │ ║")
            print("║  │    • Pick your Path (Client, Developer, Partner)                                        │ ║")
            print("║  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ ║")
            print("║  │  PHASE 2: YOUR ORIGIN STORY (Book Maker)                                                │ ║")
            print("║  │    • Generate a unique backstory based on your selections                               │ ║")
            print("║  │    • Saved to Aurora's memory for personalized interactions                             │ ║")
            print("║  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ ║")
            print("║  │  PHASE 3: INTEGRATION SETUP                                                             │ ║")
            print("║  │    • Configure AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic)                                         │ ║")
            print("║  │    • Set up Discord bot for cross-platform chat                                         │ ║")
            print("║  │    • Connect Notion, Slack, Supabase                                                    │ ║")
            print("║  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ ║")
            print("║  │  PHASE 4: PERSONALIZATION                                                               │ ║")
            print("║  │    • Response length and personality settings                                           │ ║")
            print("║  │    • Feature toggles (XP tracking, memory, web search)                                  │ ║")
            print("║  ├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤ ║")
            print("║  │  PHASE 5: QUICK START GUIDE                                                             │ ║")
            print("║  │    • Essential commands and features                                                    │ ║")
            print("║  │    • How to earn XP and progress                                                        │ ║")
            print("║  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ ║")
            print("║                                                                                              ║")
            print("║  ⏱️ Estimated time: 5-10 minutes (skip options available at each step)                       ║")
            print("║                                                                                              ║")
            print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")

            choice = input("\n  Begin your journey? [Y/n/skip]: ").strip().lower()

            if choice == 'skip':
                self.state.skipped = True
                self._save_state()
                print("\n  Onboarding skipped. Use /onboard anytime to start.")
                return False

            if choice == 'n':
                print("\n  No problem! Type 'help' anytime for assistance.")
                return False

            # Step 1: Welcome & Capabilities
            self.run_welcome()
            input("\n  Press Enter to continue to Character Creation...")

            # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
            # PHASE 1: CHARACTER CREATION
            # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
            print("\n")
            print("═" * 96)
            print("  PHASE 1 OF 5: CHARACTER CREATION                                      [Progress: ████░░░░░░ 20%]")
            print("═" * 96)
            self.run_archetype_selection()
            input("\n  Press Enter to continue...")

            self.run_skill_focus_selection()
            input("\n  Press Enter to continue...")

            self.run_persona_path_selection()
            input("\n  Press Enter to continue to Your Origin Story...")

            # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
            # PHASE 2: BOOK MAKER - YOUR ORIGIN STORY
            # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
            print("\n")
            print("═" * 96)
            print("  PHASE 2 OF 5: YOUR ORIGIN STORY                                       [Progress: ████████░░ 40%]")
            print("═" * 96)
            self.run_book_maker_story()
            input("\n  Press Enter to continue to Integration Setup...")

            # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

            # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
            print("\n")
            print("═" * 96)
            print("  PHASE 3 OF 5: INTEGRATION SETUP                                       [Progress: ██████████░ 60%]")
            print("═" * 96)
            self.run_api_key_setup()
            input("\n  Press Enter to continue to Discord Setup...")

            # Discord Bot Setup
            self.run_discord_setup()
            input("\n  Press Enter to continue to Communication Services...")

            # Communication Services (Notion, Slack, Supabase)
            self.run_communication_services()
            input("\n  Press Enter to continue to Personalization...")

            # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
            # PHASE 4: PERSONALIZATION
            # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
            print("\n")

            print("  PHASE 4 OF 5: PERSONALIZATION                                         [Progress: ████████████░ 80%]")
            print("═" * 96)

            input("\n  Press Enter to continue to Quick Start Guide...")

            # ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
