            print("\n")
            print("═" * 96)
            print("  PHASE 5 OF 5: QUICK START GUIDE                                       [Progress: ██████████████ 100%]")
            print("═" * 96)
            self.run_quick_tutorial()

            # Complete
            self.complete_onboarding()

            # Show character summary
            self._show_character_summary()

            return True

        except KeyboardInterrupt:
            print("\n\n  Onboarding interrupted. You can restart with /onboard")
            self._save_state()
            return False

    def _show_character_summary(self) -> None:
        """Display final character summary after onboarding."""
        arch = ARCHETYPE_DEFINITIONS.get(self.state.archetype, ARCHETYPE_DEFINITIONS["scholar"])
        path = PERSONA_PATH_DEFINITIONS.get(self.state.persona_path, PERSONA_PATH_DEFINITIONS["client"])

        print("\n")
        print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
        print("║                    📜 YOUR CHARACTER SUMMARY 📜                      ║")
        print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print(f"║  Archetype:   {arch.icon} {arch.name:<48}  ║")
        print(f"║  Motto:       \"{arch.motto}\"")
        print(f"║  Path:        {path.icon} {path.name:<48}  ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  Skill Focuses:                                                      ║")
        for focus_id in self.state.skill_focuses[:3]:
            if focus_id in SKILL_FOCUS_AREAS:
                focus = SKILL_FOCUS_AREAS[focus_id]
                print(f"║    {focus.icon} {focus.name:<56}  ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("║  Special Ability:                                                    ║")
        ability_line = arch.special_ability[:56]
        print(f"║    {ability_line:<58}  ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print(f"║  Starting XP Bonus: +{arch.starting_xp_bonus} XP                                         ║")
        print("║                                                                      ║")
        print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")
        print("")
        print("  Your journey begins now. May your path be filled with knowledge!")
        print("")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SECTION 112.4: SETTINGS COMMAND HANDLER
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def show_settings_menu(onboarding: OnboardingSystem) -> None:
    """
    Display and modify settings interactively.

    # BEGIN META: show_settings_menu
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Interactive settings menu for /settings command
    # SRS: ["SRS-SETTINGS-001"]
    # Tags: ["settings", "menu", "interactive"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """
    settings = onboarding.settings

    print("\n")
    print("╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗")
    print("║                    ⚙️ AURORA SETTINGS                                ║")
    print("╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣")
    print("║                                                                      ║")
    print("║  RESPONSE & PERSONALITY                                              ║")
    print(f"║    [1] Response Length:    {settings.response_length:<15}                   ║")
    print(f"║    [2] Personality Mode:   {settings.personality_mode:<15}                   ║")
    print("║                                                                      ║")
    print("║  FEATURES                                                            ║")
    print(f"║    [3] XP Tracking:        {'✅ ON' if settings.enable_xp_tracking else '⬚ OFF':<10}                         ║")
    print(f"║    [4] Memory System:      {'✅ ON' if settings.enable_memory_system else '⬚ OFF':<10}                         ║")
    print(f"║    [5] Web Search:         {'✅ ON' if settings.enable_web_search else '⬚ OFF':<10}                         ║")
    print(f"║    [6] Professor Network:  {'✅ ON' if settings.enable_professor_network else '⬚ OFF':<10}                         ║")
    print(f"║    [7] Analytics:          {'✅ ON' if settings.enable_analytics else '⬚ OFF':<10}                         ║")
    print("║                                                                      ║")
    print("║  DISPLAY                                                             ║")
    print(f"║    [8] Show Tips:          {'✅ ON' if settings.show_tips else '⬚ OFF':<10}                         ║")
    print(f"║    [9] Compact Mode:       {'✅ ON' if settings.compact_mode else '⬚ OFF':<10}                         ║")
    print("║                                                                      ║")
    print("║  API KEYS                                                            ║")
    print("║    [K] Configure API Keys                                            ║")
    print("║                                                                      ║")
    print("║  [Q] Save and Exit                                                   ║")
    print("╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝")

    try:
        choice = input("\n  Select option to change: ").strip().upper()

        if choice == '1':
            print("\n  Response Length: [1] Concise [2] Balanced [3] Detailed [4] Elongated [5] Maximum")
            rc = input("  Select: ").strip()
            resp_map = {'1': 'concise', '2': 'balanced', '3': 'detailed', '4': 'elongated', '5': 'maximum'}
            if rc in resp_map:
                settings.response_length = resp_map[rc]
                print(f"  → Set to: {settings.response_length}")

        elif choice == '2':
            print("\n  Personality: [1] Helpful [2] Playful [3] Professional [4] Mentor")
            pc = input("  Select: ").strip()
            pers_map = {'1': 'helpful', '2': 'playful', '3': 'professional', '4': 'mentor'}
            if pc in pers_map:
                settings.personality_mode = pers_map[pc]
                print(f"  → Set to: {settings.personality_mode}")

        elif choice == '3':
            settings.enable_xp_tracking = not settings.enable_xp_tracking
            print(f"  → XP Tracking: {'Enabled' if settings.enable_xp_tracking else 'Disabled'}")

        elif choice == '4':
            settings.enable_memory_system = not settings.enable_memory_system
            print(f"  → Memory System: {'Enabled' if settings.enable_memory_system else 'Disabled'}")

        elif choice == '5':
            settings.enable_web_search = not settings.enable_web_search
            print(f"  → Web Search: {'Enabled' if settings.enable_web_search else 'Disabled'}")

        elif choice == '6':
            settings.enable_professor_network = not settings.enable_professor_network
            print(f"  → Professor Network: {'Enabled' if settings.enable_professor_network else 'Disabled'}")

        elif choice == '7':
            settings.enable_analytics = not settings.enable_analytics
            print(f"  → Analytics: {'Enabled' if settings.enable_analytics else 'Disabled'}")

        elif choice == '8':
            settings.show_tips = not settings.show_tips
            print(f"  → Show Tips: {'Enabled' if settings.show_tips else 'Disabled'}")

        elif choice == '9':
            settings.compact_mode = not settings.compact_mode
            print(f"  → Compact Mode: {'Enabled' if settings.compact_mode else 'Disabled'}")

        elif choice == 'K':
            onboarding.run_api_key_setup()

        elif choice == 'Q':
            onboarding._save_state()
            print("\n  ✅ Settings saved!")
            return

        # Save after each change
        onboarding._save_state()

        # Show menu again unless quit
        if choice != 'Q':
            show_settings_menu(onboarding)

    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        onboarding._save_state()
        print("\n\n  Settings saved!")


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# END SECTION 112: INTERACTIVE ONBOARDING SYSTEM
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# SECTION 113: DISCORD BOT INTEGRATION + MEMORY SHARDING + SELF-LEARNING
# Pattern: KAIRO Nexus Discord Bot + College Vector Store Sharding
# Target: ~2,500 LOC | Cumulative: ~70,000+ LOC
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

"""
Section 113 implements:
1. Memory Sharding System - Domain-separated FAISS indexes with auto-categorization
2. Self-Learning Cycles - Background learning from conversation data
3. Discord Bot Integration - Full-featured bot with chat, reporting, and XP tracking

Architecture:
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    DISCORD + MEMORY SHARDING ARCHITECTURE                    │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                              │
│  ┌─────────────────┐    ┌─────────────────┐    ┌─────────────────────────┐ │
│  │  DiscordBot     │    │  MemorySharding │    │  SelfLearningEngine     │ │
│  │  - Chat         │───▶│  - Domain FAISS │◀───│  - Pattern extraction   │ │
│  │  - Reports      │    │  - Auto-route   │    │  - Knowledge consolidate│ │
│  │  - XP tracking  │    │  - Search       │    │  - Background cycles    │ │
│  └─────────────────┘    └─────────────────┘    └─────────────────────────┘ │
│                                                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
"""


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SECTION 113.1: MEMORY SHARDING SYSTEM
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class MemoryDomain(Enum):
    """
    Memory domains for sharded storage.

    # BEGIN META: MemoryDomain
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Define memory domains for sharded FAISS indexes
    # SRS: ["SRS-MEMORY-001", "SRS-SHARDING-001"]
    # Tags: ["memory", "domain", "sharding"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """
    GENERAL = "general"
    TECHNOLOGY = "technology"
    SCIENCE = "science"
    BUSINESS = "business"
    CREATIVE = "creative"
    PERSONAL = "personal"
    SECURITY = "security"
    CONVERSATION = "conversation"
    SKILLS = "skills"
    FACTS = "facts"


@dataclass
class ShardedMemory:
    """
    A memory entry with domain classification.

    # BEGIN META: ShardedMemory
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Purpose: Store memory with domain metadata
    # Tags: ["memory", "shard", "dataclass"]
    # END META
    """
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid4()))
    content: str = ""
    domain: str = "general"
    timestamp: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now().isoformat())
    embedding: Optional[List[float]] = None
    confidence: float = 0.0  # Classification confidence
    source: str = "interaction"  # Where it came from
    tags: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
    metadata: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)

    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "id": self.id,
            "content": self.content,
            "domain": self.domain,
            "timestamp": self.timestamp,
            "confidence": self.confidence,
            "source": self.source,
            "tags": self.tags,
            "metadata": self.metadata,
        }


@dataclass
class DomainShard:
    """
    A single domain shard with its FAISS index.

    # BEGIN META: DomainShard
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Purpose: Container for domain-specific FAISS index
    # Tags: ["shard", "faiss", "domain"]
    # END META
    """
    domain: str
    index_path: Path
    map_path: Path
    memory_count: int = 0
    last_updated: Optional[str] = None
    index: Any = None  # FAISS index
    id_map: Dict[str, Dict] = field(default_factory=dict)


class MemoryShardingSystem:
    """
    Domain-separated memory storage with automatic categorization.

    Features:
    - Separate FAISS index per domain
    - Auto-categorization using embeddings
    - Cross-domain search
    - Memory consolidation

    # BEGIN META: MemoryShardingSystem
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Shard memories into domain-specific FAISS indexes
    # SRS: ["SRS-MEMORY-001", "SRS-SHARDING-001", "SRS-LEARNING-001"]
    # Tags: ["memory", "sharding", "faiss", "categorization"]
    # Categories: ["Memory", "Storage"]
    # KnowledgeSectors: ["Data Management", "Vector Search"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """

    STORAGE_DIR = Path.home() / ".nexus_agent_data" / "memory_shards"
    EMBED_DIM = 1536

    # Domain keywords for classification
    DOMAIN_KEYWORDS = {
        "technology": ["code", "programming", "software", "api", "database", "server", "python",
                       "javascript", "function", "class", "algorithm", "debug", "git", "deploy"],
        "science": ["research", "experiment", "hypothesis", "data", "analysis", "physics",
                    "chemistry", "biology", "math", "equation", "formula", "theory"],
        "business": ["revenue", "profit", "strategy", "market", "customer", "sales", "growth",
                     "product", "startup", "investor", "roi", "kpi", "metrics"],
        "creative": ["design", "art", "music", "story", "write", "create", "imagine",
                     "visual", "color", "style", "aesthetic", "creative"],
        "personal": ["feel", "think", "prefer", "like", "want", "need", "my", "i am",
                     "personal", "emotion", "mood", "opinion"],
        "security": ["security", "password", "encrypt", "auth", "permission", "access",
                     "vulnerability", "attack", "protect", "firewall", "audit"],
        "conversation": ["hello", "hi", "thanks", "please", "help", "question", "answer",
                         "chat", "talk", "discuss"],
        "skills": ["learn", "skill", "ability", "improve", "practice", "master",
                   "technique", "method", "how to"],
        "facts": ["fact", "true", "false", "definition", "what is", "history",
                  "when", "where", "who", "encyclopedia"],
    }

    def __init__(self, embedding_service=None):
        """
        Initialize memory sharding system.

        Args:
            embedding_service: Optional embedding service for vector generation
        """
        self.embedding_service = embedding_service
        self.shards: Dict[str, DomainShard] = {}
        self.domain_embeddings: Dict[str, List[float]] = {}  # Pre-computed domain embeddings
        self._initialize_shards()
        self._load_domain_embeddings()

    def _initialize_shards(self) -> None:
        """Initialize shard directories and load existing indexes."""
        self.STORAGE_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

        for domain in MemoryDomain:
            domain_name = domain.value
            shard = DomainShard(
                domain=domain_name,
                index_path=self.STORAGE_DIR / f"{domain_name}.faiss",
                map_path=self.STORAGE_DIR / f"{domain_name}_map.json",
            )

            # Load existing index if available
            if shard.index_path.exists() and shard.map_path.exists():
                try:
                    import faiss
                    shard.index = faiss.read_index(str(shard.index_path))
                    with open(shard.map_path, "r") as f:
                        shard.id_map = json.load(f)
                    shard.memory_count = len(shard.id_map)
                    print(f"[MemoryShard] Loaded {domain_name}: {shard.memory_count} memories")
                except Exception as e:
                    print(f"[MemoryShard] Failed to load {domain_name}: {e}")
                    shard.index = None
                    shard.id_map = {}
            else:
                # Create new empty index
                try:
                    import faiss
                    shard.index = faiss.IndexFlatL2(self.EMBED_DIM)
                    shard.id_map = {}
                except ImportError:
                    shard.index = None
                    shard.id_map = {}

            self.shards[domain_name] = shard

    def _load_domain_embeddings(self) -> None:
        """Pre-compute domain embeddings for classification."""
        embeddings_path = self.STORAGE_DIR / "domain_embeddings.json"

        if embeddings_path.exists():
            try:
                with open(embeddings_path, "r") as f:
                    self.domain_embeddings = json.load(f)
                return
            except Exception:
                pass

        # Generate domain embeddings from keywords
        if self.embedding_service:
            for domain, keywords in self.DOMAIN_KEYWORDS.items():
                domain_text = f"{domain}: " + ", ".join(keywords)
                try:
                    embedding = self.embedding_service.generate_embedding(domain_text)
                    if embedding:
                        self.domain_embeddings[domain] = embedding
                except Exception:
                    pass

            # Save for future use
            if self.domain_embeddings:
                try:
                    with open(embeddings_path, "w") as f:
                        json.dump(self.domain_embeddings, f)
                except Exception:
                    pass

    def classify_domain(self, content: str) -> Tuple[str, float]:
        """
        Classify content into the most appropriate domain.

        # BEGIN META: MemoryShardingSystem.classify_domain
        # Purpose: Auto-categorize content into memory domains
        # SRS: ["SRS-SHARDING-001"]
        # Tags: ["classify", "domain", "categorize"]
        # END META

        Args:
            content: Text content to classify

        Returns:
            Tuple of (domain_name, confidence_score)
        """
        content_lower = content.lower()

        # Method 1: Keyword matching (fast)
        keyword_scores = {}
        for domain, keywords in self.DOMAIN_KEYWORDS.items():
            score = sum(1 for kw in keywords if kw in content_lower)
            if score > 0:
                keyword_scores[domain] = score

        # Method 2: Semantic similarity (if embeddings available)
        semantic_scores = {}
        if self.embedding_service and self.domain_embeddings:
            try:
                content_embedding = self.embedding_service.generate_embedding(content[:500])
                if content_embedding:
                    for domain, domain_emb in self.domain_embeddings.items():
                        similarity = self._cosine_similarity(content_embedding, domain_emb)
                        semantic_scores[domain] = similarity
            except Exception:
                pass

        # Combine scores
        combined_scores = {}
        all_domains = set(keyword_scores.keys()) | set(semantic_scores.keys())

        for domain in all_domains:
            kw_score = keyword_scores.get(domain, 0) / 5  # Normalize keyword score
            sem_score = semantic_scores.get(domain, 0)
            # Weight semantic higher if available
            if sem_score > 0:
                combined_scores[domain] = (kw_score * 0.3) + (sem_score * 0.7)
            else:
                combined_scores[domain] = kw_score

        if combined_scores:
            best_domain = max(combined_scores.items(), key=lambda x: x[1])
            return best_domain[0], min(best_domain[1], 1.0)

        return "general", 0.5  # Default

    def _cosine_similarity(self, vec1: List[float], vec2: List[float]) -> float:
        """Compute cosine similarity between two vectors."""
        if not vec1 or not vec2:
            return 0.0
        dot_product = sum(a * b for a, b in zip(vec1, vec2))
        magnitude1 = sum(a ** 2 for a in vec1) ** 0.5
        magnitude2 = sum(b ** 2 for b in vec2) ** 0.5
        if magnitude1 == 0 or magnitude2 == 0:
            return 0.0
        return dot_product / (magnitude1 * magnitude2)

    def store(self, content: str, domain: Optional[str] = None,
              source: str = "interaction", tags: List[str] = None,
              metadata: Dict = None) -> ShardedMemory:
        """
        Store a memory in the appropriate shard.

        # BEGIN META: MemoryShardingSystem.store
        # Purpose: Store memory with auto-domain classification
        # SRS: ["SRS-MEMORY-001", "SRS-SHARDING-001"]
        # Tags: ["store", "memory", "shard"]
        # END META

        Args:
            content: Memory content
            domain: Optional domain override (auto-classifies if None)
            source: Source of the memory
            tags: Optional tags
            metadata: Optional metadata

        Returns:
            ShardedMemory object
        """
        # Auto-classify if domain not specified
        if domain is None:
            domain, confidence = self.classify_domain(content)
        else:
            confidence = 1.0

        # Generate embedding
        embedding = None
        if self.embedding_service:
            try:
                embedding = self.embedding_service.generate_embedding(content[:500])
            except Exception:
                pass

        # Create memory object
        memory = ShardedMemory(
            content=content,
            domain=domain,
            embedding=embedding,
            confidence=confidence,
            source=source,
            tags=tags or [],
            metadata=metadata or {},
        )

        # Store in shard
        shard = self.shards.get(domain, self.shards.get("general"))
        if shard and shard.index is not None and embedding:
            try:
                import numpy as np
                vector = np.array([embedding], dtype=np.float32)
                shard.index.add(vector)
                shard.id_map[memory.id] = memory.to_dict()
                shard.memory_count += 1
                shard.last_updated = datetime.now().isoformat()
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[MemoryShard] Failed to index memory: {e}")

        return memory

    def search(self, query: str, domain: Optional[str] = None,
               top_k: int = 5, cross_domain: bool = False) -> List[ShardedMemory]:
        """
        Search for similar memories.

        # BEGIN META: MemoryShardingSystem.search
        # Purpose: Search memories within domain or across domains
        # SRS: ["SRS-MEMORY-001"]
        # Tags: ["search", "query", "similarity"]
        # END META

        Args:
            query: Search query
            domain: Specific domain to search (None = auto-detect)
            top_k: Number of results to return
            cross_domain: If True, search all domains

        Returns:
            List of ShardedMemory objects
        """
        # Get query embedding
        if not self.embedding_service:
            return []

        try:
            query_embedding = self.embedding_service.generate_embedding(query[:500])
            if not query_embedding:
                return []
        except Exception:
            return []

        results = []
        import numpy as np

        # Determine which shards to search
        if cross_domain:
            search_domains = list(self.shards.keys())
        elif domain:
            search_domains = [domain]
        else:
            detected_domain, _ = self.classify_domain(query)
            search_domains = [detected_domain, "general"]

        # Search each shard
        for domain_name in search_domains:
            shard = self.shards.get(domain_name)
            if not shard or shard.index is None or shard.memory_count == 0:
                continue

            try:
                query_vector = np.array([query_embedding], dtype=np.float32)
                k = min(top_k, shard.memory_count)
                distances, indices = shard.index.search(query_vector, k)

                # Map indices back to memories
                id_list = list(shard.id_map.keys())
                for i, idx in enumerate(indices[0]):
                    if idx < len(id_list):
                        memory_id = id_list[idx]
                        memory_dict = shard.id_map.get(memory_id)
                        if memory_dict:
                            memory = ShardedMemory(**{
                                k: v for k, v in memory_dict.items()
                                if k in ShardedMemory.__dataclass_fields__
                            })
                            memory.metadata["search_distance"] = float(distances[0][i])
                            results.append(memory)
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[MemoryShard] Search error in {domain_name}: {e}")

        # Sort by distance and limit
        results.sort(key=lambda x: x.metadata.get("search_distance", float("inf")))
        return results[:top_k]

    def get_domain_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Dict]:
        """Get statistics for all domains."""
        stats = {}
        for domain_name, shard in self.shards.items():
            stats[domain_name] = {
                "memory_count": shard.memory_count,
                "last_updated": shard.last_updated,
                "index_exists": shard.index is not None,
            }
        return stats

    def save_all(self) -> None:
        """Save all shard indexes to disk."""
        for domain_name, shard in self.shards.items():
            if shard.index is not None and shard.memory_count > 0:
                try:
                    import faiss
                    faiss.write_index(shard.index, str(shard.index_path))
                    with open(shard.map_path, "w") as f:
                        json.dump(shard.id_map, f)
                    print(f"[MemoryShard] Saved {domain_name}: {shard.memory_count} memories")
                except Exception as e:
                    print(f"[MemoryShard] Failed to save {domain_name}: {e}")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SECTION 113.2: SELF-LEARNING SYSTEM
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@dataclass
class LearningPattern:
    """
    A learned pattern extracted from conversations.

    # BEGIN META: LearningPattern
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Purpose: Store extracted learning patterns
    # Tags: ["learning", "pattern", "dataclass"]
    # END META
    """
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid4()))
    pattern_type: str = ""  # "preference", "fact", "skill", "behavior"
    content: str = ""
    domain: str = "general"
    confidence: float = 0.0
    occurrences: int = 1
    first_seen: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now().isoformat())
    last_seen: str = field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.now().isoformat())
    source_ids: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)  # Memory IDs that contributed


@dataclass
class LearningCycleResult:
    """Result of a learning cycle."""
    cycle_id: str
    started_at: str
    completed_at: str
    memories_processed: int
    patterns_extracted: int
    patterns_reinforced: int
    knowledge_consolidated: int
    domains_updated: List[str]


class SelfLearningEngine:
    """
    Self-learning engine that extracts patterns from conversations.

    Features:
    - Pattern extraction from memories
    - Knowledge consolidation
    - Preference learning
    - Background learning cycles

    # BEGIN META: SelfLearningEngine
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Extract and consolidate learning from conversation data
    # SRS: ["SRS-LEARNING-001", "SRS-MEMORY-001"]
    # Tags: ["learning", "patterns", "self-improvement"]
    # Categories: ["Learning", "AI"]
    # KnowledgeSectors: ["Machine Learning", "Knowledge Management"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """

    STORAGE_DIR = Path.home() / ".nexus_agent_data" / "learning"
    PATTERNS_FILE = "patterns.jsonl"
    CYCLE_LOG_FILE = "cycle_log.jsonl"

    # Pattern extraction rules
    PATTERN_EXTRACTORS = {
        "preference": [
            r"i (?:like|prefer|love|enjoy|want|need) (.+)",
            r"my (?:favorite|preferred) (?:is|are) (.+)",
            r"i (?:don't|do not|hate|dislike) (.+)",
        ],
        "fact": [
            r"(?:the|a) (.+) (?:is|are|was|were) (.+)",
            r"(.+) (?:means|refers to|is defined as) (.+)",
        ],
        "skill": [
            r"(?:how to|how do i|how can i) (.+)",
            r"(?:learn|improve|master) (.+)",
        ],
        "behavior": [
            r"(?:always|usually|often|sometimes|never) (.+)",
            r"(?:when|if) (.+) (?:then|i) (.+)",
        ],
    }

    def __init__(self, memory_system: MemoryShardingSystem = None,
                 embedding_service=None):
        """
        Initialize self-learning engine.

        Args:
            memory_system: MemoryShardingSystem instance
            embedding_service: Embedding service for similarity
        """
        self.memory_system = memory_system
        self.embedding_service = embedding_service
        self.patterns: Dict[str, LearningPattern] = {}
        self.cycle_count = 0
        self._load_patterns()

    def _load_patterns(self) -> None:
        """Load existing patterns from disk."""
        patterns_path = self.STORAGE_DIR / self.PATTERNS_FILE
        if patterns_path.exists():
            try:
                with open(patterns_path, "r") as f:
                    for line in f:
                        data = json.loads(line.strip())
                        pattern = LearningPattern(**data)
                        self.patterns[pattern.id] = pattern
                print(f"[SelfLearning] Loaded {len(self.patterns)} patterns")
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[SelfLearning] Failed to load patterns: {e}")

    def _save_patterns(self) -> None:
        """Save patterns to disk."""
        self.STORAGE_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        patterns_path = self.STORAGE_DIR / self.PATTERNS_FILE
        try:
            with open(patterns_path, "w") as f:
                for pattern in self.patterns.values():
                    f.write(json.dumps({
                        "id": pattern.id,
                        "pattern_type": pattern.pattern_type,
                        "content": pattern.content,
                        "domain": pattern.domain,
                        "confidence": pattern.confidence,
                        "occurrences": pattern.occurrences,
                        "first_seen": pattern.first_seen,
                        "last_seen": pattern.last_seen,
                        "source_ids": pattern.source_ids,
                    }) + "\n")
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[SelfLearning] Failed to save patterns: {e}")

    def extract_patterns_from_text(self, text: str, source_id: str = None) -> List[LearningPattern]:
        """
        Extract learning patterns from text.

        # BEGIN META: SelfLearningEngine.extract_patterns_from_text
        # Purpose: Extract patterns from conversation text
        # SRS: ["SRS-LEARNING-001"]
        # Tags: ["extract", "patterns", "text"]
        # END META
        """
        extracted = []
        text_lower = text.lower()

        for pattern_type, regex_list in self.PATTERN_EXTRACTORS.items():
            for regex in regex_list:
                try:
                    matches = re.findall(regex, text_lower, re.IGNORECASE)
                    for match in matches:
                        content = match if isinstance(match, str) else " ".join(match)
                        content = content.strip()[:200]  # Limit length

                        if len(content) > 5:  # Minimum content length
                            # Check if pattern already exists (by content similarity)
                            existing = self._find_similar_pattern(content, pattern_type)

                            if existing:
                                # Reinforce existing pattern
                                existing.occurrences += 1
                                existing.last_seen = datetime.now().isoformat()
                                existing.confidence = min(1.0, existing.confidence + 0.1)
                                if source_id and source_id not in existing.source_ids:
                                    existing.source_ids.append(source_id)
                            else:
                                # Create new pattern
                                domain = "general"
                                if self.memory_system:
                                    domain, _ = self.memory_system.classify_domain(content)

                                pattern = LearningPattern(
                                    pattern_type=pattern_type,
                                    content=content,
                                    domain=domain,
                                    confidence=0.3,
                                    source_ids=[source_id] if source_id else [],
                                )
                                self.patterns[pattern.id] = pattern
                                extracted.append(pattern)

                except Exception:
                    continue

        return extracted

    def _find_similar_pattern(self, content: str, pattern_type: str) -> Optional[LearningPattern]:
        """Find existing pattern with similar content."""
        content_lower = content.lower()
        for pattern in self.patterns.values():
            if pattern.pattern_type == pattern_type:
                # Simple similarity check
                if content_lower in pattern.content.lower() or \
                   pattern.content.lower() in content_lower:
                    return pattern
        return None

    def run_learning_cycle(self, memories: List[ShardedMemory] = None) -> LearningCycleResult:
        """
        Run a full learning cycle.

        # BEGIN META: SelfLearningEngine.run_learning_cycle
        # Purpose: Execute learning cycle on memory data
        # SRS: ["SRS-LEARNING-001"]
        # Tags: ["learning", "cycle", "consolidate"]
        # END META
        """
        cycle_id = f"cycle_{self.cycle_count}"
        started_at = datetime.now().isoformat()

        patterns_extracted = 0
        patterns_reinforced = 0
        knowledge_consolidated = 0
        domains_updated = set()

        # Process provided memories or fetch from shards
        if memories is None and self.memory_system:
            memories = []
            for domain, shard in self.memory_system.shards.items():
                for memory_id, memory_dict in shard.id_map.items():
                    memories.append(ShardedMemory(**{
                        k: v for k, v in memory_dict.items()
                        if k in ShardedMemory.__dataclass_fields__
                    }))

        # Extract patterns from each memory
        for memory in (memories or []):
            extracted = self.extract_patterns_from_text(memory.content, memory.id)
            patterns_extracted += len(extracted)
            domains_updated.add(memory.domain)

        # Consolidate knowledge - merge similar patterns
        knowledge_consolidated = self._consolidate_patterns()

        # Count reinforced patterns
        patterns_reinforced = sum(1 for p in self.patterns.values() if p.occurrences > 1)

        # Save results
        self._save_patterns()

        self.cycle_count += 1

        result = LearningCycleResult(
            cycle_id=cycle_id,
            started_at=started_at,
            completed_at=datetime.now().isoformat(),
            memories_processed=len(memories or []),
            patterns_extracted=patterns_extracted,
            patterns_reinforced=patterns_reinforced,
            knowledge_consolidated=knowledge_consolidated,
            domains_updated=list(domains_updated),
        )

        # Log cycle
        self._log_cycle(result)

        return result

    def _consolidate_patterns(self) -> int:
        """Consolidate similar patterns to reduce redundancy."""
        consolidated = 0
        # Group by type and domain
        groups: Dict[Tuple[str, str], List[LearningPattern]] = {}

        for pattern in list(self.patterns.values()):
            key = (pattern.pattern_type, pattern.domain)
            if key not in groups:
                groups[key] = []
            groups[key].append(pattern)

        # Within each group, merge very similar patterns
        for key, patterns in groups.items():
            if len(patterns) > 1:
                patterns.sort(key=lambda p: p.occurrences, reverse=True)
                primary = patterns[0]

                for secondary in patterns[1:]:
                    # Check if should merge (simple similarity)
                    if self._should_merge_patterns(primary, secondary):
                        primary.occurrences += secondary.occurrences
                        primary.confidence = max(primary.confidence, secondary.confidence)
                        primary.source_ids.extend(secondary.source_ids)
                        del self.patterns[secondary.id]
                        consolidated += 1

        return consolidated

    def _should_merge_patterns(self, p1: LearningPattern, p2: LearningPattern) -> bool:
        """Check if two patterns should be merged."""
        # Simple check: one contains the other
        c1 = p1.content.lower()
        c2 = p2.content.lower()
        return c1 in c2 or c2 in c1

    def _log_cycle(self, result: LearningCycleResult) -> None:
        """Log learning cycle result."""
        self.STORAGE_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
        log_path = self.STORAGE_DIR / self.CYCLE_LOG_FILE
        try:
            with open(log_path, "a") as f:
                f.write(json.dumps({
                    "cycle_id": result.cycle_id,
                    "started_at": result.started_at,
                    "completed_at": result.completed_at,
                    "memories_processed": result.memories_processed,
                    "patterns_extracted": result.patterns_extracted,
                    "patterns_reinforced": result.patterns_reinforced,
                    "knowledge_consolidated": result.knowledge_consolidated,
                    "domains_updated": result.domains_updated,
                }) + "\n")
        except Exception:
            pass

    def get_patterns_by_type(self, pattern_type: str) -> List[LearningPattern]:
        """Get all patterns of a specific type."""
        return [p for p in self.patterns.values() if p.pattern_type == pattern_type]

    def get_patterns_by_domain(self, domain: str) -> List[LearningPattern]:
        """Get all patterns for a specific domain."""
        return [p for p in self.patterns.values() if p.domain == domain]

    def get_learning_summary(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get summary of learning state."""
        pattern_types = {}
        domains = {}

        for pattern in self.patterns.values():
            pattern_types[pattern.pattern_type] = pattern_types.get(pattern.pattern_type, 0) + 1
            domains[pattern.domain] = domains.get(pattern.domain, 0) + 1

        return {
            "total_patterns": len(self.patterns),
            "pattern_types": pattern_types,
            "domains": domains,
            "learning_cycles": self.cycle_count,
            "high_confidence_patterns": sum(1 for p in self.patterns.values() if p.confidence > 0.7),
        }


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SECTION 113.3: DISCORD BOT INTEGRATION
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class DiscordBotConfig:
    """Configuration for Discord bot."""
    TOKEN_ENV_VAR = "DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN"
    DEFAULT_PREFIX = "!"
    DEFAULT_STATUS = "Citadel Nexus | /help"


@dataclass
class DiscordMessage:
    """A Discord message for tracking."""
    id: str
    channel_id: str
    author_id: str
    author_name: str
    content: str
    timestamp: str
    guild_id: Optional[str] = None
    is_bot: bool = False


@dataclass
class DiscordReportConfig:
    """Configuration for Discord reporting."""
    channel_id: str
    report_types: List[str]  # "xp", "achievements", "learning", "status"
    enabled: bool = True
    cooldown_seconds: int = 60


class AuroraDiscordBot:
    """
    Discord bot integration for Aurora agent.

    Features:
    - Chat in any channel
    - XP/TP tracking per user
    - Achievement broadcasting
    - Learning cycle reports
    - Memory-aware conversations

    # BEGIN META: AuroraDiscordBot
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Discord bot integration with chat, reporting, and XP tracking
    # SRS: ["SRS-DISCORD-001", "SRS-INTEGRATION-001"]
    # Tags: ["discord", "bot", "integration", "chat"]
    # Categories: ["Integration", "Communication"]
    # KnowledgeSectors: ["Discord API", "Bot Development"]
    # Guild: "CNWB"
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META
    """

    def __init__(
        self,
        agent: "NexusTamagotchiAgentPro",
        memory_system: MemoryShardingSystem = None,
        learning_engine: SelfLearningEngine = None,
    ):
        """
        Initialize Discord bot.

        Args:
            agent: NexusTamagotchiAgentPro instance
            memory_system: Optional MemoryShardingSystem
            learning_engine: Optional SelfLearningEngine
        """
        self.agent = agent
        self.memory_system = memory_system
        self.learning_engine = learning_engine
        self.bot = None
        self.running = False
        self.report_channels: Dict[str, DiscordReportConfig] = {}
        self.user_xp: Dict[str, int] = {}  # Discord user ID → XP
        self.message_history: List[DiscordMessage] = []
        self.last_report_time: Dict[str, float] = {}

        # Voice state
        self.voice_client = None  # Current voice client
        self._tts_cache_dir = Path.home() / ".nexus_agent_data" / "tts_cache"
        self._tts_cache_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

        # Load saved state
        self._load_state()

    def _load_state(self) -> None:
        """Load bot state from disk."""
        state_path = Path.home() / ".nexus_agent_data" / "discord_bot_state.json"
        if state_path.exists():
            try:
                with open(state_path, "r") as f:
                    data = json.load(f)
                    self.user_xp = data.get("user_xp", {})
                    self.report_channels = {
                        k: DiscordReportConfig(**v)
                        for k, v in data.get("report_channels", {}).items()
                    }
            except Exception:
                pass

    def _save_state(self) -> None:
        """Save bot state to disk."""
        state_path = Path.home() / ".nexus_agent_data" / "discord_bot_state.json"
        try:
            state_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
            with open(state_path, "w") as f:
                json.dump({
                    "user_xp": self.user_xp,
                    "report_channels": {
                        k: {
                            "channel_id": v.channel_id,
                            "report_types": v.report_types,
                            "enabled": v.enabled,
                            "cooldown_seconds": v.cooldown_seconds,
                        }
                        for k, v in self.report_channels.items()
                    },
                }, f)
        except Exception:
            pass

    def create_bot(self):
        """
        Create the Discord bot instance with all handlers.

        # BEGIN META: AuroraDiscordBot.create_bot
        # Purpose: Initialize Discord.py bot with commands and events
        # SRS: ["SRS-DISCORD-001"]
        # Tags: ["discord", "bot", "create"]
        # END META
        """
        try:
            import discord
            from discord.ext import commands, tasks
            from discord import app_commands
        except ImportError:
            print("[DiscordBot] discord.py not installed. Run: pip install discord.py")
            return None

        # Create bot with intents
        intents = discord.Intents.default()
        intents.message_content = True
        intents.members = True

        bot = commands.Bot(
            command_prefix=DiscordBotConfig.DEFAULT_PREFIX,
            intents=intents,
            description="Aurora - Citadel Nexus AI Companion",
        )

        # Store reference
        self.bot = bot

        # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        # EVENT HANDLERS
        # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

        @bot.event
        async def on_ready():
            print(f"[DiscordBot] Logged in as {bot.user.name} (ID: {bot.user.id})")
            print(f"[DiscordBot] Connected to {len(bot.guilds)} guild(s)")

            # Set status
            await bot.change_presence(
                activity=discord.Activity(
                    type=discord.ActivityType.watching,
                    name=DiscordBotConfig.DEFAULT_STATUS
                )
            )

            # Sync slash commands
            try:
                synced = await bot.tree.sync()
                print(f"[DiscordBot] Synced {len(synced)} slash command(s)")
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[DiscordBot] Failed to sync commands: {e}")

            # Start background tasks
            if not learning_cycle_task.is_running():
                learning_cycle_task.start()

        @bot.event
        async def on_message(message: discord.Message):
            # Ignore bot messages
            if message.author.bot:
                return

            # Track message
            self._track_message(message)

            # Check if bot is mentioned or in DM
            is_mentioned = bot.user in message.mentions
            is_dm = isinstance(message.channel, discord.DMChannel)

            if is_mentioned or is_dm:
                # Remove mention from content
                content = message.content.replace(f"<@{bot.user.id}>", "").strip()
                content = content.replace(f"<@!{bot.user.id}>", "").strip()

                if content:
                    await self._handle_chat(message, content)

            # Process commands
            await bot.process_commands(message)

        # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        # SLASH COMMANDS
        # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

        @bot.tree.command(name="chat", description="Chat with Aurora")
        @app_commands.describe(message="Your message to Aurora")
        async def chat_command(interaction: discord.Interaction, message: str):
            await interaction.response.defer(thinking=True)
            response = await self._generate_response(message, interaction.user)
            await interaction.followup.send(response[:2000])

        @bot.tree.command(name="status", description="Show Aurora's status")
        async def status_command(interaction: discord.Interaction):
            embed = self._create_status_embed()
            await interaction.response.send_message(embed=embed)

        @bot.tree.command(name="xp", description="Check your XP and rank")
        async def xp_command(interaction: discord.Interaction):
            user_id = str(interaction.user.id)
            xp = self.user_xp.get(user_id, 0)
            rank = self._calculate_rank(xp)

            embed = discord.Embed(
                title=f"⚔️ {interaction.user.display_name}'s Progress",
                color=discord.Color.gold()
            )
            embed.add_field(name="XP", value=f"{xp:,}", inline=True)
            embed.add_field(name="Rank", value=rank, inline=True)
            embed.add_field(name="Next Rank", value=self._xp_to_next_rank(xp), inline=True)

            await interaction.response.send_message(embed=embed)

        @bot.tree.command(name="learn", description="Trigger a learning cycle")
        async def learn_command(interaction: discord.Interaction):
            await interaction.response.defer(thinking=True)

            if self.learning_engine:
                result = self.learning_engine.run_learning_cycle()
                embed = discord.Embed(
                    title="🧠 Learning Cycle Complete",
                    color=discord.Color.purple()
                )
                embed.add_field(name="Memories Processed", value=result.memories_processed)
                embed.add_field(name="Patterns Extracted", value=result.patterns_extracted)
                embed.add_field(name="Knowledge Consolidated", value=result.knowledge_consolidated)
                await interaction.followup.send(embed=embed)
            else:
                await interaction.followup.send("Learning engine not initialized.")

        @bot.tree.command(name="memory", description="Search Aurora's memories")
        @app_commands.describe(query="What to search for")
        async def memory_command(interaction: discord.Interaction, query: str):
            await interaction.response.defer(thinking=True)

            if self.memory_system:
                results = self.memory_system.search(query, top_k=3, cross_domain=True)
                if results:
                    embed = discord.Embed(
                        title=f"🔍 Memory Search: {query[:50]}",
                        color=discord.Color.blue()
                    )
                    for i, mem in enumerate(results, 1):
                        embed.add_field(
                            name=f"[{mem.domain}] Memory {i}",
                            value=mem.content[:200] + "..." if len(mem.content) > 200 else mem.content,
                            inline=False
                        )
                    await interaction.followup.send(embed=embed)
                else:
                    await interaction.followup.send("No matching memories found.")
            else:
                await interaction.followup.send("Memory system not initialized.")

        @bot.tree.command(name="domains", description="Show memory domain statistics")
        async def domains_command(interaction: discord.Interaction):
            if self.memory_system:
                stats = self.memory_system.get_domain_stats()
                embed = discord.Embed(
                    title="📊 Memory Domain Statistics",
                    color=discord.Color.teal()
                )
                for domain, data in stats.items():
                    if data["memory_count"] > 0:
                        embed.add_field(
                            name=f"{domain.title()}",
                            value=f"{data['memory_count']} memories",
                            inline=True
                        )
                await interaction.response.send_message(embed=embed)
            else:
                await interaction.response.send_message("Memory system not initialized.")

        @bot.tree.command(name="setreport", description="Set this channel for Aurora reports")
        @app_commands.describe(report_types="Types: xp, achievements, learning, status (comma-separated)")
        async def setreport_command(interaction: discord.Interaction, report_types: str = "all"):
            if report_types.lower() == "all":
                types = ["xp", "achievements", "learning", "status"]
            else:
                types = [t.strip() for t in report_types.split(",")]

            self.report_channels[str(interaction.channel_id)] = DiscordReportConfig(
                channel_id=str(interaction.channel_id),
                report_types=types,
                enabled=True,
            )
            self._save_state()

            await interaction.response.send_message(
                f"✅ This channel will now receive reports for: {', '.join(types)}"
            )

        # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        # VOICE COMMANDS (using edge-tts - free Microsoft Edge TTS)
        # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

        @bot.tree.command(name="voice_join", description="Join your voice channel")
        async def voice_join_command(interaction: discord.Interaction):
            """Join the user's voice channel for TTS."""
            if not interaction.user.voice or not interaction.user.voice.channel:
                await interaction.response.send_message("❌ You must be in a voice channel!", ephemeral=True)
                return

            channel = interaction.user.voice.channel
            try:
                if self.voice_client and self.voice_client.is_connected():
                    await self.voice_client.move_to(channel)
                else:
                    self.voice_client = await channel.connect()
                await interaction.response.send_message(f"🎤 Joined **{channel.name}**!")
            except Exception as e:
                await interaction.response.send_message(f"❌ Failed to join: {str(e)[:100]}", ephemeral=True)

        @bot.tree.command(name="voice_leave", description="Leave voice channel")
        async def voice_leave_command(interaction: discord.Interaction):
            """Leave the current voice channel."""
            if self.voice_client and self.voice_client.is_connected():
                await self.voice_client.disconnect()
                self.voice_client = None
                await interaction.response.send_message("👋 Left voice channel!")
            else:
                await interaction.response.send_message("❌ Not in a voice channel.", ephemeral=True)

        @bot.tree.command(name="voice_say", description="Say something in voice channel (TTS)")
        @app_commands.describe(
            text="Text to speak",
            voice="Voice to use (default: en-US-AriaNeural)"
        )
        async def voice_say_command(
            interaction: discord.Interaction,
            text: str,
            voice: str = "en-US-AriaNeural"
        ):
            """Convert text to speech and play in voice channel using edge-tts."""
            if not self.voice_client or not self.voice_client.is_connected():
                await interaction.response.send_message(
                    "❌ Not in a voice channel. Use `/voice_join` first!",
                    ephemeral=True
                )
                return

            await interaction.response.defer(thinking=True)

            try:
                # Generate TTS using edge-tts (free Microsoft Edge TTS)
                audio_path = await self._generate_tts(text, voice)

                if audio_path and audio_path.exists():
                    # Play the audio
                    source = discord.FFmpegPCMAudio(str(audio_path))
                    self.voice_client.play(
                        source,
                        after=lambda e: print(f"[Voice] Playback finished: {e}") if e else None
                    )
                    await interaction.followup.send(f"🔊 Speaking: *{text[:100]}{'...' if len(text) > 100 else ''}*")

                    # Award XP for voice interaction
                    self._award_xp(str(interaction.user.id), 10)
                else:
                    await interaction.followup.send("❌ Failed to generate speech.")

            except Exception as e:
                await interaction.followup.send(f"❌ TTS error: {str(e)[:100]}")

        @bot.tree.command(name="voice_chat", description="Chat with Aurora via voice")
        @app_commands.describe(message="Your message (Aurora will respond in voice)")
        async def voice_chat_command(interaction: discord.Interaction, message: str):
            """Chat with Aurora and hear the response via voice."""
            if not self.voice_client or not self.voice_client.is_connected():
                await interaction.response.send_message(
                    "❌ Not in a voice channel. Use `/voice_join` first!",
                    ephemeral=True
                )
                return

            await interaction.response.defer(thinking=True)

            try:
                # Get agent response
                response = await self._generate_response(message, interaction.user)

                # Truncate for TTS (keep it reasonable)
                tts_text = response[:500] if len(response) > 500 else response

                # Generate and play TTS
                audio_path = await self._generate_tts(tts_text)
                if audio_path and audio_path.exists():
                    source = discord.FFmpegPCMAudio(str(audio_path))
                    self.voice_client.play(source)

                # Send text response too
                await interaction.followup.send(f"**You:** {message}\n\n**Aurora:** {response[:1900]}")

                # Award XP
                self._award_xp(str(interaction.user.id), 15)

            except Exception as e:
                await interaction.followup.send(f"❌ Error: {str(e)[:100]}")

        @bot.tree.command(name="voice_status", description="Show voice channel status")
        async def voice_status_command(interaction: discord.Interaction):
            """Show current voice connection status."""
            embed = discord.Embed(
                title="🎤 Voice Status",
                color=discord.Color.purple()
            )

            if self.voice_client and self.voice_client.is_connected():
                channel = self.voice_client.channel
                embed.add_field(name="Status", value="🟢 Connected", inline=True)
                embed.add_field(name="Channel", value=channel.name, inline=True)
                embed.add_field(name="Members", value=len(channel.members), inline=True)
                embed.add_field(
                    name="TTS Engine",
                    value="edge-tts (Microsoft)",
                    inline=False
                )
            else:
                embed.add_field(name="Status", value="🔴 Not connected", inline=True)
                embed.add_field(
                    name="Tip",
                    value="Use `/voice_join` to connect!",
                    inline=False
                )

            await interaction.response.send_message(embed=embed)

        # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
        # BACKGROUND TASKS
        # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

        @tasks.loop(minutes=30)
        async def learning_cycle_task():
            """Run periodic learning cycles."""
            if self.learning_engine and self.running:
                try:
                    result = self.learning_engine.run_learning_cycle()

                    # Report to channels
                    for channel_id, config in self.report_channels.items():
                        if "learning" in config.report_types and config.enabled:
                            try:
                                channel = bot.get_channel(int(channel_id))
                                if channel:
                                    embed = discord.Embed(
                                        title="🧠 Background Learning Complete",
                                        description=f"Processed {result.memories_processed} memories",
                                        color=discord.Color.purple()
                                    )
                                    embed.add_field(name="Patterns", value=result.patterns_extracted)
                                    embed.add_field(name="Consolidated", value=result.knowledge_consolidated)
                                    await channel.send(embed=embed)
                            except Exception:
                                pass
                except Exception as e:
                    print(f"[DiscordBot] Learning cycle error: {e}")

        return bot

    def _track_message(self, message) -> None:
        """Track a Discord message for learning."""
        try:
            dm = DiscordMessage(
                id=str(message.id),
                channel_id=str(message.channel.id),
                author_id=str(message.author.id),
                author_name=message.author.display_name,
                content=message.content,
                timestamp=message.created_at.isoformat(),
                guild_id=str(message.guild.id) if message.guild else None,
                is_bot=message.author.bot,
            )
            self.message_history.append(dm)

            # Store in memory system
            if self.memory_system and not message.author.bot:
                self.memory_system.store(
                    content=message.content,
                    source="discord",
                    tags=["discord", f"user:{message.author.display_name}"],
                    metadata={"channel_id": str(message.channel.id)},
                )

            # Limit history size
            if len(self.message_history) > 1000:
                self.message_history = self.message_history[-500:]

        except Exception:
            pass

    async def _handle_chat(self, message, content: str) -> None:
        """Handle a chat message."""
        try:
            import discord

            async with message.channel.typing():
                response = await self._generate_response(content, message.author)

                # Award XP
                self._award_xp(str(message.author.id), 5)

                # Send response
                if len(response) > 2000:
                    # Split into chunks
                    for i in range(0, len(response), 2000):
                        await message.reply(response[i:i+2000])
                else:
                    await message.reply(response)

        except Exception as e:
            await message.reply(f"Sorry, I encountered an error: {str(e)[:100]}")

    async def _generate_response(self, content: str, user) -> str:
        """Generate a response using the agent."""
        try:
            # Get context from memory if available
            context = ""
            if self.memory_system:
                memories = self.memory_system.search(content, top_k=2)
                if memories:
                    context = "\n".join([f"[Memory] {m.content[:100]}" for m in memories])

            # Build prompt with context
            prompt = content
            if context:
                prompt = f"Context:\n{context}\n\nUser: {content}"

            # Get response from agent
            response = self.agent.interact(prompt)

            # Store the interaction
            if self.memory_system:
                self.memory_system.store(
                    content=f"Q: {content}\nA: {response[:200]}",
                    source="discord_interaction",
                    tags=["interaction", f"user:{user.display_name}"],
                )

            return response

        except Exception as e:
            return f"I apologize, but I encountered an error processing your request."

    def _award_xp(self, user_id: str, amount: int) -> None:
        """Award XP to a Discord user."""
        self.user_xp[user_id] = self.user_xp.get(user_id, 0) + amount
        self._save_state()

    def _calculate_rank(self, xp: int) -> str:
        """Calculate rank from XP."""
        if xp >= 100000:
            return "Grandmaster"
        elif xp >= 50000:
            return "Master"
        elif xp >= 25000:
            return "Expert"
        elif xp >= 10000:
            return "Journeyman"
        elif xp >= 5000:
            return "Apprentice"
        elif xp >= 1000:
            return "Initiate"
        else:
            return "Novice"

    def _xp_to_next_rank(self, xp: int) -> str:
        """Calculate XP needed for next rank."""
        thresholds = [1000, 5000, 10000, 25000, 50000, 100000]
        for t in thresholds:
            if xp < t:
                return f"{t - xp:,} XP needed"
        return "Max rank!"

    def _create_status_embed(self):
        """Create a status embed."""
        try:
            import discord
        except ImportError:
            return None

        embed = discord.Embed(
            title="🏰 Aurora Status",
            description="Citadel Nexus AI Companion",
            color=discord.Color.purple()
        )

        # Agent stats
        if hasattr(self.agent, 'brotherhood') and self.agent.brotherhood:
            embed.add_field(
                name="Total XP",
                value=f"{self.agent.brotherhood.total_xp:,}",
                inline=True
            )
            embed.add_field(
                name="Rank",
                value=self.agent.brotherhood.rank,
                inline=True
            )

        # Memory stats
        if self.memory_system:
            stats = self.memory_system.get_domain_stats()
            total_memories = sum(s["memory_count"] for s in stats.values())
            embed.add_field(
                name="Memories",
                value=f"{total_memories:,}",
                inline=True
            )

        # Learning stats
        if self.learning_engine:
            summary = self.learning_engine.get_learning_summary()
            embed.add_field(
                name="Patterns Learned",
                value=summary["total_patterns"],
                inline=True
            )

        embed.add_field(
            name="Discord Users",
            value=len(self.user_xp),
            inline=True
        )

        embed.set_footer(text="Use /help to see available commands")

        return embed

    async def broadcast_achievement(self, title: str, description: str, color=None):
        """
        Broadcast an achievement to report channels.

        # BEGIN META: AuroraDiscordBot.broadcast_achievement
        # Purpose: Send achievement notification to Discord
        # SRS: ["SRS-DISCORD-001"]
        # Tags: ["broadcast", "achievement", "discord"]
        # END META
        """
        if not self.bot or not self.running:
            return

        try:
            import discord
            embed = discord.Embed(
                title=f"🏆 {title}",
                description=description,
                color=color or discord.Color.gold()
            )

            for channel_id, config in self.report_channels.items():
                if "achievements" in config.report_types and config.enabled:
                    try:
                        channel = self.bot.get_channel(int(channel_id))
                        if channel:
                            await channel.send(embed=embed)
                    except Exception:
                        pass
        except Exception:
            pass

    async def broadcast_xp_milestone(self, user_name: str, xp: int, rank: str):
        """Broadcast XP milestone."""
        await self.broadcast_achievement(
            f"{user_name} Ranked Up!",
            f"Reached **{rank}** with **{xp:,} XP**!"
        )

    async def _generate_tts(self, text: str, voice: str = "en-US-AriaNeural") -> Optional[Path]:
        """
        Generate TTS audio using edge-tts (free Microsoft Edge TTS).

        Args:
            text: Text to convert to speech
            voice: Voice to use (default: en-US-AriaNeural)

        Returns:
            Path to generated audio file, or None on error

        # BEGIN META: AuroraDiscordBot._generate_tts
        # Date: 2026-01-15
        # Purpose: Generate TTS audio using free edge-tts
        # SRS: ["SRS-VOICE-001", "SRS-DISCORD-001"]
        # Tags: ["tts", "voice", "edge-tts", "audio"]
        # END META

        Available voices (edge-tts):
        - en-US-AriaNeural (Female, warm)
        - en-US-GuyNeural (Male, friendly)
        - en-US-JennyNeural (Female, professional)
        - en-GB-SoniaNeural (British female)
        - en-AU-NatashaNeural (Australian female)
        """
        try:
            import edge_tts
        except ImportError:
            print("[Voice] edge-tts not installed. Run: pip install edge-tts")
            return None

        try:
            # Generate unique filename
            import hashlib
            text_hash = hashlib.md5(f"{text[:100]}{voice}".encode()).hexdigest()[:12]
            audio_path = self._tts_cache_dir / f"tts_{text_hash}.mp3"

            # Check cache
            if audio_path.exists():
                return audio_path

            # Generate audio with edge-tts
            communicate = edge_tts.Communicate(text, voice)
            await communicate.save(str(audio_path))

            print(f"[Voice] Generated TTS: {len(text)} chars, voice={voice}")
            return audio_path

        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[Voice] TTS generation error: {e}")
            return None

    def _cleanup_tts_cache(self, max_files: int = 50):
        """Clean up old TTS cache files."""
        try:
            files = sorted(self._tts_cache_dir.glob("tts_*.mp3"), key=lambda p: p.stat().st_mtime)
            if len(files) > max_files:
                for f in files[:-max_files]:
                    f.unlink()
        except Exception:
            pass

    def run(self, token: str = None):
        """
        Run the Discord bot.

        # BEGIN META: AuroraDiscordBot.run
        # Purpose: Start the Discord bot
        # SRS: ["SRS-DISCORD-001"]
        # Tags: ["run", "start", "bot"]
        # END META
        """
        if not token:
            token = os.environ.get(DiscordBotConfig.TOKEN_ENV_VAR)

        if not token:
            print("[DiscordBot] No token provided. Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN environment variable.")
            return

        if self.bot is None:
            self.create_bot()

        if self.bot is None:
            print("[DiscordBot] Failed to create bot.")
            return

        self.running = True
        print("[DiscordBot] Starting Aurora Discord Bot...")

        try:
            self.bot.run(token)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[DiscordBot] Error: {e}")
        finally:
            self.running = False
            self._save_state()


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SECTION 113.4: DISCORD LAUNCH HELPER
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def launch_discord_bot(
    agent: "NexusTamagotchiAgentPro",
    token: str = None,
    background: bool = False,
) -> Optional[AuroraDiscordBot]:
    """
    Launch the Discord bot for the agent.

    # BEGIN META: launch_discord_bot
    # Date: 2026-01-15
    # Maintainer: CNWB
    # Purpose: Helper function to launch Discord bot
    # SRS: ["SRS-DISCORD-001"]
    # Tags: ["launch", "discord", "bot"]
    # CAPS: CAPSTONE-A
    # END META

    Args:
        agent: NexusTamagotchiAgentPro instance
        token: Discord bot token (optional, uses env var if not provided)
        background: If True, run in background thread

    Returns:
        AuroraDiscordBot instance
    """
    # Initialize memory sharding system
    embedding_service = getattr(agent, 'embedding_service', None)
    memory_system = MemoryShardingSystem(embedding_service)

    # Initialize learning engine
    learning_engine = SelfLearningEngine(memory_system, embedding_service)

    # Create bot
    bot = AuroraDiscordBot(agent, memory_system, learning_engine)

    if background:
        import threading
        thread = threading.Thread(target=bot.run, args=(token,), daemon=True)
        thread.start()
        print("[DiscordBot] Started in background thread")
        return bot
    else:
        bot.run(token)
        return bot
